**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Friend,
I just found out that Crooked Joe's weaponized Department of InJustice obtained a search warrant to secretly gain access to my Twitter account and my private data.
The deranged and vengeful Biden-appointed prosecutor also DEMANDED that Twitter keep it a SECRET for 6 months.
And when Twitter at first did not comply by handing over my private data, they were FINED $350,000 - _by a judge appointed by Barack Obama._
This is the Deep State - a giant, interconnected network of corruption that abuses its power to crush dissent and attack its opposition.
As I've said before, when you begin to drain the swamp, you expose the monstrous entities that had been lurking at the bottom.
_**What else will we find out has been taking place behind closed doors to infringe upon my rights and interfere in the 2024 election?**_
In Crooked Joe's America, you no longer have constitutional _rights._
Our God-given rights to freedom of speech, privacy, and proper due process have been ripped to shreds.
These are dark days for our country, but I promise you this: I am not deterred in the slightest.
_**The more I hear these horror stories of how viciously these Deep State thugs have been violating my rights, the more committed I become to saving our country. **_
_Because this simply cannot go on. We cannot let the freest and greatest Republic in history fall to the dark forces of tyranny._

clean_body: | | | Friend, I just found out that Crooked Joe's weaponized Department of InJustice obtained a search warrant to secretly gain access to my Twitter account and my private data. The deranged and vengeful Biden-appointed prosecutor also DEMANDED that Twitter keep it a SECRET for 6 months. And when Twitter at first did not comply by handing over my private data, they were FINED $350,000 - by a judge appointed by Barack Obama. This is the Deep State - a giant, interconnected network of corruption that abuses its power to crush dissent and attack its opposition. As I've said before, when you begin to drain the swamp, you expose the monstrous entities that had been lurking at the bottom. What else will we find out has been taking place behind closed doors to infringe upon my rights and interfere in the 2024 election? In Crooked Joe's America, you no longer have constitutional rights. Our God-given rights to freedom of speech, privacy, and proper due process have been ripped to shreds. These are dark days for our country, but I promise you this: I am not deterred in the slightest. The more I hear these horror stories of how viciously these Deep State thugs have been violating my rights, the more committed I become to saving our country. Because this simply cannot go on. We cannot let the freest and greatest Republic in history fall to the dark forces of tyranny. If you're doing poorly due to the very sinister people in charge of America right now, then ignore what I'm about to ask you. | Thank you, | Donald J. name: Cecile Richards
subject: I'll be blunt with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Anti-choice extremists are attacking abortion access like never before.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67904844/421258871/-220169546?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230810-Z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3ZmU5ZTAwLWRjMzctZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MFaaiorLA43ENa3VoHSP6GHQskpzAP8ofNC7cf8G8S4=)
---
Peter: During my time as president of Planned Parenthood, I watched Republicans attempt to pass horrific laws to control women's bodies.

But now, with _Roe v. Wade_ no longer the law of the land, I need to be blunt with you: **Anti-choice extremists are attacking abortion access _like never before._**

In states across this country, Republicans are doing everything in their power to restrict reproductive freedom – and Mitch McConnell and his allies have threatened to pass a national abortion ban if they take back Senate control.

Political analysts say that the future of the Senate could all come down to Nevada – just like it did last year – which is why I’m reaching out today: **My friend, Sen. Jacky Rosen, is running for reelection. I’m working hard to help her win this fight, and I’m asking you to join me.**

The GOP knows the importance of Nevada, so they’re zeroing in on Jacky as a top target for defeat. She’s facing an uphill climb and won’t be able to defend her seat without grassroots support from people like you. **So please, Peter, I’m personally asking:[_Will you chip in $10 – split between Jacky’s campaign and Fight for Progress or more now – to keep Nevada blue, defend the Senate, and restore reproductive freedom nationwide?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67904846/421258872/-220169546?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230810-Z-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3ZmU5ZTAwLWRjMzctZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MFaaiorLA43ENa3VoHSP6GHQskpzAP8ofNC7cf8G8S4=)**

Last year, the GOP flooded Nevada’s Senate race with a staggering $55 million – and their handpicked candidate came within _less than 8,000 votes_ of winning. That’s a SLIM margin. There’s no question that Jacky’s race will be just as close – and likely even more expensive.

**That’s why she urgently needs grassroots resources as early in the election cycle as possible. So please, Peter, can I count on you to join me in supporting Jacky today?**

[_**Donate $10 now – or however much you can spare – to keep both Nevada and the Senate blue. This race couldn’t be more pivotal in the fight to protect reproductive freedom in America.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67904856/421258878/-220169546?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230810-Z-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3ZmU5ZTAwLWRjMzctZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MFaaiorLA43ENa3VoHSP6GHQskpzAP8ofNC7cf8G8S4=)

clean_body: Anti-choice extremists are attacking abortion access like never before. | = Peter: During my time as president of Planned Parenthood, I watched Republicans attempt to pass horrific laws to control women's bodies. But now, with Roe v. Wade no longer the law of the land, I need to be blunt with you: Anti-choice extremists are attacking abortion access like never before. In states across this country, Republicans are doing everything in their power to restrict reproductive freedom – and Mitch McConnell and his allies have threatened to pass a national abortion ban if they take back Senate control. Political analysts say that the future of the Senate could all come down to Nevada – just like it did last year – which is why I’m reaching out today: My friend, Sen. Jacky Rosen, is running for reelection. I’m working hard to help her win this fight, and I’m asking you to join me. The GOP knows the importance of Nevada, so they’re zeroing in on Jacky as a top target for defeat. She’s facing an uphill climb and won’t be able to defend her seat without grassroots support from people like you. So please, Peter, I’m personally asking:= | | | = | = | = | = | = Last year, the GOP flooded Nevada’s Senate race with a staggering $55 million – and their handpicked candidate came within less than 8,000 votes of winning. That’s a SLIM margin. There’s no question that Jacky’s race will be just as close – and likely even more expensive. That’s why she urgently needs grassroots resources as early in the election cycle as possible. So please, Peter, can I count on you to join me in supporting Jacky today? = Thank you, Cecile Richards * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. Fight for Progress PAC PO Box 15320 Washington, DC 20003 United States | | ---|--- = = Emails are crucial for communicating with top members of the Fight for Progress PAC team. name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: WOW! It Is Now Official... | From The Desk Of Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
body:
Today It Is Official! The last three years have been more than interesting... In the midst of all the craziness, we have seen tremendous growth at S
| | |
---
## Today It Is Official!
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.322.1.9d24b05a040ba7cd384aef54872bf03c)
---
The last three years have been more than interesting...
In the midst of all the craziness, we have seen **tremendous growth** at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.323.1.d49cfdadef0d506b1b86bf3faf6a2d88). We have currently maxed out our facility in Tulsa with two services every Sunday.
Last year, we were blessed to acquire 14 acres in South Tulsa but that did not solve our immediate need.
I am excited to share with you that [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.324.1.984095539ea625d64fe3b6f599909321) closed on the purchase of the historic **Caravan Nightclub** in Tulsa, OK.
Features of the new facility:
**-Auditorium will seat 700+**
**-Separate Kids & Youth Wing**
**-Over 400 parking spaces**
We are aiming to have our FIRST service there on Sunday, September 3 at 10am.
In order to do this we are needing to raise $130,000 to complete Phase 1 of the buildout to make the space functional.
I would like for you to pray and consider partnering with us to see this **incredible story of a former tavern becoming a tabernacle in Tulsa**.
You can watch this short video to see what the Caravan Nightclub looks like right now:[https://youtu.be/aq9FDBtTcvA](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.325.1.a7ab54fcae2880cfa173ed304e61ca3d)
You can partner with [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.326.1.9864b6993b82f730215545541997e2c5) by visiting: [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.327.1.ed8f82214af172672e695716e2df50bf)
I am very grateful for your support!
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.328.1.b393a5d4322849238048cd673291dcb9), GAB, [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.329.1.2f725da79172552d6301214057608bb6), [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.330.1.774f655a58feeaa5b32116cb8a1fd18c), [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.331.1.80d18782f337e8578570cda78ec541f5), [Telegram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.332.1.6e7ad87e6504edbdf1a79794dc48045a), GETTR & [YouTube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.333.1.33e51ef9e044054899d44b491dccc5c7)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.334.1.712cc7a2a46d5ac19ef764ea787ab6e9)
| | [ Help Turn A Club To A Church In Tulsa ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.335.1.238d33062a8407c43e2407aa2c19f617)
---
---
## Have Dinner w/Lara Trump In Tulsa
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.336.1.adfebae5c63cffbff42e6c7859988212)
---
I am excited to announce that **Lara Trump** is joining me at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.337.1.b91cdef7413bdb92971c7ac7d1b24be8) in Tulsa, OK for [IGNITE 2023](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.338.1.f43a7b58bccb70e66deab54e5be1d66c)!
[IGNITE](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.339.1.c8ea5adefc185b4192da03cdcd5d28b7) is an annual conference at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.340.1.db3af4a6eae186ddfc9a9a5c4170d78b) with _powerful worship_ , _dynamic speakers_ and a _community of believers on fire for God_.
**Dates** : September 10-13
**Speakers** :
-Lara Trump
-Dr. Randy Caldwell
-Bishop Darrell Hines
-David Ring
**Location** : [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.341.1.960325ef6e5767fe3d03bbe612547b68) Tulsa
**Cost** : FREE
**Seating** : LIMITED
**RSVP** : [www.sheridan.church/ignite23](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.342.1.f15f32a5646b3f98e77e94e0aba43fa0)
After the service at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.343.1.57657e534b8cb803ecf6fad4f9037163) on Sunday, September 10, Lara Trump will be joining [Pastors For Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.344.1.89972c6e9ebf1112bf6d8ace141ff4dc) for a dinner event that you are invited to.
Get your ticket to have dinner with Lara Trump & Pastors For Trump here: [https://app.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/961453#](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.345.1.120d9e33b01f1bd0cbbe79a58e052ece)
| | [ Dinner w/Lara Trump ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=730979.346.1.9d26c88a236b64254431a7f1179c6b7a)

name: Team Cori
subject: Toxic waste from Manhattan Project still harms our communities.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
The toxic legacy of the atomic bomb in the United States still threatens children today. | |
---
Peter, Crowds have gathered to watch the movie “Oppenheimer” about a Manhattan Project leader who designed atomic bombs during the Second World War. But the film fails to mention the impact that bomb production had on communities around the United States. Government mismanagement led to radioactive contamination that has made generations of families sick, including in St. Louis, which was a center for uranium processing during the Manhattan Project. **In Cori Bush’s district, Coldwater Creek was a dumping ground for radioactive waste, increasing the risk of cancer for generations of people playing in the Creek.** That toxic waste still endangers the community: A recent report found unsafe levels of radioactive waste in and around an elementary school that sits on the Creek. **So Cori introduced the _Justice for Jana Elementary Act_ to require clean-up and testing for radioactive contamination.** The bill would also create a fund for schools impacted by Manhattan Project waste to request financial assistance for radioactive testing or the construction of new schools. [**Please sign now if you agree: No one should have to live with hazardous radiation in our community, let alone elementary school children. Support Rep. Cori Bush’s _Justice for Jana Elementary Act_ of 2023.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QJ9rz8ORrS9NRZl_xwNnuCrIRETH_9X-0SZ-RjrO1A1enDsibyWMCkX5gVySgK78M5Oc0rUd3W8DaJP3qiU21JfdEXAXOaob7pYToCw79v5CtAFpkPWd0XHjUArkUk2irIs89zPZEKoaIZ5y1CB97snYLusrZe5nFtdnyA0i83UpD2e4SPM4SNWnq1jwSx82a3Vk85rd3v-bEOXalQ1Vbi1hPNP_aBFb7hnvAO1jMjpjox63CVyIaff6yX1oStUdQ998O0V2xGF79eH--h0l_LUo2Ph-9_0yr15J2LjGYg2D-ICQlrLSeebikic_QVlwm8-ZVI8urbPrCrpbc-tX7G7xZUEzVECz--cOjusp2vLG6uQNEC6jjuWe6G__LWHLetVeTUlNilpwPip8BppXndQ/3yn/FlbvP7hwQmKp4gdOAs4j2Q/h0/rfqAQXIqGXjQ2GxaN4DTHaMmYrlf140A6MksyD7E0bo) **[SIGN ON NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QJ9rz8ORrS9NRZl_xwNnuCrIRETH_9X-0SZ-RjrO1A1enDsibyWMCkX5gVySgK78M5Oc0rUd3W8DaJP3qiU21JcLmDiwa__VTg_aTrI9W1tlrKETVEIo4bzxgsGjJbq43ibLYFh0xJ_D0XgtivsQQetmqIDHy69xdAEtYXZkaVoZa5VT7vp5qzJP_uquasXNEo09EB9z3ONKNGfSw7AOpVkLMdRgbSbxpD8hYJWvM4pib8BArsp2Ag4E_Ptz5PnDDwuhiVMMGGDfB9VSOWzVmbIsP2lZRHFU0zzVKjDkJjlfqBBOwwuLHJ-MOdWhn5WOnokkZpZP3QNF7_KRwlr5Cv54XM2etxSRNPR4EI01f48qo7KZvh0YbJMnfmMB7Gw3u72X_MQv2zGZ16ROXEs4YFA/3yn/FlbvP7hwQmKp4gdOAs4j2Q/h1/xTVJehKg58oVyz9y56hQe0mkDKc2_tfbIXxZZToc1wU) ** For generations, children have been exposed to hazardous waste while learning. After a recent report found dangerous chemicals in Jana Elementary School’s cafeteria and playground, leaders closed the school until it can be cleaned up. Its students -- 80% of whom are Black -- have been transferred to other schools until the school can get cleaned up. Cori’s advocacy has secured a federal environmental review of Coldwater Creek, which is especially urgent now that communities living near the Creek experience more frequent flooding due to climate change. When Cori used to live near the Creek, her basement would regularly flood with potentially radioactive water. **This is a severe public health threat, and an emergency that requires an urgent response. Our government created this waste and has a responsibility to clean it up.** [**Please sign to support Rep. Cori Bush’s _Justice for Jana Elementary Act_ to require clean-up and testing for radioactive contamination around St. Louis schools, and to create a fund for schools impacted by Manhattan Project waste to request financial assistance for radioactive testing or the construction of new schools.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QJ9rz8ORrS9NRZl_xwNnuCrIRETH_9X-0SZ-RjrO1A1enDsibyWMCkX5gVySgK78M5Oc0rUd3W8DaJP3qiU21JcSUjzlx-kjvLDkeTPXAnC2uUFjCJryIkrZuV2vBaFWvbjvhHHxwyXE3NeUSXskvofxlBt2c5SM5E2Ap88mt8rOCyGWv7NkFlxjTEsdd3BdYhID2VApCQjVyLrnjGuWqeuid9A5YdunQV1H3-ippEgH9xG5UL6HKXwPIh66XxQzfDD4wqfrIr_IF6Ir7Yp9QRAxxSAmrcNDiVzXClLJkY-FPujGDyoTjj_4k486HJBQN6032UrZPUEb7DUnjq6rh8u3zMwOkFd7KytVOM6cgVHqqo7SbjvZKEvtxgtrFN2IHR7rayd_jkeY4P_byq5cJhA/3yn/FlbvP7hwQmKp4gdOAs4j2Q/h2/EDB9BW3B2zVCvx0RNj6j4lFj6hDpOGYlL9HvVdEzzwc) Thank you. Cori won't stop fighting until our communities are safe and thriving. clean_body: The toxic legacy of the atomic bomb in the United States still threatens children today. | | Peter, Crowds have gathered to watch the movie “Oppenheimer” about a Manhattan Project leader who designed atomic bombs during the Second World War. But the film fails to mention the impact that bomb production had on communities around the United States. Government mismanagement led to radioactive contamination that has made generations of families sick, including in St. Louis, which was a center for uranium processing during the Manhattan Project. In Cori Bush’s district, Coldwater Creek was a dumping ground for radioactive waste, increasing the risk of cancer for generations of people playing in the Creek. That toxic waste still endangers the community: A recent report found unsafe levels of radioactive waste in and around an elementary school that sits on the Creek. So Cori introduced the Justice for Jana Elementary Act to require clean-up and testing for radioactive contamination. The bill would also create a fund for schools impacted by Manhattan Project waste to request financial assistance for radioactive testing or the construction of new schools. For generations, children have been exposed to hazardous waste while learning. After a recent report found dangerous chemicals in Jana Elementary School’s cafeteria and playground, leaders closed the school until it can be cleaned up. Its students -- 80% of whom are Black -- have been transferred to other schools until the school can get cleaned up. Cori’s advocacy has secured a federal environmental review of Coldwater Creek, which is especially urgent now that communities living near the Creek experience more frequent flooding due to climate change. When Cori used to live near the Creek, her basement would regularly flood with potentially radioactive water. This is a severe public health threat, and an emergency that requires an urgent response. Our government created this waste and has a responsibility to clean it up. Thank you. Cori won't stop fighting until our communities are safe and thriving. In solidarity, \- Team Cori Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress | | Sent via . **Meet Sheriff Lamb:** GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

body:
ONE day to save our Senate majority...
| **_MAGA Republicans like Rick Scott have unveiled their sinister plan to steal the Senate..._**

But before we give you the breakdown, we _have_ to ask: [Please, will you chip in $5 right now to defeat corrupt Republicans like Rick Scott so we can save our Senate majority in 2024?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51246?t=6&akid=9810%2E878179%2Et24RNM) | [CRITICAL DEADLINE INCOMING: RUSH $5 NOW TO HELP US RAISE $10,000 TO SAVE THE SENATE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51222?t=7&akid=9810%2E878179%2Et24RNM)
---
**Here’s THREE things MAGA Republicans do NOT want you to know:**
**ONE:** Rick Scott is one of the **RICHEST** Senators in the nation. __In 2018, he spent more than $60 million of his own dollars to win his race!__

**TWO:** corrupt Republicans want to _buy_ their way into the Senate so they're relying on their MAGA-mega donor army to flood races in _key_ swing states with donations.

**THREE:** _our team crunched the numbers and if we don’t raise $5,000 by MIDNIGHT tonight their plan is going to _succeed!__
**We only have ONE shot to reach this goal.
MAGA Republicans only need ONE seat to flip the Senate.
We only have ONE day to raise $10,000 to fend off MAGA extremists.**
[$10,000 LEFT TO RAISE: CHIP IN $5 NOW TO DEFEAT EXTREMISTS LIKE RICK SCOTT TO SAVE OUR SENATE MAJORITY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51222?t=8&akid=9810%2E878179%2Et24RNM)

body:
This is your last chance to advise the President on his decision.| | | Friend,

---
The first scheduled Republican primary debate is coming up very soon!

---
This is your last chance to advise the President on his decision on whether to attend the debate – or let all of the many, many other candidates duke it out on stage while he turns his attention to uniting the rest of our Party behind firing Crooked Joe.

---
_The President commissioned a poll to see what his supporters like YOU think he should do._

---
_**But we want the sample size to be as big as possible to ensure that the results perfectly reflect the will of primary voters from all across the country.**
_
---
As of the last time we checked the polling submissions, it looks like you haven’t taken the poll yet – so we wanted to follow up with you before it closes.

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: a few pressing matters to update you on:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us.

| |

---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20142%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sW8yNYZQcJZoWm8QBhs69Q&sysid=1 "Kellyanne Conway")
---

Hey there, it’s Kellyanne...

_**[This might just be the single most important email I’ve ever sent. I have a few pressing matters to update you on as soon as possible:](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20143%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T%2fgidDHH9h%2bsfmU5fIE6AQ&sysid=1 "I have three urgent
matters to discuss with you:")**_
** 1. ** Republicans have an **EXTREMELY** slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control ** 2. ** Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is **UNLOADING** $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power ** 3. ** The latest FEC reports have Democrats **OUTRAISING**
Republicans by _$12,000,000+_ since we took back the House in January
**When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... _[So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL August deadline?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20144%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m8v%2bVx%2f7W95ZCdMroY4Hzg&sysid=1 "So here it goes: our House
Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us.
Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim
House Majority before our FINAL August deadline?")_**
---
**[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20255%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OqTL%2facAm7YWU0a0CpJpRQ&sysid=1)[**YES**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20256%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VJaXgkP%2f4yrSz8Bn9h9Zhw&sysid=1) _[**NO**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20257%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fNy7j7Xut5RPT4kq3skkVg&sysid=1)**
---
Look, I don’t like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies.

Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC.

They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer’s radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. **That’s why this email is especially important.**

**_[Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20258%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LTyjBIq8a8%2fky9mD%2bPDunQ&sysid=1 "Here’s my plan: I set a
goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five
or ten dollars.")_ **

If everyone reading this gives that much, we’ll catch up just in time before our August deadline.

YOU are key to my goal. We’ve stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you?
---
**[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20255%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OqTL%2facAm7YWU0a0CpJpRQ&sysid=1)[**YES**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20256%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VJaXgkP%2f4yrSz8Bn9h9Zhw&sysid=1) _[**NO**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20257%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fNy7j7Xut5RPT4kq3skkVg&sysid=1)**
---
Thanks for all you do for freedom.

- Kellyanne Conway
---

---

name: Secure & Prosper
subject: The key to Lincoln's rhetorical success
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper._c2M9MDA0NzJOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWdlb21ldHJ5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX1NQTzQxOTA1In0/1F1PK8ZT9hWYnXNHgiX4FA)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly-plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **"Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.**** ****You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. Hey there, it's Kellyanne...

_**[This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent. I have a few pressing matters to update you on as soon as possible:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrmnm6alhihcnnai32b9290oeu784b46ft1od7og_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctgm1o32c3h2bs "I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:")**_

Republicans by _$12,000,000+_ since we took back the House in January

Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL August deadline?")_**

**[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5pto1e9nm700tem16ta2qguik94q2ph2vbkgi78_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctgm1o32c3h2bs)[**YES**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z95f8fahivt9q9i1r4vb7s0d8nv8qndse16tnfao_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctgm1o32c3h2bs) _[**NO**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj7lhesmjjcu2bptut7843gkeem6fotjbac3ksvg_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctgm1o32c3h2bs)**
---
Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies.

Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC.

They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. **That 's why this email is especially important.**

**_[Here's my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6mr8u2ahkpdmjob8qmbt4s86bmcb3asip37smg8_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctgm1o32c3h2bs "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.")_ **

If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our August deadline.

YOU are key to my goal. We've stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you?
---
**[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdlviuf78dtqusi9doc4b0mv8ul79ql1f88c3gsg_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctgm1o32c3h2bs)[**YES**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcod43758vlf17ebjb7fgqg8ci88i7ngh1gu7i30_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctgm1o32c3h2bs) _[**NO**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztqfkv44c4kpdlhsa8d2nt3nr9kuhoq8bih9pqc8_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctgm1o32c3h2bs)**

Thanks for all you do for freedom.

- Kellyanne Conway

name: Your America
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20266%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TQH0%2frN2VefPkYiN8FhJww&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.

And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

name: Alan Dershowitz
subject: The Sun's re-emergence is a gift...
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-W5TXXoQtmQiMcrZufen8g)
---
|
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
**FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ** Dear Fellow American, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism - mostly the latter - and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. **The New York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.** Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. **The Sun's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. **[I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. ](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-w)**
---
[**Join the Sun Now →**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
Every person matters in this effort. Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---
---
**Alan Dershowitz** Columnist, The New York Sun
---
[**Join the Sun Now →**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._bqT1jViTChe1vSB0uXRg)
---
|
---

---

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: a few pressing matters to update you on:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us.

| |

---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc4qnv3gb06ovkr2rqmg6130ggj7uufodaumr34o_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctim8or6cjh2bs "Kellyanne Conway")
---

Hey there, it's Kellyanne...

_**[This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent. I have a few pressing matters to update you on as soon as possible:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcaa10orq4c623faepu63hkblnpl3p3284kkhrvo_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctim8or6cjh2bs "I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:")**_
** 1. ** Republicans have an **EXTREMELY** slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control ** 2. ** Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is **UNLOADING** $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power ** 3. ** The latest FEC reports have Democrats **OUTRAISING**
Republicans by _$12,000,000+_ since we took back the House in January
**When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... _[So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL August deadline?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjehe2qs3a0qtok9g4mf7mej3jseqgaqc8pootgg_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctim8or6cjh2bs "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL August deadline?")_**
---
**[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg8ugs7vvm198a2trjtq71520nr2pjrrrgrr2rq0_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctim8or6cjh2bs)[**YES**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsk6egqpsp5m9f4mq7ho2um2a1sas2525vt89rso_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctim8or6cjh2bs) _[**NO**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4ubm2q05a36bt1vdi3qb17dqrnsklompg4hm4vo_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctim8or6cjh2bs)**
---
Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies.

Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC.

They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. **That 's why this email is especially important.**

**_[Here's my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmlup232872v72oennpa36ad4hmi0fthl6cknuko_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctim8or6cjh2bs "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.")_ **

If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our August deadline.

YOU are key to my goal. We've stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you?
---
**[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztbe50hh0u71b2b8s90ms2nhchomg296r264mgeg_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctim8or6cjh2bs)[**YES**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z73ja49734aleunkcgv7prqj7k4i5ghkl32g6ocg_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctim8or6cjh2bs) _[**NO**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5d7uuudns5sgpb18v0aq12gq8vs5d43rdgr6sm8_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctim8or6cjh2bs)**
---
Thanks for all you do for freedom.

- Kellyanne Conway
---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuqst9dlpkkvr91alef2lgbc52ok1lp13mtm874o_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctim8or1clh2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zak5t7p0bd4kiea86ulv7lj37fptenkfdtlibee8_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctim8or1clh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv6qbhvhist563otiba368uh6aj83f07ss39jmlg_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctim8or1clh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: She's Gonna Lose
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
Lauren Boebert is a fighter that stood by my father when it mattered.

| | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlsskmdlmdeloq8020c0g1e6c3sc0t75u3kgl6eg_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctimaoj1chh2bs)
---
| | | Lauren Boebert is a fighter that **stood by my father when it mattered.**

That’s why this is the hardest email I’ve had to write in a long time...

Friend, I know you care about the MAGA agenda. Lauren has been unrelenting in supporting and defending that agenda. She’s taken the hits for it, and her Soros-backed challenger has closed the gap so much that **_her race was just declared a “Toss up.”_**

I’m looking at the numbers... and **Lauren Boebert may lose her seat.** **_We can stop this from happening. I am asking everyone reading this email to join me in contributing whatever they can and save Lauren Boebert from defeat._**
---
| | | [STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN >>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdp51f7vv8il954cpbupmpmuut94a4gumu1cvimo_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctimaoj1chh2bs "STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN")
---
| Let’s just start with the facts.

**>** Last year, her opponent **lost by only 546 votes** after a lengthy recount.

**>** This year, he’s **outraised Lauren 3 to 1** , and she’s in danger of falling too far behind.

**>** If this trend continues, Soros will have punished **one of the strongest voices defending my father** and the American way next year. [**_I am begging every Patriot who loves this country to step up and defend Lauren Boebert. Her record speaks for itself–she had our back and now we MUST have her back. _**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv5mcikcbmnk8i03i22setvlus1puahq96m7udn0_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctimaoj1chh2bs)

---
| You know the stakes of this election: **the course of America will be decided in 2024**.

Joe Biden and his crooked cabal have **declared it their mission** to completely **eradicate** **the MAGA Agenda** , and those who support it. Soros is bankrolling their effort.

And it all starts with **wiping out my father and Lauren**.

She’s **stood against the Woke “Squad,”** stood up for my father during the **unlawful persecutions levied against him** , **and never wavered in her commitment** to America First. You couldn’t find a more winsome ally than Lauren.

Which is why I am coming to you and all patriots who love America.** [Now is the time to stand with Lauren before it’s too late!](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znung0sgue47scd2s6eteoaf85klfevkag2mmo30_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctimaoj1chh2bs)**

| My father and I are counting on you.

body:

Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. name: Team D'Esposito
subject: Urgent: Say NO to Congestion Pricing
body:
Peter,

Nassau County is under threat.

The push for congestion pricing in lower Manhattan is gaining momentum, which could mean an additional fee of up to $23 a day for New Yorkers; this is not just another tax; it's a direct blow to our already overtaxed neighbors.

Congressman Anthony D'Esposito is on the front lines of this battle.

He has spearheaded bipartisan legislation to counteract this punishing new commuter tax. Alongside colleagues from both parties and respected labor leaders, they have been vocal in their unified opposition to Governor Hochul's cash-grab initiative.

Our community needs your support now more than ever. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Urgent+Say+No+To+Congestion+Pricing+Email]

HELP FUEL OUR FIGHT → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=Urgent+Say+No+To+Congestion+Pricing+Email]

As we work to combat strong political headwinds, having the necessary resources to champion the interests of our community is paramount.

Every donation we receive bolsters our campaign against undue financial burdens like congestion pricing.

Can you help fuel our fight? A donation of $5, $10, $50, or any amount you can provide will significantly boost our efforts. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=Urgent+Say+No+To+Congestion+Pricing+Email]

CHIP IN $5 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=5&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Urgent+Say+No+To+Congestion+Pricing+Email] CHIP IN $25 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=25&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Urgent+Say+No+To+Congestion+Pricing+Email] CHIP IN $50 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=50&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Urgent+Say+No+To+Congestion+Pricing+Email] CHIP IN $100 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=100&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Urgent+Say+No+To+Congestion+Pricing+Email] CHIP IN $500 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=500&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=Urgent+Say+No+To+Congestion+Pricing+Email] ANY AMOUNT → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=other+button&utm_campaign=Urgent+Say+No+To+Congestion+Pricing+Email]

With your support, we can send a powerful message: Nassau County will be a challenging target for policies that overburden its residents. Let's make it clear to Governor Hochul and her administration that we are united in our stance against congestion pricing.

Thank you for your continued commitment to our community and for standing shoulder-to-shoulder with Congressman Anthony D'Esposito.

Together, we are a force to be reckoned with.

Thank you,

Team D'Esposito

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7kqest4vvms84n7lnaqgcj3shmfso1mp6a4sah0_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctimeo32cth2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqv5nm7ivhoh2k0jnjgot84e1a3gqs1j5akbo2i8_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctimeo32cth2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv5sotu63o3h62varrvajprh78bebjoea86qfdto_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctimeo32cth2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zah8p2o4u7rg1d350kp3pclhneftst804oog9td8_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctimeo32cth2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

name: Shift WA
subject: FWD: Local Election Coverage
body:
Did you get a chance to read the email below?

The Primary Election is now behind us - and the November General Election will be here before we know it!

If there is one thing we gained from the results of the Primary, it's that voters now have a clear choice between supporting candidates who will protect public safety or candidates who will back our current failing and crime-enhancing policies. We here at Shift WA are dedicated to providing our readers with the news needed to make informed voting decisions in upcoming local elections.

But - leading up to the General Election - we need your help.

**[Will you consider contributing $100, $50, or even $25 to our efforts today?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62119763:W6oo4eDGN:m:1:2610672541:B14E466C45F330CBA5A0BF6C98CB7307:r)**

Thank you,

The Shift WA team
We now have a clear picture of which candidates remain standing as we head to the General Election. One thing is evident: the choice between improving public safety and supporting failed liberal crime policies has never been clearer. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62119764:W6oo4eDGN:m:1:2610672541:B14E466C45F330CBA5A0BF6C98CB7307:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends, The August Primary is behind us, and the final votes are almost all counted! We now have a clear picture of which candidates remain standing as we head to the General Election. **One thing is evident: the choice between improving public safety and supporting failed liberal crime policies has never been clearer.** We here at Shift WA are dedicated to providing our readers with the news needed to make informed voting decisions. Communities across our state are suffering from the impact of terrible public safety policies passed by Democrats. Mainstream media outlets will rarely investigate the truth of these failures in a timely manner - but we won't hesitate to shed light on what's really going on. **Voters deserve to know which candidates will continue pushing the same failed, crime-enhancing policies and which candidates will fight for public safety.** From the very important race for Mayor in Spokane to the city council races in Seattle, you can turn to us for analysis on local races in our state. As we gear up for the upcoming November General Election, we need your continued support to continue our efforts. **_[Your contribution of $100, $50, or even $25 means an investment in the only daily communications outlet dedicated to holding Democrats accountable in our state.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62119763:W6oo4eDGN:m:1:2610672541:B14E466C45F330CBA5A0BF6C98CB7307:r)_** **_[Please consider contributing today and help us make a difference in the future of our state.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62119763:W6oo4eDGN:m:1:2610672541:B14E466C45F330CBA5A0BF6C98CB7307:r)_** Thank you, The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62119765:W6oo4eDGN:m:1:2610672541:B14E466C45F330CBA5A0BF6C98CB7307:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14266138&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oW6oo4eDGN).

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20275%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jt5sQHVms3D%2bIHEDWP%2fRNQ&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20276%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tFKsdGcMbEdd7CAGaTGGHw&sysid=1) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20277%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bh2VX95khK0nLBykU9eU3A&sysid=1)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20278%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TlvfHUNg58hdZrTgR2dZ0Q&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

---

name: The Flyover
subject: GOP to Subpoena Biden Family, Mickelson’s $1 Billion in Bets, and a Celestial Question Mark
body:
The House GOP will subpoena Biden family members, potentially including President Joe Biden, over Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings, said Rep. James Comer, chairman of the House Oversight Committee.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)
---
[](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQANCvgS0WdxgHBoYu2dK1o3U2R3wNNpaNEvXvK3XuDzzpfd3HO0mR7fFJK8eW60hzkxePxl8ALmhH1ClmZmSrOcIQ4OrQOdBLzGRxngJx9ki-930iC-ASJRcwg9ES0aA1HsAEe4Whm4ILOEw-cEiTn5zqDSdp9ei-q2xt4Vx-6ouPbq6rLnFpbT-V_VB4U3grsj3P7nzTfjaan91cFd78LkkfMe1vKUXO4ap681hJyh_R_h_9BgAA__8Vw0ya)

| | |
# FRIday, August 11, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** On this date in 1866, the nation's [first roller rink](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOszAQBOCnMZ2j9RIcU1D8DV3-9kpkYwN7cWxkL4ny9ieuvvqTRjPzdZ_uliKl9b99hoGXPNmZ6RUmMFIpie2EjR-WEDC0TRiU7tWtw65TzTaANotRGhyA9trD1Slo9dwBKgdW-YYGBGzBKAV9e1P64vquR-1MH3rvjOvEFYInzuXynSnxFpb4ya9QLnN-NnHYmPcq2n8CR4Hje7Ncjz2F9366wBEBUeAIRuDI2duPpCRPz4XlRpVz-Uh7rEflc4wyWsuFSmVZcoyhyPqwTGmVhdJD5j2kKjlL3oLcDxdpPvOOKnBsyuD3N8VIVd_EFdanpfjbkv8-7ScAAP__Wgxtzg) was opened to the public in Newport, R.I., by James Plimpton, inventor of the modern quad roller skate. Wheels on your feet! It was a hit from the start. If this is your first time reading _The Flyover_ , [sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz79OwzAQgPGnibdGd_7vwRvqVlbGyBdf2kNOjYIp4u2RWOn6Sd_we7sslyJN7tfXsnMeW1_KOuTBC8QT4kmbRauaN2bNRnFGnzA47RyqWy6ElAhj8ECQNNnVeOdXMLVagBCUZA3aQESEZAL6mZJL2lNMnCpFcpMFrjL6Mb93uY8bb-2nP_iY176rlv_HSZ8nc_4a-2ReLKgj149vaU0-fZgsXPci7e8dzym_AQAA__-gJ0mR) and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? [Click here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj71u8yAUQJ8GtliXiwEzMHyLt2T6pI4WP5eYFofIRrH69lXbtfs5Rzpv1-XqSy2P-81v5Hpui4-9vGiB6SLEBeWCPLlMhCQ5OaGtMAqVEnx1ESBYyCHHYJLCZEwMqKUdvTeTHoEXh4ASJiHASiP0EKyyqMNkyaYwBcVGoFR624f3Vh59pVw_24v2IbaNV7f2_jyY_MdwZjif5zlkHym09vENMJz_rzT_Gjc6D4Yz3116nqXWcmjDRrhvvtSfWv977isAAP__ZtNQVg). Enjoying _the Flyover_? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, [Aura](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQANCvgS0WdxgHBoYu2dK1o3U2R3wNNpaNEvXvK3XuDzzpfd3HO0mR7fFJK8eW60hzkxePxl8ALmhH1ClmZmSrOcIQ4OrQOdBLzGRxngJx9ki-930iC-ASJRcwg9ES0aA1HsAEe4Whm4ILOEw-cEiTn5zqDSdp9ei-q2xt4Vx-6ouPbq6rLnFpbT-V_VB4U3grsj3P7nzTfjaan91cFd78LkkfMe1vKUXO4ap681hJyh_R_h_9BgAA__8Vw0ya).

|
---
## House GOP To Subpoena Biden Family
The House GOP will [subpoena Biden family members](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2OwyAQhJ8GOiJY_IMLimvc5dorLTDrsCcMliGJ8vanpL5uRqPRJ30_1-XqKFG-fbsdbdvK4tZGD1ykEUoJ0AvwYDdEQM3RqmFSYw99r3i0K-gAZjNh9B16NL2TBtA7o4OSsCEnCxK0NErJSY9quPipn2DwZsIpeON71kkM1Mp5-S2UW8QtvcoDz8tadp5sbO2oTH8xmBnMLWKklN4bgzmWHTM-6yfeKzKYO9WNgxrFp4tbOcSTUhL17o-C2QlPAbPY3E7pJap7VXHicfeJVpfFGh2du8sMZn7acLyvVIeRdfK2O_pgefvf0F8AAAD__-K1aSE), potentially including President Joe Biden, over Hunter Biden's foreign business dealings, said Rep. James Comer, chairman of the House Oversight Committee. The committee released bank records showing [at least $20 million paid](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L9yozAQgPGngW4ZafljKFRcQ-drr2QktJi9CC0jySZ--0xSp_-Kb37_7svdcuD4-GsPMmWTxa6FX7SoEbQGbBesvdmIkNqajB4mfeux73W9G-v0psZOKyTsrFZu7Vrf46AGS6OzXc0GFbZq1FpN7U0PjZv6CQc3TjR5N7q-6hR5LpKa_8Kx7LSFt7woNascdTB7KWeu2j8VzhXO13U1m3y6Z-ZIOX83Fc6nBC685grnXZ6Z4CEnFIH8dKdQtODYU4TNHhze4Gz8gESrJJ_BSywQmCDRCasclCDbd66T8efFIXAeblWnHofl8HNUfgf6CgAA___CL2os) to Hunter Biden's companies from countries including Russia and Ukraine, and Comer said more testimony would be heard before issuing the subpoenas.

Democrats continue to argue there's no proof directly tying President Biden to Hunter's complicated web of deals. ## UPS Drivers Heading to $170,000 Salaries
UPS drivers will earn an [average of $170,000 in annual pay](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAUAL8Gb1jwMGAGhi7e0rWjBeY5eZUNlqGx8vdVOnc76YaT7us23wJtlO-fYUff1jKHpdETZzFyKTmoGbrkV0RA1aGXxkmrQWvZPbzGGEbrRhNXu6IGOwSVtBJJm8HY4DryIECJUUrhlJWmj047MHF06FIco2aDwEStnP13odweuG6v8sSzX8rebf7R2lGZ-mAwMZiu6-qXWDNe9e0ZTG9kMP0claeTnnhWLq0QQvAjvHjEjCu1ypeyH5hraFQyg6k7fTou2jaqxrJB3PdA21-x_T_gNwAA__9y1VyM) and benefits at the end of the proposed new five-year contract negotiated with the Teamsters Union, according to UPS CEO Carol Tome. That's up almost 20% from the current average pay at UPS. By comparison, average pay increased 4.5% for all American workers between June 2022 and June 2023. The news drove searches for UPS delivery driver jobs [up by 50%](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7tu7CAUAL8Gd7Y4YF4FxW3c7W1TWhgOaxJsLCC72r-PNnW6KUYazcdtvbmU03n_7w60PZbV-Z4euFI9AoyMr2wINiIy5ANakAaUYELAsFstjIt8o1Io6rUOoEXEMEtQSnoz45Aso4xTDUANVyCnzQjD5KYNmrDpTZCZYki91OmzpLPvGPOrPLBOvhxDtnvvVyP8H2ELYUtMpzs9Ti-3l_I2CFtOfDbClu-rjaGmB9Y2Nl8qjqDo13hhfQNwbmY97f3IQ7XheqacU5OKzPR-uJR_a_3v-Z8AAAD__4rJWac). The agreement covers 340,000 workers at the package carrier. They're currently [in the middle of a vote](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O5CAQBp8GZ201ePxDQHCJs7n0QquBZswJGwuztubtV7PxJl_ySaVS_XsuT4op7q-_tLGpIS_karx4wQmkBNUtqvEmMCvuGjZy0HLsVd_LZjU2YGAKzOjJsbPoOs2ht6TIBcljE41C1eEkJepulENrda_VYCfN2tvJ9uKB7GPNpf2f415XDumdLy6ty1uTzFrrcYruj1CzUPN9363brfucQs0ftFAzTp_RQs1fxwm-xIvLCTUDXVzoxSBHRESIOxz0Bss7h1hPoAq8e8gBengzFfBMqV3rlppi_HHHlOI5jOKBr41i-jGqvwf6DgAA__9we2bq) that will end on Aug. 22 to ratify the contract.
## Virgin Galactic Rockets Tourists Into Space
Virgin Galactic finally launched its [first spaceflight with paying customers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2u4yAQxfGnsTsiZowNFBTbpMu2W1p8DPasiLEwm2jf_iq3vuXRaX76_3msD8-Fj-23f5Lrua4-dn7RKo0AEDitOCaXiZCmkRwsFvSM8wzj7hZNMiVrAhApq3POKcwmmrx4kDnhyA4lTtIASDtpWG7BzhaXYCzZFEyYByUpca_t9rfy0XfK5X99UbvF-hyL23s_r2H6NeB9wLs_D3pfn-szWudYaMD7i9vGh9h8-cij6PVf46uL6_SRcuFt7yI0f1z1ECpKKxWpjIghgfcKrIrg1aS1TgnH5tL55lL4WvSg5Pb0XL4x_ec2XwEAAP__nPRlvQ), including a former Olympian who bought his ticket 18 years ago when they were first offered. Tickets cost $200,000 then; they're $450,000 now. The Virgin space plane flew about 55 miles high [for a brief flight](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGupCAUQL9GOwxcFaWg2MZutt3SgFz0bhAmwOi8v3-ZV7_-JCfn_HusD0OB4v7XnKirT6vZKl248pkJwaBfoXXaIwL2LWohlZhGGEfRHtrBZHBw4wiCW8kl98o66Xw_wWC5Uy1p4NDzWQiu-knIzqpRgbSzQuXsbMdm4Oioptz9TxTrgT58pQtzt6WzDfqo9Vma_k8DSwPLfd-dT2_7KhSxlA_TwOLTm0W8C6u4HQ0sF-WdIttN-IRszFMulT0zXaYiM6XmFM2rspNKoRTbrN3zphCoyKkZ-H4aCj_6-vuN7wAAAP__LXljsw) that gave its three passengers a sense of weightlessness while they floated around the cabin before the plane glided back to a runway landing. The passengers included 80-year-old British Olympian Jon Goodwin and a mother-daughter team from Antigua who were sweepstakes winners. The daughter, at 18, became the youngest person to go into space.

clean_body: The House GOP will subpoena Biden family members, potentially including President Joe Biden, over Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings, said Rep. James Comer, chairman of the House Oversight Committee. | | | | | | FRIday, August 11, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! On this date in 1866, the nation's was opened to the public in Newport, R.I., by James Plimpton, inventor of the modern quad roller skate. Wheels on your feet! It was a hit from the start. If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, . | House GOP To Subpoena Biden Family The House GOP will , potentially including President Joe Biden, over Hunter Biden's foreign business dealings, said Rep. James Comer, chairman of the House Oversight Committee. The committee released bank records showing to Hunter Biden's companies from countries including Russia and Ukraine, and Comer said more testimony would be heard before issuing the subpoenas. Democrats continue to argue there's no proof directly tying President Biden to Hunter's complicated web of deals. breaks down the details. UPS Drivers Heading to $170,000 Salaries UPS drivers will earn an and benefits at the end of the proposed new five-year contract negotiated with the Teamsters Union, according to UPS CEO Carol Tome. That's up almost 20% from the current average pay at UPS. By comparison, average pay increased 4.5% for all American workers between June 2022 and June 2023. The news drove searches for UPS delivery driver jobs . The agreement covers 340,000 workers at the package carrier. They're currently that will end on Aug. 22 to ratify the contract. Virgin Galactic Rockets Tourists Into Space Virgin Galactic finally launched its , including a former Olympian who bought his ticket 18 years ago when they were first offered. Tickets cost $200,000 then; they're $450,000 now. The Virgin space plane flew about 55 miles high that gave its three passengers a sense of weightlessness while they floated around the cabin before the plane glided back to a runway landing. The passengers included 80-year-old British Olympian Jon Goodwin and a mother-daughter team from Antigua who were sweepstakes winners. The daughter, at 18, became the youngest person to go into space. The pledge promises to support the eventual Republican nominee. () ➤ Sen. Joe Manchin says he's "thinking seriously" about leaving the Democratic Party and running for re-election in West Virginia as an independent. () ➤ The Supreme Court Thursday temporarily blocked a nationwide settlement with Oxycontin maker Purdue Pharma that would have shielded its owners, the Sackler family, from civil lawsuits. The Court will hear the case later this year. He threw 124 pitches -- a career-high and the most of any pitcher this season - to beat the Washington Nationals 7-0. body:
our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us.

| |

---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df537a3d663542138fdc67e4343f1420&_e=zzFoiV8XMRuOaIAnL7sBn9iR6pTg0SnhjbCKvMG16GK3yab0vtM-NRkq0zCC_Qyi7QrbrfNUJItU3HNptwKb-o7MU3-mrrMyj2BxbFnVHFixldjG-_UW0iuc1AYPE0LnGuI_aMkl0KotOVlURDEvBCTln-bucd8fSeTsn56I71-x4nNrHpYpH3-ekxlcsO3y9K0FE81ZpJSx85EHmD1QV_q2sh4Bda7U3orNA56_2o6iA9y28zk6EAVHsx31Xmyr8x2NdhdO_4PGbAEDVnnfWUy_xCNKhIHlMYsc6LrIEr2VMmuI3wdLB59QoUKCnQk4ML1zSsseqirXAHb5svZk6LL7Mag4eMeIx1mq7aGOLbTKgFrwpPn0b_QsEbGO6LZBBYRKPTFjV7zhW0dQLwffAA%3D%3D "Kellyanne Conway")
---

Hey there, it's Kellyanne...

_**[This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent. I have a few pressing matters to update you on as soon as possible:](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df537a3d663542138fdc67e4343f1420&_e=zzFoiV8XMRuOaIAnL7sBn9iR6pTg0SnhjbCKvMG16GK3yab0vtM-NRkq0zCC_Qyi7QrbrfNUJItU3HNptwKb-o7MU3-mrrMyj2BxbFnVHFixldjG-_UW0iuc1AYPE0LnGuI_aMkl0KotOVlURDEvBCTln-bucd8fSeTsn56I71-x4nNrHpYpH3-ekxlcsO3y9K0FE81ZpJSx85EHmD1QV_q2sh4Bda7U3orNA56_2o4EHLVWqd40oInCv08RNMOE4_M2rz-qssFqGT7-567cWR6Nqi8LiiyJZeSCSII4XYpHvk8yNfGatYRhLjBvcu5gC1T4OuEFFP43n4UbACGKeaU-7pt3_TsMJ8VsZMZc2wDj94k874G6q6PeMx40CObot2oc6aRTeSASj-sRl5-HjQ%3D%3D "I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:")**_
** 1. ** Republicans have an **EXTREMELY** slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control ** 2. ** Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is **UNLOADING** $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power ** 3. ** The latest FEC reports have Democrats **OUTRAISING**
Republicans by _$12,000,000+_ since we took back the House in January
**When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... _[So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL August deadline?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df537a3d663542138fdc67e4343f1420&_e=zzFoiV8XMRuOaIAnL7sBn9iR6pTg0SnhjbCKvMG16GK3yab0vtM-NRkq0zCC_Qyi7QrbrfNUJItU3HNptwKb-o7MU3-mrrMyj2BxbFnVHFixldjG-_UW0iuc1AYPE0LnGuI_aMkl0KotOVlURDEvBCTln-bucd8fSeTsn56I71-x4nNrHpYpH3-ekxlcsO3y9K0FE81ZpJSx85EHmD1QV_q2sh4Bda7U3orNA56_2o6SjeMpX7I_4BkmdfRysYOmCkoNe794JZDrkvnZq6v6nQlCgtbmVOA_N4v1WMWhEAZqZSKwXcalTOSywJjCkM5Icf1Gwhrg0TXQI39a8ZG2j3sU_ahiftAifmbjksOAbxAyUQNSK4Fm9jp2aekBwZzkuyHh7zYdm5Eyj27YMllMxA%3D%3D "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL August deadline?")_**
---
**[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df537a3d663542138fdc67e4343f1420&_e=zzFoiV8XMRuOaIAnL7sBn9iR6pTg0SnhjbCKvMG16GK3yab0vtM-NRkq0zCC_Qyi7QrbrfNUJItU3HNptwKb-o7MU3-mrrMyj2BxbFnVHFixldjG-_UW0iuc1AYPE0LnGuI_aMkl0KotOVlURDEvBCTln-bucd8fSeTsn56I71-x4nNrHpYpH3-ekxlcsO3y9K0FE81ZpJSx85EHmD1QV_q2sh4Bda7U3orNA56_2o5f2LZb_DqqSi426Eeuh8UxC4qh9v-Eg30c7YWG2ANJq40fxyJM957oWlD0-Ic-eRjG9PYo7Kf9eV6MPDgYEtlvP1reUJLnZIIShtpI3tHp1JhDAz82LEUYilgdUWGHvtiq90ioyKf3iQM0gr0emlTsI-hXSQe89RfPxbze2P5iNQ%3D%3D)[**YES**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df537a3d663542138fdc67e4343f1420&_e=zzFoiV8XMRuOaIAnL7sBn9iR6pTg0SnhjbCKvMG16GK3yab0vtM-NRkq0zCC_Qyi7QrbrfNUJItU3HNptwKb-o7MU3-mrrMyj2BxbFnVHFixldjG-_UW0iuc1AYPE0LnGuI_aMkl0KotOVlURDEvBCTln-bucd8fSeTsn56I71-x4nNrHpYpH3-ekxlcsO3y9K0FE81ZpJSx85EHmD1QV_q2sh4Bda7U3orNA56_2o5Y-FKgbno41lzl5AsB0dE4q8qRoddFpUNuq-WJHj7_bd43X8o590QUjv-TFZnRfAiG3hryNfsVKQ4IjwCNIr6IPVJypgP3JSdYEFomofpjyJw12M0Gfsmo90r-V_NJfUst2mxrVddM6YOjl7xVv5Hv65fTkZOr9_2L1-LRzmQK9A%3D%3D) _[**NO**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df537a3d663542138fdc67e4343f1420&_e=zzFoiV8XMRuOaIAnL7sBn9iR6pTg0SnhjbCKvMG16GK3yab0vtM-NRkq0zCC_Qyi7QrbrfNUJItU3HNptwKb-o7MU3-mrrMyj2BxbFnVHFixldjG-_UW0iuc1AYPE0LnGuI_aMkl0KotOVlURDEvBCTln-bucd8fSeTsn56I71-x4nNrHpYpH3-ekxlcsO3y9K0FE81ZpJSx85EHmD1QV_q2sh4Bda7U3orNA56_2o5et4ZPwlJ-VUwVycWwC72wpZuECcvi3jOQ5VeAjyuvX2ZwdhYSNvgblJXUGEk79Hmjfbs5tDJmh69xZ8benUDacbhFZUZWbf4EVVqGNFBVDfKtNdrRYtzP4FJyZEBSO1tXhm_kaRox31mJIpFlxo4t7b1Z0Cvqpmj8hGXif92ayw%3D%3D)**
---
Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies.

Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC.

They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. **That 's why this email is especially important.**

**_[Here's my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=df537a3d663542138fdc67e4343f1420&_e=zzFoiV8XMRuOaIAnL7sBn9iR6pTg0SnhjbCKvMG16GK3yab0vtM-NRkq0zCC_Qyi7QrbrfNUJItU3HNptwKb-o7MU3-mrrMyj2BxbFnVHFixldjG-_UW0iuc1AYPE0LnGuI_aMkl0KotOVlURDEvBCTln-bucd8fSeTsn56I71-x4nNrHpYpH3-ekxlcsO3y9K0FE81ZpJSx85EHmD1QV_q2sh4Bda7U3orNA56_2o5J4o0n9MULniOAQygsIss0rzQTFGnRms1PmnIfvmouKIu6V71_bj2zMz934xL-qPAWXtH5r5VWJdMxMKf7xkykV9j6qE_5nZW1kLUUiAnaV_VA2PcfUXbszQqYjhgYV5AqLX4ucM8Rg1KxTdLD7ugE2lISCSkTwlDfYONPF7y5-g%3D%3D "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.")_ **

If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our August deadline.

YOU are key to my goal. We've stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you?
---

- Kellyanne Conway
