body:
our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us.

| |

---
| | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=94d41e4e1795459da81dc3d3f516c2c4&_e=nGV4t0u-U4ozQwg1iF8OIakEaBG8ysKJorWldEGH_mNaZ7uO0SBZDZUjleiCU5OTW8NnLQZO6qo_jP5xLmWIqSPs6sAzyP_9vyW6_B7VSkmUmmLG04ogqIqCjTqqlbDdlMlwr2CPH-QLnvqCffbNyc6ldmMSy2db8gmkDtMQ5BXKf5hJUC4XaZt51Mb8HGKhS5ZKVALIrvYyAC9mfjjVSWmc4BNXU8-i_4oI_IEv6i50gfRTbtYP2dqnNiay5NgqNIe11CKOMQLC5CSd9qJrAKhIFtUYjmynQCq44NqtNtfmFZv7_I-PuTG40AcGzINOcekiyErRyUufUrYby41c1_3VJ2KYt5qJVT7u772_3EASufm_6r4-0fEbhopxU0AkktFS_norIqmjB-E1hLdtkQ%3D%3D "Kellyanne Conway")
---

Hey there, it's Kellyanne...

_**[This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent. I have a few pressing matters to update you on as soon as possible:](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=94d41e4e1795459da81dc3d3f516c2c4&_e=nGV4t0u-U4ozQwg1iF8OIakEaBG8ysKJorWldEGH_mNaZ7uO0SBZDZUjleiCU5OTW8NnLQZO6qo_jP5xLmWIqSPs6sAzyP_9vyW6_B7VSkmUmmLG04ogqIqCjTqqlbDdlMlwr2CPH-QLnvqCffbNyc6ldmMSy2db8gmkDtMQ5BXKf5hJUC4XaZt51Mb8HGKhS5ZKVALIrvYyAC9mfjjVSWmc4BNXU8-i_4oI_IEv6i7SUsvZIfo3-_kCrwWqqgICmK9FpC27k3im22Fu8BSGF8RLCvvNcR5Uf0iWYJ-WVkfLfTHnMy5U-nqybwOvWvDTFk0XJP5sTLKrHYs6vPBeJXvhFXBTRk0z8wA8dm1YXzQF7dv2vGhVNHawYoEq9ulKfota75TJcDJSiirNwP-86A%3D%3D "I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:")**_
** 1. ** Republicans have an **EXTREMELY** slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control ** 2. ** Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is **UNLOADING** $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power ** 3. ** The latest FEC reports have Democrats **OUTRAISING**
Republicans by _$12,000,000+_ since we took back the House in January
**When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... _[So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL August deadline?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=94d41e4e1795459da81dc3d3f516c2c4&_e=nGV4t0u-U4ozQwg1iF8OIakEaBG8ysKJorWldEGH_mNaZ7uO0SBZDZUjleiCU5OTW8NnLQZO6qo_jP5xLmWIqSPs6sAzyP_9vyW6_B7VSkmUmmLG04ogqIqCjTqqlbDdlMlwr2CPH-QLnvqCffbNyc6ldmMSy2db8gmkDtMQ5BXKf5hJUC4XaZt51Mb8HGKhS5ZKVALIrvYyAC9mfjjVSWmc4BNXU8-i_4oI_IEv6i459yMrq-6MzVNZS_0c38nZRonDfVrch9clM584_s5eS1OACtjoFPFU6vBVKKo-cBgQzhmxgPqdfeZtS7cUQEB4blySRU1EYZLloVtn07QlaBEsBRkQYIvyMRkfuvhRXvLn08GZyw9lbr980kIMvHLt9O_IZpyYgh0QaAlKKGGGrw%3D%3D "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL August deadline?")_**
---
**[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=94d41e4e1795459da81dc3d3f516c2c4&_e=nGV4t0u-U4ozQwg1iF8OIakEaBG8ysKJorWldEGH_mNaZ7uO0SBZDZUjleiCU5OTW8NnLQZO6qo_jP5xLmWIqSPs6sAzyP_9vyW6_B7VSkmUmmLG04ogqIqCjTqqlbDdlMlwr2CPH-QLnvqCffbNyc6ldmMSy2db8gmkDtMQ5BXKf5hJUC4XaZt51Mb8HGKhS5ZKVALIrvYyAC9mfjjVSWmc4BNXU8-i_4oI_IEv6i4bEBqVthfPJnnM4JqQdmTJQqCqRbtfQDSFHDv1Gk63q_Z77J9pTsX3ETQ6R3r1ZlkXOYodKemPsa1_gCZnNKJn3yrQADUqhg4VwEap1tLJoMydp2sh0HcLDVLdI8lO3ejZJvhzErAlVKEHI3txAJ0EKDsqwK4xE9sc6nQ2puvkJQ%3D%3D)[**YES**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=94d41e4e1795459da81dc3d3f516c2c4&_e=nGV4t0u-U4ozQwg1iF8OIakEaBG8ysKJorWldEGH_mNaZ7uO0SBZDZUjleiCU5OTW8NnLQZO6qo_jP5xLmWIqSPs6sAzyP_9vyW6_B7VSkmUmmLG04ogqIqCjTqqlbDdlMlwr2CPH-QLnvqCffbNyc6ldmMSy2db8gmkDtMQ5BXKf5hJUC4XaZt51Mb8HGKhS5ZKVALIrvYyAC9mfjjVSWmc4BNXU8-i_4oI_IEv6i5-Pexdk4s7ieVRGbjW_gcuoqiQpEM4UDuctPlmfKKgFLKLX05VREXEldb3ZSG57oBUzGY6iK5sPd18SsFmD5r7JcVVq5aEoVt2G_BYURHLShBkexjVL31SLV9L2XM2iu6tnhlMuDi_rWwtihtZ_OCUoxE68WdPC2NXpRm6uB7ibQ%3D%3D) _[**NO**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=94d41e4e1795459da81dc3d3f516c2c4&_e=nGV4t0u-U4ozQwg1iF8OIakEaBG8ysKJorWldEGH_mNaZ7uO0SBZDZUjleiCU5OTW8NnLQZO6qo_jP5xLmWIqSPs6sAzyP_9vyW6_B7VSkmUmmLG04ogqIqCjTqqlbDdlMlwr2CPH-QLnvqCffbNyc6ldmMSy2db8gmkDtMQ5BXKf5hJUC4XaZt51Mb8HGKhS5ZKVALIrvYyAC9mfjjVSWmc4BNXU8-i_4oI_IEv6i6jRi2D0PGJf1DXTcliXmWFoKntUXONjpa0Lm6ygxNf8eZLCb_m5NwRsEKuyvRsfPYMWAqAzUCHog-d2stihZ3F-n8kGou_bYqFF6GmwXL9EOKL5MRPsWiGwi1v7pjO150pWFDR61FOSy1X2q5uHCPjvBtvyMKi5lv25TWSXBo_Lw%3D%3D)**
---
Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies.

Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC.

They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. **That 's why this email is especially important.**

**_[Here's my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=94d41e4e1795459da81dc3d3f516c2c4&_e=nGV4t0u-U4ozQwg1iF8OIakEaBG8ysKJorWldEGH_mNaZ7uO0SBZDZUjleiCU5OTW8NnLQZO6qo_jP5xLmWIqSPs6sAzyP_9vyW6_B7VSkmUmmLG04ogqIqCjTqqlbDdlMlwr2CPH-QLnvqCffbNyc6ldmMSy2db8gmkDtMQ5BXKf5hJUC4XaZt51Mb8HGKhS5ZKVALIrvYyAC9mfjjVSWmc4BNXU8-i_4oI_IEv6i4bxdPjBGjVUK64458ebE8NhUIihGV4y6tO-3ruF2YW1G_BCk2IWayZssfWsMyUh6IdSEatvAa4D5toq9bTBNln6bgO74pY7TdejhMKrnUNIno-44o5M8hm8mNss0J3ugcd8TQLTbvYUBYkt9ha7YlpkuRFwuYHHgr2n2TFen0MVg%3D%3D "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.")_ **

If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our August deadline.

YOU are key to my goal. We've stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you?
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zeee36msqebm9a530emiaih9nnigvjfbtsme4eb8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cthm4ob4c3h2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt5db73atai4grsl6dv1jnvq67g9i4fadc225o80_rp22sh2s8i66p74cthm4ob4c3h2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4dgcv1iesdb3tn63k3c2bpm9pj43q6cv2kfp6e8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cthm4ob4c3h2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgd7rj96sobubade09io0tem8fi3372414899bq8_rp22sh2s8i66p74cthm4ob4c3h2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

---

name: Gloucester County GOP
subject: Keynote Speaker Announced for the 2023 Chairwoman's Reception: RILEY GAINES
body:
September 19, 2023 - 6:00 PM at Adelphia Restaurant - GET YOUR TICKETS NOW
| | | |
# Chairwoman Jacci Vigilante
and the Gloucester County Republican Executive Committee invite you to our 6th Annual Chairwoman's Reception The Keynote Speaker will be Riley Gaines
---
| Riley Gaines, a 12 time All-American swimmer with 5 SEC titles was a successful female swimmer at University of Kentucky with ambitions to pursue a dental degree. That post-graduate ambition and her entire life was changed when she was forced to share a locker room and then compete against biological male Lia Thomas at the 2022 NCAA Women's Swimming Championship. This uneven challenge, not just for Riley but for every woman competing in the pool that day, was made even more traumatic when the NCAA officials insisted on giving Lia Thomas the trophy, despite tying Riley down to the hundredth of a second in the event. Riley can recall wondering why no one was standing up for her or for any women in the room. This moment became her call to action - to defend and protect America's daughters against the woke left and their gender-denying ideology. Biological men should not take opportunities for success in sports away from women. Biological men should not share locker rooms with women.
---
|
---
|

name: Freedom First Project
subject: The key to Lincoln's rhetorical success
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c2M9MDA0NzJOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWdlb21ldHJ5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX0ZGTzQxOTAzIn0/_hw8Kmbx5Xba2lCZMNISBg)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly-plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **"Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.**** ****You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c2M9MDA0NzJOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWdlb21ldHJ5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX0ZGTzQxOTAzIn0/jPUdJLBJZ2A1jxW5LRGy5w)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c2M9MDA0NzJOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWdlb21ldHJ5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX0ZGTzQxOTAzIn0/ls8NF23aoTzVWe9O7NolKg)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. ArnnPresident, Hillsdale CollegePursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Lincoln's secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b04a5ca487324c93b88ed0505732cfba&_e=mvX0wcDMXLL8AJaVyhrDOl_80R9R5lB6wj0j7OVEP_cVJr_JU3Ox-eSuPLul_YJ05fMS8HIEBYGenKqxnAT8OsBsd2C-Z6LJKn4ar1Cj7FtZvYTcqfGWj6kvWQYygBn0iFMzRvbihRwQ5bx7aK8rG34KOPfBlpd6vAbuUMfUu_oFkMViUH1rPPdsU7qi-91pWYlWLZvAXHPABWasCaWEn3YZAtf--ykOoLhLbNkVY5DsuhBbBhXAo8n4ZpHxWMi7SGc1O00rk16Xyw7LezBZGZ48mcQc7J6REpL6B9sAhqUSNCJa02VAOiTQyuXzDswecHh8sPCQcrII476lshiXvFkU_Z0hfRYpChalhbZiAjmvR8q1RUz3Y1IGr2QpNXSuTQUFHVw9q4sfjPeswVL7A5tgBDbykAxXrDtzolXcF9E%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b04a5ca487324c93b88ed0505732cfba&_e=mvX0wcDMXLL8AJaVyhrDOl_80R9R5lB6wj0j7OVEP_cVJr_JU3Ox-eSuPLul_YJ05fMS8HIEBYGenKqxnAT8OsBsd2C-Z6LJKn4ar1Cj7FtZvYTcqfGWj6kvWQYygBn0iFMzRvbihRwQ5bx7aK8rG34KOPfBlpd6vAbuUMfUu_oFkMViUH1rPPdsU7qi-91pWYlWLZvAXHPABWasCaWEn3YZAtf--ykOoLhLbNkVY5DsuhBbBhXAo8n4ZpHxWMi7pOmcj8KA4vMG04vOWNFjDY2Wco_GcTKU812kt8NQGLPjHeMr7gLhRCSSxkSeGA5iDcrxGzPiVuzcbgUWP2CFXRb4ZhFu0UFQCONXVqfU0FzXYYbqr_h_P4u-pTbunkZ_azjhDFQvoh7QvvsAeZkYPjQV2b2B8huxwyf64R6-2X8%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=b04a5ca487324c93b88ed0505732cfba&_e=mvX0wcDMXLL8AJaVyhrDOl_80R9R5lB6wj0j7OVEP_cVJr_JU3Ox-eSuPLul_YJ05fMS8HIEBYGenKqxnAT8OsBsd2C-Z6LJKn4ar1Cj7FtZvYTcqfGWj6kvWQYygBn0iFMzRvbihRwQ5bx7aK8rG34KOPfBlpd6vAbuUMfUu_oFkMViUH1rPPdsU7qi-91pWYlWLZvAXHPABWasCaWEn3YZAtf--ykOoLhLbNkVY5DsuhBbBhXAo8n4ZpHxWMi7G8hQqvvrFBFXvcZHk_1DteXtNbORfEDwny7u88NoDWkirbK8RbDHMOkiBGAX2PQJXHCiviiNeMW7xQ1HyVvxYUMnwQuwHhxwj-fyU2cEKsUJRtRW3RFFeHHjfOUSmHTMx1jXPOWZjXNhjcgFFz3uQoQjZv4JvbAKxxJsoWEBsQc%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Hey there, it's Kellyanne...

_**[This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent. I have a few pressing matters to update you on as soon as possible:](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a15cd674dd8149f991c93d74a3903b1d&_e=DgZ04WHYqS28gNTldMDpZ0MESBaTkxkHPqpWJsJoFukNiKoG6AmL_hAucHYGmdU8pKWPBy4GjuGnDF6zk5XoXDNN006tivCXnprov9tG71AbxArSYWuhPb7Me8Hto55uv70gkLZfsvO_YIttM0VDVGmOGBoGI708T-FCkTWUaog4TBD6hMoy_ffYueUGoar9VVs99h0eXU2YgoPXAbwG8tzEAfy5BVtGe6ts_Y0oTZzlgh40e5hVJnSa-5BnW5PybPsOikVzgj32w-Cz4BlW2FmcXceoHtcydaQ7C8i6CKqBQIX81E0jOo-8gt8Bkt0C04hcijzAPMyW3ciZiHVtJCK2DkY9hgryj86rZNq5mtmKx4Rt3NlpP1A2WHsopwxPBKi_-8t_IyD8I0zUyQ0Rug%3D%3D "I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:")**_
** 1. ** Republicans have an **EXTREMELY** slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control ** 2. ** Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is **UNLOADING** $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power ** 3. ** The latest FEC reports have Democrats **OUTRAISING**
Republicans by _$12,000,000+_ since we took back the House in January
**When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... _[So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL August deadline?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a15cd674dd8149f991c93d74a3903b1d&_e=DgZ04WHYqS28gNTldMDpZ0MESBaTkxkHPqpWJsJoFukNiKoG6AmL_hAucHYGmdU8pKWPBy4GjuGnDF6zk5XoXDNN006tivCXnprov9tG71AbxArSYWuhPb7Me8Hto55uv70gkLZfsvO_YIttM0VDVGmOGBoGI708T-FCkTWUaog4TBD6hMoy_ffYueUGoar9VVs99h0eXU2YgoPXAbwG8tzEAfy5BVtGe6ts_Y0oTZzjLHDsgQKzfWtXFO_LbbPwduyes-7tXKHEpx2HlTRDLa815JzLGjPIa3jXw8rDwZNw738CAv82mmvT9MsD-npFpfvn3e4FxmxmcZEhjXD_fzesWJBHtISJ-dAJwGuhOOuRSoIFlsbeQnczeJScj2h0rAAkXifpKsf5LABy6HhumA%3D%3D "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL August deadline?")_**
---
**[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a15cd674dd8149f991c93d74a3903b1d&_e=DgZ04WHYqS28gNTldMDpZ0MESBaTkxkHPqpWJsJoFukNiKoG6AmL_hAucHYGmdU8pKWPBy4GjuGnDF6zk5XoXDNN006tivCXnprov9tG71AbxArSYWuhPb7Me8Hto55uv70gkLZfsvO_YIttM0VDVGmOGBoGI708T-FCkTWUaog4TBD6hMoy_ffYueUGoar9VVs99h0eXU2YgoPXAbwG8tzEAfy5BVtGe6ts_Y0oTZz-6rzl-o7RdX2MauFGvV74isTRi6IDxT3Q-evh2RpmaUICjDNXYMkkZWmxQWcKI2tP8woLH7-gVdEda5RkGZEL4FDSTlG9SNUayJFZmFzwA24OgvbwdzTnoQPfBLkyOM2m-rP6STIu1U1t6evL9CIWfFz33yr-miJgb9eT40_wtg%3D%3D)[**YES**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a15cd674dd8149f991c93d74a3903b1d&_e=DgZ04WHYqS28gNTldMDpZ0MESBaTkxkHPqpWJsJoFukNiKoG6AmL_hAucHYGmdU8pKWPBy4GjuGnDF6zk5XoXDNN006tivCXnprov9tG71AbxArSYWuhPb7Me8Hto55uv70gkLZfsvO_YIttM0VDVGmOGBoGI708T-FCkTWUaog4TBD6hMoy_ffYueUGoar9VVs99h0eXU2YgoPXAbwG8tzEAfy5BVtGe6ts_Y0oTZx6VchvogVllpef8KMs11ud-HaQR3NUaag8mQhEv7IKiaSQUMPwB15gzoGrFzUdpARF0PP-nznotAFmQ0uaE5BQDWT259xbojs7KfK3IkHXSy72OU_9ULdoIQ8oPazodY6R7c86gbQn4p3gvfQxXHcO3rM0JDvTswKd-6eLCIB45g%3D%3D) _[**NO**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a15cd674dd8149f991c93d74a3903b1d&_e=DgZ04WHYqS28gNTldMDpZ0MESBaTkxkHPqpWJsJoFukNiKoG6AmL_hAucHYGmdU8pKWPBy4GjuGnDF6zk5XoXDNN006tivCXnprov9tG71AbxArSYWuhPb7Me8Hto55uv70gkLZfsvO_YIttM0VDVGmOGBoGI708T-FCkTWUaog4TBD6hMoy_ffYueUGoar9VVs99h0eXU2YgoPXAbwG8tzEAfy5BVtGe6ts_Y0oTZyxfJO_gnaoGAHeZov0CfgpCzTz8xwW6hpIRyqo4Tkhu7pBMKNQWWUSS7Xa19UQZr8H4UovY27j3PuX6k1png8QRxmQKTwWMi10OF1GWBiyDS8wSyN41A7Dfzt4_Fw8EsWo1Df6fClLGWFVXMSZBOPkjocTNZjUMsTdf7znpqiBLw%3D%3D)**
---
Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies.

Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC.

They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. **That 's why this email is especially important.**

**_[Here's my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a15cd674dd8149f991c93d74a3903b1d&_e=DgZ04WHYqS28gNTldMDpZ0MESBaTkxkHPqpWJsJoFukNiKoG6AmL_hAucHYGmdU8pKWPBy4GjuGnDF6zk5XoXDNN006tivCXnprov9tG71AbxArSYWuhPb7Me8Hto55uv70gkLZfsvO_YIttM0VDVGmOGBoGI708T-FCkTWUaog4TBD6hMoy_ffYueUGoar9VVs99h0eXU2YgoPXAbwG8tzEAfy5BVtGe6ts_Y0oTZz0W6whT2Luks4LvI9jQJM0gUsRuc5zvPe-ax3HFwXhQeseDcGLaH2DO-q5bUZJbr89_T8sHZ4HHdUyVRXEC0il_CjHVQEGFbcoHaBXYtJP44_z2dKU4-IHuvV_3HitXgZ-1TsgqH1TfirjAy8lLyHknlEQRxYV1bDu6Ltgn6QJpg%3D%3D "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.")_ **

If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our August deadline.

clean_body: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. | | | | | | "Kellyanne Conway" Hey there, it's Kellyanne... "I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:" 1. Republicans have an EXTREMELY slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control 2. Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is UNLOADING $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power 3. The latest FEC reports have Democrats OUTRAISING Republicans by $12,000,000+ since we took back the House in January When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL August deadline?" Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies. Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC. They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. That 's why this email is especially important. "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars." If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our August deadline. YOU are key to my goal. We've stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you? Thanks for all you do for freedom. - Kellyanne Conway * | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. subject: a few pressing matters to update you on:

body:
our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us.

| |

---
| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaqhfhq1q8o8b47l3rjspaoetkl52pl5kdghp3og_rp22sh2s8i66p74cthm4ob4clh2bs "Kellyanne Conway")
---

Hey there, it's Kellyanne...

_**[This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent. I have a few pressing matters to update you on as soon as possible:](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbj3smb5tfbuih1s63nt04tuaohenhoeshjgor50_rp22sh2s8i66p74cthm4ob4clh2bs "I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:")**_
** 1. ** Republicans have an **EXTREMELY** slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control ** 2. ** Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is **UNLOADING** $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power ** 3. ** The latest FEC reports have Democrats **OUTRAISING**
Republicans by _$12,000,000+_ since we took back the House in January
**When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... _[So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL August deadline?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4jgq10798aaneln9u5o5i6u4mmecp5mdrf6dghg_rp22sh2s8i66p74cthm4ob4clh2bs "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL August deadline?")_**
---
**[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhp1hdri7r83u4ithodhhrurd5siamuc92ark9g0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cthm4ob4clh2bs)[**YES**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrcetf6rs6iniev34q7836854lpbvupao81di1ho_rp22sh2s8i66p74cthm4ob4clh2bs) _[**NO**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za6tfo9hv80adg3cpffooma9pteij0kicdgo1j6o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cthm4ob4clh2bs)**
---
Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies.

Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC.

They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. **That 's why this email is especially important.**

**_[Here's my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7e9ctbt7bs7nv8md4abg2p3i0njgncnse0qvaeo_rp22sh2s8i66p74cthm4ob4clh2bs "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.")_ **

If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our August deadline.

YOU are key to my goal. We've stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you?
---
**[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z871d6e1foqq0ec6flg1bfphc207od1crjtlkpr0_rp22sh2s8i66p74cthm4ob4clh2bs)[**YES**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4gvbf08q1m3l9adgv3u9f78ikfkludhrukifaag_rp22sh2s8i66p74cthm4ob4clh2bs) _[**NO**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs2oiplatf2gdttl7vo3epqp72cj88jldlph525o_rp22sh2s8i66p74cthm4ob4clh2bs)**
---
Thanks for all you do for freedom.

- Kellyanne Conway

name: David Hogg via Blue Amp Action
subject: Time to take the gloves off:
body:
This is the biggest thing I’ve ever been a part of.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdb3dca81-cf73-44cb-b738-8280c1facbda/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | Hey, Peter, it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives. Many of our elected officials can be described as one word: Cowards. Our kids, our planet, our freedoms, our democracy — are all under attack by far-right extremists, from the State House to the U.S. Senate, who are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for their own personal gain. We refuse to back down. There were many who said after Parkland that we couldn’t change anything because we were just a “bunch of kids.” But we proved them wrong — we passed gun laws in a state owned by the NRA. There were many who said young people would never vote. But we proved them wrong in 2018 — defeating more NRA backed politicians than ever before in U.S. history. Then, in 2020, we defeated NRA puppet Donald Trump. Both of these victories enabled us to pass the first federal gun law in 30 years. There were many who said Maxwell Frost, March For Our Lives' first National Organizing Director, could never be the first Gen Z Member of Congress. But we proved them wrong, again. Badass young people have a habit of being underestimated — and I have a habit of scaring the shit out of Republicans by proving that, while we might be young, we are powerful. That is why today, myself and Kevin Lata, Maxwell Frost’s Campaign Manager and 2022 Campaign Manager of the Year, are launching Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. Leaders We Deserve will work in partnership with a stacked Advisory Board, including Maxwell Frost, Justin Jones, and other influential leaders. [Are you in? Split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action so we can win back our country and advance a progressive agenda.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9de68ea2-0132-4f98-b17f-83c4eedd0a5b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te9baf8ce-576e-4997-858d-e07c3b8a8405/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Why is this important? Despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats. Conversely, Republicans have made significant investments in down-ballot races, leading to the absolute assault on our rights and freedoms that we’re seeing happen across states — from abortion bans to taking away LGBTQ+ rights to repealing life-saving common sense gun laws put into place after the Parkland shooting. Our political system is stacked against us, but incredible young leaders have fought back and beat the odds to get elected to office. It’s time to take more young people from movements like March For Our Lives and elect them to office to be the leaders we deserve. But grassroots support is what moves the needle, and it’s what we need from you today. [Join us by splitting a donation of any amount between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action today. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td828c202-83e5-4900-89fe-1afc9d6b5f23/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) So how are we going to fight back against the 50-year chess game conservative special interest groups have been manipulating? Leaders We Deserve will invest in young people, knock down barriers, and elect more young people to office. We’re doing this by:
1. Recruitment: Identifying candidates who will have the biggest impact on their states (that's where the real work is happening).
2. Providing Day-to-Day Support: We’re helping campaigns build from the ground up and will work with them directly on fundraising, messaging, coalition building, voter contact, and volunteer recruitment.
3. Volunteer Network: Our grassroots volunteer army (that’s you, NAME) will have person-to-person conversations with voters all across a candidate’s district, advocating on their behalf.
4. Running Paid Media Campaigns: We’ll run well-funded independent expenditure programs.

But there’s a reason our political system favors those who are older, wealthier, and white — running for office takes serious resources. Which is one of the reasons I’m reaching out today. Young candidates aren’t seen as viable and often struggle to raise money. They have lower personal wealth and smaller donor networks. [So I’m asking: Will you join our movement by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T853a020a-f07c-4890-8a74-c7c888432000/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcf6acfaa-4110-4c9e-b743-f4b53efe4e06/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| There’s so much more I could say, Peter, but I’ll end with this — we absolutely cannot do this work without you. [Please, consider joining us so we can defeat the far-right extremists who have taken over our communities and our nation — and elect the leaders we deserve. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T341b01d1-1e36-4e51-947a-62e8dbdc69dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you. More soon, David Hogg
Co-founder
Leaders We Deserve
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T00678697-fa08-440f-be0a-f6609c3e6806/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/baa_op_leaderswedeserve23081119?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=3bbf84ad-a7cc-4dd2-8212-ff5321d61000&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=3bbf84ad-a7cc-4dd2-8212-ff5321d61000&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

**[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=edbd38749b9f4f708e0ea29894a3e88e&_e=jdzJzKc5NypSZpRtyFViO9JYl-xLeUuEGS4p0qtBN0nQuDKBjegCXbZx_zedffgOyG32MNeMRrzqc1T5FYMWw4GDFEMoNCpoNqy17ks5_KhUmfNUa40LCWWzpchwHOtG1eGslmISqFskbFS_O0Oaq-zue39XKHSRmqyQF2XYkmtOJB7iHGcdLNKed3thiQ6SW_YVW06S9b7p269BQQh9UDTy52tDLNKAjf03v0kgGe-tP5x3JHl1-RcB65xmdBVdzmotZNFk4EL0FHH7bQHI6Eg9DWMfhbpvo64yU4qIuzG_WyWdLaML9kiGYZvEdZyv0SYjU_XAJH5bIP-ZkddgZEtEj4oLKvKPvWryW2I1ZOBFVkHjzGMBB8KcCtw2xpoezdefxTmfg1ZQfIHhCmHWIA%3D%3D)[**YES**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=edbd38749b9f4f708e0ea29894a3e88e&_e=jdzJzKc5NypSZpRtyFViO9JYl-xLeUuEGS4p0qtBN0nQuDKBjegCXbZx_zedffgOyG32MNeMRrzqc1T5FYMWw4GDFEMoNCpoNqy17ks5_KhUmfNUa40LCWWzpchwHOtG1eGslmISqFskbFS_O0Oaq-zue39XKHSRmqyQF2XYkmtOJB7iHGcdLNKed3thiQ6SW_YVW06S9b7p269BQQh9UDTy52tDLNKAjf03v0kgGe_bCl7o5ANY4FTjytwetjtKZx7LlkXRfuRUO8AWDGU_e_In7ycr3b4FPgmV2ueqNXF9gRC5OdHyhYdHdDzec1fCwGyAA7ROnLRHc-1uXjEMMF2S0PDCF2GLTjYEOT6vI78dnvApLVOd3l3vl7LNtbC58OJcyybXUm3tdW_EdF4uDw%3D%3D) _[**NO**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=edbd38749b9f4f708e0ea29894a3e88e&_e=jdzJzKc5NypSZpRtyFViO9JYl-xLeUuEGS4p0qtBN0nQuDKBjegCXbZx_zedffgOyG32MNeMRrzqc1T5FYMWw4GDFEMoNCpoNqy17ks5_KhUmfNUa40LCWWzpchwHOtG1eGslmISqFskbFS_O0Oaq-zue39XKHSRmqyQF2XYkmtOJB7iHGcdLNKed3thiQ6SW_YVW06S9b7p269BQQh9UDTy52tDLNKAjf03v0kgGe_1udiYjmK_2oRbRt3VEFcasH2dQNXGtteX-mIVggp_8iiZMWoWSwdThPE5BKWwlUUU1IWGVKEyemSZu02PW___r8whGPmGwEvTnI7Gfe2oYkg5thU0vH1LwOjA6h1NYyyOS9Me_OeBErc8WnbJSRcg9RzDUdHJwCOp6VcGZZ3OKg%3D%3D)**
---
Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies.

Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC.

They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. **That 's why this email is especially important.**

**_[Here's my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=edbd38749b9f4f708e0ea29894a3e88e&_e=jdzJzKc5NypSZpRtyFViO9JYl-xLeUuEGS4p0qtBN0nQuDKBjegCXbZx_zedffgOyG32MNeMRrzqc1T5FYMWw4GDFEMoNCpoNqy17ks5_KhUmfNUa40LCWWzpchwHOtG1eGslmISqFskbFS_O0Oaq-zue39XKHSRmqyQF2XYkmtOJB7iHGcdLNKed3thiQ6SW_YVW06S9b7p269BQQh9UDTy52tDLNKAjf03v0kgGe9K2EkgoBLSVLrbMcJeGVvFE5To2mUAHBImsamvjyuqmKyuBxZzhn8sl7duOVDLH8QMUvSfKeTSWd-_suvyXcdvpBd04McQnLTiGGyy9wljOHqRpoLSkX_WXkEHyJh1fzmjxL0KoLctFIdkGzvKzOdoeyAXg_JoB6EFoSJC-QrAtg%3D%3D "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.")_ **

If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our August deadline.

YOU are key to my goal. We've stood together before, and I know we can win big again! Can I count on you?
---
**[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=edbd38749b9f4f708e0ea29894a3e88e&_e=jdzJzKc5NypSZpRtyFViO9JYl-xLeUuEGS4p0qtBN0nQuDKBjegCXbZx_zedffgOyG32MNeMRrzqc1T5FYMWw4GDFEMoNCpoNqy17ks5_KhUmfNUa40LCWWzpchwHOtG1eGslmISqFskbFS_O0Oaq-zue39XKHSRmqyQF2XYkmtOJB7iHGcdLNKed3thiQ6SW_YVW06S9b7p269BQQh9UDTy52tDLNKAjf03v0kgGe84GglX9DtSsmatm9Kg0aZdD9Z0dyRYrFeBhwCLf4MXJjxYhrQ2W4HPEdwGA3BdH2FKthDSUVIOqbizrO9jvFIoeh5b9GUkkRyABd-_MKi_Ml_o9dMb-ISocxSxY2vrusOpqSGg1DfLxQ_-H88S-oEa-sJ3NoEfNt9hSRi-shGXyw%3D%3D)[**YES**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=edbd38749b9f4f708e0ea29894a3e88e&_e=jdzJzKc5NypSZpRtyFViO9JYl-xLeUuEGS4p0qtBN0nQuDKBjegCXbZx_zedffgOyG32MNeMRrzqc1T5FYMWw4GDFEMoNCpoNqy17ks5_KhUmfNUa40LCWWzpchwHOtG1eGslmISqFskbFS_O0Oaq-zue39XKHSRmqyQF2XYkmtOJB7iHGcdLNKed3thiQ6SW_YVW06S9b7p269BQQh9UDTy52tDLNKAjf03v0kgGe9BJP-AIenuNtm43OVM1tf7W6Ac930GvXiOEntgUqByVfnM40k_YQ_RPN8zz36k-8EzT2kfORPAGgR4H5hICE8Sn3iwkHnnjDAeXcl41BX6QzoxDTaaqiBwOuIWJbHGsE60Dqnfb_QftN-_P4M8XOlK757jYqu3b29dpS-0UtRJyA%3D%3D) _[**NO**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=edbd38749b9f4f708e0ea29894a3e88e&_e=jdzJzKc5NypSZpRtyFViO9JYl-xLeUuEGS4p0qtBN0nQuDKBjegCXbZx_zedffgOyG32MNeMRrzqc1T5FYMWw4GDFEMoNCpoNqy17ks5_KhUmfNUa40LCWWzpchwHOtG1eGslmISqFskbFS_O0Oaq-zue39XKHSRmqyQF2XYkmtOJB7iHGcdLNKed3thiQ6SW_YVW06S9b7p269BQQh9UDTy52tDLNKAjf03v0kgGe-K7lgPye0KdZ-ath4JszYqxSypm3hoXOQrJmBjLf_mOuq-Pgd-QdyeJRCKnUSvzVOA62J5Cu92CFbywaFRNCyMT-9HZgAMZqgZaepR-Z8j2PfMtbci3Dj089LoesgZHYtYJ3vS45sGBqj3fxU8inbDGDWe-ACHdRfWynIaNHf4JA%3D%3D)**

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills
%recipient.md5_hash%
| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69f524af751a4289a06cc31b99731ed9&_e=BBgEMWx3QY4n-nMhMfZbtBuibIR14PGKpLbRiywAmaL79tjQbd3lzlKRAtIqaSvmGveqtB-KZYjQ_hG3Wi3wznjGX5JPHNfJkqN8Ezbps2JMBwVJStlpWOSA1CRcrIXL4giqK18foI3Fwb5D-yLjgAjx6oYPV43aqiUbcZmG6XqwWd--dYZLe10GA3mUWlz8eebIX0W_n3tQnaKzCJxFGkuWhYwQWdf4bLXKH2rSbpiSYQ_vBUjPN0UrsYZVcLOn6uWY2a-e23sIKu2PZ2AEKWbkkubcJS3--gj9ylU3bv8uk_n7-8c0La_ion0gZjw2Dr45Qpo6cUKulJ4Nuec8xsiHNFa6jBFBBbmFSuFNRlk3o43WLbksXi8LYWLdjkftw6pl_XP_4X_emZO1VT82rXdsrhOhNAmety-OXoocemA%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69f524af751a4289a06cc31b99731ed9&_e=BBgEMWx3QY4n-nMhMfZbtBuibIR14PGKpLbRiywAmaL79tjQbd3lzlKRAtIqaSvmGveqtB-KZYjQ_hG3Wi3wznjGX5JPHNfJkqN8Ezbps2JMBwVJStlpWOSA1CRcrIXL4giqK18foI3Fwb5D-yLjgAjx6oYPV43aqiUbcZmG6XqwWd--dYZLe10GA3mUWlz8eebIX0W_n3tQnaKzCJxFGkuWhYwQWdf4bLXKH2rSbpiSYQ_vBUjPN0UrsYZVcLOn87JRKBBmx64w3BgRnXU21KtfrTWAPSOLZLUNju91EzbXa-mogNmphMEAPB5flV2b_2UO17okOyNLhlWMBqv_O0T8fC9wHvQjFugvVoyPBgnSCtPwHeEKfrgkA3L35LSSrXPjiKJvQCv3IZKRQYPQ3SSQKP7bNHHvpFb39y1ypmE%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=69f524af751a4289a06cc31b99731ed9&_e=BBgEMWx3QY4n-nMhMfZbtBuibIR14PGKpLbRiywAmaL79tjQbd3lzlKRAtIqaSvmGveqtB-KZYjQ_hG3Wi3wznjGX5JPHNfJkqN8Ezbps2JMBwVJStlpWOSA1CRcrIXL4giqK18foI3Fwb5D-yLjgAjx6oYPV43aqiUbcZmG6XqwWd--dYZLe10GA3mUWlz8eebIX0W_n3tQnaKzCJxFGkuWhYwQWdf4bLXKH2rSbpiSYQ_vBUjPN0UrsYZVcLOnX6UHSVTNFboSrIgz6VufqzyHdvy0Iiy6U8kAAjfLmlIWVgLR-VDKA1A-sp8wnQcFSaBzttvDFyKFhxxhFsFDKho4LmkfutVgDUPkSohIBnh4EjpiwFIO7EIFiDYpB2haQcDm7fUoFgZmsKJgyncSfEdxLvunGPFNETu_kUKUtNk%3D) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: We won, Friend – no more uranium mining near the Grand Canyon
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | We did it, Friend. Tribes have been fighting hard to win protections for more than 1.1 million acres surrounding the Grand Canyon. Thanks to their leadership and the support of people like you across the country, **President Biden officially approved the proposed Baaj Nwaavjo I’tah Kukveni Grand Canyon monument** earlier this week. The new monument permanently bans new uranium mining within its borders. This industry has been an issue in the region for years – from contaminating local drinking water to creating toxic air pollution. _**We don’t have to worry about uranium mining near the Grand Canyon anymore.**_ This victory would not have been possible without the tireless work of local Indigenous leaders, environmental allies across the country, and people like you who are willing to take action on issues that matter. **Here’s the bottom line, Friend: we can make a difference.** Actions matter, and all of them – online or in-person, calls or petition signatures – all of them contribute. I hope this victory shows you that. So, let’s all take a moment to celebrate. Get up and do a little dance! Go for a nice walk! Make yourself a treat! Then, let’s get back to work, because there are so many more opportunities to change the world for the better! **Thank you,
Raena Garcia
Senior Fossil Fuel and Lands Campaigner,
Friends of the Earth** [****](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1923861?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | |

clean_body: | | | | | ---|---|--- | | We did it, Friend. Tribes have been fighting hard to win protections for more than 1.1 million acres surrounding the Grand Canyon. Thanks to their leadership and the support of people like you across the country, President Biden officially approved the proposed Baaj Nwaavjo I’tah Kukveni Grand Canyon monument earlier this week. The new monument permanently bans new uranium mining within its borders. This industry has been an issue in the region for years – from contaminating local drinking water to creating toxic air pollution. We don’t have to worry about uranium mining near the Grand Canyon anymore. This victory would not have been possible without the tireless work of local Indigenous leaders, environmental allies across the country, and people like you who are willing to take action on issues that matter. Here’s the bottom line, Friend: we can make a difference. Actions matter, and all of them – online or in-person, calls or petition signatures – all of them contribute. I hope this victory shows you that. So, let’s all take a moment to celebrate. Get up and do a little dance! Go for a nice walk! Make yourself a treat! Then, let’s get back to work, because there are so many more opportunities to change the world for the better! body:
You need to see this | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/mama-bears-8857379?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

To those who still repeat the Big Pharma lie that “nobody ever said the vaccine would stop the transmission of the COVID virus," well click the [video](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=c7ca7db10a&e=9828080a05) thumbnail below and see that many of the so-called "experts" got it wrong. Spend two minutes this morning and [watch this](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=915db81e12&e=9828080a05):
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=8948922ada&e=9828080a05 "2 Minutes of "Experts" Being WRONG About the COVID Vaccine")
---
| This is a huge reason I wrote my book: "[_We’ve Been Played...Exposing the Triad of Tyranny_](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=4bca097dcb&e=9828080a05)." I have come to recognize that medically related agendas not centered on patient wellbeing and physician guidance can be a poison to patients and doctors alike. And this is exactly the root of the problem. Schemes emanating from Big Pharma, Big Tech, and Big Government too often do not serve healers or the sick. This triad represents a dangerous and insidious force that works against transparency and health freedom. It is the triad of tyranny. Its appetite is for power, dollars, and control.

We must continue to be vigilant and hold our leaders accountable. [Share the video today](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=6029d6a700&e=9828080a05) and remind your friends and neighbors that the so-called "experts" were indeed lying to us.

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor

| |

Hey there, it's Kellyanne...

_**[This might just be the single most important email I've ever sent. I have a few pressing matters to update you on as soon as possible:](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85cd1b5bf32f4377a8066c37e6af480e&_e=561twDoBSRHJ6ddpLx8eYxLX-I4UWYn7hS7RRH8vRfetR2K0cdBv5T-K3lXKkh5lPXXUvTZNe-h8G0_I3TJJbCJBgrE8wTifSBJOWePjT-1dzIT_4SPg0UBLbbXZV6URwAnqD3ePZJ4hRgIf2BkDRO4fa7W9aNiMD-UdW6IyoVjS3HsEggHGRbXhpsCQBt2GlkS6AT0iIsEI8Qyv1makHLeTfTtuF2KHluOcRr06Ck5dH8gKSli3ZFjOhSnio6fMec1EvpnoNwWgw7r0wFQKtWs4RAriTocU0INCkafgoc-KTqBBqW4yIHWk6BdUNLALMHSm3mLFHpWvMtPhyVE5dtgdW9SgUF61ay7hPJ1JVXRjC4y-GSFfNCpVmYf4si6GZ2GTj9rHeS_YRrVphnrZLg%3D%3D "I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:")**_
** 1. ** Republicans have an **EXTREMELY** slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control ** 2. ** Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is **UNLOADING** $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power ** 3. ** The latest FEC reports have Democrats **OUTRAISING**
Republicans by _$12,000,000+_ since we took back the House in January
**When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... _[So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL August deadline?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85cd1b5bf32f4377a8066c37e6af480e&_e=561twDoBSRHJ6ddpLx8eYxLX-I4UWYn7hS7RRH8vRfetR2K0cdBv5T-K3lXKkh5lPXXUvTZNe-h8G0_I3TJJbCJBgrE8wTifSBJOWePjT-1dzIT_4SPg0UBLbbXZV6URwAnqD3ePZJ4hRgIf2BkDRO4fa7W9aNiMD-UdW6IyoVjS3HsEggHGRbXhpsCQBt2GlkS6AT0iIsEI8Qyv1makHLeTfTtuF2KHluOcRr06Ck7OLJUR7kOprM1pyt1jzYBCHzZf9jclk4MW4w5ZHsPrVRdT5A-sPUBkNJX5bP70B048jLsZel02gosQEgLr0r4ZfPhd7bF30gJVHAyNnXJ4tcM0S3i2GTxxxgrUabI0sfJAV86WtiGyTXKyZzseMqxR394DKDrh2zyUn7n1W0zX-g%3D%3D "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL August deadline?")_**
---
**[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85cd1b5bf32f4377a8066c37e6af480e&_e=561twDoBSRHJ6ddpLx8eYxLX-I4UWYn7hS7RRH8vRfetR2K0cdBv5T-K3lXKkh5lPXXUvTZNe-h8G0_I3TJJbCJBgrE8wTifSBJOWePjT-1dzIT_4SPg0UBLbbXZV6URwAnqD3ePZJ4hRgIf2BkDRO4fa7W9aNiMD-UdW6IyoVjS3HsEggHGRbXhpsCQBt2GlkS6AT0iIsEI8Qyv1makHLeTfTtuF2KHluOcRr06Ck5HtE4HHh2JDCTt3SLOJFfYqF4APOedJxQp6GdeNwfxxIylH_c-5caahzD14bBt505yI4jDcsnY4Sy_i9_uwAINgBAF7pGSgswek2gc7zSThQHoIdgHYBrsZ93Ds0FnouB4duQ1oq18mAePMtoggqnsmy1mxarNjVvjEakQe_veYg%3D%3D)[**YES**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85cd1b5bf32f4377a8066c37e6af480e&_e=561twDoBSRHJ6ddpLx8eYxLX-I4UWYn7hS7RRH8vRfetR2K0cdBv5T-K3lXKkh5lPXXUvTZNe-h8G0_I3TJJbCJBgrE8wTifSBJOWePjT-1dzIT_4SPg0UBLbbXZV6URwAnqD3ePZJ4hRgIf2BkDRO4fa7W9aNiMD-UdW6IyoVjS3HsEggHGRbXhpsCQBt2GlkS6AT0iIsEI8Qyv1makHLeTfTtuF2KHluOcRr06Ck58k3GxNXlBeGqUUIcb40ywm2B_BLBDBk3T39n5cvbKOJIj4I3iJQTGi66obGd9-_D37ygKeOn2iftAPUW0aIsvcfgkhi5iIj9MTsibLwaBd84YMv4X74AFumxnGPPRHCuycuhUFFQ08hal7OYWIDs_DQn2RS78EB4YiZLljE_9FA%3D%3D) _[**NO**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85cd1b5bf32f4377a8066c37e6af480e&_e=561twDoBSRHJ6ddpLx8eYxLX-I4UWYn7hS7RRH8vRfetR2K0cdBv5T-K3lXKkh5lPXXUvTZNe-h8G0_I3TJJbCJBgrE8wTifSBJOWePjT-1dzIT_4SPg0UBLbbXZV6URwAnqD3ePZJ4hRgIf2BkDRO4fa7W9aNiMD-UdW6IyoVjS3HsEggHGRbXhpsCQBt2GlkS6AT0iIsEI8Qyv1makHLeTfTtuF2KHluOcRr06Ck4bhup2XzR3g9k3zVHloNIiMTBAcd_9Lmtbh1PgfbUhRPS8Hu_oStCk-KQxI-1KaRMHfa1lCaV10Zw138xJ4co1Xqt940bMX6nu2zDTHRqRhT4Yu_VRnKvQzrXkg1_Y93E2voy5IqvSBQNnLKjSrfxDETWyzdjqNkiihdctSWpCuQ%3D%3D)**
---
Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies.

Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC.

They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. **That 's why this email is especially important.**

**_[Here's my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=85cd1b5bf32f4377a8066c37e6af480e&_e=561twDoBSRHJ6ddpLx8eYxLX-I4UWYn7hS7RRH8vRfetR2K0cdBv5T-K3lXKkh5lPXXUvTZNe-h8G0_I3TJJbCJBgrE8wTifSBJOWePjT-1dzIT_4SPg0UBLbbXZV6URwAnqD3ePZJ4hRgIf2BkDRO4fa7W9aNiMD-UdW6IyoVjS3HsEggHGRbXhpsCQBt2GlkS6AT0iIsEI8Qyv1makHLeTfTtuF2KHluOcRr06Ck74WVsNdt6KVX2QXPGUeIg3ygM6eLwMy43UDqOEpNzIbLX04eaXym6niWa1e-MdHAs-lWr_y6JUlve0FHQMmoKAYpYz8cRKXZavlXKzr0DzfjwDCnNFjpCfv7d_Bxl4BNvHyLMyWSnPS6m1k1eG8ZtLOSlT7c4DCS-QoHxi1u4KwQ%3D%3D "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars.")_ **

"I have three urgent matters to discuss with you:" 1. Republicans have an EXTREMELY slim Majority in the House - if we lose even a handful of seats, our Majority will be destroyed and Democrats will retake control 2. Roll Call reported that a top Liberal Super PAC is UNLOADING $80,000,000 in New York and California alone - there are enough battleground seats in those two states alone to tip the balance of power 3. The latest FEC reports have Democrats OUTRAISING Republicans by $12,000,000+ since we took back the House in January When I ran the presidential campaign in 2016, I never minced words with anyone. I always told it like it is... "So here it goes: our House Majority is hanging on by a thread and the Democrats are surging ahead of us. Would you be willing to make a ten or twenty-dollar donation to defend our slim House Majority before our FINAL August deadline?" Look, I don't like sending emails like this - the Democrats have driven our economy off a cliff and I know times are tough. Unfortunately, fundraising can mean the difference between victory and defeat, resulting in Republican policies stewarding our financial future or Democrat policies. Democrats control the Senate and the presidency, so House Republicans have the most important job in DC. They are the ONLY firewall we have to stop Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's radical agenda. And even then, our Majority in the House comes down to just a few seats. That 's why this email is especially important. "Here’s my plan: I set a goal to get every Conservative I can reach with this email to pitch in JUST five or ten dollars." If everyone reading this gives that much, we'll catch up just in time before our August deadline. YOU are key to my goal. We've stood together before, and I know we can win big again! name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: July Average Donation = $32.80
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWfgpOeDtN

Vivek 2024

This campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people
like you - not the Washington elite

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWfgpOeDtN

$32.80
That was our average donation in
July, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign on
February 21st, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters
across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.
Because of your support, we've not only qualified for this
month's debate, but the next one too!

This campaign is proving that
building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington
insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them.
That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that
our message and solutions are what are going to revive our
nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To
keep this going and actually impact change, I need you to join me
and put some skin in the game with me.

Can I count on you to chip in $1,
$5, or even our average gift for last month - $32.80?

Chip in $5 ➔

Chip in $10 ➔

Chip in $20 ➔

Chip in $32.80 ➔

This isn't just a political
campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic
pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our
purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country,
I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually,
truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually
ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of
your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from
conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a
grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the
Washington elite.

I will do what the other GOP
candidates appear afraid to even say but I need your help to
amplify our ideas and message.

Please add your voice to the
growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.

Thanks,

Vivek Ramaswamy

CHIP IN $32.80
→

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: She’s going to lose.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
Lauren Boebert is a fighter that stood by my father when it mattered.
%recipient.md5_hash%
| | | | [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92e67f0dbc4e4f819024ceb847d52b08&_e=cJ89hob6MKF2tC9IMmF51tcRWxCDyz1iwzfUNQyWJEukPq_kNaeSzob0SVhW-FnXdrppQ_jCnSPGvFb73_nnlYD7d_OdViJc9GH6r1UCBsKjfwL5XFKqCIpbutVfPZXWLUruAzgNwBxBjfW-u5FBHa06wUCVjLuKX5IneCVhvciBB_yzsz1x-xjXASY3phgzQUuI0BVppj0EbvcOC4YzSXGxxjhcNHZD5CTha4YAmPskDYnmbhMstaxxBF7qt3lXO78dOqh3ixqCS7Nka0i3NG7NQ_gUUasqngwApsIgWOM%3D)
---
| | | Lauren Boebert is a fighter that **stood by my father when it mattered.**

That's why this is the hardest email I've had to write in a long time...

Friend, I know you care about the MAGA agenda. Lauren has been unrelenting in supporting and defending that agenda. She's taken the hits for it, and her Soros-backed challenger has closed the gap so much that **_her race was just declared a "Toss up."_**

I'm looking at the numbers... and **Lauren Boebert may lose her seat.** **_We can stop this from happening. I am asking everyone reading this email to join me in contributing whatever they can and save Lauren Boebert from defeat._**
---
| | | [STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN >>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92e67f0dbc4e4f819024ceb847d52b08&_e=cJ89hob6MKF2tC9IMmF51tcRWxCDyz1iwzfUNQyWJEukPq_kNaeSzob0SVhW-FnXdrppQ_jCnSPGvFb73_nnlYD7d_OdViJc9GH6r1UCBsLm-NkEN0j95h1cJvJzYfv00nGvnH1GwCetKHdHii50YoEwD2hPqawxO1-n4QuyikwfarKbVJjEZpoFkHob-2_JRA3_YsiEYliJBrkss4fx2I4N8IupVyPjibsSFomL3w5l2cCsb51isS5OfojzsW2z8rM5OR22zset9xtRZAgOQQ%3D%3D "STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN >>")
---
| Let's just start with the facts.

**>** Last year, her opponent **lost by only 546 votes** after a lengthy recount.

**>** This year, he's **outraised Lauren 3 to 1** , and she's in danger of falling too far behind.

**>** If this trend continues, Soros will have punished **one of the strongest voices defending my father** and the American way next year. | **Weekly Newsletter**
---
| | Derek,

**Another week, another increase in inflation.
**
Inflation is up again another 3.2% this month compared to last July and 16.9% since Joe Biden was sworn in.

On Monday we released a video project interview of Grethel from Chichester describing her inflation story. You can watch the moving video and submit your own story at [https://www.granitesolutions.org/inflation-story](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Finflation-story/1/01000189e47a5f05-75742790-5e02-4d25-9b22-d4e432a469ce-000000/VIoX8stNtqxGC7bx6wPQBiNGkjk=334)

Grethel's story is not uncommon but it is still important to share it with our networks in order to show people the reality of inflation.

**Granite Solutions 2023 Summit****
**
Join us for an impactful day of learning and growth at the New Hampshire Institute of Politics (NHIOP) on Saturday, September 23rd. This candidate & activist training is designed for those who are passionate about shaping the future of the Granite State. From field organizing to social media use, our expert panelists and presenters will guide attendees through various essential topics.

From field organizing to social media use, our expert panelists and presenters will guide attendees through various essential topics. Whether you're a seasoned candidate or a budding activist, this training will equip you with the tools and knowledge to make a difference in your community.

Event Partners and Sponsors will be announced as we get closer to the event. [You can RSVP here.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fopenwith.link%2FGraniteSolutions.org%2Fevents%2F1830.html/1/01000189e47a5f05-75742790-5e02-4d25-9b22-d4e432a469ce-000000/ZBBsciOxJIEP3ZlZjulsAR5XCBo=334)

Best,

Rep. Joe Sweeney
Chairman, Granite Solutions

name: Al Franken
subject: another big announcement:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend,

A month or two ago I wrote to you with a big announcement: my friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District – one of the most competitive races in the country.

**Now I’m back with an even bigger announcement: Josh is running for Congress in one of the most competitive races in the country... AND his wife just had a baby!**

[**While Josh is catching sleep in 30-minute increments and cleaning up spit-up, I’m pitching in to make sure his fundraising doesn’t look like a dirty diaper. So I have to ask, will you split a contribution between the Voter Protection Project and Josh’s campaign today?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51240?t=6&akid=9809%2E878179%2Ekg-Nxx) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51241?t=7&akid=9809%2E878179%2Ekg-Nxx)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51242?t=8&akid=9809%2E878179%2Ekg-Nxx)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51243?t=9&akid=9809%2E878179%2Ekg-Nxx)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51244?t=10&akid=9809%2E878179%2Ekg-Nxx)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51240?t=11&akid=9809%2E878179%2Ekg-Nxx)
You know who’s probably getting a full night's sleep? Josh’s opponent, Marc Molinaro. In fact, he’s probably dreaming about taking away someone’s rights, rolling back gun safety legislation or blocking progress on clean energy – he’s only been in Congress a couple of months and he’s already done all that and more!

We need someone like Josh in Congress – he’s the real deal.
[ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51240?t=12&akid=9809%2E878179%2Ekg-Nxx)
(The really tall guy is Josh.)
After graduating from Harvard Law School, Josh worked on a landmark civil rights lawsuit to help kids from low-income families get access to healthcare. When I was in the Senate, Josh and I passed bills expanding rights for survivors of domestic abuse and providing new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. And since then, Josh has fought in the Supreme Court to block the Trump Administration’s Muslim Ban and plans to deport Dreamers.

**Even before he was a dad, Josh was always looking out for the little guy.**

[**So what do you say? Will you split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between the Voter Protection Project and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51240?t=13&akid=9809%2E878179%2Ekg-Nxx)

Thanks,

Al

P.S. I like the P.S. because it’s one more opportunity to ask for a donation. [**So donate now!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/51240?t=14&akid=9809%2E878179%2Ekg-Nxx)
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9809%2E878179%2Ekg-Nxx). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9809%2E878179%2Ekg-Nxx).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=9809%2E878179%2Ekg-Nxx) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=9809%2E878179%2Ekg-Nxx). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=9809%2E878179%2Ekg-Nxx)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=9809%2E878179%2Ekg-Nxx)

name: David Trone
subject: My campaign strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
Peter, I learned a lot about politics by coaching my kids’ sports teams.

Patience, hard work, and listening to my players — those are three skills essential to success.

I’m implementing the same strategy for my campaign for the U.S. Senate, with an extra focus on listening to my team — you. I need your input to best represent your concerns on the campaign trail and in Washington.

We put together an exclusive Democratic Strategy Focus Group, and we’ve selected our best players – which includes you – to participate. Will you accept your exclusive invitation to help us craft our winning campaign strategy?

ENTER THE FOCUS GROUP >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/mx9tqiUjWkuGMf-RbfDCKQ2

Thank you for your support. It means the world to me.

– David

Paid for by David Trone for Maryland.
David Trone for Maryland
P.O. Box 83998

body:
Tell It Like It Is PAC Takes Aim At Trump In New TV Spot | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b1466d81f9f6/what-they-are-saying-about-chris-christie-13559904?e=d0a9afa930)

**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:**
August 11, 2023
Contact: [press@tellitlikeitispac.com ](mailto:press@tellitlikeitispac.com?subject=null&body=null)

**Tell It Like It Is PAC Takes Aim At Trump In New TV Spot
** _$400,000 Media Buy To Begin In New Hampshire Friday_
**ARLINGTON, VA —** Today, Tell It Like It Is PAC released its second television ad of the 2024 presidential election. Entitled “Winning Again,” the :30 second spot is part of a $400,000 media buy that will air statewide on broadcast and cable in New Hampshire and across digital platforms.
The ad contrasts the “drama, distraction and lies” around former President Trump with Governor Christie’s conservative record of success in one of the bluest states in the nation.
As a U.S. Attorney, Christie won [130 political corruption cases](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=89e1921572&e=d0a9afa930) and successfully tracked down child traffickers and pornographers in New Jersey and [across the globe](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=a52909d57a&e=d0a9afa930). As governor, he vetoed[ more tax hikes](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=c06b1dff98&e=d0a9afa930) than any governor in American history, repealing the estate tax and capping property taxes.

His efforts overhauling the Camden Police Department, led to a significant [reduction in crime](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=a30d0556ad&e=d0a9afa930) in what was once the most dangerous city in America - the murder rate has [dropped](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=344f645407&e=d0a9afa930) by 74%.
The latest public poll in the Granite State shows Governor Christie surging into second place, tied at 9 percent with Florida Governor Ron DeSantis.
**“Winning Again”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=f6de69b7e1&e=d0a9afa930)
**TRANSCRIPT FOR “WINNING AGAIN” (TV:30):
**
**Voice Over:** _Tired of the drama, the distractions, the lies?_
_It’s time for conservatives to win again._
_Chris Christie._
_A former prosecutor who convicted child pornographers, corrupt politicians._
_A successful blue-state governor._
_Christie took on the teachers’ union and won, turned around Jersey’s most violent city, and got Democrats to cut taxes._
_A real conservative – Christie tells the truth, and he’ll beat Joe Biden - easily._
_Tell It Like It Is PAC is responsible for the content of this advertisement.
_
_-###-_

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49822295e81c447a82d3d31ddc258d5b&_e=1abPU1Z8AQMftNnC7Uw1_JEaCGwVq37ts24-UMfABr5_5YhNcFDp3ro6b1N7INii1d54FpvppZM1-IdOJ1_0OqH8aVeEcMv44eHb8IUQjtFkrxsU2fdL1Pfk1J8ahaAWchfpWPxphPz8CH5zPSqZGs6mmzVTuli2zTGjhlGfPH8Pe_ZNryzYt6ESIYFW6T6lOX5t09suDUPhWnO_Z5vChKJE5jNYf4rm7GfOBfU8rBN3CeP9sz9fmON4wq3SOkIFf8nL7W5CWuBAlt7hhkE6fPzbq6MIuroFSbyGyP5gOpFmLwUznuySOxRZ8MC6fwKpo1teOLrHv745EWkylflGdO_uWSjkvozfUQXOn4mYOxgQ_GOxlAGXLRp_W80nK01htxBhuz_9jNyHP5fFuSna7E-zRke1wxu-9t105kQTDys%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49822295e81c447a82d3d31ddc258d5b&_e=1abPU1Z8AQMftNnC7Uw1_JEaCGwVq37ts24-UMfABr5_5YhNcFDp3ro6b1N7INii1d54FpvppZM1-IdOJ1_0OqH8aVeEcMv44eHb8IUQjtFkrxsU2fdL1Pfk1J8ahaAWchfpWPxphPz8CH5zPSqZGs6mmzVTuli2zTGjhlGfPH8Pe_ZNryzYt6ESIYFW6T6lOX5t09suDUPhWnO_Z5vChKJE5jNYf4rm7GfOBfU8rBN3CeP9sz9fmON4wq3SOkIFf8nL7W5CWuBAlt7hhkE6fPENKv4aUozBVRbBmRp_m32DOIuejJWIv7sVYsp_bYSxf7eLFxY8RKKnW9MG9RGv5HmOj3E9ew53XaoLLRdj84AnfpYE2wCixY9FAszMxjPpu0SFl4J2VVRZXsmyPOC3VImFVMm0ZPCZ-CVJdrKhrKA%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49822295e81c447a82d3d31ddc258d5b&_e=1abPU1Z8AQMftNnC7Uw1_JEaCGwVq37ts24-UMfABr5_5YhNcFDp3ro6b1N7INii1d54FpvppZM1-IdOJ1_0OqH8aVeEcMv44eHb8IUQjtFkrxsU2fdL1Pfk1J8ahaAWchfpWPxphPz8CH5zPSqZGs6mmzVTuli2zTGjhlGfPH8Pe_ZNryzYt6ESIYFW6T6lOX5t09suDUPhWnO_Z5vChKJE5jNYf4rm7GfOBfU8rBN3CeP9sz9fmON4wq3SOkIFf8nL7W5CWuBAlt7hhkE6fAxQRKU0-c9w8sduVKS0icm1naeCdxtuVkAjJhANQpRBKPAJLeG4YqZCoIkbq-69fU_loh8UNfttgzpzkskF2C9ddSzJ5P12cK_5RFjFUDc89m1oBxTmaYtLoZhrVJU_gHx4ckuMt0MhFkWb5XpmIN8%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49822295e81c447a82d3d31ddc258d5b&_e=1abPU1Z8AQMftNnC7Uw1_JEaCGwVq37ts24-UMfABr5_5YhNcFDp3ro6b1N7INii1d54FpvppZM1-IdOJ1_0OqH8aVeEcMv44eHb8IUQjtFkrxsU2fdL1Pfk1J8ahaAWchfpWPxphPz8CH5zPSqZGs6mmzVTuli2zTGjhlGfPH8Pe_ZNryzYt6ESIYFW6T6lOX5t09suDUPhWnO_Z5vChKJE5jNYf4rm7GfOBfU8rBN3CeP9sz9fmON4wq3SOkIFf8nL7W5CWuBAlt7hhkE6fACGcg2UyUoXksklwZZxsaOdfkjKxPIcI6caCat9wxc_7Wd2gW1PSYip5GAEivhimQpNMAaxcTH2Xa046BoMzQWWabtCzFqGcadAuukeKZG3mHyo2CY4LcvtuLgORo0SNR0H5UdOIbROD84AWNNMGk0%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
