clean_body: After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law | | | | | Fellow American, There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: 3️⃣ Toss Ups
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
My race is 1 of 3 to decide the Senate, then the Presidency.
#

In a moment, I am going to ask you to make your first donation to my campaign for Senate in Arizona. But first, let me explain why your support is so crucial.
First, there are only **THREE** Senate races that are rated as true toss-ups by _Inside Elections_ , meaning it’s a 50/50 shot and anyone's game.
And guess, what? **Arizona is one of those races.**
That’s reason number one that your donation could be a game changer as we work to hold the Senate.
Second, Krysten Sinema is raising millions of dollars from corporate interests, and Kari Lake is waiting in the wings with Trump’s full backing. We don’t know when they’ll announce, but we have to be ready when they do.
That's reason number two that your donation is a game changer.
Now, I know that it might not seem like $3 is a whole lot against the millions funding the other side. But yesterday, Jana from Prescott donated $3, and Patricia from Tucson pitched in $20. Each and every dollar adds up. That’s not a gimmick, that's the honest truth.
[**So please, make your first donation right away in support of Ruben Gallego to keep MAGA loving Lake and hedge-fund courting Sinema out of the Senate.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230811-1-f&t=1&akid=914%2E734936%2EY1D-69)

Ruben

name: Diane Sare
subject: Symposium: Deadly wildfires and 'extreme weather'--What's the relationship to human activity?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230811_symposium&n=1)
---
Friend -- As devastating fires tear across the island of Maui in Hawaii, killing dozens, the media fan the flames of hysteria about "climate change." The climate has been changing for billions of years on our planet, and every other planet in our solar system and galaxy. As human beings, we are supposed to study the scientific principles behind these effects and learn how to preserve the well being of our people when confronted by such events. I will be joined by two longtime scientific collaborators of Lyndon LaRouche, RObert Hux, and Jason Ross, who have been investigating this important area.
### [NY Symposium: Friday, August,11 8:00 pm: Deadly wildfires and 'extreme weather'--What's the relationship to human activity?](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k-KX4ZymTiv1yEX-FmDmPnM&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230811_symposium&n=2)

Trump knows he could finally get what’s coming to him. We want Judge Chutkan to know we stand with her against Trump’s attacks and she has our full support to finally bring him to justice. name: =?utf-8?Q?Alfonso=20For=20Congress?=
subject: Celebrating the Pact Act!
body:
Go to alfonsoforcongress.com to learn more! | | | | |
---
|
---
# Celebrating
# the PACT Act for
# Veterans' Healthcare
|
---
I hope this message finds you in good health.
Today, I am excited to share a significant milestone with you – the one-year anniversary of the PACT Act (Providing Accountability to Combat Veterans' Healthcare Timely Access to Care Act) of 2022.
|
---
[](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=3a7e212cad&e=16d812e81c)
|
---
| [LEARN MORE](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=88e1c86ea4&e=16d812e81c)
---
The PACT Act is a pivotal piece of legislation that reaffirms our commitment to those who have served our nation.
The PACT Act enhances veterans' healthcare access by streamlining applications, reducing wait times, and ensuring the VA delivers timely and efficient services.
It addresses the crucial issue of veterans' healthcare, ensuring that those who have bravely defended our freedoms receive the medical care they deserve.
|
---
# Honoring Our
# Commitment to Veterans
|
---
I am humbled to share that we recently marked the one-year anniversary of the PACT Act.
This event allowed us to reflect on progress, celebrate positive changes, and discuss ongoing efforts to enhance veterans' healthcare services.
At the event, Senator Gary Peters spoke about the importance of the PACT Act and his tireless work to ensure its passage.
His dedication and commitment have played a significant role in making this legislation a reality.
|
---
# YOUR CONTRIBUTION MATTERS!
|
---
| [GIVE TODAY](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=bfde87c2c4&e=16d812e81c)
---
Your support has been invaluable in advocating for initiatives like the PACT Act.
It's a reminder that positive change is possible when we stand together for a common cause.
As we celebrate this milestone, I want to express my gratitude for your unwavering commitment to our veterans and their well-being.
While we celebrate this progress, our journey is far from over.
Together, we will keep working to ensure that veterans receive the care and support they rightfully deserve.
|
---
# EVERY DOLLAR COUNTS!
|
---
If you'd like to continue supporting our efforts, consider making a donation to our campaign.
Your contribution will help us continue advocating for veterans' healthcare and other important causes.
To make a contribution or learn more about our campaign, visit our website at alfonsoforcongress.com and click on the "Give Today" button to make a secure online donation.
Every contribution, no matter the amount, makes a difference.
Thank you once again for your belief in our cause and your dedication to making a difference.
Together, we can build a Michigan that reflects the true spirit of democracy - a Michigan thatworks for everyone.
With heartfelt gratitude,
Alfonso For Congress Team
| | | | [](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=b3a66e6cef&e=16d812e81c)| [](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=f66cd85eb1&e=16d812e81c)| [](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=fa427dc35c&e=16d812e81c)| [](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=2da6ef584f&e=16d812e81c)| [](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=e2c3c4f555&e=16d812e81c)
---|---|---|---|---

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Our mailing address is:
Alfonso for Congress P.O Box 1375 Holland, MI 49422 USA

name: Attention
subject: President Trump JUST ISSUED A PROCLAMATION
body:
See it for yourself:

| |
---
| | | President Trump JUST ISSUED A PROCLAMATION on the latest criminal arrest and attempt to END his 2024 campaign.

See it for yourself:

_"Isn 't is TERRIBLE that a Political Opponent can haphazardly charge you with FAKE crimes in the middle of your campaign in order to interfere with your time & message, and there is nothing you can do to stop this travesty of 'justice.' They had 2.5 years to file, long before the campaign started. Another Russia, Russia, Russia HOAX. Should not be allowed to happen!"_

Donald Trump is holding nothing back. He's made it clear that this witch hunt is nothing more than a SHAM that must end immediately!

He was just arrested for the THIRD time with a fourth indictment on the way.

So, we're calling on every last patriot reading this to speak out before Trump is forced to appear in court. It's now or never as the 24-hour countdown has already begun...

Peter – the situation in North Carolina is urgent: can you sign our petition showing you stand with fair maps and voting rights for all? | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67920009/421315061/837445042?refcode=230811-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2JiOTVmOC00YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C4LjtACvwjRWnq89EIkXWbT9HRnQZ5-KXIYxT_eLRkM=) Peter – **The situation in North Carolina is urgent:** [**can you sign our petition showing you stand with fair maps and voting rights for all?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67920010/421315062/-254604230?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2JiOTVmOC00YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C4LjtACvwjRWnq89EIkXWbT9HRnQZ5-KXIYxT_eLRkM=&emci=80bb95f8-4a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=87bb95f8-4a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=28008880) **[**SIGN ON**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67920011/421315063/-254604230?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2JiOTVmOC00YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C4LjtACvwjRWnq89EIkXWbT9HRnQZ5-KXIYxT_eLRkM=&emci=80bb95f8-4a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=87bb95f8-4a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=28008880)** Voting rights are the cornerstone of our democracy, and we must continue taking action to protect and expand them. In recent years, we have witnessed countless attempts from far-right Republicans to suppress voter participation in our great state of North Carolina, undermining the very principles that make our democracy what it is. From **[partisan gerrymandering](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67920012/421315064/-1627437615?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2JiOTVmOC00YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C4LjtACvwjRWnq89EIkXWbT9HRnQZ5-KXIYxT_eLRkM=&emci=80bb95f8-4a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=87bb95f8-4a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=28008880)** to restrictive voting laws, we know they are only looking to gain more power. [**Can you sign our petition today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67920013/421315065/-254604230?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2JiOTVmOC00YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C4LjtACvwjRWnq89EIkXWbT9HRnQZ5-KXIYxT_eLRkM=&emci=80bb95f8-4a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=87bb95f8-4a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=28008880) **[**SIGN ON**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67920014/421315066/-254604230?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2JiOTVmOC00YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C4LjtACvwjRWnq89EIkXWbT9HRnQZ5-KXIYxT_eLRkM=&emci=80bb95f8-4a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=87bb95f8-4a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=28008880)** By signing our petition, you will help us send a powerful message to extremist Republicans that we demand an equitable and just electoral process. Thank you for being a champion of democracy. We are truly grateful for your continued support. – Team Wiley

Peter, Weekends are the slowest fundraising days of the week, so we need to start out with a BANG if we’re going to keep up.

**That’s why we’re OFFICIALLY launching $5 FRIDAY!**

We’re rallying conservatives _everywhere_ to take back the U.S. Senate in Virginia.

_And as our campaign continues to come under fire from the Left, we need all the support we can get to fend off their attacks._

**$5 may not seem like much, but it adds up to a LOT for our mission. I can’t stress enough that every single dollar counts from now until Election Day.**

name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: The Presumptive Nominee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter
| | |
---
|
---
# _The Presumptive Nominee_
---
---
**_Congressman Jim Banks_** _joins**Chairman Kyle Hupfer** and **RNC National Committeewoman Anne Hathaway** onstage after **Chairman Hupfer** announced Indiana's Republican National Committee (RNC) members had signed a letter allowing the RNC to provide pre-primary support._
---
Last night, over 800 Republicans from across the state came together in to celebrate our party's proud history, prepare for the fights ahead this year and next, and solidify the long-term strength of our party. We heard from Bowie, Maryland Mayor Pro Tem Roxy Ndebumadu and honored the third graduating cohort of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series, bringing in another group of outstanding leaders into the party who are spreading our message and ideals into their communities where Republicans have been underrepresented for far too long. [This cohort](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/db6b809ffe9be878/fc8002b407d53e1ec3d6b838967d376c/40313) and [those before](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/db6b809ffe9be878/c8483d2be9437726c3d6b838967d376c/40313) it are already making a difference, and I'm confident that some will join the ranks of elected officials we celebrated last night. We also heard from Congressman Jim Banks, but not before making an unprecedented announcement. As state party chair, I serve as a member of the Republican National Committee (RNC) alongside Anne Hathaway and John Hammond. Before bringing Congressman Banks onstage, I announced that the three of us had signed a letter under the RNC's Rule 11 to allow the RNC to provide "any and all pre-primary financial assistance and in-kind aid the RNC may choose to provide in furtherance of the United States Senate candidacy of Congressman Jim Banks." It's clear that Congressman Banks is _the_ conservative choice and we look forward to him taking the fight for our conservative Hoosier values to the U.S. Senate as Indiana’s next U.S. Senator!
---
---
Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
**Forwarded this newsletter from a friend? [Sign up for The Party Line here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/db6b809ffe9be878/fddfa2ced0f22dfcc3d6b838967d376c/40313)**
---
|
---
| |
# **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| |
# 💼 _Honoring Hoosier Businesses_
---
---
| | _**Governor Eric Holcomb** provides remarks during the 2023 Century and Half Century award ceremony._**
---
This week,**Governor Eric Holcomb **honored 38 companies across the state with the Governor’s Century or Half Century Business Award.
* The honor recognizes “each company’s longevity and service to its employees, community and the state."

**What he's saying:** "Every year, the Century and Half-Century Awards remind me of the dedication and perseverance Hoosiers across the state bring to their businesses, and each year it is truly an honor to recognize these organizations that have withstood the test of time, navigated economic uncertainties and demonstrated unconditional commitment to their employees and communities across Indiana," said **Gov. Holcomb**. Over the past 32 years, Indiana governors have honored more than 1,200 companies.
**What else happened this week?****Gov. Holcomb**[dedicated](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/db6b809ffe9be878/0cf43793a31da6e9c3d6b838967d376c/40313) the new E.S. Witchger School of Engineering Building Marian University Indianapolis.
* To stay up-to-date, follow Gov. Holcomb on [Facebook](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/db6b809ffe9be878/f15b15b65f78a724c3d6b838967d376c/40313) or [Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/db6b809ffe9be878/6de66b7a24086949c3d6b838967d376c/40313).

---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/db6b809ffe9be878/d2494acd13868073c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
| | |
---
# _Thank You, Matt_
---
Throughout my six and a half years serving as the chairman of the Indiana Republican Party, we've had an incredible team working night and day to elect Republicans up and down the ballot across the state. I truly believe that we have the strongest state party in the country, and that our team, which has been led by Executive Director Matt Huckleby for the entirety of my tenure, is unmatched. Today is Matt's last day at the Indiana Republican Party. Thank you, Matt, for everything you have done for the party and for Republicans across the state. — Kyle and Your Team at the Indiana Republican Party
---
|
---
# 💰 _Fox News: House GOP Release Bank Records on Hunter Biden Payments from Russian, Kazakh Oligarchs, Total Clears $20M_
---
From [Fox News](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/db6b809ffe9be878/4daeba76bccf60cdc3d6b838967d376c/40313): House Oversight Committee Chairman Rep. James Comer, R-Ky., released a third memo Wednesday about the Biden family’s foreign business dealings, producing bank records purporting to show that Hunter Biden and his business associates received millions in payments from Russian and Kazakhstani oligarchs when his father was vice president. The 19-page memo, which provides screenshots of redacted bank records, says millions in payments came from Ukrainian energy company Burisma Holdings, as well as Russian oligarch Yelena Baturina and Kazakhstani oligarch Kenes Rakishev, and that then-Vice President Biden attended dinners with Baturina, Rakishev and a representative from Burisma. "Then-Vice President Biden met—in person, for significant periods of time—with those individuals or their representatives," the memo states. "Then-Vice President Biden joined approximately 20 phone calls on speakerphone with Hunter Biden’s foreign business associates and attended dinners with foreign oligarchs who paid huge sums of money to Hunter Biden. Joe Biden, ‘the brand,’ was the only product the Bidens sold." _[Story continues](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/db6b809ffe9be878/9ba138df5c31d592c3d6b838967d376c/40313)_.
---
|
---
# 💡 _Democrats Forget How They Voted_
---
---
The Indiana Democrat Party and Democrats in the statehouse seem to have forgotten how they voted on key bills this past legislative session. **Catch up: **Over the past couple weeks, the Indiana Democrat Party has attempted to attack statehouse Republicans on multiple issues, seemingly forgetting that their members voted against solutions to those very issues.
* On [child care](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/db6b809ffe9be878/e1e1bfec408a38f3c3d6b838967d376c/40313), all but two statehouse Democrats voted against establishing a tax credit to help expand child care across the state.
* On [clean water](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/db6b809ffe9be878/43e150678583729ac3d6b838967d376c/40313), all but two statehouse Democrats voted against a 500% increase for Clean Water Indiana.
* On[ Pre-K](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/db6b809ffe9be878/87e4b26788820b91c3d6b838967d376c/40313), all but two statehouse Democrats voted against expanding eligibility for the program, making thousands of more Hoosier families eligible.

**The icing on the cake:** Democrat State Senator **Andrea Hunley** sent out a taxpayer-funded mailer saying she was proud of what "we" were able to accomplish this past legislative session.
* The problem? She joined all but two statehouse Democrats in voting against everything she listed, including funding for a homeless shelter, eliminating textbook fees, doubling the amount of funding for food banks, and creating an economic enhancement district for downtown Indianapolis.

**Statehouse Republicans are the ones delivering for Hoosiers.**
---
|
---
# 👀 ICYMI: _NBC News: Note Cards and Shorter Stairs: How Biden's Campaign is Addressing His Age_
---
From _[NBC News](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/db6b809ffe9be878/c1970e926b25af85c3d6b838967d376c/40313):_ "The president of the United States tripping and falling is never a good moment in the throes of a re-election campaign. But when the president is 80 years old and already faces concerns that he’s too old for another term, it’s something of a crisis ... "Biden’s answer to voters who question whether he’s up to the rigors of a second term is simple: 'Watch me.' The trouble is, voters are watching, and what they’re seeing is hardening impressions that it’s time for him to step aside,[ polling shows](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/db6b809ffe9be878/887e729f216f6198c3d6b838967d376c/40313). Apart from being the most taxing job on the world stage, the presidency is also the most public, and signs of advancing age are tough to miss." _[Story continues](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/db6b809ffe9be878/1dd3ebaa042aacebc3d6b838967d376c/40313)[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/db6b809ffe9be878/83d9c6454431d33fc3d6b838967d376c/40313).__

# 🗳️ _Less Than 90 Days to Go_

---
We are officially less than 90 days until Election Day and there are plenty of important dates you need to be aware of. **Make a plan:** Add these dates into your calendar and make a plan to vote this fall.
* Sept. 23, 2023: Absentee ballots begin to be mailed
* Oct. 10, 2023: Voter registration ends
* Oct. 11, 2023: Early voting begins
* Oct. 26, 2023: Deadline to request an absentee ballot
* **Nov. 7, 2023: ELECTION DAY**

Visit [indianavoters.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/db6b809ffe9be878/b55e0d0a24d8daa9c3d6b838967d376c/40313) today!

clean_body: The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter | | | | The Presumptive Nominee Congressman Jim Banks joinsChairman Kyle Hupfer and RNC National Committeewoman Anne Hathaway onstage after Chairman Hupfer announced Indiana's Republican National Committee (RNC) members had signed a letter allowing the RNC to provide pre-primary support. Last night, over 800 Republicans from across the state came together in to celebrate our party's proud history, prepare for the fights ahead this year and next, and solidify the long-term strength of our party. We heard from Bowie, Maryland Mayor Pro Tem Roxy Ndebumadu and honored the third graduating cohort of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series, bringing in another group of outstanding leaders into the party who are spreading our message and ideals into their communities where Republicans have been underrepresented for far too long. and it are already making a difference, and I'm confident that some will join the ranks of elected officials we celebrated last night. We also heard from Congressman Jim Banks, but not before making an unprecedented announcement. As state party chair, I serve as a member of the Republican National Committee (RNC) alongside Anne Hathaway and John Hammond. Before bringing Congressman Banks onstage, I announced that the three of us had signed a letter under the RNC's Rule 11 to allow the RNC to provide "any and all pre-primary financial assistance and in-kind aid the RNC may choose to provide in furtherance of the United States Senate candidacy of Congressman Jim Banks." It's clear that Congressman Banks is the conservative choice and we look forward to him taking the fight for our conservative Hoosier values to the U.S. Senate as Indiana’s next U.S. Senator! Chairman Kyle Hupfer | Forwarded this newsletter from a friend? | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | 💼 Honoring Hoosier Businesses | | Governor Eric Holcomb provides remarks during the 2023 Century and Half Century award ceremony. This week,Governor Eric Holcomb honored 38 companies across the state with the Governor’s Century or Half Century Business Award. The honor recognizes “each company’s longevity and service to its employees, community and the state." What he's saying: "Every year, the Century and Half-Century Awards remind me of the dedication and perseverance Hoosiers across the state bring to their businesses, and each year it is truly an honor to recognize these organizations that have withstood the test of time, navigated economic uncertainties and demonstrated unconditional commitment to their employees and communities across Indiana," said Gov. Holcomb. Over the past 32 years, Indiana governors have honored more than 1,200 companies. What else happened this week?Gov. Holcomb the new E.S. Witchger School of Engineering Building Marian University Indianapolis. To stay up-to-date, follow Gov. Holcomb on or . | | | | | Thank You, Matt Throughout my six and a half years serving as the chairman of the Indiana Republican Party, we've had an incredible team working night and day to elect Republicans up and down the ballot across the state. I truly believe that we have the strongest state party in the country, and that our team, which has been led by Executive Director Matt Huckleby for the entirety of my tenure, is unmatched. Today is Matt's last day at the Indiana Republican Party. Thank you, Matt, for everything you have done for the party and for Republicans across the state. — Kyle and Your Team at the Indiana Republican Party | 💰 Fox News: House GOP Release Bank Records on Hunter Biden Payments from Russian, Kazakh Oligarchs, Total Clears $20M From : House Oversight Committee Chairman Rep. James Comer, R-Ky., released a third memo Wednesday about the Biden family’s foreign business dealings, producing bank records purporting to show that Hunter Biden and his business associates received millions in payments from Russian and Kazakhstani oligarchs when his father was vice president. The 19-page memo, which provides screenshots of redacted bank records, says millions in payments came from Ukrainian energy company Burisma Holdings, as well as Russian oligarch Yelena Baturina and Kazakhstani oligarch Kenes Rakishev, and that then-Vice President Biden attended dinners with Baturina, Rakishev and a representative from Burisma. "Then-Vice President Biden met—in person, for significant periods of time—with those individuals or their representatives," the memo states. "Then-Vice President Biden joined approximately 20 phone calls on speakerphone with Hunter Biden’s foreign business associates and attended dinners with foreign oligarchs who paid huge sums of money to Hunter Biden. Joe Biden, ‘the brand,’ was the only product the Bidens sold." . | 💡 Democrats Forget How They Voted The Indiana Democrat Party and Democrats in the statehouse seem to have forgotten how they voted on key bills this past legislative session. Catch up: Over the past couple weeks, the Indiana Democrat Party has attempted to attack statehouse Republicans on multiple issues, seemingly forgetting that their members voted against solutions to those very issues. On , all but two statehouse Democrats voted against establishing a tax credit to help expand child care across the state. On , all but two statehouse Democrats voted against a 500% increase for Clean Water Indiana. On, all but two statehouse Democrats voted against expanding eligibility for the program, making thousands of more Hoosier families eligible. The icing on the cake: Democrat State Senator Andrea Hunley sent out a taxpayer-funded mailer saying she was proud of what "we" were able to accomplish this past legislative session. The problem? She joined all but two statehouse Democrats in voting against everything she listed, including funding for a homeless shelter, eliminating textbook fees, doubling the amount of funding for food banks, and creating an economic enhancement district for downtown Indianapolis. Statehouse Republicans are the ones delivering for Hoosiers. | 👀 ICYMI: NBC News: Note Cards and Shorter Stairs: How Biden's Campaign is Addressing His Age From : "The president of the United States tripping and falling is never a good moment in the throes of a re-election campaign. But when the president is 80 years old and already faces concerns that he’s too old for another term, it’s something of a crisis ... "Biden’s answer to voters who question whether he’s up to the rigors of a second term is simple: 'Watch me.' The trouble is, voters are watching, and what they’re seeing is hardening impressions that it’s time for him to step aside,. Apart from being the most taxing job on the world stage, the presidency is also the most public, and signs of advancing age are tough to miss." . | 🤓 Read Up on Our 2023 Candidate Features We've long talked about our deep bench of talent across the state. And in this year's municipal elections, it's certainly showing. You can read our quick Q&As; with multiple candidates and take action to support their candidacies by visiting our . Are you a mayoral candidate that would like to be featured? mailto:lthomas@indiana.gop?subject=2023%20candidate%20feature "lthomas@indiana.gop" to us. | 🗳️ Less Than 90 Days to Go We are officially less than 90 days until Election Day and there are plenty of important dates you need to be aware of. Make a plan: Add these dates into your calendar and make a plan to vote this fall. name: The GIFFORDS Team
subject: A victory for our movement
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This week, the Supreme Court ruled on the side of safety by allowing the ATF’s regulations on ghost guns to remain in effect.
#

Friends -
This week, the Supreme Court ruled on the side of safety by allowing the ATF’s regulations on ghost guns to remain in effect.
Ghost guns can be built at home from parts purchased online, thus becoming untraceable firearms. When these firearms are in the hands of people who legally should not have a gun, it poses a grave risk to our public safety. The number of ghost guns recovered by law enforcement has increased by **1,000%** since 2016. This is why regulating ghost guns is so critically important.
GIFFORDS has been leading the fight against ghost guns at the federal level and in states across the country. This week’s Supreme Court ruling is a testament to the hard work that you all have helped fuel to keep untraceable firearms out of the wrong hands.
However, this fight is not over yet. The gun lobby is suing to overturn this rule and keep ghost guns unregulated. We can’t let them win.
[**Will you make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today? Help us send a strong message to the gun lobby that we won’t allow ghost guns to flood our communities.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug23.8Y_0mi&refcode=em230811-1-15&t=1&akid=6322%2E3935704%2EiLz6am)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Team AOC
subject: Are you on some of these other email lists?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Are you on other political email lists?
If so, you probably regularly receive urgent and panicky emails asking for money. Too many politicians and organizations see their grassroots supporters as an ATM machine. They use scare tactics, guilt and shame, and downright misleading language to coax people into donating.
It’s bad, and getting worse. **Team AOC is determined to rise above that and treat you and our other grassroots supporters with respect.** Here’s what we believe:
\- Instead of scaring you to donate, we want to inspire you to take action.
\- Instead of guilt-tripping you for not donating enough, we want our emails to provide value to you. We try to send out informative, educational content.
\- Instead of misleading you about fake 5X matches or faux threats, we’re honest with you about what’s going on and how you can help.
\- Instead of only hitting you up when we need money, we’ll also send you opportunities to volunteer or help other candidates and causes who need it.
**But just like all the other campaigns in your inbox, we do have fundraising goals and deadlines.** Everything we raise each quarter is detailed in our public FEC report, and we want to post the biggest possible fundraising numbers. But we’re not going to scare or scam you into donating. We’ll just ask nicely because your donations to AOC are important and meaningful.
[Would you be able to make a $5 contribution to help us reach our mid-month fundraising goal? Every single donation will truly make a difference.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-2023811-1.zcTowa&refcode=em20230811-4787-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4787%2E2526796%2EF0IPr3)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-2023811-1.zcTowa&refcode=em20230811-4787-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4787%2E2526796%2EF0IPr3)**
If you can’t make a donation today, that’s okay too. We still want you here, and we still appreciate you reading our emails.
The truth is that this email list is powerful. It’s powerful precisely because you’re here, with so many others. It’s powerful because when so many of us take collective action all at once, we can make real change.
So, maybe you can’t [donate right now.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-2023811-1.zcTowa&refcode=em20230811-4787-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4787%2E2526796%2EF0IPr3) But maybe you’ll get something of value from the next email we send. Or perhaps you’ll join us for a volunteer activity down the road.
No matter what, we’re glad you’re here. Thanks for being part of this movement,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-2023811-1?refcode=em20230811-4787-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=22&refcode2=4787_2526796_F0IPr3&akid=4787%2E2526796%2EF0IPr3)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230811-4787-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=23&akid=4787%2E2526796%2EF0IPr3)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=4787%2E2526796%2EF0IPr3) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=4787%2E2526796%2EF0IPr3) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=4787%2E2526796%2EF0IPr3)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=4787%2E2526796%2EF0IPr3)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=4787%2E2526796%2EF0IPr3)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Breaking: Soros is coming after Texas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
He will go to any length to BUY wins for Democrats.
| [](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=9da120f6afd24f75a0990ea7efe49955&_e=VekbZ2uXIqn5KGAOXqm6_L2_OZ1WPY3nFGa5J5vx7gIRZ3mlGDVQNEwgDkCPBEM9jh12r5UsXit4KZlmfhuNZ6HI59ISV0J_-TMYjjUoT3FnSj6WI5vDBNSt02FBz_G0qaMjHCOwNktDKirk42i61R-p_A7A86WQJHWPxpYaXAfhHMYC-MjL6Gu_dMY10En4IkQO887-x6Oljb_-dMMQRq3zI5NQHL8btlKI01Uk1TL5TS_tIL7YKGx35Ld6BAVj79Oi_RiXbSADQZxK17JJCeweyFQaFg4u20Xor16Md9P3XyR3LBd2k2y9GFtMGsr4HF_kS-_brVN1M8g9YziwjFRZTt-1tfDqGjrqo9kWGErXu_x6xVcGSzYB49waHVazzGXCP0tUcX2nElpoSdRskPaqf0_QZuLWxCYUdbIWVZTGat_tlCPZJ3GeCLA23TxBQvS1gKMOU5DWrWB35YAmXQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
Last cycle, liberal billionaire George Soros was doing everything in his power to **BUY** the House majority for Nancy Pelosi and her fellow Democrats.
---
**As 1 of the 5 seats Republicans needed to win, Soros set his sights on my campaign, pouring millions into Texas, including buying up radio stations to silence conservative voices.**
---
Now, with the 2024 election looming ahead, Soros has jumped back into the game, with Texas as his top target once again:
---
[](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=9da120f6afd24f75a0990ea7efe49955&_e=VekbZ2uXIqn5KGAOXqm6_L2_OZ1WPY3nFGa5J5vx7gIRZ3mlGDVQNEwgDkCPBEM9jh12r5UsXit4KZlmfhuNZ6HI59ISV0J_-TMYjjUoT3FnSj6WI5vDBNSt02FBz_G0qaMjHCOwNktDKirk42i61R-p_A7A86WQJHWPxpYaXAfhHMYC-MjL6Gu_dMY10En4IkQO887-x6Oljb_-dMMQRq3zI5NQHL8btlKI01Uk1TL5TS_tIL7YKGx35Ld6BAVj79Oi_RiXbSADQZxK17JJCeweyFQaFg4u20Xor16Md9P3XyR3LBd2k2y9GFtMGsr4cZB1cXZ8JLcUo6OuNnlVI4myJEwQkGSJnxkFb36ZXOBVSW83WP1ZozjIh8ABsIKaFrc5IjQ-odYRF1jDXlCMJVXfkMzbfwKLRHn-mSXis2Wk1qhyWWbx4z0nVQe2Ir8XzhwKmfYi9MHcF_q8QEuGSw%3D%3D)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jim=20Gaughran?=
subject: Nick LaLota’s scared of our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Gaughran for Congress _
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/982d7e716fb9/party-12739988?e=a6aa651d40)
---
| | [ ](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=4c13833fc6&e=a6aa651d40)
---
| |
**Dear Friend** ,

Within hours of announcing my candidacy, Nick LaLota revved up the slime machine and started attacking me for turning our public schools “woke.” I have no idea what that means – but I do know he called me woke enough times that he sounds like New York's own version of Ron DeSantis.

[It’s because he’s scared, and he should be. With your help, I’ll make him a one-term Congressman.](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=76b06a39d7&e=a6aa651d40)

Nick LaLota hasn’t delivered results for Long Island, so he’s resorting to the only thing he knows how to do – stirring up phony outrage. But if LaLota wants America’s public schools to be more like Ron DeSantis’ plan for Florida, we need to stand up and fight back.

In the New York State Senate, I voted to ensure our children learn about the horrors of the Holocaust. Now, Florida schools are removing Anne Frank's _The Diary of a Young Girl_ from their curriculum.

In my time in the State Senate, we passed nation-leading LGBTQ protections for students. Meanwhile, Florida has passed the Don’t Say Gay Law.

And in my time in the State Senate, we promoted efforts to teach comprehensive American history. In Florida, students now must learn about the “benefits” of being a slave. (For the record: there were none).

[Can you chip in $10 today to help restore sanity to Washington? We need to move America forward, not back.](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=5715945d84&e=a6aa651d40)

We can’t let a radical rewriting of history become the new normal in our schools. And that starts with defeating the politicians who repeat this nonsense.

Sincerely,
Jim
---
|
---
---
| |

Paid for by Jim Gaughran for Congress _._

**Our mailing address is:**
PO BOX 20574
Huntington Station, NY 11746
[Add us to your address book](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=a62e4de0e4&e=a6aa651d40)
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=ca7cef8f27&e=a6aa651d40&c=875f6f31c9) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=ca7cef8f27&e=a6aa651d40&c=875f6f31c9).

name: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen
subject: 100K Evergreen advocates stood for climate action this week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN COLLABORATIVE
body:
Our fight's not over yet
| | | | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3139?t=2&akid=13617%2E53494%2EIGdXQu)
---
| | Friend, **We're speechless. Together, we sent EPA nearly 100,000 comments demanding strong carbon pollution standards for power plants.**
---
---
This community made up a whopping one-tenth of the **one million total comments** submitted to EPA in response to its proposed carbon standards. We are truly building something powerful.** ** **And we must. Strengthening these rules is one of President Biden's most impactful climate tools, and thanks to your advocacy, EPA knows what's at stake**. ** ** These numbers don't lie, and it's clear what the American people want. But our fight isn't over. **Utility lobbying group Edison Electric Institute (EEI) is trying to gut these rules before they're finished**. **
** EEI represents utilities across the U.S., providing power to over 235 million Americans. [And your utility company (sometimes called power companies) might be one of their members—meaning, you might be unintentionally funding EEI's efforts to delay climate action through your utility bill.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4759?t=3&akid=13617%2E53494%2EIGdXQu)
---
[**FIND YOUR UTILITY AND DEMAND CLIMATE ACTION**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4759?t=5&akid=13617%2E53494%2EIGdXQu)
---
Over this past week, thousands of online activists tweeted at their utility companies, demanding they do right by their customers and the planet—you can [join them](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4759?t=6&akid=13617%2E53494%2EIGdXQu). Don't have or use Twitter? [You can reshare this Instagram reel](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4722?t=7&akid=13617%2E53494%2EIGdXQu) we shot in front of EEI's headquarters. **We're making powerful noise, and decision-makers are noticing—let's keep the pressure on. ** Onward, Lena MoffittExecutive DirectorEvergreen Collaborative
---

name: Joe Biden
subject: What sets Kamala apart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Picking Kamala as my eventual vice president was one of the best decisions I made as a presidential nominee. | | |
---
Three years ago today, Kamala Harris joined the ticket as my running mate. Picking Kamala as my eventual Vice President was one of the best decisions I made as a presidential nominee. I learned from my friend Barack Obama what to look for: Someone to be a partner in progress. Someone who shares the same perspective on how we view the challenges the country faces. Someone who will fight for the American people every day on the job. That’s what led me to Kamala. Her record of accomplishment -- fighting tooth and nail for what’s right. And since that day, she’s demonstrated that she was the perfect choice. Kamala stepped up to help pass the most significant federal gun safety legislation in nearly three decades. She has been at the forefront of our work to protect abortion rights, especially in the aftermath of the Supreme Court overturning _Roe v. Wade_. And thanks in large part to her energizing presence on the campaign trail in the midterms, Democrats won tough races all over the country -- securing our Senate majority and delivering the best midterm election results for any first-term Democratic president in the last 40 years. **I know Kamala personally, Peter, and I can tell you one thing for sure:_She is just getting started._** **When Kamala joined the ticket this time three years ago, we saw a massive outpouring of grassroots support, which helped sustain our campaign all the way to the finish line -- because you and I both know this: Kamala is committed to doing everything she can to help the American people get ahead. I’m proud to be working alongside her.** [If you’re with us, I hope you’ll make your first $25 donation to our reelection campaign. Let's keep building progress together.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zCGwti0VNLZHg96qeIEvJxcZvqglZ4DutSVgmxhDKmtRNM9BYPt1BHQvRB267Do-PH6ei1oxg2uc5yzavuqmx1_hwcfrBi2IuW2z7SjpKMG3bSzKYzJGJihiMDr6gkOrMOeJjKiZM3iKWhkooBXQ3d9HxzO5dG1VS1wLyt-e6gXmTL4sJmWwOHHw-_wMxbk36lakj1y479s7bJn6d2zVxVvQ1kcfbLE9LpkFv9wWFC5CPvSWkcaNwfwC8wRZ4bgxs3dApfoMMleioTHeFCNomWymMtGj4r30_Tw9VfqIe6jauO2vlsL86lNhkVqPOUmjm_qPxcgXVu9G5vKYKAIpcrcxj7BqD-pj_V9493kznvaAnqjw7QOsuqcL5B2PNhEx_QULtJudhOSlPcLvf3MyDnekHGDg-r-5M51gnf9jWiiA/3yn/LZpEVJpWR9KSPxjJtfmZWw/h0/V3XcYgXe3R12F3dTXnGkTiQr7u_bWsoEQ-OuW5lGg8w) | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Picking Kamala as my eventual vice president was one of the best decisions I made as a presidential nominee. | | | Three years ago today, Kamala Harris joined the ticket as my running mate. Picking Kamala as my eventual Vice President was one of the best decisions I made as a presidential nominee. I learned from my friend Barack Obama what to look for: Someone to be a partner in progress. Someone who shares the same perspective on how we view the challenges the country faces. Someone who will fight for the American people every day on the job. That’s what led me to Kamala. Her record of accomplishment -- fighting tooth and nail for what’s right. And since that day, she’s demonstrated that she was the perfect choice. Kamala stepped up to help pass the most significant federal gun safety legislation in nearly three decades. She has been at the forefront of our work to protect abortion rights, especially in the aftermath of the Supreme Court overturning Roe v. Wade. And thanks in large part to her energizing presence on the campaign trail in the midterms, Democrats won tough races all over the country -- securing our Senate majority and delivering the best midterm election results for any first-term Democratic president in the last 40 years. I know Kamala personally, Peter, and I can tell you one thing for sure:She is just getting started. When Kamala joined the ticket this time three years ago, we saw a massive outpouring of grassroots support, which helped sustain our campaign all the way to the finish line -- because you and I both know this: Kamala is committed to doing everything she can to help the American people get ahead. I’m proud to be working alongside her. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | I really appreciate your support, Peter. Joe Joe Biden

name: Anna Kaplan
subject: George Santos + Donald Trump = birds of a feather
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Hi, it’s Anna Kaplan, Democratic candidate for Congress running against
George Santos.

Like Donald Trump, my opponent calls himself an “America-first
Republican.”

Both Santos and Trump claim the 2020 election was stolen -- despite not
having any evidence. 🤔

They’re both anti-choice, pro-gun, radical right-wing lunatics.

And now, they’re both under criminal indictment and are running for office
to avoid jail time.

We can’t let them win.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19010?t=1001&akid=3481%2E346206%2EbkjUJV ]Will you pitch in $25 or more -- split with Charles Booker -- to help
me DEFEAT George Santos and restore honesty and integrity to the U.S.
Congress?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19010?t=1002&akid=3481%2E346206%2EbkjUJV ][IMG]

Trump and Santos are birds of a feather. Let’s defeat them together.

Thanks for your support,

Anna Kaplan

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230811-3481-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3481_346206_bkjUJV&akid=3481%2E346206%2EbkjUJV

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3481%2E346206%2EbkjUJV

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

body:
The Internal Revenue Service is beginning to look more like the mafia

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a09e33c55d584b2e87b1d3ff5e0f1171&_e=7qeU3F8VRWgUBSA6npAmT9HsO1TSjLN57Mc8Wf0CnAE4b1nzI3Xe2hglG_d-EY_y73LXgs-StM5LOjP0ku5ifWuIF5Rjqh0-MMgtG0P0m9IR1nRmnB_8MU05kNrlWAuq1wptrmmNe4NJePuIyHVg5-U6aTWTw2PHBD-sfhJwDxvjMCxCUuOgq9lDC3tv4gp482BCAzcc-7bemNk6JjK1QbRwiP0awjtq6qS5DRk0X1tUzsbpML0PWFzOVkMuk8LsfdpWNw8zAcjuRx-c4y19OLbjDU1atykNd-qSGXqHbLmgJDxjO-2WEVaOASavzXswEcrI0IPUn5Mc_96NX9BGMkuxxfrHgURNooUWoQHddPJXtJb4h2ug4t_7f6gk2kLcq5RihB0oDRKt7h_SpVOzMf3pD2FRhBumS0mCPLyBmUKZZc1bXnC_euQxFZ226ndQCJ6gXjSyFmMKwgm374oPWA%3D%3D)
---

Friend, this is urgent.

The Internal Revenue Service is beginning to look more like **the mafia** or a **guerilla military unit** than a revenue collection service.

The collection arm of the **[Federal Reserve](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a09e33c55d584b2e87b1d3ff5e0f1171&_e=7qeU3F8VRWgUBSA6npAmT9HsO1TSjLN57Mc8Wf0CnAE4b1nzI3Xe2hglG_d-EY_y73LXgs-StM5LOjP0ku5ifWuIF5Rjqh0-MMgtG0P0m9IR1nRmnB_8MU05kNrlWAuq1wptrmmNe4NJePuIyHVg5-U6aTWTw2PHBD-sfhJwDxvjMCxCUuOgq9lDC3tv4gp482BCAzcc-7bemNk6JjK1QbRwiP0awjtq6qS5DRk0X1tUzsbpML0PWFzOVkMuk8LsfdpWNw8zAcjuRx-c4y19OLbjDU1atykNd-qSGXqHbLn8ckmkHqmbThpzSJQ3p84Z7mr_otD8J7V8Z2xC-tFcog4uL6pX0-OpWNGp8LTbyECu8jCI4-kbsVy5Cc3mrVSYIDDwJotNjZ9Op-ROrYm4MPbe9RDyxB8vWZSIcG7jOP0sGhx4sB2SHU0NIFzj06V7L6KS7Z6wCATPjT9P0yEj5g%3D%3D "Federal Reserve")** has decided to hire special agents who will be authorized to **carry firearms** and use "**deadly force** " in the line of work.

_**Guess you 'd better pay your taxes.**_

If you're anything like me - just a normal, hard-working, tax-paying American citizen - then you probably think the notion of an armed IRS army is a load of _**b******t**_ just like I do.

Thankfully, there's hope. Grassroots patriots like you and I outnumber the IRS, the Washington lobbyists, and all the politicians by a long shot. Now, it's time to demonstrate our strength in numbers. **[Will you sign this petition in opposition to an armed IRS by 9PM?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a09e33c55d584b2e87b1d3ff5e0f1171&_e=7qeU3F8VRWgUBSA6npAmT9HsO1TSjLN57Mc8Wf0CnAE4b1nzI3Xe2hglG_d-EY_y73LXgs-StM5LOjP0ku5ifWuIF5Rjqh0-MMgtG0P0m9IR1nRmnB_8MU05kNrlWAuq1wptrmmNe4NJePuIyHVg5-U6aTWTw2PHBD-sfhJwDxvjMCxCUuOgq9lDC3tv4gp482BCAzcc-7bemNk6JjK1QbRwiP0awjtq6qS5DRk0X1tUzsbpML0PWFzOVkMuk8LsfdpWNw8zAcjuRx-c4y19OLbjDU1atykNd-qSGXqHbLn4Twgr4ol4F31b7zg6cvIhR5wMKfBP6Kom0NnG5ySwmZiKGMjabuFX_ofDnPnswPf74lnKtbIH_4RjsN8Hy4Z0lCYU8K4HvqCrR1-fv38IFU9ZZV1t9vQkxgrB0rtsohhls7hu9L8l30yZCN4ll-73f3LVonsxg2VQYjiiY2bbJg%3D%3D "Will you sign this petition in opposition to an armed IRS by 9PM? name: Sherrod Brown
subject: We will win in November
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
Hi there – this week, Ohioans voted to stop an anti-democratic constitutional amendment aimed at making it harder for us to enshrine reproductive rights in our state's constitution. In doing so, they rejected special interests and made sure democracy remained where it belongs – in the hands of the voters, not the rich and powerful.
That’s why I’m in this fight, team, to give a voice to workers and families. I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. I spent summers working on my family's farm. Today, I live in Cleveland with my wife, Connie, and our two rescue dogs, Franklin and Walter.
I’ll be honest with you, friend: Over the years, in Ohio, we've seen manufacturing jobs shipped overseas because of bad trade deals, prices skyrocketing as wages failed to keep up, and hopes for a comfortable retirement dashed. That's why I've devoted my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do.
Every day in the Senate, I’m fighting for you. But I’m facing my toughest race yet, and I need your help to win. Will you chip in $10 or more now – split between my campaign and Michael Bennet’s – so I can keep up the fight in Ohio and defend the Senate for Democrats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-brown?refcode=X_081123_BennetBrown_act]
Right now, Mitch McConnell and the GOP need to flip only two seats to retake Senate control – and experts at Politico say it could all come down to Ohio. Last year’s Senate race here was one of the most costly in the nation, and NBC News reports this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.”
That's why I simply cannot win this race – and Democrats simply cannot hold on to our narrow Senate majority – without grassroots support from folks like you. As one of the most vulnerable senators in the country, I'm personally asking:
Will you please split $10 between my campaign and Michael Bennet’s to help us hit our midnight fundraising goal, power our reelection campaign to victory, and keep the Senate blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-brown?refcode=X_081123_BennetBrown_act]
This is gonna be a heck of a fight, but with you by my side, I know we can beat the odds and continue making much-needed progress for workers and families. Thanks for being on our team.
With gratitude,
Sherrod

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: I checked the numbers...she's going to lose.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
Lauren Boebert is a fighter that stood by my father when it mattered.
%recipient.md5_hash%
| | | | [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=50a154db2fe648a18e5c54595401b03d&_e=cjQ5C6XHCAtCfTg_Vk7dJ1DA0v0dLzCSgo8qvZbNXOTrB_U2qFCUUz1rU21Azj7Hs4P-XQvl8IeYB108q3we90svpU2OQ6G5M3esw0WX5mOUkD3KuxSM6EY2Xc9ocZmYcosQqnFxt7DhPDnQnDBwtkMJB_c_y8M_6PkFVEWaGI2flfxowvdT4lrH54hPQgxOc6k66Rh7oJY78Ws8gXxUobSQ_5KFTzin-DO2bvU1Myr4DZzzIR3n6paQRBfyw7g_xyNQBQfFyb582r3U9NVB-WoC3qEwZwdrhOlGXuZk_eE%3D)
---
| | | Lauren Boebert is a fighter that **stood by my father when it mattered.**

That's why this is the hardest email I've had to write in a long time...

Friend, I know you care about the MAGA agenda. Lauren has been unrelenting in supporting and defending that agenda. She's taken the hits for it, and her Soros-backed challenger has closed the gap so much that **_her race was just declared a "Toss up."_**

subject: I'm not easily shocked...
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63056216:JvvIH-IBN:m:1:3299561967:208792C3FF8E1DDA0D59A30535326D6B:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63056216:JvvIH-IBN:m:1:3299561967:208792C3FF8E1DDA0D59A30535326D6B:r)
Dear Patriot,

Over decades, undercover investigative journalists have exposed the foul underbelly of corporate America, government, politics, and society.

We few undercover journalists have instigated change, and rapidly.

One of the first extensive investigations I started, focused on voter fraud across America. Journalists I trained were offered ballots of everyone from Tom Brady to former Attorney General Eric Holder. It was a massive embarrassment to many governments, and the result was something I would have never imagined!

Seventeen states took positive action and instituted Voter ID Laws. Others, like the governor of Maine, issued arrest warrants for me and my investigators - let's just say I didn't travel to Maine for a while.

Now, it was never my job to advocate for the solutions to the problems I exposed. I show the world the truth - on video - and let the chips fall where they may.

And my job is just starting with my new organization, O'Keefe Media Group (OMG). **[I'm requesting your support to fund our investigations and keep my elite team of undercover journalists on the job.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63056216:JvvIH-IBN:m:1:3299561967:208792C3FF8E1DDA0D59A30535326D6B:r)**

In just the first few months of operations for OMG, we've exposed the sickness of greed within the financial leviathan, BlackRock. I'm not easily shocked, but this one made me rethink the true powers around the world. If you watched it, you'd know what I mean.

That BlackRock investigation started with one tip, pursued by one undercover journalist with dogged determination and courage. And I have a team of folks like her who need your continued support to keep exposing the truth. **[Will you help fund them?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63056216:JvvIH-IBN:m:1:3299561967:208792C3FF8E1DDA0D59A30535326D6B:r)**

You can sponsor as a journalist just once or make it **[ongoing support by joining OMG as a member for $20 a month](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63056216:JvvIH-IBN:m:1:3299561967:208792C3FF8E1DDA0D59A30535326D6B:r). [Any help for these brave folks is greatly appreciated](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63056216:JvvIH-IBN:m:1:3299561967:208792C3FF8E1DDA0D59A30535326D6B:r).**

I scrambled to build OMG so that I could get back to work and wouldn't lose a team of elite journalists to the corporate media. **And I have to tell you, that was EXPENSIVE.** Dozens of laptops, cameras, editing hardware, and software cost enormous amounts of money just to get started.

Now, **[I must ensure my team can continue to work](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63056216:JvvIH-IBN:m:1:3299561967:208792C3FF8E1DDA0D59A30535326D6B:r)** , and I am eager to lead them.

Please give OMG a hand as we start, and strongly support our operations and journalists. You have my sincere thanks for all that you do.

With respect and gratitude,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group
---

name: Andrei Cherny
subject: Veterans deserve health care – not hypocrisy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona
body:
Schweikert voted against veterans’ benefits, and then he took credit for them

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67927932/421344326/1272516037?refcode=em_XX_XXXX.XX.XX_XX_XX_header_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGUwY2MzMTUtNTYzOC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XOShLOQcweiaa-3q1GdqvHgWdHDg067_6iSDbD9TgVY=) Friends –

Earlier this week, David Schweikert sent an email to his constituents bragging about his work for veterans and encouraging them to sign up for benefits from the PACT Act. The only problem? Schweikert voted against the PACT Act.

As one national publication put it, _“Last year, Rep. David Schweikert voted not once, but twice against a bill to provide health benefits to veterans who were exposed to toxic substances during their service. Now, the Arizona Republican is urging his constituents to sign up for the benefits created by that same legislation.”_

We’re used to seeing Republican politicians showing up at ribbon cuttings after voting against the Infrastructure Bill. But this isn’t a road or bridge; it’s veterans’ lives.

**We deserve better – we deserve someone who won’t be a hypocrite,[which is why I’m asking for your support today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67927933/421344327/-1902212844?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.11_b1_ac_all&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGUwY2MzMTUtNTYzOC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XOShLOQcweiaa-3q1GdqvHgWdHDg067_6iSDbD9TgVY=)** [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67927934/421344328/-1902212844?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.11_b1_ac_all&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGUwY2MzMTUtNTYzOC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XOShLOQcweiaa-3q1GdqvHgWdHDg067_6iSDbD9TgVY=) Enlisting after 9/11, I served alongside incredible men and women who put their lives on the line, including many who would likely be eligible for PACT Act benefits. They asked for nothing in return, but deserve a country that does right by them

The PACT Act was passed with bipartisan support – even Ted Cruz and Matt Gaetz voted for it. But Schweikert voted no. Seeing him vote no was one of the moments that made me decide to run for Congress against him.

**Look, being a hypocrite is bad enough, but it’s all the worse when it comes to how we treat our veterans.

[We can beat Schweikert, but I need your help to do it. I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs, so I’m relying on this team. Will you chip in $3, $30, or whatever you can afford to fuel our campaign and flip this seat blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67927935/421344329/-1902212844?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.11_b1_ac_all&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGUwY2MzMTUtNTYzOC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XOShLOQcweiaa-3q1GdqvHgWdHDg067_6iSDbD9TgVY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$3 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67927936/421344330/-1902212844?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.11_b1_ac_all&amount=3&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGUwY2MzMTUtNTYzOC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XOShLOQcweiaa-3q1GdqvHgWdHDg067_6iSDbD9TgVY=) | [$30 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67927937/421344331/-1902212844?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.11_b1_ac_all&amount=30&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGUwY2MzMTUtNTYzOC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XOShLOQcweiaa-3q1GdqvHgWdHDg067_6iSDbD9TgVY=)

clean_body: Schweikert voted against veterans’ benefits, and then he took credit for them = Friends – Earlier this week, David Schweikert sent an email to his constituents bragging about his work for veterans and encouraging them to sign up for benefits from the PACT Act. The only problem? Schweikert voted against the PACT Act. As one national publication put it, “Last year, Rep. David Schweikert voted not once, but twice against a bill to provide health benefits to veterans who were exposed to toxic substances during their service. Now, the Arizona Republican is urging his constituents to sign up for the benefits created by that same legislation.” We’re used to seeing Republican politicians showing up at ribbon cuttings after voting against the Infrastructure Bill. But this isn’t a road or bridge; it’s veterans’ lives. We deserve better – we deserve someone who won’t be a hypocrite,= = Enlisting after 9/11, I served alongside incredible men and women who put their lives on the line, including many who would likely be eligible for PACT Act benefits. They asked for nothing in return, but deserve a country that does right by them The PACT Act was passed with bipartisan support – even Ted Cruz and Matt Gaetz voted for it. But Schweikert voted no. Seeing him vote no was one of the moments that made me decide to run for Congress against him. Look, being a hypocrite is bad enough, but it’s all the worse when it comes to how we treat our veterans. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = In your service, – Andrei To learn more about Andrei, visit | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Andrei for Arizona Andrei for Arizona PO Box 26058 Phoenix, AZ 85068 United States Emails are a really important way for our campaign to be in touch with our supporters. name: Trump Alert via Courier Newsroom
subject: Fox News is doing Trump’s dirty work again
body:
A startling new poll shows that over 90% of Fox viewers don’t think Trump has committed serious crimes.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1372%2E120351%2EAsnSNF)
Since Trump's indictment, Fox News has gone on offense for his alleged criminal scheme to overturn the 2020 election. Following Trump’s lead, everyone from Sean Hannity to Tucker Carlson’s replacement Jesse Watters has attacked the Justice Department and echoed Trump’s claims that the indictment is a political witchhunt from the Biden administration.
It’s like 2020 all over again, Peter.
We’ll explain a bit more about what we mean in just a moment, but **here’s the gist:**
[**Fox News is undermining our democracy and spreading misinformation to drive higher ratings. Our local newsrooms are fighting back by correcting the record and reaching the online audiences that are most vulnerable to Fox’s misinformation. Please help us keep up this vital work by contributing $5 today:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230811?refcode=em20230811&amount=5&refcode2=1372_120351_AsnSNF&akid=1372%2E120351%2EAsnSNF)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230811?refcode=em20230811&amount=5&refcode2=1372_120351_AsnSNF&akid=1372%2E120351%2EAsnSNF)**
Remember what happened after the 2020 election, Peter?
Trump lost, and even though Fox News personalities like Carlson and Hannity knew that election fraud claims were bogus, they pushed the lies anyway to drive ratings.
**The result was that even today, vast majorities of Republicans believe the 2020 election was stolen.** And, a new poll shows that over 90% of Fox viewers think Trump is the victim right now and that the grave charges against him aren’t serious.1
With Trump running away with the Republican Presidential nomination, Fox News is following the same destructive playbook. They’ll push Trump’s lies and help him undermine the investigation, and ratings will stay high.
**The good news is that this time around, our local news teams are ready to fight back.**
Our dedicated reporters counter bad information from Fox News in real time with fact-based journalism published in the online spaces where misinformation spreads. **We can win the fight to protect our democracy from Fox News and right-wing bad actors, but we can’t do it alone.**
[**Our work has never been more impactful at a historic moment like this. Will you chip in $5 to power our team?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230811?refcode=em20230811&amount=5&refcode2=1372_120351_AsnSNF&akid=1372%2E120351%2EAsnSNF)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230811?refcode=em20230811&amount=5&refcode2=1372_120351_AsnSNF&akid=1372%2E120351%2EAsnSNF)**
Thank you,
Courier Newsroom
1 - [The New York Times](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3766?t=2&akid=1372%2E120351%2EAsnSNF)
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=1372_120351_AsnSNF&akid=1372%2E120351%2EAsnSNF)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1372%2E120351%2EAsnSNF)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxMj01vhCAQQH_NeNPA4OfBQ9uNPfW4e20QBiUrYhDT-O8bzKbp9b0HMyPdtlhz9tC8A-Js9Q6IIN4A8YjiIe_3r3DmY13mn9UDpyTxAxDjudFf-fqkICftkmhzy3RfouRGZdTzuuNNXfO6zeae8dbwahRGYDWyshVdpTqU2BpNamRNZntkKFjLOa8Ylk3RoVKt0CUXTHGOGkp2DSpMIIqzXZ8UtLTLWSjvsqWfY9z2a7EBcNhJHYEKuZL2MRWAg38SGXKkrZyCP7aE3JTvm193H3I35t6BGI7ovnd_BEUgbv8CwDqp9P5wl3oRJd0m7bSCuLnxxSKF1JioeRZ6vf3YZbF73UDJpusK5d1vAAAA___Pl3p4)
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxMj01vhCAQQH_NeNPA4OfBQ9uNPfW4e20QBiUrYhDT-O8bzKbp9b0HMyPdtlhz9tC8A-Js9Q6IIN4A8YjiIe_3r3DmY13mn9UDpyTxAxDjudFf-fqkICftkmhzy3RfouRGZdTzuuNNXfO6zeae8dbwahRGYDWyshVdpTqU2BpNamRNZntkKFjLOa8Ylk3RoVKt0CUXTHGOGkp2DSpMIIqzXZ8UtLTLWSjvsqWfY9z2a7EBcNhJHYEKuZL2MRWAg38SGXKkrZyCP7aE3JTvm193H3I35t6BGI7ovnd_BEUgbv8CwDqp9P5wl3oRJd0m7bSCuLnxxSKF1JioeRZ6vf3YZbF73UDJpusK5d1vAAAA___Pl3p4)
Dear Friend,

Over decades, undercover investigative journalists have exposed the foul underbelly of corporate America, government, politics, and society.

We few undercover journalists have instigated change, and rapidly.

One of the first extensive investigations I started, focused on voter fraud across America. Journalists I trained were offered ballots of everyone from Tom Brady to former Attorney General Eric Holder. It was a massive embarrassment to many governments, and the result was something I would have never imagined!

Seventeen states took positive action and instituted Voter ID Laws. Others, like the governor of Maine, issued arrest warrants for me and my investigators - let's just say I didn't travel to Maine for a while.

Now, it was never my job to advocate for the solutions to the problems I exposed. I show the world the truth - on video - and let the chips fall where they may.

And my job is just starting with my new organization, O'Keefe Media Group (OMG). **[I'm requesting your support to fund our investigations and keep my elite team of undercover journalists on the job.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxMj01vhCAQQH_NeNPA4OfBQ9uNPfW4e20QBiUrYhDT-O8bzKbp9b0HMyPdtlhz9tC8A-Js9Q6IIN4A8YjiIe_3r3DmY13mn9UDpyTxAxDjudFf-fqkICftkmhzy3RfouRGZdTzuuNNXfO6zeae8dbwahRGYDWyshVdpTqU2BpNamRNZntkKFjLOa8Ylk3RoVKt0CUXTHGOGkp2DSpMIIqzXZ8UtLTLWSjvsqWfY9z2a7EBcNhJHYEKuZL2MRWAg38SGXKkrZyCP7aE3JTvm193H3I35t6BGI7ovnd_BEUgbv8CwDqp9P5wl3oRJd0m7bSCuLnxxSKF1JioeRZ6vf3YZbF73UDJpusK5d1vAAAA___Pl3p4)**

In just the first few months of operations for OMG, we've exposed the sickness of greed within the financial leviathan, BlackRock. I'm not easily shocked, but this one made me rethink the true powers around the world. If you watched it, you'd know what I mean.

That BlackRock investigation started with one tip, pursued by one undercover journalist with dogged determination and courage. And I have a team of folks like her who need your continued support to keep exposing the truth. **[Will you help fund them?](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxMj01vhCAQQH_NeNPA4OfBQ9uNPfW4e20QBiUrYhDT-O8bzKbp9b0HMyPdtlhz9tC8A-Js9Q6IIN4A8YjiIe_3r3DmY13mn9UDpyTxAxDjudFf-fqkICftkmhzy3RfouRGZdTzuuNNXfO6zeae8dbwahRGYDWyshVdpTqU2BpNamRNZntkKFjLOa8Ylk3RoVKt0CUXTHGOGkp2DSpMIIqzXZ8UtLTLWSjvsqWfY9z2a7EBcNhJHYEKuZL2MRWAg38SGXKkrZyCP7aE3JTvm193H3I35t6BGI7ovnd_BEUgbv8CwDqp9P5wl3oRJd0m7bSCuLnxxSKF1JioeRZ6vf3YZbF73UDJpusK5d1vAAAA___Pl3p4)**

You can sponsor as a journalist just once or make it **[ongoing support by joining OMG as a sponsor for $20 a month](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxMj01vhCAQQH_NeNPA4OfBQ9uNPfW4e20QBiUrYhDT-O8bzKbp9b0HMyPdtlhz9tC8A-Js9Q6IIN4A8YjiIe_3r3DmY13mn9UDpyTxAxDjudFf-fqkICftkmhzy3RfouRGZdTzuuNNXfO6zeae8dbwahRGYDWyshVdpTqU2BpNamRNZntkKFjLOa8Ylk3RoVKt0CUXTHGOGkp2DSpMIIqzXZ8UtLTLWSjvsqWfY9z2a7EBcNhJHYEKuZL2MRWAg38SGXKkrZyCP7aE3JTvm193H3I35t6BGI7ovnd_BEUgbv8CwDqp9P5wl3oRJd0m7bSCuLnxxSKF1JioeRZ6vf3YZbF73UDJpusK5d1vAAAA___Pl3p4). [Any help for these brave folks is greatly appreciated](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxMj01vhCAQQH_NeNPA4OfBQ9uNPfW4e20QBiUrYhDT-O8bzKbp9b0HMyPdtlhz9tC8A-Js9Q6IIN4A8YjiIe_3r3DmY13mn9UDpyTxAxDjudFf-fqkICftkmhzy3RfouRGZdTzuuNNXfO6zeae8dbwahRGYDWyshVdpTqU2BpNamRNZntkKFjLOa8Ylk3RoVKt0CUXTHGOGkp2DSpMIIqzXZ8UtLTLWSjvsqWfY9z2a7EBcNhJHYEKuZL2MRWAg38SGXKkrZyCP7aE3JTvm193H3I35t6BGI7ovnd_BEUgbv8CwDqp9P5wl3oRJd0m7bSCuLnxxSKF1JioeRZ6vf3YZbF73UDJpusK5d1vAAAA___Pl3p4).**

I scrambled to build OMG so that I could get back to work and wouldn't lose a team of elite journalists to the corporate media. **And I have to tell you, that was EXPENSIVE.** Dozens of laptops, cameras, editing hardware, and software cost enormous amounts of money just to get started.

Now, **[I must ensure my team can continue to work](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxMj01vhCAQQH_NeNPA4OfBQ9uNPfW4e20QBiUrYhDT-O8bzKbp9b0HMyPdtlhz9tC8A-Js9Q6IIN4A8YjiIe_3r3DmY13mn9UDpyTxAxDjudFf-fqkICftkmhzy3RfouRGZdTzuuNNXfO6zeae8dbwahRGYDWyshVdpTqU2BpNamRNZntkKFjLOa8Ylk3RoVKt0CUXTHGOGkp2DSpMIIqzXZ8UtLTLWSjvsqWfY9z2a7EBcNhJHYEKuZL2MRWAg38SGXKkrZyCP7aE3JTvm193H3I35t6BGI7ovnd_BEUgbv8CwDqp9P5wl3oRJd0m7bSCuLnxxSKF1JioeRZ6vf3YZbF73UDJpusK5d1vAAAA___Pl3p4)** , and I am eager to lead them.

Please give OMG a hand as we start, and strongly support our operations and journalists. You have my sincere thanks for all that you do.

With respect and gratitude,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

I scrambled to build OMG so that I could get back to work and wouldn't lose a team of elite journalists to the corporate media. And I have to tell you, that was EXPENSIVE. Dozens of laptops, cameras, editing hardware, and software cost enormous amounts of money just to get started. Now, , and I am eager to lead them. Please give OMG a hand as we start, and strongly support our operations and journalists. You have my sincere thanks for all that you do. With respect and gratitude, James O'Keefe Founder and CEO O'Keefe Media Group

clean_body: Why we’re all in for Andy. | | | | Our government is elected by the people, and it should work for those same people. That's what good governance is all about. Last week, Congressman Kim was proud to host a Good Governance Week – a week dedicated to connecting our neighbors to all the assistance from us and others in the community. = You can't have good governance without good leaders. Leaders who do more than talk. Leaders who follow through and get things done. Leaders like Andy. = = Under Andy's leadership since 2019, his office has resolved more than 11,400 cases with federal departments and agencies such as the Internal Revenue Service (IRS), the Social Security Administration, the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA), and the Small Business Administration (SBA). That means a return of over $44 million to constituents throughout the 3rd District. And last week, Andy was proud to connect with people around the district with needed resources and assistance. That's what good governance is all about. = While Good Governance Week may have ended, Andy is committed to working hard to serve the people of New Jersey every single day. name: =?UTF-8?Q?Morgan=C2=A0Luttrell?=
subject: Ending this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Morgan Luttrell
body:
I’m a combat veteran who served in multiple combat missions in defense of America.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm3jhq1te9e4ld6147sbnd3pmlic9qobrdhh4hrg_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctge0ob5cph2bs)
---

Friend --

My name is Morgan Luttrell.

I'm a combat veteran who served in multiple combat missions in defense of America.

I've seen things I wouldn't wish on my worst enemy. Things I will never be able to unsee.

In 2009, I survived a helicopter crash that should've taken my life but, by the grace of God, I was given a second chance.

No matter how tough or brave you are, nothing is fully in your control. That's why we put our faith in God.

**But -- there are some things we CAN control, and that 's why I'm running for Congress. **

I have to just say it: Biden and the Radical Democrats want me GONE, they want me DEFEATED, they want to END my campaign for good.

But unlike the spineless career politicians, **I 'm not someone who EVER gives up.**

You see, the career DC politicians are living each day by their own agenda -- not thinking about those suffering the consequences.

After my time in the military, I knew that each day that I woke up in America was a gift.

_**The land of the free and home of the brave.**_

But the Biden regime has stripped our nation of our core values and turned us down a path that is leading us toward a dark future.

**So, Friend, I want to humbly ask you right now if you 'll stand with me in my fight for the America we all once knew and loved. **

It is patriots like yourself that have helped change the direction of our country before, but we still need you. Maybe now more than ever.

Please, stand up for America's liberties and freedoms by chipping in just a few bucks today?

---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zct67tg5fo1el9l1307aj63e06ig319ob9ufl258_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctge0ob5cph2bs "CONTRIBUTE")
---

Together, we can bring America back to her greatness before the Democrats send us further down the dark path we're currently on.

Thank you,

Morgan Luttrell

---
|
---

Magnolia, TX 77353
