Fellow American,

**There is a full-fledged crisis** at our southern border and Democrats in Congress don't seem to care at all.

The number of illegal immigrants crossing in a single month is often the size of a small city's population. Within those numbers are illegal aliens affiliated with criminal cartels, free to roam our neighborhoods. Previously arrested or convicted criminal illegal aliens are free to commit serious criminal offenses _again._ **We are at a breaking point.**

**Your safety is at risk every single day because of the reckless policies upheld by Democrats. We need strong patriots who are TOUGH on border security, and I'm the man for the job. Will you chip in any amount today to send me to Congress and secure the border?**

[ **DONATE TO SECURE THE BORDER**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=dcc632af9928477691e9015d3ac594ef&_e=yepTYaJ3eErM3XGwJ_fWsV6ifK5xC9Nk0twHKGXh3YbGC3sfB-DFvCE7WWGObSxXsiR8vLt2tlbdLKFELgEVxuyiae6hkWxAOGfeWetTies9UUqwbRSK8f3pWMYvQhIBoZSZ5inCQuamyjAyER-LHcNVEbRB3kMzgEFw2daxTwT3W08YlAjsR08KhM87QazDCKo97reJ3MbVjRWS8pOQ4oWsvir-S-W-YZq6AeUWs_90OOEmObzplIJzwq8Lg_lxL7G6-LGqOcccKUK_qE1-7geqY_QN32GK7wT8VQXOSmJ0mUPhYWwtcuCiXbM9hhf38eqRkmhwUauMKNu82T4GEdBzChueAQhuL9ci0f1dQuty5OEcqeHe93wYPEZoO-qOaK3cCW7rePw3sK5J82P8sQ%3D%3D)

_I'm not a man full of empty promises,_ I actually have a plan to combat the humanitarian crisis ignored by the liberals in charge. We must:

* **_Finish building the wall._** Secure our open borders and take real action on illegal immigration. Withhold taxpayer-funded grants from sanctuary cities, and require deportation for illegal immigrants caught committing VIOLENT crimes.
* **_Focus on drug and anti-crime policies on today's challenges._** Hire and retain more law enforcement officers – including funding for U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) and Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) – focused on drug and gang corridors that move drugs and lead to human trafficking.

**_And I've actually done it:_ I wrote the law that expanded the required use of E-Verify, protecting American jobs and wages. And I've voted to get tough on so-called Sanctuary Cities.**

[**We can no longer sit on the sidelines while Democrats let criminals pour into our country – _enough is enough!_ I need your immediate donation to ensure we CLOSE the border and secure our country.**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=dcc632af9928477691e9015d3ac594ef&_e=yepTYaJ3eErM3XGwJ_fWsV6ifK5xC9Nk0twHKGXh3YbGC3sfB-DFvCE7WWGObSxXsiR8vLt2tlbdLKFELgEVxuyiae6hkWxAOGfeWetTies9UUqwbRSK8f3pWMYvQhIBoZSZ5inCQuamyjAyER-LHcNVEbRB3kMzgEFw2daxTwT3W08YlAjsR08KhM87QazDCKo97reJ3MbVjRWS8pOQ4oWsvir-S-W-YZq6AeUWs__Ndq4sSx9fkQcpYHP-7jBG528JW_7QM22eHUq9lFNEz1KjvoVxFX-zuxULtUJs1RjWOQaPy0NuTKkfKdWWPPL0smMcdJPIk9YS7907VXPzrRN8g4Cl6cqBJbu5YmFi7xkJxZPKVn-ouzvjhKa5EdV0IibfQCuMHKIUoXbRSDoJ6w%3D%3D)

[ **SEND RYAN MACKENZIE TO FIX THE BORDER**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=dcc632af9928477691e9015d3ac594ef&_e=yepTYaJ3eErM3XGwJ_fWsV6ifK5xC9Nk0twHKGXh3YbGC3sfB-DFvCE7WWGObSxXsiR8vLt2tlbdLKFELgEVxuyiae6hkWxAOGfeWetTies9UUqwbRSK8f3pWMYvQhIBoZSZ5inCQuamyjAyER-LHcNVEbRB3kMzgEFw2daxTwT3W08YlAjsR08KhM87QazDCKo97reJ3MbVjRWS8pOQ4oWsvir-S-W-YZq6AeUWs_-kuuT_uINZuRtssnMr_wM-hF-jHRplE6jFI9IWqRNxKi8JFDRBVvaM5ltCldLVtA3PrjxWk8jVz8O6UTPjMKM6TlqbP7yxDU4zhh_tct5vR92rdP7xJPFQ-N2657ktPOLmiyD4U3ZIxIl2AkV9sYk7rLVwLhjuEYHL9P-U7HXADw%3D%3D)

President Biden has refused to address the border crisis – _he's too busy vacationing at the beach._

We need decisive leadership to actually **get the job done** of securing the border – **_and I'm the man for that job._** We need to stop the criminals and narcotics from coming into our country, period!

I'm tired of a do-nothing Washington, _and I'm sure you are too._ It's time for action, [**which is why I'm looking for your support of any amount to send me to Washington and secure the border.**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=dcc632af9928477691e9015d3ac594ef&_e=yepTYaJ3eErM3XGwJ_fWsV6ifK5xC9Nk0twHKGXh3YbGC3sfB-DFvCE7WWGObSxXsiR8vLt2tlbdLKFELgEVxuyiae6hkWxAOGfeWetTies9UUqwbRSK8f3pWMYvQhIBoZSZ5inCQuamyjAyER-LHcNVEbRB3kMzgEFw2daxTwT3W08YlAjsR08KhM87QazDCKo97reJ3MbVjRWS8pOQ4oWsvir-S-W-YZq6AeUWs_9L6BJkyXIAEEnTmq0lu1Wy6bHIR904b_pjKwqOa05mzLqlW-MQpQiFzlU-sn2dNSD3vt8Bb2FQ-r7Fm6QJZU43sFZ3cm1Jufx-TwJflT4DOW4iND4R3CaKM66yiEIjv1xSX3ik6VNqUZIj1TcVqLwjAruJTeVJf83oK8kAlaJbIQ%3D%3D)

Ryan Mackenzie

MEET RYAN

* * *
_When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers.

A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan's first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching.

It's that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: "Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin."

In Pennsylvania's state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. Ryan didn't just talk – he got our values enacted into law._

2. She’s worked tirelessly to limit our reproductive rights and freedoms and has proposed legislation that would allow health officials to conduct warrantless searches of abortion providers.
3. She has cooperated with Donald Trump’s attempts to corrupt our electoral processes, including joining nearly 140 Republican members of Congress to overturn the 2020 presidential election results.
4. Lesko continues to reject the idea of climate change, and firmly planted herself on the side of big business at the expense of our natural resources.
5. She currently holds an A rating from the NRA — our nation’s largest and wealthiest gun lobbying organization and frequently opposes common-sense gun-violence solutions.
6. She’s working to destroy Medicare and Medicaid, which would impact over 1,000,000 Arizonans who currently rely on the program.
7. Lesko is opposed to enacting the Equality Act which would expand discrimination protections to protect LGBTQ+ Arizonans.
8. Despite Debbie’s work to sabotage President Biden’s agenda, **we were able to add nearly 2,800 jobs across Arizona in the month of June.**

[**So what do you say, team — Can we count on you to pitch in $8 or more today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67930784/421355107/-864030063?amount=8&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230811_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmFiYzExZGYtNTkzOC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YVfTnR21v4qUlPQKlX3hNzvOaY59AxcGTXCVzh0T-RA=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $8 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67930785/421355108/-864030063?express_lane=true&amount=8&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20230811_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmFiYzExZGYtNTkzOC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YVfTnR21v4qUlPQKlX3hNzvOaY59AxcGTXCVzh0T-RA=)

name: Ilhan Omar HQ
subject: BREAKING: AIPAC is coming after Ilhan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Once again, AIPAC and their right-wing donors are ramping up their efforts to defeat progressive candidates for Congress — and this cycle, they already have their targets set on Ilhan and our movement.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=425%2E791427%2Ekp4V34)

Here comes the kitchen sink, team:
Once again, AIPAC and their right-wing donors are ramping up their efforts to defeat progressive candidates for Congress — **and this cycle, they already have their targets set on Ilhan and our movement.**
We've all seen AIPAC's playbook before, and we know it won't be long before their super PAC begins pouring money into Minnesota's 5th district to try and defeat us.1 That's why we're urgently asking:
**[Can you rush a contribution — of $3 or anything you can — to stand with Ilhan today so we have what it takes to fight back? It's so important that our movement is in this together.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug23.SAeyb4&refcode=em230811-1-t1&t=2&akid=425%2E791427%2Ekp4V34)**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/14?c0=io-em-aug23.HDXfNR&refcode=em230811-1-t1&t=21&akid=425%2E791427%2Ekp4V34)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-aug23.aMbjPI&refcode=em230811-1-t1&t=22&akid=425%2E791427%2Ekp4V34)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-aug23._S4P8Q&refcode=em230811-1-t1&t=23&akid=425%2E791427%2Ekp4V34)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/9?c0=io-em-aug23.zTCtgq&refcode=em230811-1-t1&t=24&akid=425%2E791427%2Ekp4V34)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/10?c0=io-em-aug23.KaGgr9&refcode=em230811-1-t1&t=25&akid=425%2E791427%2Ekp4V34)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-aug23.i_mkOm&refcode=em230811-1-t1&t=26&akid=425%2E791427%2Ekp4V34)**
---
****
AIPAC is the same group that spent $350,000 in 2022 supporting Ilhan's primary opponent through their "United Democracy Project" super PAC.
They're the same group that launched bigoted Islamophobic attack ads against Ilhan,2 and a member of whom's national council called Ilhan a "terrorist" and suggested that she and Rashida Tlaib represent the Muslim Brotherhood.3
They're the same group whose super PAC, earlier this year, took a _$1 million_ contribution from a billionaire Trump mega-donor, all to interfere in Democratic primaries.4
They're the same group whose super PAC didn't spend a dime helping _any_ Democrats defeat the GOP in 2022 — instead opting to endorse over 100 Republican insurrectionists and spending tens of millions trying to defeat progressive candidates of color all across the country.
In many cases, it worked.
Now AIPAC and the United Democracy Project are already gearing up for 2024, and have begun recruiting challengers to run against Ilhan and her fellow incumbent Squad members.
AIPAC continues to attack and spread bigoted lies about Ilhan and our movement. We need your help fighting back, as soon as we can, and the only way we do that is together. So please:
**[Can you make a contribution of $3 or anything you can to Ilhan and our re-election campaign today? It's critical that we have the resources necessary to fight back against AIPAC and everything the right wing will throw our way.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug23.SAeyb4&refcode=em230811-1-t1&t=27&akid=425%2E791427%2Ekp4V34)**
As always, thank you for being a part of our fight.
\- Team Ilhan
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug23.SAeyb4&refcode=em230811-1-t1&t=28&akid=425%2E791427%2Ekp4V34)**

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: September 11th Day of Service: Ask what you can do for your country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
In his Inaugural Address, which I attended when I was 7 years old, President John F. Kennedy encouraged Americans to “Ask not what your country can do for you. Ask what you can do for your country.” On September 11th this year, I am asking all of us the same question.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_11th_email_non_donor&n=1)
---
Peter -- In his Inaugural Address, which I attended when I was 7 years old, President John F. Kennedy encouraged Americans to “ _Ask not what your country can do for you. Ask what you can do for your country.”_ On September 11th this year, I am asking all of us the same question. September 11th is recognized each year as a National Day of Service and Remembrance. This year, I’m asking all of those who support my campaign to honor the memory of those lost on this day by doing their best to participate in a [National Day of Service.](https://www.kennedy24.com/september-11-day-of-service?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_11th_email_non_donor&n=2) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/september-11-day-of-service?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_11th_email_non_donor&n=3) I believe campaigns shouldn’t just be about collecting donations and doing television advertising. This campaign is a part of a broader purpose to recommit our country to community service. We should all consider what we can do for our country, right now, today. I want to see change happen now – not in some distant future. That’s why I am calling on all those who support my campaign to engage in service projects on or around September 11th this year. I am asking you to consider what your community needs most, and then to design a project that addresses that need. This could be anything from a beach clean up to spending time fixing up a school. You could read to children or distribute food to people in need. Once you decide how you’re going to serve or if you want to organize a project in your area, post about it on the website. | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/september-11-day-of-service?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_11th_email_non_donor&n=4 "SUBMIT YOUR SERVICE PROJECT") [SUBMIT YOUR SERVICE PROJECT](https://www.kennedy24.com/september-11-day-of-service?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_11th_email_non_donor&n=4)
---
Once you post your service project, others in your area can find it on the website and RSVP to join you in service. But you don’t have to be the one to organize a project. You can simply visit our [Day of Service Events](https://www.kennedy24.com/september-11-events?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_11th_email_non_donor&n=5) page to search and find service projects in your area and sign up to attend.
Regardless of your political standing, we can all come together for the common human value of service. A way we can heal the divide in the Nation is to come together as a community to help others in need. Let’s use the strong momentum of this campaign to begin repairing our country, and bring people together for a day of helping your community. I’ll be out there, by your side.
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
P.S. Team Kennedy has designed [an elegant commemorative t-shirt for this initiative](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=92YYov9O17-vE3x_2FgMqcpC3Uu0TtfyErPHzkeABYjoC-VXKOry0umcl-b5ZjM4E8op1cOp14wjZfxVsUUuwQ&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_11th_email_non_donor&n=6), which is available in our merchandise store, which you may choose to wear on your Day of Service and beyond!
[Donate today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_11th_email_non_donor&n=7) to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! Ask what you can do for your country.” On September 11th this year, I am asking all of us the same question. | Peter -- In his Inaugural Address, which I attended when I was 7 years old, President John F. Kennedy encouraged Americans to “ Ask not what your country can do for you. Ask what you can do for your country.” On September 11th this year, I am asking all of us the same question. September 11th is recognized each year as a National Day of Service and Remembrance. This year, I’m asking all of those who support my campaign to honor the memory of those lost on this day by doing their best to participate in a I believe campaigns shouldn’t just be about collecting donations and doing television advertising. This campaign is a part of a broader purpose to recommit our country to community service. We should all consider what we can do for our country, right now, today. I want to see change happen now – not in some distant future. That’s why I am calling on all those who support my campaign to engage in service projects on or around September 11th this year. I am asking you to consider what your community needs most, and then to design a project that addresses that need. This could be anything from a beach clean up to spending time fixing up a school. You could read to children or distribute food to people in need. Once you decide how you’re going to serve or if you want to organize a project in your area, post about it on the website. | "SUBMIT YOUR SERVICE PROJECT" Once you post your service project, others in your area can find it on the website and RSVP to join you in service. But you don’t have to be the one to organize a project. You can simply visit our page to search and find service projects in your area and sign up to attend. Regardless of your political standing, we can all come together for the common human value of service. A way we can heal the divide in the Nation is to come together as a community to help others in need. Let’s use the strong momentum of this campaign to begin repairing our country, and bring people together for a day of helping your community. I’ll be out there, by your side. Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. P.S. Team Kennedy has designed , which is available in our merchandise store, which you may choose to wear on your Day of Service and beyond! to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! * PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY

clean_body: An indictment is looming.| | | Friend, It’s been reported that if I am unjustly indicted and arrested in the Atlanta Witch Hunt, a mugshot will be taken of me: Georgia sheriff on Trump probe: "We'll have a mugshot ready for you" [SOURCE: Axios] Atlanta has already begun setting up security barricades, shutting down roads surrounding the courthouse, and the Grand Jury is expected to reconvene. All signs indicate that a FOURTH SHAM INDICTMENT is on its way The Left is trying their hardest to turn me – an innocent man – into a criminal, all while theyare the true criminals, violating our rights and weaponizing the legal system to imprison their leading opposition. These are the same thugs who attempted to FRAME me as an agent of the Russian government. Keep in mind – they’ve had access to just about every single piece of paper I’ve ever laid a finger on... and yet, they still can’t find a crime to pin me down for. If they can’t find anything real after looking at my entire life under a microscope, then I must be one of the most honest people alive! The truth is: My only offense is opposing the Washington ruling class and standing up for the hardworking citizens of our country. And in the eyes of the Deep State, there is no greater offense than that... As a possible fourth sham indictment hangs over my head, I will continue our campaign to drain the corrupt Washington swamp and restore power to YOU, the American people. If you’re doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day. But if not, I don’t have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now. | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message ---------From: Donald J. Trump Date: Tue, August 8, 2023Subject: BARRICADES AND ROAD CLOSURESTo: dpwillis67@gmail.com | | Friend, I’ve been briefed on reports that Atlanta has begun setting up security barricades, shutting down roads surrounding the courthouse, and the Grand Jury is expected to reconvene. All signs indicate that your favorite president – whose only offense is challenging the political ruling class – may be INDICTED yet again as an innocent man. [SOURCE:WSB-TV Atlanta] The prosecutor leading the witch hunt is so corrupt that even CNN (!!!) has called her out after she “intermixed her political fortunes with this case.” Her bias was so terrible that she was REMOVED from one part of this witch hunt because of a “political conflict of interest” of her own creation. Do you think she’s going to treat me fairly and put aside her extreme political biases? Not a chance! This is yet another political persecution of the ONLY candidate who can beat Crooked Joe and restore power to YOU , the American people. As I’ve always said, they’re not after me. They’re after YOU. I’m only standing in the way. And even as a possible fourth indictment hangs over my head, I will continue to stand in their way, because the fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It’s not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well – and I will NEVERlet them take it from you. If you’re doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day. But if not, I don’t have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now. | | - Thank you, Donald J. subject: Take action for public schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Cinde Warmington
body:
| Extremist political bias has no place in our public schools. Our education system is a critical pillar of our democracy that serves future generations. We must protect it. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67931916/421358557/1040548813?source=EM_NBI_CW_20230811_PT_school_1.1_1MO_CindeWarmington_na_na_publicschools&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTllOTIyMS01YzM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uo32S_1f88B8yDp7VljXjeoFuDFEECjUaMxmjrHjY3A=&emci=f38ba91a-5c38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=959e9221-5c38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626166) We would be doing a disservice to children and students by implementing radical ideas under the guise of financial literacy coursework. This conservative controlled platform is not even an accredited academic institution.

As governor, I will fight to bolster our public schools so that every child in New Hampshire has the opportunity to succeed and prosper—and appoint members of the Board of Education who believe in public education.

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67932132/421359157/-531765509?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTZlMWE2ZC01YzM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ruZ4BM0CjGfNjd5fY4VwxHWodAk_gx9WcWUx3FBLHrs=&emci=456e1a6d-5c38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=4e6e1a6d-5c38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249) Team, ProPublica just released a report that I didn't want you to miss...

They exposed Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas has _regularly accepted gifts_ (38 destination vacations, 26 private jet flights, and 12 VIP passes to sporting events to name a few) from billionaires—the same billionaires who push their personal agenda before the court and have unfettered access to the justices who decide their outcome.

**This is beyond unacceptable. In Pennsylvania, we have a ban on gifts that I enforced as Auditor General. And when people didn’t report those gifts, they were held accountable.**

To me, it doesn't matter if gifts are large or small. My problem is that anyone who accepts them could be swayed by those perks. Even the perception of bribery or buying influence undermines the public’s trust in our government.

Right now, an unchecked, unethical, and increasingly extremist Supreme Court – perhaps influenced by mega donors – is rolling back our rights and freedoms with each new decision.

Our next Attorney General will be our best, and often last, line of defense from an extremist takeover of our Democracy.

Team, I’ll be an Attorney General for every Pennsylvanian and I’ll defend your rights whenever they come under attack – even if it’s from the highest powers on the Supreme Court. **[I’m committed to fighting for you. If you’re with me, please make a donation to my campaign for Attorney General today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67932133/421359158/-412144306?refcode=email_081123_scotus_t3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTZlMWE2ZC01YzM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ruZ4BM0CjGfNjd5fY4VwxHWodAk_gx9WcWUx3FBLHrs=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67932134/421359159/-412144306?refcode=email_081123_scotus_t3&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTZlMWE2ZC01YzM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ruZ4BM0CjGfNjd5fY4VwxHWodAk_gx9WcWUx3FBLHrs=)

I don't have to tell you there are powerful forces in our country actively fighting to turn back the clock on the progress it’s taken generations to achieve.

Our current Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade last year, and this year, they limited LGBTQ protections—just two examples of the destruction they can do to our basic rights and freedoms.

When the rights of millions of Pennsylvanians depend on a few seats on the Supreme Court, our work is far from finished.

Pennsylvania’s next Attorney General will be on the frontlines of the battles you care about most, folks. I have a proven record of taking on tough fights, and winning. If you give me the opportunity, I’ll do the same as your next Attorney General.

**[Please, if you’re in this fight with me, make a $5, $15, $25, or more donation to my campaign →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67932142/421359167/-412144306?refcode=email_081123_scotus_t3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTZlMWE2ZC01YzM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ruZ4BM0CjGfNjd5fY4VwxHWodAk_gx9WcWUx3FBLHrs=)**

clean_body: Team, ProPublica just released a report that I didn't want you to miss... They exposed Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas has regularly accepted gifts (38 destination vacations, 26 private jet flights, and 12 VIP passes to sporting events to name a few) from billionaires—the same billionaires who push their personal agenda before the court and have unfettered access to the justices who decide their outcome. This is beyond unacceptable. In Pennsylvania, we have a ban on gifts that I enforced as Auditor General. And when people didn’t report those gifts, they were held accountable. To me, it doesn't matter if gifts are large or small. My problem is that anyone who accepts them could be swayed by those perks. Even the perception of bribery or buying influence undermines the public’s trust in our government. Right now, an unchecked, unethical, and increasingly extremist Supreme Court – perhaps influenced by mega donors – is rolling back our rights and freedoms with each new decision. Our next Attorney General will be our best, and often last, line of defense from an extremist takeover of our Democracy. Team, I’ll be an Attorney General for every Pennsylvanian and I’ll defend your rights whenever they come under attack – even if it’s from the highest powers on the Supreme Court. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = I don't have to tell you there are powerful forces in our country actively fighting to turn back the clock on the progress it’s taken generations to achieve. Our current Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade last year, and this year, they limited LGBTQ protections—just two examples of the destruction they can do to our basic rights and freedoms. When the rights of millions of Pennsylvanians depend on a few seats on the Supreme Court, our work is far from finished. Pennsylvania’s next Attorney General will be on the frontlines of the battles you care about most, folks. I have a proven record of taking on tough fights, and winning. If you give me the opportunity, I’ll do the same as your next Attorney General. = Thank you, Eugene | | | = Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add info@depasqualeforag.com to your address book. This campaign is powered by grassroots donation. You can = to make a donation to support Eugene for Attorney General of Pennsylvania. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. | | Dear Supporter, We are thrilled to welcome you to the Alexandria for Senate community and extend our heartfelt appreciation to those who have been with us on this journey. Your support makes all the difference. For those who are new to our cause, Alexandria for Senate is dedicated to bringing positive change to our great nation while upholding the values of family, faith, and freedom. With your involvement, we're working tirelessly to shape a brighter tomorrow. To our long-standing supporters, thank you for your unwavering belief in our mission. Your commitment fuels our determination to champion conservative principles and ensure a stronger Michigan for all. Whether you're just joining us or have been by our side, your contribution, no matter the amount, is a vital part of advancing our cause. Together, we can make a difference and stand united for the values we hold dear. Join us today by making a donation to our campaign. Let's continue this journey of positive change together. Thank you for being an essential part of this movement. With gratitude, Team Alexandria for Michigan

name: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
subject: Looking back on 2020
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, as we move
closer to yet another major election year in 2024, I want to take a moment
to look back on Justice Democrats’ crucial fights and victories you fueled
in 2020.

The 2020 election was not only a pivotal moment in defending our country
and our democracy from further damage under Donald Trump — it was a
massive opportunity to fight back against moderates and move our
progressive movement forward.

Thanks to support from people like you, we recruited and elected two new
members of the Squad: Cori Bush in Missouri’s 1st district and Jamaal
Bowman in New York’s 16th district.

Both Cori and Jamaal were working-class candidates of color who
successfully ousted long-time Democratic incumbents who were failing to
serve their communities. Now, they’re providing true representation and
pushing for bold change in Congress.

But that’s not all we accomplished in 2020. During the presidential
primaries, Justice Democrats became one of the only organizations to run
compelling ads and a press offensive against more corporate-friendly
Democrats vying for the nomination.

In May of 2020, we privately and publicly sent a Youth Vote Turnout Letter
to Joe Biden ahead of his nomination, explaining what kind of
transformative policies and actions we expected from him in order to earn
our support.

When now President Biden beat Trump, we celebrated and then got right to
work launching campaigns like ClimateMandate.org to hold him accountable
to our communities and ensure a bold governing agenda as president. We
made it clear that we expect and demand urgent mobilization around the
climate crisis, as well as progressive representation in his Cabinet.

Throughout 2020, Justice Democrats sent a message: young people will no
longer automatically give our votes and support to Democrats who uphold
the status quo. We demand better, and we’re not stopping.

In 2024, we need to double-down on the work we achieved in 2020: re-elect
our incumbents like Cori and Jamaal, elect new progressive leaders to
Congress, and re-elect President Biden while making sure he delivers on
his promises.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136926?refcode=em20230811-30322&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=30322%2E1203867%2E9ZFL1_ ]As a grassroots-funded organization, we can’t do any of it without
you, Peter. Will
you pitch in $3 or more right now to help us gear up for
the fights ahead?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136926?refcode=em20230811-30322&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=30322%2E1203867%2E9ZFL1_ ]Donate $3

If we’re going to overcome our financial challenges and deliver
groundbreaking wins next year, we need you by our side today.

Thanks for everything,

Alexandra Rojas, Executive Director
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=30322%2E1203867%2E9ZFL1_ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=30322%2E1203867%2E9ZFL1_ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230811-30322-footer&t=1023&refcode2=30322_1203867_9ZFL1_&akid=30322%2E1203867%2E9ZFL1_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=30322%2E1203867%2E9ZFL1_

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: fighting for American energy independence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Peter-
Since day one, Joe Biden has followed the lead of radical environmentalists in attacking American energy independence.
Joe Biden has canceled pipelines, proposed burdensome regulations on energy producers, and forfeited America's energy security.
Coming from Texas and an oil and gas family, I understand the importance of protecting this vital industry. This industry supports good-paying jobs, and provides Americans with affordable and reliable energy that is needed for nearly every aspect of our lives.
That's why I've used my position on the Energy and Commerce Committee to stand up for American energy dominance and America's energy workers.
I've introduced legislation to:

* Protect America's refiners from the overzealous lawsuits of radical environmental activists.

* Ensure Joe Biden cannot indefinitely delay energy projects.

* Speed up the approval process for American oil production so we're not relying on foreign adversaries to meet our energy needs.

This work is critical because, under Joe Biden, we've sacrificed our position as a global leader in energy production, which has destabilized the geopolitical landscape around the world and made energy bills unaffordable for too many Americans.
Thankfully, with a Republican House Majority, we have the power to make incremental progress on this issue. That's why it's so important that we keep the House in Republican hands so we can continue to prevent Joe Biden from using Congress to further the agenda of the far-left that wants to completely abolish American oil and gas.
Democrats are going to do everything in their power to take back control of the House of Representatives. When we let Democrats outraise and outspend us in elections, we lose. But with resources from patriots like you, I know we can win and continue standing up for American energy independence.
That's why I'm asking for your support to protect the Republican House Majority. Every dollar you can spare will be put to immediate use and help me debunk the lies from radical environmentalists and their allies running for Congress, and allow me to promote common sense solutions to re-establish American energy dominance.
[Please consider donating anything you can at this link.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MAvoXHYcLEY00NFbRH4WwjaDyqU3X6_SUmIrbJsVO12v7OkfiPOL9naROlVBT0H3uGfkRqnhGBi-1Uzfr68RMOwmGyq3slx681-f8E6J4ZRvv-Kr_dkL8UnK1KmImEcBvMUukoywfQiAq3a2WRWnnqUs0HCjmUAN1dNyq5Ike84LUcuPJDzWcXaRTQ1JNa8rDfKw_GOV4xwC2EBsm9b7kNsmFLMkOMT0_EX5va2CyZ6RgTfRQThU1S0-2vc_qRm4EmA-Dg91U21tEtiew1qw9efP4tW-tgrF-Kwkgrrhc-g26pS09DptuYkfSDJCBM6FtulcXo9noeQS-sB1ME1mW5nvEhL42b8UbtWFmWVSSEI=&c=rGEvY9WdqzFMPFysU2ficAQqyKAYCj4YZvvo6x4XiO2OsgM_e6kVwQ==&ch=qCA0gDWGS1cwlr0XyOa58OVAyrEEfz2xSUsz3UqxKf59glDYmM4OvA==)

Joe Biden has canceled pipelines, proposed burdensome regulations on energy producers, and forfeited America's energy security. Coming from Texas and an oil and gas family, I understand the importance of protecting this vital industry. This industry supports good-paying jobs, and provides Americans with affordable and reliable energy that is needed for nearly every aspect of our lives. That's why I've used my position on the Energy and Commerce Committee to stand up for American energy dominance and America's energy workers. I've introduced legislation to: Protect America's refiners from the overzealous lawsuits of radical environmental activists. Ensure Joe Biden cannot indefinitely delay energy projects. * Speed up the approval process for American oil production so we're not relying on foreign adversaries to meet our energy needs. This work is critical because, under Joe Biden, we've sacrificed our position as a global leader in energy production, which has destabilized the geopolitical landscape around the world and made energy bills unaffordable for too many Americans. Thankfully, with a Republican House Majority, we have the power to make incremental progress on this issue. That's why it's so important that we keep the House in Republican hands so we can continue to prevent Joe Biden from using Congress to further the agenda of the far-left that wants to completely abolish American oil and gas. Democrats are going to do everything in their power to take back control of the House of Representatives. When we let Democrats outraise and outspend us in elections, we lose. But with resources from patriots like you, I know we can win and continue standing up for American energy independence. That's why I'm asking for your support to protect the Republican House Majority. Every dollar you can spare will be put to immediate use and help me debunk the lies from radical environmentalists and their allies running for Congress, and allow me to promote common sense solutions to re-establish American energy dominance. == | | | == | Thank you for your continued support of my campaign and American oil and gas. In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | | | P.S. Congress is out of session during the month of August. I'm using that time to hear from supporters about the issues they care about and what I should be focusing on when I return to Washington, D.C. There are so many problems to tackle under the failed leadership of Joe Biden, but with your help I can ensure I'm focusing on the issues important to you to get America back on track. == | | | | | == == == | | | | | PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS | | Dan Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b0c3a1a7df4145ed88307ceff3061a5d&_e=1fy7I7RMwqNIU4uN4N2RIQkVZ3a9t-5DbTOSwOur_0YmLCILctisO0Sf3fvQ0ep4lilhcbuIZrO4_gtbBKhTvv7JpgFF-NohMFMtYnF_Q2tNh-XJznDLT0r4ntUNDq-wzvaIVxiOuloYGG43nhcDcepgx5chMb7pBgaNo8eJpq2CM5d2gtxvSGbXl4enRvD0bks1GCSSI48BC54lueDArNnueYzQLoggTB4SmMi23Cm4SKFqqbXAJ_C1q9jMBoIfBvEcN78NAzZaXv9D4pSDZ1t-UTGG56lzP-opax9aAIHaNoam1oi3UPalOCdlPqNtMd4Ww_6kM3F5s1OZfedxFc7ggRW7OkvrMNiIzHrMvtFPMZ7X7rEYAAWjjd6EzpirxZzIoViC3Vc6zOrBFR829g%3D%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|

Here's what you need to know: | | | | THE RULES OF THE CONTEST Click to enter your name into the contest 1 lucky winner will be chosen at random on 8/19 and notified promptly! And guess what, Peter, | | | | | | | | We know you haven't joined our team yet, and that's okay. When you get the chance to meet Gov. Ron DeSantis, we're confident that you won't want to wait another day to help us elect him President. Our contest ends on August 18th at 11:59 PM ET, so don't wait! We hope we get to meet you, Team DeSantis | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. body:
Round 4 Of Tell It Like It Is PAC’s 10 Reasons Donald Trump Is Afraid to Debate | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ddec5fdd814c/what-they-are-saying-about-chris-christie-13559912?e=d0a9afa930)

|

|
---
|
---
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** August 11, 2023
Contact: [press@tellitlikeitispac.com](mailto:press@tellitlikeitispac.com)
**Round 4 Of Tell It Like It Is PAC’s 10 Reasons Donald Trump Is Afraid to Debate
** _Trump Finds A New Excuse To Avoid Debating Governor Chris Christie_
**ARLINGTON, VA —** Today, Tell It Like It Is PAC released the fourth ad in a ten-part video series highlighting why Donald Trump is afraid to commit to the first Republican National Committee (RNC) debate on August 23rd.
The spot drops two days after Tell It Like It Is PAC hosted Governor Chris Christie as a special guest for a [town hall](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=1d3ed6ef08&e=d0a9afa930) in Salem, NH and after Governor Christie [challenged](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=13fd867e5e&e=d0a9afa930) Donald Trump to show up on the debate stage. The underlying message behind the digital campaign is clear: Donald Trump is afraid to debate because he knows that Governor Christie will bring the fight directly to him. Unlike the other candidates in the race, Governor Christie is not afraid to prosecute his failures and disqualifying behavior. Round three takes Trump to task for his constant whining about the debate guidelines - he’s said that is it “unfair” that he should debate, he’s called the moderators “[nasty](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=3656f35c10&e=d0a9afa930),” and just the other day he stated that he[ won’t sign](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=97bea109d7&e=d0a9afa930) an RNC pledge which is required to participate.
Trump is using every excuse in the book to try to avoid facing off with Governor Christie on the debate stage. As Trump’s former Chief of Staff Mick Mulvaney [said](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=f4b93a8e71&e=d0a9afa930), “Trump may well be afraid to match wits with the former New Jersey governor on stage.”
**Round 4: He’s Scared**

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Peter, Under President Joe Biden and Border Czar Kamala Harris, our borders have been thrown open. Every city has become a border city. However, it wasn’t until the border crisis reached Democrat-run cities that Democrats finally decided to call it a “crisis.” I’ve been down to see the border crisis firsthand. body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
| | | [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cc87a0dfbc06489297b4292bf5d75788&_e=W9xoUbKIDoaMymuhU4aI2H3yxoyN8MM2RP-tvp5XreIHawmd2hcq6gh6X-sXgUlp4Cja9hPdhVOx8Ws4Q-YslLYxavmZFiUF-PndBAZqOBl-kcCPYSIpM89ZuujHhehe03nbbqaSjUKNztW7ZsgdZovvhPHcj9iUj9un7upcoaczZN8ihpes9tXhBjt895ykbRhyNrtQEaal6tLSb4dku3FMmn4rbdMpu6Z9Mg9jx2TIIQIpB_oCgwY-HBtZh524VGfWCzSdKwmwg_YxPUwehWP-wamV77eK3KqMa6IjMAqqmI7NrvH1Y5K-1FUhjfbvBIeosLTLNyAiNnVgfHEuC9ZaQIIQGUgxQOmU74gTokxNJz1Eo9Ss5KsHXqxnijVrBjRhT3TkVNFQ_v9BHP0M6XVjACZobRVqH4RNsMFVpi8%3D)
---
Friend,
I have a lot to say in this email - but it all comes from the HEART.
Since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my presidential campaign as a political outsider, the Deep State has put a bull's eye on my back.
My private communications were SPIED on, I was slandered by the Fake News, and a dossier was fabricated in an attempt to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government.
But then, a line was crossed on August 8, 2022 at 9:00 in the morning when my own home was RAIDED by the FBI and staged to look like a made-for-TV crime scene.
_**When the Deep State invades your own home, it 's a sign that our nation has entered uncharted territory and things are about to get far worse.**_
The raid on my home was a stern warning from the federal government not to run for president in 2024 - and a sign of what's to come if I chose to defy their demands.
I could've obeyed. I could've said, "I got to be one of only 45 Americans to ever be president. We did a tremendous job in those 4 years. Now, I can just spend the rest of my life by the beach with my beautiful family."
But that thought never even crossed my mind.
_**I could never turn my back on the country that gave me everything I ever could 've dreamed of. America will always be worth saving.**_
Surrendering our country to tyrannical bureaucrats who've become drunk with power never was and never will be an option.
So, when I announced my re-election campaign in November of 2022, I knew the imminent storm I was walking straight into...
...I have since been INDICTED **THREE** TIMES as an innocent man. I've been ARRESTED for crimes that I did not commit. And the rabid left-wing prosecutors have signaled that this is only just the beginning.
**They 've made it clear that their end game is to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man.**
Many pundits have remarked that if I were to drop out of the presidential race, the phony charges against me would be dropped and I would be guaranteed to live as a free man.
_**But here in America, our liberty is not a bargaining chip. Our freedom doesn 't come from a deal brokered by the government, our freedom is a natural right from God.**_
_**The second we allow our liberty and justice to be used as weapons of extortion, our nation will have forever succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny.**_
So, I will address those who are wondering if I would accept a deal with the Deep State and what this THIRD sham indictment means for the fate of our campaign...
...Let me make myself 100% clear: OUR CAMPAIGN GOES ON AND IT WILL _CONTINUE_ TO GO ON UNTIL WE THE PEOPLE WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024.
We've built the greatest political movement in the history of our country - and I will NEVER ABANDON it.
**We are on a mission to save our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class - and I know in my heart, that we will prevail just as we always have, and on November 5, 2024, We The People will be celebrating America's TRIUMPH OVER TYRANNY.**
Friend, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are destroying our country, then you can stop reading here. I only wanted to share this note with you.
_But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country._
**[Please make a contribution of even just $1 to show that you will peacefully stand by my side and NEVER SURRENDER our mission to SAVE AMERICA- for 1,500% impact.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cc87a0dfbc06489297b4292bf5d75788&_e=W9xoUbKIDoaMymuhU4aI2H3yxoyN8MM2RP-tvp5XreIHawmd2hcq6gh6X-sXgUlp4Cja9hPdhVOx8Ws4Q-YslLYxavmZFiUF-PndBAZqOBl-kcCPYSIpM89ZuujHhehe03nbbqaSjUKNztW7ZsgdZovvhPHcj9iUj9un7upcoaczZN8ihpes9tXhBjt895ykbRhyNrtQEaal6tLSb4dku3FMmn4rbdMpu6Z9Mg9jx2TIIQIpB_oCgwY-HBtZh524VGfWCzSdKwmwg_YxPUwehYXpuBa9h-1Zo2l-BqSU31B3sFBaiq-WczgnSpL2k2aTHZNqUyTbWgp1ga2ZiTssQjjEv0wpV76w4HLo8YyGQVTjp7NiVWGJLimfriN2rWM1U8TQIflXHnHmaa5DiK-2xBOml-kVuYoJCsKdSquw9RU%3D)**
[CONTRIBUTE $1 >>](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cc87a0dfbc06489297b4292bf5d75788&_e=W9xoUbKIDoaMymuhU4aI2H3yxoyN8MM2RP-tvp5XreIHawmd2hcq6gh6X-sXgUlp4Cja9hPdhVOx8Ws4Q-YslLYxavmZFiUF-PndBAZqOBl-kcCPYSIpM89ZuujHhehe03nbbqaSjUKNztW7ZsgdZovvhPHcj9iUj9un7upcoaczZN8ihpes9tXhBjt895ykbRhyNrtQEaal6tLSb4dku3FMmn4rbdMpu6Z9Mg9jx2TIIQIpB_oCgwY-HBtZh524BdYQKapv1Zt1kk0mQOiM0MqlZWuFeGsnXYbj_Dcnl-cpeg6nF3XpeaW5fjjRGUD3otMggCApQuCwjDTQ1CKheDPuTQ3SWo59dMXdTzyeiZtLs8wdsczV66FvxzbGzZXGWk05lOrI5nv5jiRhTRJ1UsVDMUQXNrKHJ9cJZr2pg8M6MmQBJgTyg3svAlY-hOBf)

clean_body: \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | | | Friend, I have a lot to say in this email - but it all comes from the HEART. Since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my presidential campaign as a political outsider, the Deep State has put a bull's eye on my back. My private communications were SPIED on, I was slandered by the Fake News, and a dossier was fabricated in an attempt to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government. But then, a line was crossed on August 8, 2022 at 9:00 in the morning when my own home was RAIDED by the FBI and staged to look like a made-for-TV crime scene. When the Deep State invades your own home, it 's a sign that our nation has entered uncharted territory and things are about to get far worse. The raid on my home was a stern warning from the federal government not to run for president in 2024 - and a sign of what's to come if I chose to defy their demands. I could've obeyed. I could've said, "I got to be one of only 45 Americans to ever be president. We did a tremendous job in those 4 years. Now, I can just spend the rest of my life by the beach with my beautiful family." But that thought never even crossed my mind. I could never turn my back on the country that gave me everything I ever could 've dreamed of. America will always be worth saving. Surrendering our country to tyrannical bureaucrats who've become drunk with power never was and never will be an option. So, when I announced my re-election campaign in November of 2022, I knew the imminent storm I was walking straight into... ...I have since been INDICTED THREE TIMES as an innocent man. I've been ARRESTED for crimes that I did not commit. And the rabid left-wing prosecutors have signaled that this is only just the beginning. They 've made it clear that their end game is to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man. Many pundits have remarked that if I were to drop out of the presidential race, the phony charges against me would be dropped and I would be guaranteed to live as a free man. But here in America, our liberty is not a bargaining chip. Our freedom doesn 't come from a deal brokered by the government, our freedom is a natural right from God. The second we allow our liberty and justice to be used as weapons of extortion, our nation will have forever succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny. So, I will address those who are wondering if I would accept a deal with the Deep State and what this THIRD sham indictment means for the fate of our campaign... ...Let me make myself 100% clear: OUR CAMPAIGN GOES ON AND IT WILL CONTINUE TO GO ON UNTIL WE THE PEOPLE WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024. We've built the greatest political movement in the history of our country - and I will NEVER ABANDON it. We are on a mission to save our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class - and I know in my heart, that we will prevail just as we always have, and on November 5, 2024, We The People will be celebrating America's TRIUMPH OVER TYRANNY. Friend, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are destroying our country, then you can stop reading here. I only wanted to share this note with you. But, if you can, never forget that even just $1 has the power to beat Crooked Joe and save America, because your $1 is never alone. It 's backed by millions of other patriots who share your values and love for our country. Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. name: #TeamGabe for Congress
subject: Supporting Gabe on the debate stage
body:
https://www.gabeamo.com/ [https://www.gabeamo.com/]

Friend,

Yesterday, Gabe participated in the first true back-and-forth style debate of this election. Hosted by Bill Bartholomew on The Bartholomewtown Podcast , this setting was a great opportunity for candidates to distinguish themselves from one another.

In his closing statement [https://drive.google.com/file/d/1SuGTzrFmoCqHb8x_VYc5LA6yjlxBgCIz/view?usp=sharing] , Gabe talked about the desire to serve. As a kid from humble beginnings in Pawtucket, Gabe has had the opportunity to serve at the heights of government, to roll up his sleeves and get to work to help people, on behalf of two presidents and a governor, most recently as Deputy Director of the Office of Intergovernmental Affairs for President Biden (as Gabe likes to say, try saying that three times fast!).

The thing that makes Gabe different is the combination of his desire to serve the community that invested so much in him and the ability to go to Washington, D.C. and immediately deliver on behalf of the people of Rhode Island.

We have our most important deadline next Wednesday, August 16th. That is the FINAL fundraising deadline of the election. Help us make a strong showing and help us build on our momentum as early voting begins on the same day!

Can you chip in as much as you are able TODAY to support Gabe? Whether it’s $20 or $2000, every dollar counts.

DONATE $10 NOW >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-aug?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
DONATE $25 NOW >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-aug?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 NOW >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-aug?express_lane=true&amount=%2050&refcode=express_lane_%2050]
DONATE OTHER >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-aug?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

With gratitude
#TeamGabe

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-aug]
VOLUNTEER [https://www.mobilize.us/gabeamo/event/564657/]
GET UPDATES [https://www.gabeamo.com/]

https://www.facebook.com/gabeamoforcongress [https://www.facebook.com/gabeamoforcongress]
https://twitter.com/gabeamo [https://twitter.com/gabeamo]
https://www.instagram.com/gabeamoforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/gabeamoforcongress/]
https://www.gabeamo.com/ [https://www.gabeamo.com/]

Gabe Amo for Congress
P.O. Box 40457
Providence, RI 02940
United States

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Kari Lake to announce she’s running against Ruben
body:
We can’t let Kari Lake - or Kyrsten Sinema - win this race. | | | Peter – 🚨🚨🚨 [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xss5LMl9ab1MJDFI2H7n2PAjLrw28SK_3MyKEZc0Wup9hBhUXSK8vuBQ_QNLuoAbmPZgW8Tix92n5olIZUKGHlOgeHXE5be-n24_YLGD9jMAEVLhE5agxSJWPA54lQ3ierkl97m7mO0TpHmH22tQk7dDI82pBgYb24Nl9qUcuebkjWLwCuK0Ywnmhf2-wo8pciKcbpPsNQmnpqorfJnf9WIQ2_W5qAkpDFBgAGUugTrNrRJNo6rSOmGjBIKxHlNTxN0Xj-SvYJzty8YivyrzDArkYI_zL_vls6kRXTMgrFgFfR4Vi5RA-hFWwoTJKltzVcPEWeq4Z-wz1rcZdcHLoO/3yn/xAaNZCFCQ2aYZEQxpjdJGQ/h0/tiG0xlEQpJlxyeu0F2W7faWvDw6rBqCUUso0VGugfKM)It’s been nearly a year since Kari Lake lost – but pretended to win – the governorship. Since then, she’s spread Trump-like election lies, spent millions of dollars on nonsense lawsuits, and practically moved into Mar-A-Lago to suck up even more to Trump. (Really, she had her own room!) Now, reports say she will soon enter the Senate race against Ruben Gallego – for the seat Kyrsten Sinema currently holds. Make no mistake: Kari Lake is dangerous. A former TV anchor, she’s a statewide celebrity who has been called “Trumpism’s leading lady.” She aggressively pushes Trump’s Big Lie, consistently promotes debunked conspiracy theories and has invited Q-Anon ‘activists’ into her campaign, and she’s in favor of a total ban against all abortion.

And here’s another thing: the Republicans WANT Sinema to run. They like their odds better in a three-way race than if they had to face Gallego one-on-one. They’re betting on Sinema taking too many votes from Gallego, letting Kari Lake or another GOP candidate sneak by.
That’s why we’re going to keep doing everything we can, right now, to keep educating voters about Sinema’s *real* record of corruption and obstruction, while also explaining the danger that Kari Lake poses. We’re going to do everything we can to help Ruben Gallego win this seat and keep another MAGA extremist like Kari Lake from entering the Senate.

I joined Stuart Varney on Fox Business this morning to discuss the Democrat-created migrant crisis.
We have to do something to stem the flow of migrants. Spending $12 billion or even $100 billion is never going to be enough.
The sanctuary and open borders policies of one-party rule Democrats in Albany and President Biden are decimating our communities and they have NO PLAN other than shipping migrants to communities upstate and shoveling billions of taxpayer dollars into a giant cash furnace.
New Yorkers and all Americans are the ones footing the bill! Take a moment to watch my interview discussing this on Varney & Co.

body:
Nothing to worry about yet. But we do need your help.
#
Hey Derek, quick update from the VoteVets team.
We’ve got a small problem.
Last month was one of our biggest months of the year. Thousands of you chipped in to support our work.
But this month, we haven’t kept the pace.
This isn’t a panic email. There’s nothing to worry about yet. But we do need your help to make sure we don’t fall behind.
We’re approaching the halfway point to our next FEC deadline on the 15th, so we’re starting a drive through mid-month to catch up to where we need to be.
So we’re asking for $5 today. Yes, just $5.

name: Ashley Ehasz
subject: What just happened in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
Over and over again, we're seeing what voters really think about abortion. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67935881/421373308/-1733172345?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20230810_fr_ohioRR_cand_mf_60da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGMwODdkNy02MzM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r4UBT1sg14oBIIjjwPlPtrJva5AXK4LGE23rqqZrZZ4=)
---
Team, I am still not over what happened in Ohio earlier this week. **When I heard the news that anti-choice politicians’ attempt to block voters from enshrining abortion rights in the state constitution LOST – and by a HUGE margin no less – I got pretty emotional.** The details of Issue 1, the ballot measure that failed, are a little complex, but the basics are this: After the Supreme Court struck down Roe last summer, pro-choice activists got to work passing abortion protections at the state level. Across the country last year, the 6 times voters had a chance to weigh in, they voted FOR abortion rights – including in Kentucky, Montana, Kansas, and Michigan. Now, Ohio is state #7. What we learned from last year, and what we are seeing in Ohio, is that red, blue, or purple – folks _everywhere_ are fed up with Republican attacks on our freedom to control our own bodies.**And they are fighting BACK.** My opponent, Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick, is another anti-choice extremist Republican. He just recently voted to block service members from accessing abortion care. But beating him won't be easy. We'll need to raise millions of dollars, and to do that, I'm relying on grassroots donors – not corporate PACs – to fuel this campaign. [**If you want to show that Pennsylvanians will fight just as hard (heck, harder!) for our access to abortion as Ohio did, please chip in your first donation of $5 – or whatever you can afford – to send me to the House where I promise I will be a pro-choice champion.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67935882/421373309/-1733172345?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20230810_fr_ohioRR_cand_mf_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGMwODdkNy02MzM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r4UBT1sg14oBIIjjwPlPtrJva5AXK4LGE23rqqZrZZ4=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Over and over again, we're seeing what voters really think about abortion. | = Team, I am still not over what happened in Ohio earlier this week. When I heard the news that anti-choice politicians’ attempt to block voters from enshrining abortion rights in the state constitution LOST – and by a HUGE margin no less – I got pretty emotional. The details of Issue 1, the ballot measure that failed, are a little complex, but the basics are this: After the Supreme Court struck down Roe last summer, pro-choice activists got to work passing abortion protections at the state level. Across the country last year, the 6 times voters had a chance to weigh in, they voted FOR abortion rights – including in Kentucky, Montana, Kansas, and Michigan. Now, Ohio is state #7. What we learned from last year, and what we are seeing in Ohio, is that red, blue, or purple – folks everywhere are fed up with Republican attacks on our freedom to control our own bodies.And they are fighting BACK. My opponent, Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick, is another anti-choice extremist Republican. He just recently voted to block service members from accessing abortion care. But beating him won't be easy. We'll need to raise millions of dollars, and to do that, I'm relying on grassroots donors – not corporate PACs – to fuel this campaign. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you, Ashley Candidate for Pennsylvania's First Congressional District | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. Add your name – support our nation’s energy industry!
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/3ea9618e34588354/513b7ad741e36e8cc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter,

Have you seen the price at the pump?

**The cost of a gallon of gasoline is up 30 cents in 30 days, once again approaching $4.00.** Families and small businesses in Alabama and across the country are feeling the impact.

_Joe Biden’s War on American Energy is to blame_.

Biden has been doing all he can to appease the radical "green” left since his first days in office back in January 2021. And last month, just days after the Biden administration imposed new restrictions on energy production, Energy Secretary Jennifer Granholm was out there talking about market volatility and the need for more supply.

Hello?!?! The answer to how we bring down prices is to **UNLEASH AMERICAN ENERGY**!

**[If you agree, please sign our new petition now>>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/3ea9618e34588354/ac78daa6c318a778c3d6b838967d376c/33013)**
