name: Chloe Cole
subject: We're suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
There are lots of powerful people who don’t want my story to get out...

| |
---
| | Dear Friend,My name is Chloe. You don’t know me but I’m hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson.There are lots of powerful people who don’t want my story to get out, so I’m so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest.I guess I’m what you’d call a “cautionary tale.”You see, I’m one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. [**Even though we don’t know each other, I’m writing you today hoping you’ll help me stop the** **horror of what happened to me, from happening to other children and their parents.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8napj0pujbdckonk3fbava9u76cpgrmsnp96c38_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctgeao74cjh2bs) It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing.I was also shy and didn’t socialize easily – and I didn’t feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents.But I found ‘friends’ on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body.And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me.I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I’d be valued and loved even more.Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender.They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to “experts” who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide.**The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: “Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?”** Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant “saving” me. When they signed those forms, it wasn’t informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress.And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. [**Will you help me fight so these radical doctors and hospitals can’t prey on another scared, confused, lonely child like they did me?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc05ruegfmv3q8v3h897925pdv4oaviije7b8l4o_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctgeao74cjh2bs) The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders......and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy.I was fifteen years old.And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused.If you’re like most people I tell my story to... right about now you’re probably thinking, “HOW did it ever get this far?” And the answer is simple.The “experts” lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way.They claimed I would never get “better” unless I medically transitioned – when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they’re transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body......while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks.They never told us that there isn’t one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts.When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars.At age 18, I’m just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I’ll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man’s, my body will look like a boy’s, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner.And my parents feel like they’ve failed me on every level imaginable.I can’t go back. I can’t change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical “experts.” [**And YOU can help me.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z09m0bl6aa57qr02ie8fmd3ic18l1lua4ikcjct8_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctgeao74cjh2bs) More and more children are mutilated and abused every day.**There’s even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in.** And it won’t stop until someone fights back.When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I’d seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn’t know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn’t even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face!Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty.And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn’t felt in a long time -- hope. Because Harmeet is a fighter like me.She didn’t tell me we’d never win against the giant medical industry.She didn’t tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch.She told me my fight mattered.Not only because of what had happened to me -- but also because we could STOP it from happening to other children.And so together with Harmeet Dhillon’s non-profit -- the Center for American Liberty -- I’ve launched a case against the radical doctors and hospital who preyed on me......and who continue to prey on children -- maybe even in your family.As I’ve mentioned several times -- I’m 18-years-old. On my own, I’d never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this.That’s one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don’t have the money to fight them in court.But that’s exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what’s right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn.Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like:
---
| |
* _Brach v. Newsom_ \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools...
* _Ngo v. Roce City Antifa_ \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING...
* _O’Handley v. Padilla_ \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with...
* And now my case... _Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente_.

---
The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn’t mean they have the big money that their opponents have.[**That’s why I hope you’ll consider helping us by rushing back a small tax-deductible donation of $25 or more.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z24vhje2947c6eajfl3jl2baeqvc22tciem83bd0_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctgeao74cjh2bs) There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt.Alone we’re no match for them. [**But if everyone I’m writing to can contribute just $25, or if you’re able, maybe more -- $35, $50, $75, $100, $200, or even $500**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zka27dpmnm6rl83m9tc1d50v8jeqofes2n46grrg_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctgeao74cjh2bs), we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I’ve been called a “liar.” I’ve even been told de-transitioners like me don’t exist. But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say:**_“You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. I exist.”_** Thank you for reading this letter from a complete stranger. I hope I can call you a friend now. And thank you for whatever help you can send to the Center for American Liberty. **[Whether it’s $25, $35, $50, $75, $100, $200, or even $500 or more...](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2022v8t26c4l6odmed11o35iedr9cnfg7h0q448_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctgeao74cjh2bs)** every bit moves us closer to stopping these monsters.
---
| | Thank you,Chloe Cole
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2aia3c3bpuluul6occk8acem1aalgm4ncaem5i0_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctgeao74cjh2bs)
---
| | P.S. This is a photo of me now. It’s been a long, painful road but I’m finding happiness and purpose as I fight to make sure what happened to me NEVER happens to another child. **[Please help me with your tax-deductible gift of $25 or more.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z58flglersh5rflg8pl3kudhfuuiufuodp1bg9ho_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctgeao74cjh2bs) **Thank you so much for your help. -Chloe
---
[**DONATE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrk4a2hp95288gnl9gu03ff9kflsnk6r6516v6l8_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctgeao74cjh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs3lmid2qf7u9tte38untjhpfvhidblhl9anrms0_rp22sh2s8i66p74ctgeao74cjh2bs)

body:
| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvop5HqA03b2usrXHoCRrJQf6798UZs7DBJ-yH0YQ6WPCSMRsk-LgbZZlZPWs7bumPOoFulTAZ8k9JqqOAtLY2T2H_8egAOCYMRwjHa-VqAa2Ei6ADAya3BRZMTZd-D1JhUN0cpTLTH3JCeU3LrebyQPCLygmyap4qo20uQmXSdmlRt5cZICntwndoA18y5o9qth2vIammXCw-TXEzdSF-4L11qwgcZ76eAZEti9BLz7w/3yn/fZ0y0mxPSo-Ji4bHNhlScQ/h0/ysWwVzjBtB1EIp6wJsoMOUOv5d-5kPUMFsAnqFyQfpY)

Friend, This summer, after an announcement that Israel will finally allow U.S. citizens of Palestinian ethnicity to enter the country via Tel Aviv, we are seeing a rise of denials and discrimination. To help inform the U.S. State Department and the other Biden administration agencies, we are providing the link to report your experience of discrimination. If you’ve experienced discrimination when trying to enter Israel, here’s a form to complete: [https://forms.office.com/pages/responsepage.aspx?id=dFDPZv5a0UimkaErISH0S3k54wgSN71Bs_xpxUGsY7dURUhMNlc5SlFHS0ZMRVIyTzBYNFpRQVoyWC4u](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/A7GQnnr_XzUYyessq5BiRFeKh0bgoWYFK4JE6Wn7h5FP0ij1GtEdbBNXDMCD1c3jizdAyJpMSCNa9LSv9T-awJvsbg9_cGMpecdIEHzWB9C8I2RXKd9q6_ZpaHu8vOojWJXFNsxOczIvp5um3EDHURl-AYsQQfHA1JUICXKDVENX6aj6eOYu4WJO0X1XQE731n3zLha_ObityQJ4SxwvFdjsPZ1JEe0y6tXHoRNZxfM-1MGcTYkypD5yCYSX6ey5qMAVDlKEZSTOcFzBJ_Jq7OKcwvnTiwALsN9rU11hK-ZJg3DXRvfGjAkIRZo8m5IcTxwVQIReC-frXE6frG2xz2OI3AigdypD-JsUG8OpbroAyMP4yUEvTv-s8p1vBxX8wlLF4K8eVYt700QxPndWqA1J5WjpUjL3ynmv00ezjLHMIcjJkENs5BBomsdyO0JjMOh4mrfUcdUEuw8nY5nCmxoxZLFcC4dQcPf_1oCW8WI/3yn/fZ0y0mxPSo-Ji4bHNhlScQ/h1/8DgTjH7e9WvURRduJtolkyUpq4ZRfSa3I_jdNTV7w5A) Don't assume your own member of Congress is aware of your experience, so be sure to also connect with them for help as well. I was also refused entry a few years ago, so I am not surprised that other Americans are also experiencing very clear discriminatory practices. In an attempt to join the U.S. Visa Waiver Program—which would allow Israeli citizens to enter the U.S. for 90 days without applying for a visa—Israel committed to treat all U.S. citizens equally when they visit Israel. But Palestinian Americans, Arab Americans, Muslim Americans, and pro-Palestinian American citizens have continued to experience harassment and been denied entry at Israel-controlled borders. I’ve raised this disparate treatment of U.S. citizens with the U.S. Secretary of State and the U.S. Secretary of Homeland Security. Unless the Israeli government ends all ethnically, racially, religiously, and politically based discrimination against American citizens at its borders, it is ineligible for the Visa Waiver Program. I will continue to fight against all forms of discrimination, including being targeted solely based on your ethnicity. In solidarity, Rashida

---

Fellow American,

In a move to placate the extreme leftist environmentalists he needs to get re-elected, Biden just made another massive _**federal land grab of 1 million acres**_ on the border of Arizona and Utah.

This land grab removes access to critical natural resources, will undercut our local economy, and will likely drive national energy costs even higher.

_**If that weren’t bad enough – immediately after locking Americans out of our land, Biden is now here in Utah to fundraise off deep-pocketed environmentalist donors!**_

This isn’t about the environment for Biden, this is about abusing the Antiquities Act to pad his campaign coffers in my home state!

Biden and his radical environmentalist allies can’t just throw us under the bus and then go cash in.[**Utah’s voters and dollars are RED, and I need your help to show them we won’t stand for this.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d062931a4c4b4291b78780caf8f206b6&_e=N_aKGXKaHgvsDp0KhvK1k0Ow_Pll15ojaUV7amY0Z6PlpExjj-U9BlE86D_Lz3Nr8DtcI98sLDMhnT89bp1FEmvdUDs5SaXdP_2gwdjowHSrOIJ-iVi52fU_GxGpweJabwyXoIi9kN9UYhFTvg1TnykeqB8On2GPOBwy1eEZOJXvp0XpzLGuy0e7R_FQyQwT8Bd6F1rjyR2kA1om7DC0wt7xeAuXh052_uga5DSggpRz0qsaBOekoRJWOKTZI7bSGfVVU29ip9KMhib9KB5UOFnzmml36Cerh4bGDNfZItNdlB4Vqx_v_c6cqyYaudheUHOXIffkJwn4-4eSNwtCjOEVTQwz2o3V6RjCoF6bEsgsFfaNgbZ-fg3S8PKcXr64)

[ ** _FIGHT BACK ➞_ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d062931a4c4b4291b78780caf8f206b6&_e=N_aKGXKaHgvsDp0KhvK1k0Ow_Pll15ojaUV7amY0Z6PlpExjj-U9BlE86D_Lz3Nr8DtcI98sLDMhnT89bp1FEmvdUDs5SaXdP_2gwdjowHSrOIJ-iVi52fU_GxGpweJabwyXoIi9kN9UYhFTvg1TnykeqB8On2GPOBwy1eEZOJXvp0XpzLGuy0e7R_FQyQwT8Bd6F1rjyR2kA1om7DC0wt7xeAuXh052_uga5DSggpT5UTuKTum3APCANDcIYkzjQDN-F04bxi9f3QwAUHyQ_CEPSfcH03GNBptma93CRvDx-glcxvS55wFOeFMvwZ-d_j8CIhUDfqE1A7U_OXdeSaeLBFZNJCU-CPKNBvSPJHP8hPMQnY1JkQBfaXOtt03L)

**MEET MIKE:** | A CHAMPION FOR PRINCIPLED LEADERSHIP
Mike learned his love for the Constitution around the family dinner table. Mike’s father, Rex Lee, served as Solicitor General under President Ronald Reagan and later as President of Brigham Young University. As a child, Mike attended his father’s arguments before the U.S. Supreme Court, giving him a unique understanding of the government from an early age. As an attorney he developed a more complete understanding of why the Constitution is essential to the protection of life, liberty, and property.

After graduating from law school in 1997, he served as a law clerk to Judge Dee Benson of the U.S. District Court for the District of Utah. He then clerked for Judge Samuel A. Alito, Jr., who was serving at that time on the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Third Circuit Court in Newark, New Jersey. After his second clerkship, he joined the Washington, D.C. office of Sidley & Austin, where he specialized in appellate and Supreme Court litigation. Several years later, Mike was invited to serve as an Assistant U.S. Attorney in Salt Lake City, preparing briefs and arguing cases before the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Tenth Circuit. He served as Governor Huntsman’s General Counsel and then went to Washington for a one-year clerkship with Justice Alito at the U.S. Supreme Court.

Following his clerkship, Mike joined the Salt Lake office of the Washington, D.C.-based law firm of Howrey LLP. Mike has earned a reputation as an outstanding lawyer based on his sound judgment, writing and courtroom advocacy skills, and thorough understanding of the Constitution. Mike and Sharon have three children and live in Provo, Utah.

clean_body: This land grab removes access to critical natural resources, will undercut our local economy, and will likely drive national energy costs even higher. | | Fellow American, In a move to placate the extreme leftist environmentalists he needs to get re-elected, Biden just made another massive federal land grab of 1 million acres on the border of Arizona and Utah. This land grab removes access to critical natural resources, will undercut our local economy, and will likely drive national energy costs even higher. If that weren’t bad enough – immediately after locking Americans out of our land, Biden is now here in Utah to fundraise off deep-pocketed environmentalist donors! This isn’t about the environment for Biden, this is about abusing the Antiquities Act to pad his campaign coffers in my home state! Biden and his radical environmentalist allies can’t just throw us under the bus and then go cash in. President Biden is exploiting our rural western economy in order to stay in office. Our rural ranchers, miners, and residents – along with Americans everywhere who pay for gas and electricity – are going to suffer from this radical land grab. For America, Sen. Mike Lee MEET MIKE: | A CHAMPION FOR PRINCIPLED LEADERSHIP Mike learned his love for the Constitution around the family dinner table. Mike’s father, Rex Lee, served as Solicitor General under President Ronald Reagan and later as President of Brigham Young University. As a child, Mike attended his father’s arguments before the U.S. Supreme Court, giving him a unique understanding of the government from an early age. As an attorney he developed a more complete understanding of why the Constitution is essential to the protection of life, liberty, and property. After graduating from law school in 1997, he served as a law clerk to Judge Dee Benson of the U.S. District Court for the District of Utah. He then clerked for Judge Samuel A. Alito, Jr., who was serving at that time on the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Third Circuit Court in Newark, New Jersey. After his second clerkship, he joined the Washington, D.C. office of Sidley & Austin, where he specialized in appellate and Supreme Court litigation. Several years later, Mike was invited to serve as an Assistant U.S. Attorney in Salt Lake City, preparing briefs and arguing cases before the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Tenth Circuit. He served as Governor Huntsman’s General Counsel and then went to Washington for a one-year clerkship with Justice Alito at the U.S. Supreme Court. Following his clerkship, Mike joined the Salt Lake office of the Washington, D.C.-based law firm of Howrey LLP. Mike has earned a reputation as an outstanding lawyer based on his sound judgment, writing and courtroom advocacy skills, and thorough understanding of the Constitution. Mike and Sharon have three children and live in Provo, Utah. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc. PO Box 1537 Salt Lake City, UT 84110

Peter,
I will never forget the 2022 election, _an election that you helped me win with just 51.1% of the vote.
_
Thanks to your faith in me, I’ve been hard at work to make life better for all Oregonians for the past 8 months.

But since I refuse to play partisan games in Washington, I’ve been under relentless attack.

I don’t mind these attacks, because, at the end of the day, I don’t work for other politicians or political operatives – **I work for you, the American People.
**
_So as long as I have your support, I know I’ll be okay_ – that’s why I launched my _**2023 Sustaining Member**_ program.

But with 2023 starting to wind down, I’m only accepting new members for the next 6 HOURS – so if you want to establish your membership, now is the time.

clean_body: | | | | We’re closing this membership for the remainder of the year | Peter, I will never forget the 2022 election, an election that you helped me win with just 51.1% of the vote. Thanks to your faith in me, I’ve been hard at work to make life better for all Oregonians for the past 8 months. But since I refuse to play partisan games in Washington, I’ve been under relentless attack. I don’t mind these attacks, because, at the end of the day, I don’t work for other politicians or political operatives – I work for you, the American People. So as long as I have your support, I know I’ll be okay – that’s why I launched my 2023 Sustaining Member program. But with 2023 starting to wind down, I’m only accepting new members for the next 6 HOURS – so if you want to establish your membership, now is the time. | | | | Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | [CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT]() | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 = \- =

name: Team Whitmer
subject: It's hard for kids to learn on an empty stomach.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Team — we can all agree that no student should ever go hungry at school. That’s why, here in Michigan, we’re providing free breakfast and free lunch to all 1.4 million public school students in our state. **Thanks to Governor Gretchen Whitmer’s bipartisan budget, we’re cutting costs for families and ensuring every child can focus in class.** 🍎**** It saves families $850 a year per student and valuable time every morning. 🥪**** It helps our kids focus on learning while they’re in class with a full belly. 🧃 It supports Michigan farmers whose produce will be enjoyed by more Michigan kids. Gretchen is laser-focused on building a Michigan where everyone can thrive and it’s all thanks to support from this grassroots team. **[Can you chip in to power her work to lower costs for families and help students succeed?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67941035/421380569/720153128?refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230811_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWI5ZGE1OGEtNjgzOC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Lygr3NQtoMEnW-JfP1MJnIVm7yCMCz1DKvJXiMM8mNg=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67941044/421380576/720153128?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230811_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWI5ZGE1OGEtNjgzOC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Lygr3NQtoMEnW-JfP1MJnIVm7yCMCz1DKvJXiMM8mNg=)**

clean_body: | Team — we can all agree that no student should ever go hungry at school. That’s why, here in Michigan, we’re providing free breakfast and free lunch to all 1.4 million public school students in our state. Thanks to Governor Gretchen Whitmer’s bipartisan budget, we’re cutting costs for families and ensuring every child can focus in class. 🍎** It saves families $850 a year per student and valuable time every morning. 🥪 It helps our kids focus on learning while they’re in class with a full belly. 🧃 It supports Michigan farmers whose produce will be enjoyed by more Michigan kids. Gretchen is laser-focused on building a Michigan where everyone can thrive and it’s all thanks to support from this grassroots team. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for all that you do to help Michigan move forward! – Team Whitmer Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

body:
We’ve been working hard to register voters!

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67941224/421381004/2096228750?refcode=EM_F_230810VR_N_TN_90DO_5_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU4OWRhNThhLTY4MzgtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N0e3eQlmEZauFn-E-iSSHbo3KEByJCdKNPSe0f9UiBE=)
| Hi team – we have been hard at work registering voters around Pennsylvania and wanted to fill you in!

On July 24, we attended the Naturalization ceremonies at Dauphin County Court House, where we not only witnessed new citizens of the United States receive their Certificate of Citizenship and take their oath but also assisted these citizens in registering to vote and in turn, participating in our democracy.

Then, on July 29, we headed to The Roots concert in Harrisburg! We set up a tent and helped fellow concertgoers register to vote. These are just examples of the community events we’ve hit up recently in Dauphin County to ensure that folks are engaged, informed, and ready to cast their ballots in the critical upcoming election in November.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67941230/421381007/2096228750?refcode=EM_F_230810VR_N_TN_90DO_5_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU4OWRhNThhLTY4MzgtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N0e3eQlmEZauFn-E-iSSHbo3KEByJCdKNPSe0f9UiBE=)
Overall, through these events, we helped to register more than 50 new voters. And we have no plans to slow down! Your support will help us continue our voter registration efforts to expand the electorate centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities, and the youth across ALL of Pennsylvania.

[**As we get ready for back-to-school season, will you support our work to ensure we can host more community events not only in Dauphin County but in all of our focus regions across Pennsylvania?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67941234/421381011/2096228750?refcode=EM_F_230810VR_N_TN_90DO_5_G_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU4OWRhNThhLTY4MzgtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=N0e3eQlmEZauFn-E-iSSHbo3KEByJCdKNPSe0f9UiBE=) subject: MTA’s Congestion Tax = cash grab
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | **As your Congressman, Josh is constantly fighting to ensure affordability for Jersey Families across the state.**

The New York MTA’s proposed Congestion Tax of $23/day is nothing but a cash grab and a harm to NJ families and communities. This tax does not go back into the PATH Train or NJ transit – but instead will cause traffic and cancer-causing pollution for Jersey.

Let’s get this straight: MTA’s Congestion Tax is anti-environment, anti-commuter, and anti-business. That’s why Josh has joined Sen. Menendez and Governor Murphy in a lawsuit to stop this outrageous tax – **and now he needs you to stand with him.**

[Will you add your name to stand with Josh against the MTA’s Congestion Tax?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67941600/421381609/-550784790?source=EM_NBI_JG_20230811_pt_congestiontax_0_1MO_TeamGottheimer_NA_NA_congtax&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjliYWNiZC02ODM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KcqUBh6ah-ZP5v_8YITwyHzCWVXANQLbHe9HVXCBPKI=&emci=50ea03b7-6838-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fb9bacbd-6838-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=37438246) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67941601/421381610/-550784790?source=EM_NBI_JG_20230811_pt_congestiontax_0_1MO_TeamGottheimer_NA_NA_congtax&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjliYWNiZC02ODM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KcqUBh6ah-ZP5v_8YITwyHzCWVXANQLbHe9HVXCBPKI=&emci=50ea03b7-6838-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fb9bacbd-6838-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=37438246)

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Hawaii
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Our Hawaiian friends need our support right now.
#
Peter,
A little more than ten years ago, I had the pleasure of visiting the beautiful state of Hawaii with my friends and colleagues, Hawaii Senators Mazie Hirono and Brian Schatz. It is almost difficult to describe a place like Hawaii and its extraordinary mix of culture, history, and natural wonders.
Today, my heart is with all the people of Hawaii as wildfires tear through the state, displacing families, burning homes and businesses, and claiming the lives of at least 55 people so far. I know that I am joined in grief with people all over Illinois, the U.S., and across the world—and I am already proud to see the ways that folks are stepping up to support our Hawaiian friends.
**[If you want to help Hawaii respond to and recover from these wildfires, please consider making a donation directly to the Hawaii Community Foundation’s Maui Strong Fund.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67945082/421386106/-1302722473?refcode=dd_em_230811_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmZmYmEzMS02YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AKkLhM0oTuaQd1CDNl3XG5zKXmlu6o6zwebLS8Mv9Cw=)**
According to the Hawaii Community Foundation, the Maui Strong Fund was created to help Maui residents prepare for and recover from disasters. The funds are currently allocated to support the Maui communities that have been directly impacted by the destructive wildfires.
Time and again, our grassroots team has put politics aside and shown our compassion and empathy for communities in need, whether they are close to home or as far away as Ukraine. Now, I know that we can join together and provide a powerful outpouring of support for Hawaii.
****[Please—donate what you can to the Hawaii Community Foundation’s Maui Strong Fund.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67945083/421386108/-1302722473?refcode=dd_em_230811_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmZmYmEzMS02YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AKkLhM0oTuaQd1CDNl3XG5zKXmlu6o6zwebLS8Mv9Cw=)****
My best,
Dick Durbin

******[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67945084/421386109/-1302722473?refcode=dd_em_230811_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmZmYmEzMS02YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AKkLhM0oTuaQd1CDNl3XG5zKXmlu6o6zwebLS8Mv9Cw=)******

Peter,

**Now is our opportunity to be fully prepared to FIGHT BACK against these lying attacks while also sharing our winning message with voters to defend this all-important seat.**

The DCCC may be coming at us from all directions, but they are no match for the strength and dedication of our grassroots movement, and with your help, I know we can win again in 2024.

A recent DCCC memo – previously circulated only within the DCCC – was leaked and provides us with an insight into the baseless lies and accusations D.C. Democrats are planning to attack us with. Now is our opportunity to be fully prepared to FIGHT BACK against these lying attacks while also sharing our winning message with voters to defend this all-important seat. The DCCC may be coming at us from all directions, but they are no match for the strength and dedication of our grassroots movement, and with your help, I know we can win again in 2024. Unlike the self-indulgent D.C. Democrats, I fight for YOU every day in Congress. **MEET MIKE:** | A CHAMPION FOR PRINCIPLED LEADERSHIP
Mike learned his love for the Constitution around the family dinner table. Mike’s father, Rex Lee, served as Solicitor General under President Ronald Reagan and later as President of Brigham Young University. As a child, Mike attended his father’s arguments before the U.S. Supreme Court, giving him a unique understanding of the government from an early age. As an attorney he developed a more complete understanding of why the Constitution is essential to the protection of life, liberty, and property.

After graduating from law school in 1997, he served as a law clerk to Judge Dee Benson of the U.S. District Court for the District of Utah. He then clerked for Judge Samuel A. Alito, Jr., who was serving at that time on the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Third Circuit Court in Newark, New Jersey. After his second clerkship, he joined the Washington, D.C. office of Sidley & Austin, where he specialized in appellate and Supreme Court litigation. Several years later, Mike was invited to serve as an Assistant U.S. Attorney in Salt Lake City, preparing briefs and arguing cases before the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Tenth Circuit. He served as Governor Huntsman’s General Counsel and then went to Washington for a one-year clerkship with Justice Alito at the U.S. Supreme Court.

Following his clerkship, Mike joined the Salt Lake office of the Washington, D.C.-based law firm of Howrey LLP. Mike has earned a reputation as an outstanding lawyer based on his sound judgment, writing and courtroom advocacy skills, and thorough understanding of the Constitution. Mike and Sharon have three children and live in Provo, Utah.

clean_body: Biden just made another massive federal land grab of 1 million acres on the border of Arizona and Utah. | | Fellow American, In a move to placate the extreme leftist environmentalists he needs to get re-elected, Biden just made another massive federal land grab of 1 million acres on the border of Arizona and Utah. This land grab removes access to critical natural resources, will undercut our local economy, and will likely drive national energy costs even higher. If that weren’t bad enough – immediately after locking Americans out of our land, Biden is now here in Utah to fundraise off deep-pocketed environmentalist donors! This isn’t about the environment for Biden, this is about abusing the Antiquities Act to pad his campaign coffers in my home state! Biden and his radical environmentalist allies can’t just throw us under the bus and then go cash in. President Biden is exploiting our rural western economy in order to stay in office. Our rural ranchers, miners, and residents – along with Americans everywhere who pay for gas and electricity – are going to suffer from this radical land grab. For America, Sen. Mike Lee MEET MIKE: | A CHAMPION FOR PRINCIPLED LEADERSHIP Mike learned his love for the Constitution around the family dinner table. Mike’s father, Rex Lee, served as Solicitor General under President Ronald Reagan and later as President of Brigham Young University. As a child, Mike attended his father’s arguments before the U.S. Supreme Court, giving him a unique understanding of the government from an early age. As an attorney he developed a more complete understanding of why the Constitution is essential to the protection of life, liberty, and property. After graduating from law school in 1997, he served as a law clerk to Judge Dee Benson of the U.S. District Court for the District of Utah. He then clerked for Judge Samuel A. Alito, Jr., who was serving at that time on the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Third Circuit Court in Newark, New Jersey. After his second clerkship, he joined the Washington, D.C. office of Sidley & Austin, where he specialized in appellate and Supreme Court litigation. Several years later, Mike was invited to serve as an Assistant U.S. Attorney in Salt Lake City, preparing briefs and arguing cases before the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Tenth Circuit. He served as Governor Huntsman’s General Counsel and then went to Washington for a one-year clerkship with Justice Alito at the U.S. Supreme Court. Following his clerkship, Mike joined the Salt Lake office of the Washington, D.C.-based law firm of Howrey LLP. Mike has earned a reputation as an outstanding lawyer based on his sound judgment, writing and courtroom advocacy skills, and thorough understanding of the Constitution. Mike and Sharon have three children and live in Provo, Utah. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc. PO Box 1537 Salt Lake City, UT 84110

subject: The fantasy land of ‘Building Back Better’
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Greg Wheeler]( "Paid for by Vote Greg Wheeler")
body:
VERSUS REALITY » | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5b4cc07595e0/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-6143461?e=d6699466fe)
---
| | [ ](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=814310faec&e=d6699466fe)
---
| Peter,
---
| | We have a Greek tragedy on our hands with the contradictory messaging between the Biden White House and the economic experts who refuse to play poker with the numbers.

**In the fantasy land of ‘Building Back Better’:**
---
| [ ](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=54d1ae9248&e=d6699466fe)
---
| **Meanwhile, in reality: **
---
| [ ](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=641b8819fd&e=d6699466fe)
---
| **I’d laugh if it were ONLY the kind of entertainment that had no impact on our wallets!**

I can already hear the pundits, ‘oh but, what does manufacturing have to do with wages?’

_There’s more to it than just a headline_ : _“The widespread weakness in the sector has forced factories to reduce headcount.”_

Domestic companies have been burdened by the heavy hand of Big Government regulations, coupled with misguided policies that have driven manufacturing jobs to other nations.

The pandemic response worsened this issue, forcing businesses to shut down as the federal government took advantage of the crisis by doing what they love: spend, spend, spend.

**My incumbent opponent, Emilia Sykes, has represented Ohioans _for years_ , and she’s too busy boasting about the colossal government spending bills she supported that have gotten us in this mess to be part of the solution!**

Let’s work together to expand the private sector while **SHRINKING** the government!

**Together, we can restore American manufacturing to serve the demands of our own nation AND reinvigorate our economy.**

[**Peter, your support is CRUCIAL in this endeavor. Join me in this journey to revitalize our economy, create jobs, and ensure a brighter future for generations to come.**](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=292a080280&e=d6699466fe)
---
| [LET’S BUILD BACK WITHOUT BIDEN »](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=f62b0a793b&e=d6699466fe "LET’S BUILD BACK WITHOUT BIDEN »")
---
| Thank you for your time, your commitment, and your belief in a stronger America!
---
| For America,
---
| [ ](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=32938d7090&e=d6699466fe)

| **Greg Wheeler**
Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress, OH-13
[GregWheeler.com](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=43f83bbeae&e=d6699466fe)

I will fight relentlessly for a stronger America but I need your support to succeed in turning this campaign into a Congressional term of service that WILL deliver on its promises!**](https://gregwheeler.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3bf2f6e69e02578a82344bfc7&id=b4e443e36c&e=d6699466fe)

Sadly, this isn’t the only example of the Biden Administration’s overreach and blatant disregard for the American people’s best interests. This is an issue that we are working on every day, but we can’t do it alone.
[**Will you join me in defending American energy from Joe Biden’s EPA?**](https://u34881959.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=Myp6d5sqCDL1-2F-2FdAOHe9PGoZr9pAaWrPznezd1-2FvdEn7YQ5SniiJc108vhmX-2BBPtSQbgbboWQEYoUo5us1o-2Fx13imwlnY3x0-2BuDqFldpfa-2FBw6wCshdR2tTblXEOF5W3sU-2FfRIsSDFuWW2m0MQ-2BgODEUlIAglDYS450KllP4X03AD2V5hfrw0dWLGc7zodzYZV1O_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdkLMmWeLnwK0KfPGgXzXHvoIGcfoQrAuI0Zkzwvv9dkHghc1ZFPh4s2VPIB-2BUJPR1ce1MwXOgEsQtpD9Vs-2BDtc-2BamN65-2Bxq-2BYD1xXxJd7W7VUXCFL82Trpm0niBViOcL5sRWx-2FVDz9teSYgaYLDXEKAaZ6y5N0EU8XesmKbaN2D1mbmlU37J-2FvvjjRnQeERtc6JzyYex3bLgGhBAxZOFI4BC2APMx1IMYpMjFqfXFcNNhuROPF0os5XxU1Cc-2Bv0VJVmgcqQsUCMXF94jqKGlnvjyrRfs6-2FP2MFtKwLeEiXyChtJsVDho2-2FO5ws-2FcxpLsBoSfu90yI1rQAKRSrebGZcXkj9B1J176eA5rTbDMy06ONelkbc6keZOZrqGh-2B5uTqxA-2FDJp3YeUsuUvzaUNBzFxLNfYbePQqBoQyQqZRO5ScxTXthPXKhHmaWiXOGy8UBCVsCGzFFI9NjZaQNp6ElL4frd941WFZzzTb0I9Zu2uJEJiSEcnn996WZHGjM3w4xZZ3eQKZV8ZhuZG3CQ8BPakWRm7Vu5XqVw5dn276slTi87Ps3e5fEXusb8yPnWGSZr0UICv9zdY4NhcPpLdy0o6tJgaMzgU-2BNLhUOsp13FBUHhji6MSP5iizYtqz8iUu8JudBkOBFicFg-2FZpshypPYKgIH6jyUS9ZzsIXOOagGf-2BGRvWzhB8D6qr1NRxRbIuqbwsDg5hu-2Bch2Rv2aHX2PvyPqI6CmNBzP6m6Iy1eASNlLvgJdqZ6ui5Yu0GC2-2Benbprq3N92n1JHZ-2BA2hPbnpva49ZQORGXVyagqQ8XM4in45Enr-2FPxpveZKQExCf0fg-2FJgvjKOWrQqugJ9kwl9ANgm6gVlSFoK31QEbWDhpLegA70XyEG8htsc75Mj8YFIZlOoosUSoGegxT8Ipz43yiCifCg-2FiUnoV6BkGDXySyGJMmS1sLO7cIB6o-2B8HHOtXxr)

Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility.
As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act.
Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild.

clean_body: | | | | But I’m working to change that >> Friend, Did you see the latest from Joe Biden’s EPA on American Energy? Their proposal works against the energy sector and goes well beyond the scope of authority granted by Congress. Me and a few dozen of my Republican colleagues in the Senate are working to overturn these new regulations. Sadly, this isn’t the only example of the Biden Administration’s overreach and blatant disregard for the American people’s best interests. This is an issue that we are working on every day, but we can’t do it alone. | | | | | | With your help, we’ll STOP Biden’s EPA in its tracks and SAVE America’s Energy production once and for all. Thanks for your support, | | Bill Cassidy United States Senator, Louisiana | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" | "LinkedIn" ---|---|---|--- Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility. As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act. Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild. | Bill is working for all of Louisiana | DONATE BY MAIL Bill Cassidy for US Senate PO BOX 80505 Baton Rouge, LA 70898 Can’t donate? Don’t worry - There are other ways you can help! | Bill Cassidy PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA 70898 \- =

| | **Hi there — I'm Andie, Conor's campaign manager.** I'll be in touch from time to time to update you on the race and give you the latest from Conor HQ. I'm excited to tell you what we're up to and why it's making waves in the political community. In a normal campaign, you don't see the candidate on TV until right before Election Day. That's because career politicians think rubbing elbows with mega-donors counts as campaigning and then saturate the airwaves just as ballots drop. **That's not Conor**. He's laying the groundwork for the kind of cutting-edge campaign we deserve here in AZ-01, so we're getting our message in front of the whole district right out of the gate. [**Sound good to you? I have to tell you, it's been great working on a campaign that's not afraid to make bold moves.
Conor is not a career politician. He knows that sometimes you need to take risks to create change and build momentum. And as a dad and a resident of this district, he knows we can't afford any more of David Schweikert's destructive extremism.
**So it's time to rock the boat, try something new, and recognize that it's never "too soon" to share a candidate's vision for the future.**
Over the next few weeks, expect to hear from Conor in the news, TV ads, social media, and events all around the district. He's more focused on building a far-reaching, big-tent campaign than any candidate in the race, and you can see that in the excitement and momentum building around us.

clean_body: I’m Conor’s campaign manager, and I can tell you that this won’t be a conventional campaign. | | | | Hi there — I'm Andie, Conor's campaign manager. I'll be in touch from time to time to update you on the race and give you the latest from Conor HQ. I'm excited to tell you what we're up to and why it's making waves in the political community. In a normal campaign, you don't see the candidate on TV until right before Election Day. That's because career politicians think rubbing elbows with mega-donors counts as campaigning and then saturate the airwaves just as ballots drop. That's not Conor. He's laying the groundwork for the kind of cutting-edge campaign we deserve here in AZ-01, so we're getting our message in front of the whole district right out of the gate. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = I have to tell you, it's been great working on a campaign that's not afraid to make bold moves. Conor is not a career politician. He knows that sometimes you need to take risks to create change and build momentum. And as a dad and a resident of this district, he knows we can't afford any more of David Schweikert's destructive extremism. So it's time to rock the boat, try something new, and recognize that it's never "too soon" to share a candidate's vision for the future. Over the next few weeks, expect to hear from Conor in the news, TV ads, social media, and events all around the district. # RINO candidates are taking over the party!
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Peter, Did you see what the RINO candidates are saying about Trump and America First patriots like you and me? RINOS like Asa Hutchinson and Chris Christie are hoping that our conservative “grip” on the party will loosen in the coming months. They’re only running to hand the presidency to Biden for another four years! **We CAN defeat them though! With enough support, they don’t stand a chance!** But as we approach the mid-month fundraising deadline, I am still coming up short. I have a goal to raise $250,000 by the end of August from grassroots donors nationwide. But I am still $127,397 short of my goal. [Please contribute $10, $20, or even $50 or more so we can continue to fight for conservative values as we head towards the end of August. ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=578934e3cf&e=0be619cbaa) Just like I took on Gavin Newsom in 2021, I can take on the phony Republicans trying to upend our elections and make sure Democrats win in 2024. But without the continued support of patriots like you, they will take votes away from true conservatives and our party and our values won’t stand a chance. [**So please, contribute $10, $20, or even $50 or more TODAY, so we can stay on track in August.**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=296689363b&e=0be619cbaa) Thank you,**Larry Elder
**GOP Candidate for President
---
[P.S. While any amount will help us, a gift of $47 or more will help even more. With your generous support of $47 or more, I will send you a signed copy of my new book, As Goes California. - Larry ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=407a7884a0&e=0be619cbaa)

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: 10 things to know about Katie Porter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Katie likes to cut the B.S.—and so do we.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=28024%2E3422442%2ExIvf_F)
Derek,
Katie likes to cut the BS—and so do we. So in that spirit, here are 10 quick, important things we want you to know about Katie.
1. **Katie isn’t a career politician.** Before being elected to Congress in 2018, Katie was a law profressor and a consumer protection attorney.

2. **Katie is a single, working mom of three school-aged kids** —and she understands the pressures that families face.

3. **Katie is a proud progressive representing a purple district in Congress.** Her message resonates with Democrats, Republicans, and independent voters alike—and we know from experience that when voters hear about Katie, we win.

4. **Katie is known for using her whiteboard to hold those with power accountable.** Her questioning has led to real solutions for families, including a commitment from the Trump Administration in March 2020 that COVID testing would be free for every American. The whiteboard has also helped explain bills she passed to crack down on corporate greed and lower costs for families.

5. **Katie is running for U.S. Senate because California needs a warrior in Washington** , and when it comes to protecting California families, Katie doesn’t back down.

6. **Katie is the only candidate in this race who doesn’t accept corporate PAC or federal lobbyist money.** She believes our elected officials should work for the people they represent, not their biggest donors and Wall Street friends.

7. To fund this campaign, **Katie relies on grassroots supporters (like you!).** Our average contribution this year is $27.68.

8. Winning a statewide race in California is tough, but with the support of this grassroots team, **Katie has won tough elections before** —like when she flipped a historically red seat blue.

9. Public and internal polling show **Katie is ahead in the primary among voters.** That means she can win.

10. Our campaign is falling behind financially to those in this race _who have_ accepted corporate PAC and lobbyist money. So, **Katie is counting on this grassroots team to fight back.**

For a people-powered campaign like ours, we can’t afford to fall behind if we want to stay competitive in this primary.
[**Since we’re falling short, we have to ask: would you be able to make your first $5 contribution today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230811-1?refcode=EMAK11_1_BIO_20230811_V1_F&refcode2=28024_3422442_xIvf_F&akid=28024%2E3422442%2ExIvf_F)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230811-1?refcode=EMAK11_1_BIO_20230811_V1_F&refcode2=28024_3422442_xIvf_F&akid=28024%2E3422442%2ExIvf_F)
Thanks!
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAK11_1_BIO_20230811_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=28024_3422442_xIvf_F&akid=28024%2E3422442%2ExIvf_F)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=28024%2E3422442%2ExIvf_F)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=28024%2E3422442%2ExIvf_F)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America. | [PAID FOR BY TELL IT LIKE IT IS PAC. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. TELLITLIKEITISPAC.COM]() Contributions to Chris Christie for President, Inc. are not tax deductible. Tell It Like It Is PAC 3804 Wilson Blvd, Arlington, VA 22203 - \- =

clean_body: We’re going to need a surge of grassroots support if we want to gain ground in Republican-led states. Can we count on you to own a piece of this fight? | | | | | Since securing a Democratic trifecta in the midterms, Michigan Gov. Gretchen Whitmer has been working alongside state Democrats to safeguard abortion rights and expand access to the ballot box. But in North Carolina, Democratic Gov. Roy Cooper is gridlocked – state Republicans are using their razor-thin supermajority to override Gov. Cooper’s veto, ban abortion, and limit voting rights... SO NOW → We’re working around the clock to power fundraise so we can expand Democratic power in state legislatures and break up Republican strongholds. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Electing state Democrats who will work alongside Democratic governors to secure fundamental freedoms in their states is our best path forward. We gained trifectas in Michigan, Minnesota, Massachusetts, and Maryland last cycle, but our work is far from over. We’re going to need a surge of grassroots support if we want to gain ground in Republican-led states. Can we count on you to own a piece of this fight? Thank you, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. subject: Mayor Francis Suarez: Riding the Momentum in Presidential Race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SOS America PAC
body:
Suarez's impressive polling results and donor support mark an exciting milestone in the RNC debate build-up | | | | | |
---
[](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=31d925a656&e=9562ca5d98)
|
---
Peter,
We are thrilled to share with you that Conservative Miami Mayor**Francis Suarez** , the only Hispanic candidate running for President, **has consistently met the polling thresholds to qualify in the first GOP debate.**
[_**> >> SUPPORT HISPANIC CONSERVATIVES <<<**_](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=aa660ed34a&e=9562ca5d98)
[](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=7f10f93d90&e=9562ca5d98)
**Mayor Suarez also recently announced hitting the 40,000-donor threshold, a testament to his widespread appeal and support.** We're equally excited about his recent polling performance.
[_**> >> DONATE JUST $10 NOW TO SUPPORT PATRIOTIC MAYOR <<<**_ ](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=3f67b7d2f7&e=9562ca5d98)
**Suarez has achieved 1% in both New Hampshire and South Carolina, according to the Manhattan Institute July Survey, which polled over 2000 respondents.** In the July 2023 Echelon Insights Verified Voter Omnibus, which included over 1000 respondents, Suarez again hit the 1% mark.
These milestones not only demonstrate Mayor Suarez's growing popularity but also validate his message and vision for our country. We are motivated by these developments and look forward to the RNC debate in Wisconsin. **We hope you'll continue to support Mayor Suarez as he rides this wave of momentum.**
| [JOIN US](https://sosamericapac.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a1f6b88a8616d1a2e3589575&id=232508626e&e=9562ca5d98)

clean_body: Suarez's impressive polling results and donor support mark an exciting milestone in the RNC debate build-up | | | | | | | Peter, We are thrilled to share with you that Conservative Miami MayorFrancis Suarez , the only Hispanic candidate running for President, has consistently met the polling thresholds to qualify in the first GOP debate. Mayor Suarez also recently announced hitting the 40,000-donor threshold, a testament to his widespread appeal and support. We're equally excited about his recent polling performance. Suarez has achieved 1% in both New Hampshire and South Carolina, according to the Manhattan Institute July Survey, which polled over 2000 respondents. In the July 2023 Echelon Insights Verified Voter Omnibus, which included over 1000 respondents, Suarez again hit the 1% mark. These milestones not only demonstrate Mayor Suarez's growing popularity but also validate his message and vision for our country. We are motivated by these developments and look forward to the RNC debate in Wisconsin. We hope you'll continue to support Mayor Suarez as he rides this wave of momentum. | | | | | Our email address is: info@sosamericapac.org Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or | | [Paid for by SOS America PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. www.sosamericapac.org.]()

This is a personal plea.

|

Friend,

I'm humbly asking for your support.

My campaign's Mid-Month fundraising deadline is fast approaching -- and we know that our opponent, Democrat Sherrod Brown, will be raising hundreds of thousands of dollars. **[However, I'm only asking you for $25.](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=f1d6477879ea40e0a2043083600f3979&_e=fNxaLKtDAfCRGml6NjHVP2qJww2aiol-QwEcTy7I2NyQzDg3TXhmxBAVeFMYSzKweAcwzJA7S8Tku6SYvzyLZEZTEg_CXlWCK4RW9zfE9xsEnO1pbLQvJAOrRseWy2JuBCnZfJx3yoov9McZ0yaQqNjDZxCznFWfWINASpZAKX7n4IKBoNGBTHIgNWCC9virIfE65fbVydBfp7k6YxAX-3girnTdrhGmEUwlDQoO4MkD651x5KtW9BA-JEN1KPaitNyvJYIRMn665Z4BVATAolQR0gg2E3R0WaVkjJg-AqeI0VvfLwi0Q384oYIXUrvoeePrWH9B1hgH6bUc9w8UJS2Hf0fYSeJlnjbY6Q2pZSVuKYAw7xkjPWMzymBxczLkVJdupOWwF3u0m91Ka-fjEvosA8fgNYNaDXdiYS7liGBglwPzSCC_aVUpC_Ho2Ei3GRwyuT6UK1K5yHBI1IPXJNaYSmdfyQXZUWeaHm6xdAl6j5MMq-4MQNwlJhBrqR2hHffNG3Wmj2RGUuTIXe5Oig%3D%3D)** | [ **RUSH $25** ](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=f1d6477879ea40e0a2043083600f3979&_e=fNxaLKtDAfCRGml6NjHVP2qJww2aiol-QwEcTy7I2NyQzDg3TXhmxBAVeFMYSzKweAcwzJA7S8Tku6SYvzyLZEZTEg_CXlWCK4RW9zfE9xsEnO1pbLQvJAOrRseWy2JuBCnZfJx3yoov9McZ0yaQqNjDZxCznFWfWINASpZAKX7n4IKBoNGBTHIgNWCC9virIfE65fbVydBfp7k6YxAX-3girnTdrhGmEUwlDQoO4MkD651x5KtW9BA-JEN1KPaitNyvJYIRMn665Z4BVATAolQR0gg2E3R0WaVkjJg-AqeI0VvfLwi0Q384oYIXUrvoeePrWH9B1hgH6bUc9w8UJS2Hf0fYSeJlnjbY6Q2pZSVuKYAw7xkjPWMzymBxczLk29yIX1j5dqNsgdaeJBYXe9GWUphrqgQV21MWDTtX_6djIlk9Yt-biy-mQy7o3IyPoZkppQEoG79ohlA3Gqat2-aYTqd85wd2-tGOC0Smp0RwsMLsiLgHHZ_887EAV0zd3COqL82OqxolR3I3EvtdNw%3D%3D)

Peter,

**Three years ago today, Kamala Harris made history when she joined the Democratic ticket as Joe Biden's running mate for the critical 2020 presidential election!**
Since then, Vice President Harris has been a bold and fearless voice for everyday Americans and a champion for our essential rights. **But did you know that Vice President Harris played a key role in inspiring Emerge’s mission?**
During her first-ever state-wide race in 2010, a group of friends saw that there was no training and little support for trailblazing women in politics. Emerge was founded to fill that gap and ensure that women like Vice President Harris can shatter glass ceilings at all levels of government!
**Now, we need your help to ramp up our recruitment and training programs to empower more Democratic women to run for office and WIN. Fellow American,

In a move to placate the extreme leftist environmentalists he needs to get re-elected, Biden just made another massive _**federal land grab of 1 million acres**_ on the border of Arizona and Utah.

This land grab removes access to critical natural resources, will undercut our local economy, and will likely drive national energy costs even higher.

_**If that weren’t bad enough – immediately after locking Americans out of our land, Biden is now here in Utah to fundraise off deep-pocketed environmentalist donors!**_

This isn’t about the environment for Biden, this is about abusing the Antiquities Act to pad his campaign coffers in my home state!

Biden and his radical environmentalist allies can’t just throw us under the bus and then go cash in.[**Utah’s voters and dollars are RED, and I need your help to show them we won’t stand for this.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4a4886598a114e3894f2f6ee97281be9&_e=VXTbGM1FpFlUYvBnAvDkFLTvi1nanQ4rshvd5NfOy_v6XA5N8Q7hsjoY9ZWvLZbIYsTy6joNAsEm20rAnL9wLO7zJdoJrNyn70G2ZSNs9A6KicW4iFfouFLLK_UB6q3AXHiw71sM8AAnItnk4UgM9hq0Y7Hs-wR9AiGMFYQOmr6oCXTgU8Dvlt0ACXPSZzXqUH42fHZ4k_XDfyl5H3xsIVTgtnzkV4AOQ7-MraOMvlgNK2kVVzhG9RAU92BlfDq93s4oUC94vRVkw6yi_TkkoT8dLOvWU9mZFLvf6-ZX8b0K8Qeb-LtFgStXn6N1GPBk_npXhkXf30n9QY8l4O1YZMniwXimTR2K8s7Acx_pYIDc-CpdiKh8B1TJZe6j5wDs)

[**Please help me fight against this radical, fundraising-motivated, rural land grab by chipping in $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can today.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4a4886598a114e3894f2f6ee97281be9&_e=VXTbGM1FpFlUYvBnAvDkFLTvi1nanQ4rshvd5NfOy_v6XA5N8Q7hsjoY9ZWvLZbIYsTy6joNAsEm20rAnL9wLO7zJdoJrNyn70G2ZSNs9A6KicW4iFfouFLLK_UB6q3AXHiw71sM8AAnItnk4UgM9hq0Y7Hs-wR9AiGMFYQOmr6oCXTgU8Dvlt0ACXPSZzXqUH42fHZ4k_XDfyl5H3xsIVTgtnzkV4AOQ7-MraOMvlikt3anOqTHZNZyOiAu1ehbiiqtuGiKTB5VftJg0Ri1QZtIR28m1i5cscsHAVTasloGLh_jUFMBDuPZsbK7vdXSPnP4ndsqqfeRQUo40l5MapWhkbupjdOQtY8M_tdsLgbLfeZSJt6qIkCtMg3N-xZJ)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4a4886598a114e3894f2f6ee97281be9&_e=VXTbGM1FpFlUYvBnAvDkFLTvi1nanQ4rshvd5NfOy_v6XA5N8Q7hsjoY9ZWvLZbIYsTy6joNAsEm20rAnL9wLO7zJdoJrNyn70G2ZSNs9A6KicW4iFfouFLLK_UB6q3AXHiw71sM8AAnItnk4UgM9hq0Y7Hs-wR9AiGMFYQOmr6oCXTgU8Dvlt0ACXPSZzXqUH42fHZ4k_XDfyl5H3xsIVTgtnzkV4AOQ7-MraOMvliUv1MaB3ym0i1IMuhvemWv2MtHfj3vGgKUgss1hs1zQjgLSbpvjB990RalCj_zgBqnGRxL8gx-k-e91cwrIHbaNAL3mg7Tj25n-WdKizgSnIWNGr6DqFz1nfx_g3K6rZ_tW5Zi6ztloIOqIF_I0px1)
Sen. Mike Lee

[ ** _FIGHT BACK ➞_ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4a4886598a114e3894f2f6ee97281be9&_e=VXTbGM1FpFlUYvBnAvDkFLTvi1nanQ4rshvd5NfOy_v6XA5N8Q7hsjoY9ZWvLZbIYsTy6joNAsEm20rAnL9wLO7zJdoJrNyn70G2ZSNs9A6KicW4iFfouFLLK_UB6q3AXHiw71sM8AAnItnk4UgM9hq0Y7Hs-wR9AiGMFYQOmr6oCXTgU8Dvlt0ACXPSZzXqUH42fHZ4k_XDfyl5H3xsIVTgtnzkV4AOQ7-MraOMvlhdSYzheixSG_CfMdxGAoG-_FxSzt2iUy4qyxj2J7SwUnyXWUpJhHQq8GxJeBEZVXhU2H63t4BmUaAMnfAvjn7xsdEgjfSfQW1-JsDoqdliHy4hA594fAq8oFfgeZl9pb5U0AwXG27lCEFXekDy_qDa)

**MEET MIKE:** | A CHAMPION FOR PRINCIPLED LEADERSHIP
Mike learned his love for the Constitution around the family dinner table. Mike’s father, Rex Lee, served as Solicitor General under President Ronald Reagan and later as President of Brigham Young University. As a child, Mike attended his father’s arguments before the U.S. Supreme Court, giving him a unique understanding of the government from an early age. As an attorney he developed a more complete understanding of why the Constitution is essential to the protection of life, liberty, and property.

After graduating from law school in 1997, he served as a law clerk to Judge Dee Benson of the U.S. District Court for the District of Utah. He then clerked for Judge Samuel A. Alito, Jr., who was serving at that time on the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Third Circuit Court in Newark, New Jersey. After his second clerkship, he joined the Washington, D.C. office of Sidley & Austin, where he specialized in appellate and Supreme Court litigation. Several years later, Mike was invited to serve as an Assistant U.S. Attorney in Salt Lake City, preparing briefs and arguing cases before the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Tenth Circuit. He served as Governor Huntsman’s General Counsel and then went to Washington for a one-year clerkship with Justice Alito at the U.S. Supreme Court.

Following his clerkship, Mike joined the Salt Lake office of the Washington, D.C.-based law firm of Howrey LLP. Mike has earned a reputation as an outstanding lawyer based on his sound judgment, writing and courtroom advocacy skills, and thorough understanding of the Constitution. Mike and Sharon have three children and live in Provo, Utah.

clean_body: This land grab removes access to critical natural resources, will undercut our local economy, and will likely drive national energy costs even higher. | | Fellow American, In a move to placate the extreme leftist environmentalists he needs to get re-elected, Biden just made another massive federal land grab of 1 million acres on the border of Arizona and Utah. This land grab removes access to critical natural resources, will undercut our local economy, and will likely drive national energy costs even higher. If that weren’t bad enough – immediately after locking Americans out of our land, Biden is now here in Utah to fundraise off deep-pocketed environmentalist donors! This isn’t about the environment for Biden, this is about abusing the Antiquities Act to pad his campaign coffers in my home state! Biden and his radical environmentalist allies can’t just throw us under the bus and then go cash in. President Biden is exploiting our rural western economy in order to stay in office. Our rural ranchers, miners, and residents – along with Americans everywhere who pay for gas and electricity – are going to suffer from this radical land grab. For America, Sen. Mike Lee MEET MIKE: | A CHAMPION FOR PRINCIPLED LEADERSHIP Mike learned his love for the Constitution around the family dinner table. Mike’s father, Rex Lee, served as Solicitor General under President Ronald Reagan and later as President of Brigham Young University. As a child, Mike attended his father’s arguments before the U.S. Supreme Court, giving him a unique understanding of the government from an early age. As an attorney he developed a more complete understanding of why the Constitution is essential to the protection of life, liberty, and property. After graduating from law school in 1997, he served as a law clerk to Judge Dee Benson of the U.S. District Court for the District of Utah. He then clerked for Judge Samuel A. Alito, Jr., who was serving at that time on the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Third Circuit Court in Newark, New Jersey. After his second clerkship, he joined the Washington, D.C. office of Sidley & Austin, where he specialized in appellate and Supreme Court litigation. Several years later, Mike was invited to serve as an Assistant U.S. Attorney in Salt Lake City, preparing briefs and arguing cases before the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Tenth Circuit. He served as Governor Huntsman’s General Counsel and then went to Washington for a one-year clerkship with Justice Alito at the U.S. Supreme Court. Following his clerkship, Mike joined the Salt Lake office of the Washington, D.C.-based law firm of Howrey LLP. Mike has earned a reputation as an outstanding lawyer based on his sound judgment, writing and courtroom advocacy skills, and thorough understanding of the Constitution. Mike and Sharon have three children and live in Provo, Utah. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc. PO Box 1537 Salt Lake City, UT 84110

name: Michelle at United We Dream Action
subject: The power of this community
body:
I wanted to introduce myself! | | | Hi everybody — Michelle here! ☺️ My earliest memory of politics is phone-banking for my local Democratic party in Texas when I was in the ninth grade. It wasn’t an election year — we were calling folks in the community just to check in and connect. That’s where I learned how important it is to build a compassionate community rooted in care and trust, where all are welcome. That’s how you get a big group of folks to work together and achieve more than they can do on their own. I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself. I’m UWDA’s Political Director. I’m passionate about civic engagement and helping folks realize the power they have to effect change in their communities. That’s exactly what we aim to do at UWDA! As a young, queer, woman of color and the daughter of immigrants, I’m so proud of our unique ability to build community and power for a huge group of people all with their own identities. **I feel at home in this organization, and I know you will too.** Getting involved with United We Dream Action is an easy and fun way to create change that deeply affects folks’ lives, while joining a community of people that will support you and be with you every step of the way. Everything we do on the political team — from mobilizing voters, to circulating petitions, and more — is powered by supporters like you chipping in a little at a time. Whether it’s $10 or $25, every dollar donated to United We Dream Action helps us build this community that fights hard for the future our movement needs. That’s why I’m asking: **Can you chip in any amount today to support UWDA’s mission of immigrant justice for all?** **** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8YAqyNwYURZ1viGDyEajd5kt9IgVdSWel_Mk4Ae2O4Lj7y32uUbSc3u4h1DjpTpDRR3qDmHQIH3TZhMFq2PC217mA-_2fUpENuthCvOaLtb-2cBincT55pCahjGaeAJndhbTlLgCmysPF7AkSBPqXZkrj_u_wnvYDSdyah7AovnpPXtczQ_5glVeceFY9Gli6G131OeqwS4DPNv-ZRhQYlIpLixpy9D3D-upmFgPuCOWVzls8Inffrgn8uOlMaO2qDADXc7DgqRgj5Fukt2KnSRzHhxGyADAQTun56YzLvbk1IH_Y6gWXl4zCaUoVnfP2HTlkwE_Z637Xvf4ny_CX-CpCF8NJrSC5id_xw22umeFFwlBEgBWiYs94J6g7TnIm/3yn/qVnxWJnuSqiWN3Q3t-ts4g/h0/BujKaGq7hTJdMX1_P6hG9sMKcgrYyXtPPq1rvEeAtQQ)

subject: Can you complete this assessment before it's too late?

body:

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Hawaii
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
I want to take a break from the normal campaign emails...

Friends —
I want to take a break from the normal campaign emails to ask if you can spare a few dollars to help some of the families whose lives have been upended by the tragic wildfires in Hawaii.
Dozens have died. Thousands have lost their homes. An entire historic town has been wiped out. Lives have tragically changed forever and these people need our help in their time of need.
[**Here's a link to contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today, to several charities working to support the families impacted by the wildfires in Hawaii.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-hi?refcode=em230811-1-15&refcode2=1531_4767699_d6hB9O&akid=1531%2E4767699%2Ed6hB9O)
Here is the truth:
We in California know firsthand the devastating toll of catastrophic wildfires fueled by climate change, capable of wiping out entire communities and centuries of irreplaceable history and heritage.
I want you to know that our state is sending resources to support our Pacific neighbors during their time of need.
I've spoken with Hawaii's Governor Josh Green and we're sending firefighting and urban search and rescue personnel to assist and support the emergency operations in the most impacted areas.
That's what I can do on the government side of things.
But these families are going to need more than that — today, and for a long time ahead.
So I am asking you:
[**Can you spare a few dollars today — $3 or whatever it is you can afford — to help our sisters and brothers in Hawaii? Use this link to donate directly to several charities working to support the families impacted by the wildfires in Hawaii.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-hi?refcode=em230811-1-15&refcode2=1531_4767699_d6hB9O&akid=1531%2E4767699%2Ed6hB9O)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll instnatly process your donation to charities in Hawaii:_

Gavin

name: Allyson Damikolas
subject: New endorsement alert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Allyson for Congress
body:
Friends, as a proud Latina and engineer, I’m passionate about breaking historic barriers and advocating for every underrepresented voice.

I’m excited to share that I received the endorsement of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus BOLD PAC this week.

Here’s what the BOLD PAC’s Chairwoman, Congresswoman Linda Sánchez (CA-38) said about me:

“Allyson is a proud Latina who has come from a long line of Mexican Americans who served in the military and resided in Southern California for generations. Having grown up in a family that struggled with food insecurity, she prioritized public education and understands why it is so important for our children to succeed.”

All voices deserve to be heard at the table. And when all voices are heard, we all WIN. Inclusivity is a pillar of my congressional campaign, so I’m really proud to have BOLD PAC recognize and support my campaign’s vision and values.

Our campaign is gaining momentum. We just need to keep it going.

I know I’ve asked for your support before, but winning – and flipping this seat – means that we have to build this brick by brick, a couple of donations at a time. So I have to ask again: please pitch in whatever you’re able to today.

DONATE >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2023q3?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.08.11_B1_BOLDPAC_friendsandfamilylist

I’ll keep you posted with more campaign and endorsement updates. We’ve got lots more to come!

– Allyson

Paid for by Allyson for Congress
Allyson for Congress
PO Box 1813
Tustin, CA 92781-9998
United States

name: TN House Democrats
subject: The road to a safer Tennessee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Gloria Johnson Treasurer
body:
https://tnhousedems.com/ [https://tnhousedems.com/]
Peter,
Members of our House Caucus hit the road this week and started traveling across Tennessee to raise awareness of badly needed gun safety legislation. While the extremist supermajority continues their strategy of inaction and opposition on behalf of special interests, we Democrats have been speaking with people in their own communities. The message is clear - Tennessee families overwhelmingly believe that our state legislature can and must do more to protect our children and communities.
In case you missed the announcement last week from Caucus chair Rep. John Ray Clemmons, please take a moment to watch here. [https://www.wkrn.com/news/tennessee-politics/democrats-launch-statewide-bus-tour-ahead-of-special-session-face-uphill-battle-in-passing-any-legislation/]
We are running a statewide fundraising campaign to fund our efforts to both grow our House Caucus and promote our message for a safer Tennessee for every family. We hope you will join the fight for the future of Tennessee and make a contribution to our House Caucus today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourkidsdeservebetter]
Gov. Bill Lee has unfortunately closed the door on the possibility for gun safety policies while opening the door wide open to a number of other harmful policies that would set our state back decades. His proclamation calling for the special session is a clear violation of the trust the families of victims placed in him to do the right thing. Yet again, Lee and the other extremists running our state government have made it clear - they cannot be trusted.
It is more important than ever to support Democrats and initiatives like our statewide bus tour. We must continue working together to make progress towards breaking the extremist supermajority in the 2024 election. Nothing less than the safety of our children is at stake.
We can only succeed and make progress with your support. We thank you for all you do and look forward to visiting you in your communities soon. Please keep an eye out for our school bus and join us at a city near you, because OUR KIDS DESERVE BETTER.
TN House Democrats
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tnhousedems2023]
Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Gloria Johnson Treasurer
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
P. O. Box 198082
Nashville, TN 37219
United States
