name: Sherrod Brown
subject: This is incredible news.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
Ohioans came out strong in this week’s special election
#
_Mandela Barnes’ The Long Run is proud to stand with Senator Sherrod Brown in his Ohio Senate reelection campaign. Please read a message from him regarding Ohio’s special election last Tuesday and support his campaign if you can._

This is incredible news! Ohioans came out strong in this week’s special election to STOP an anti-democratic amendment and clear special interest power grab – which would’ve made it harder for us to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution this November.
Seeing Ohio voters turn out to the polls and decisively reject the GOP's proposal has me feeling more hopeful than ever about our ability to protect women’s health care.
This massive victory also makes clear that momentum is on our side heading into 2024 when I’ll be on the ballot. But we can’t take our foot off the gas. **[So today, as we celebrate, I'm personally asking you to help me keep up our momentum: Will you split $5 or more between me and The Long Run to defend Ohio's Democratic seat and our pro-choice Senate majority?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-sherrod-split.Ydk9hm&refcode=em230811-1-t1&t=1&akid=4727%2E196590%2E8_0wpa)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, your contribution will be split between Sherrod Brown and The Long Run instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1281?c0=longrunpac-em-sherrod-split.kPblEp&refcode=em230811-1-t1&t=2&akid=4727%2E196590%2E8_0wpa)**
---
****
| **[DONATE MORE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-sherrod-split.5l4FBr&refcode=em230811-1-t1&t=3&akid=4727%2E196590%2E8_0wpa)**
---
****
In solidarity,
Sherrod

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=4727%2E196590%2E8_0wpa). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=4727%2E196590%2E8_0wpa)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=4727_196590_8_0wpa&akid=4727%2E196590%2E8_0wpa)

But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU Friend, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. | | **China’s Espionage Extravaganza 🔍**
---
---
| | It looks like that spy balloon was just the tip of the iceberg when it comes to our adversaries over in China. Two U.S. Navy sailors were just arrested on charges related to allegedly [spying for China](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=db94ab5d5a5147bc8ebf2fdce152ff54&_e=w8awBlJW0lfp7tEIr9LMuLd9avPrsG80ILEUKqJHSmSOtN8kQDXRnpRMg86tIHht0gCmOJldrDOWg5u4nuaEyW2WOKo9dbfGmxC1o49-c_mAw_K71LD5ss8enOk0InlNWa7n-WczR81eYLmApErFLTkDo78vGUkDqAzqhwAm0gDI6_TFVAdLKLWlZiZ9z7Loh1I0XP2Br4Wj8NtBNTkN1WIlT-BKitNs9jcS1yIYViGc2pSbcujwzFPfnBy6WYLPo8zg35gxWazBkaKXesKFfg%3D%3D) right here under our noses. Like a sinister game of telephone, the young men were passing along details about our military operations in exchange for cold hard cash. But this isn’t a schoolyard—and there’s A LOT MORE at stake.
We already know Chinese Communists have been hunkered down in Cuba, operating a [spy base](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=db94ab5d5a5147bc8ebf2fdce152ff54&_e=w8awBlJW0lfp7tEIr9LMuJkVgxXJkUxEAkLuG7HGRursJzd1B4S8Y-WVd0_kQVt8bNnQyxhCjJW2ooZKpF4PnHV8LyWGyf1CCFf-1zI9qI3dJ2hde2JjrjjxaUtOkwSLtPztKFKv2IEh9t22ptj_1ZRCobBDyOD6UnU3YDLWHd2JWdE3wuxWQjV00a3vAoWlEI8KyTSfRS1Hh_V8DtMSfYkBHNtBBa2_dEmfDW3i97Jb1DF5CFifRSB1ZselsK7GBgtt_W_FFfSOg8IlVdSryOfke6kYeIWGYBIW-F1wpaTc-nAF3q0-oeZVmSk-PPrE_ygcdKMMB4pIoAMwF0AtHw%3D%3D) since at least 2019. But when it comes to the Biden administration, it’s like playing hide-and-seek with the nitty-gritty details. The Wall Street Journal reported that [Cuba is in on the whole thing](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=db94ab5d5a5147bc8ebf2fdce152ff54&_e=w8awBlJW0lfp7tEIr9LMuL3aXrHz9zsLa5f5_e2x1SlIbmNEaVAJKENRojksulOl79kpydA-qFFJdvk_q32Y2_K_r-1CxbhAkHDTfI5w_rdx-6Huj4kChB8TPgKSUydjQ4sAWa2Rcc9fEQ8zD_Jox4Cv_cLJ0Myei6rrKw9TzNGQ907rbJIOesau00WIMnhuu6mGOrM7qDTdvgb1clmq0zUXmxZkAuwJMXNIU7ONaR5W4hILIcSMUkptxlscs0ilXPURQ2c8kZaD1qQG8e4fcTT315-Ha9GUxKpbxYeRVzU%3D), hosting the Chicoms for a sleepover in return for billions of dollars. The White House called the WSJ report “inaccurate,” but we already KNOW China has it out for us. The espionage parade continued this week with China cozying up to Russian thugs to conduct a [joint naval operation](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=db94ab5d5a5147bc8ebf2fdce152ff54&_e=w8awBlJW0lfp7tEIr9LMuLd9avPrsG80ILEUKqJHSmQlLijUTr18Q1n-gXET4Uk5QiEVFggDVLoUTlANa_B6FjJSqxje0Eo7Xh568_mhZl5XNKNsCu65fdAgG7Q22kR1mPKGz7bhbrro_vmpbG5OaHv5colA9HFJTadu1xsAz1DbtoIbKfSZqfwfmtumQ4QHCVlefn0RPfCjUPlNIeWnIFqyx6FfOzrDvnNgRbEFKwDwySDiF_2AqrEZkX4fq0-hJxqgfa0-v-tqZwChER-aPpOWlFay8onTQ4LV01cMBVgWxXjvtwypd-seMAboAsvv) off the coast of Alaska. 11 ships led by these dictators came dangerously close to _our waters_ in a show of aggression that couldn’t be ignored. Yes, we mobilized destroyers to act fast, but this should be a blaring wake-up call.
Chinese Communists are not our friends, and they’re testing more than just our patience. President Biden is weak, and sharks smell blood in the water. If we want to maintain our position as the most powerful country in the world, we better elect a leader who can muster up a lot more courage.
It’s worth mentioning that today happens to be [National Presidential Joke Day](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=db94ab5d5a5147bc8ebf2fdce152ff54&_e=w8awBlJW0lfp7tEIr9LMuMNxD_ntv83aDuDwndFqrEcCP6UfJxYC-tFUajWYl7Q5sSPaIuLThaYGVsb56OXPTu76ZdcPu-BktZUBzODiqwp4qSQkvdSIRkHfWU8_NZm1V5-dhwnlqm4Ur0FOV14dyZCxIveVX-S29BOgkO2glIm8nQl_L9KIsOlTpAZPTupvGdE7zGdu6A0oeLdTD2D_lkL8PXILgldOP1933iKqTiwFTuWOl9zJ9ABNHUCdQ6wxjtK9RSRbTQkaiKCbxVeKyw%3D%3D), and boy, is our current commander-in-chief an easy target. From [crime](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=db94ab5d5a5147bc8ebf2fdce152ff54&_e=w8awBlJW0lfp7tEIr9LMuLd9avPrsG80ILEUKqJHSmTh554Q3vXrOplbYw-PHiA-tgphLKIrNzRH36CqZbPC-mxzFxl2PBGzso5ZXIG_fPAS_mkbB6icbLrUr3eJOL6YXYpB45_bwOg5aR1e6w1r1QrdjR3Sl0iO-vtpOifOPNxMeofZ7ai1zHBsQc_-TiXmbq63F9UGmZauI3XNN-nbk4Fi1H2jDBTYtdOTkF9hRUo8tHCGLnF2hMNX0EXHcEImNNnY2yY60djU5SwVkBjw_MLBkVZszVJYLIGjB23gTCFwni6Fvr-9V8ItBz5FrpBTqr11IrvqDcfIGEiY69JDDzLjVZvwJbN_zTsJw4zP-uA%3D) to [lack of competency](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=db94ab5d5a5147bc8ebf2fdce152ff54&_e=w8awBlJW0lfp7tEIr9LMuE4KErwjSIG00KEqcNgwXCYkUWZtwFOgmCAZ-Z6X34bcbPUM0Cr6Q-jzn2RgN93HvZh_VixegNw90d3Jrj8gcVztoj1SjtNF29zTu3zSExjPqzNzo_9gbbbKxrain9n9mhtArBPQJQyQgzyttoIOKFgUZhstrOKjTa4hDIL53iOVa-Je8XH5FnWHlDLZT2T6pr5jVxViHtoEXo4qRY92437TgYyEPyC65xjrJ5qJyQTJSlYoKz-EVoHiiYpltE49dtac7aKJKrPh0fSeFz1zivA%3D), Biden runs the gamut—and it’s gonna get us into trouble if we don’t do something.
2024 is right around the corner, folks. Let’s get someone with a backbone in the White House.
---
| | |
---
| | **Toys With A Purpose 🧸**
---
[](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=db94ab5d5a5147bc8ebf2fdce152ff54&_e=w8awBlJW0lfp7tEIr9LMuBRVu853vuyTQB66nV6fS4s4eeHhZw9HASbEcPpZYhkt8PN55CjhSpMh_7Nq8X0xHsjEaKndpBUx3PxKvbQOaUeZVhakXHvku6JGtnkBgFIFUlKbDrsrMx8mcoMjaiQNNoIjggSIXnUXHuFF8TinKKYLPBc6jWcN9TdR9-lacsrpcI8H3X9TxZSNmbU_BneN_fr3r7FZ83uK0sVmA1J8IAWnjWNY-mpw2H1F9r4L-xTrq_9mywzGWHyTOq3XU1iZGL2XDQAw6QNzmuItQFLRTuw%3D)

| | A [Knoxville mom](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=db94ab5d5a5147bc8ebf2fdce152ff54&_e=w8awBlJW0lfp7tEIr9LMuBRVu853vuyTQB66nV6fS4s4eeHhZw9HASbEcPpZYhkt8PN55CjhSpMh_7Nq8X0xHsjEaKndpBUx3PxKvbQOaUeZVhakXHvku6JGtnkBgFIFUlKbDrsrMx8mcoMjaiQNNpbKp5QoDyeeACK7xZ93I_xXO_IEBinvAPv_I1BRyqF6BKHmJfydLSJnI7sgOIPUVbHLs3FKQwmK6Ui8ZDG8RwckSlDHhe6nT-i6oWSvYe0fQJv0lakzrnz1UVtFgCOBTUsg6dYAhCtcqsbibHrUzxk%3D) is being recognized for her toy line that teaches children the importance of good deeds. [Toys with a Purpose](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=db94ab5d5a5147bc8ebf2fdce152ff54&_e=w8awBlJW0lfp7tEIr9LMuD3ekRH1h0VXpMBHvsCjIBOzq9yC7KfwHsbZ5KynE0Vd9R8-7SA3GdDhpnLa4VA1wgJ_I53vY3gb3RxDdlObsZ0bLpUyqp9PqCMKbCZk9wDDPtFmlTAxiv3QZx7kPAkdnTutNeZeBhdUmn0aePnls092dvr1MoW5KeDLuU1Ibt0KcaXHnv5GILnBID6YNAjIAg%3D%3D) features stuffed animals like “Bene Bear” that have a token slot. When the child does a good deed—whether it’s giving people money, time, or a simple act of kindness—they get to put a token in the slot. In addition to Bene, the line of toys also includes Sparkle the Dog and Seawhee the Turtle. Each item also comes with a book that teaches important lessons about life and how to treat others. Founder Karalyne Ley says her hope is that kids will go out into the world with these character traits ingrained in their minds, and the idea is catching on. She won Kids Product of the Year from Creative Magazine and Mom’s Choice Awards. As always, I want to tip my hat to the Knoxville folks who are doing everything they can to make this world a better place. That’s the Tennessee spirit we all know and love!
---

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | | | China’s Espionage Extravaganza 🔍 | | It looks like that spy balloon was just the tip of the iceberg when it comes to our adversaries over in China. Two U.S. Navy sailors were just arrested on charges related to allegedly right here under our noses. Like a sinister game of telephone, the young men were passing along details about our military operations in exchange for cold hard cash. But this isn’t a schoolyard—and there’s A LOT MORE at stake. We already know Chinese Communists have been hunkered down in Cuba, operating a since at least 2019. But when it comes to the Biden administration, it’s like playing hide-and-seek with the nitty-gritty details. The Wall Street Journal reported that , hosting the Chicoms for a sleepover in return for billions of dollars. The White House called the WSJ report “inaccurate,” but we already KNOW China has it out for us. The espionage parade continued this week with China cozying up to Russian thugs to conduct a off the coast of Alaska. 11 ships led by these dictators came dangerously close to our waters in a show of aggression that couldn’t be ignored. Yes, we mobilized destroyers to act fast, but this should be a blaring wake-up call. Chinese Communists are not our friends, and they’re testing more than just our patience. President Biden is weak, and sharks smell blood in the water. If we want to maintain our position as the most powerful country in the world, we better elect a leader who can muster up a lot more courage. It’s worth mentioning that today happens to be , and boy, is our current commander-in-chief an easy target. From to , Biden runs the gamut—and it’s gonna get us into trouble if we don’t do something. 2024 is right around the corner, folks. Let’s get someone with a backbone in the White House. | | | | | Toys With A Purpose 🧸 | | A is being recognized for her toy line that teaches children the importance of good deeds. features stuffed animals like “Bene Bear” that have a token slot. When the child does a good deed—whether it’s giving people money, time, or a simple act of kindness—they get to put a token in the slot. In addition to Bene, the line of toys also includes Sparkle the Dog and Seawhee the Turtle. Each item also comes with a book that teaches important lessons about life and how to treat others. Founder Karalyne Ley says her hope is that kids will go out into the world with these character traits ingrained in their minds, and the idea is catching on. She won Kids Product of the Year from Creative Magazine and Mom’s Choice Awards. As always, I want to tip my hat to the Knoxville folks who are doing everything they can to make this world a better place. That’s the Tennessee spirit we all know and love! | | | | | Just For Fun 🎉 | | → Field of dreams 🌻 ()→ On the chase 🦋 () → Best friends for life 👫 () | | | | | Product Of The Month 🛍 | | | | | | | Please chip in today to help us oust radical Democrats and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

Hey team, it’s Greg. I’m reaching out with an important update out of Ohio: **On Tuesday, Ohioans came together to reject Issue 1** , the extreme Republican-backed measure that would have stripped away our voting rights.

**Ohioans sent a clear message:_One person = one vote, and our fundamental freedoms are not up for grabs._**

When extreme politicians and Big Money special interest groups came for our rights, it was **working folks and grassroots volunteers** from across our great state that stood up and fought back. [**And believe me when I say that it’s working folks and grassroots volunteers that will help us restore our Democratic House Majority in 2024.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67950844/421403156/-1207523720?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.08.11_b1_gl_oos&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzAyYTMzYS03OTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tVqJY_k3ClwN1kx2gMyoiYBNE8ZQGmdxF9CEQ6PNiM0=)

I know that a people-powered team can defy the odds — like in 2022, when folks like you helped me make history as the only House Democrat to defeat a multiterm Republican incumbent.

**That’s why I’m proud to be running a grassroots campaign once again.** I don’t take corporate PAC money because I stand with the children and families of Southwest Ohio, not pharmaceutical executives or the insurance lobby. [**But that means that I rely on people like you giving what they can, when they can, to help me stay there.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67950845/421403160/-1207523720?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.08.11_b1_gl_oos&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzAyYTMzYS03OTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tVqJY_k3ClwN1kx2gMyoiYBNE8ZQGmdxF9CEQ6PNiM0=)

**Team, with all eyes on Ohio, I’m humbly asking:[Will you join my grassroots team today by chipping in $1, $5, or even $10 today? We must keep up our momentum and build upon this week’s victory.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67950846/421403161/-1207523720?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.08.11_b1_gl_oos&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzAyYTMzYS03OTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tVqJY_k3ClwN1kx2gMyoiYBNE8ZQGmdxF9CEQ6PNiM0=)**

Appreciate you,

Greg

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b3ee6f89c0c14bc4b8b0bd3f6500086d&_e=oXcygIKZbSPRVsT1oXeQJjnWnuTQ-5rvNwH3OJ9w0r-CUVFp4qP0alP17U1IpgX61dy0hdrYOuEQDLm41pPLGUZnye8d24t8nGMFSnlTaA9JqZ-RYQpCySF_W1wvimva3JxpVAMyNVevliODeVj_rn833xwqBVfQCe14kFLYnM9cVDFW2LORQNpSMtDkNUhT9vaVHFJBG03L96gCRA2aqHfgRq41zhTg3zDyFggVAnvfflR-IX8dDZaUCJQGnr2XekUsu-kYMmxBJcdTBVdOAQ%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b3ee6f89c0c14bc4b8b0bd3f6500086d&_e=oXcygIKZbSPRVsT1oXeQJjnWnuTQ-5rvNwH3OJ9w0r-CUVFp4qP0alP17U1IpgX61dy0hdrYOuEQDLm41pPLGUZnye8d24t8nGMFSnlTaA9JqZ-RYQpCySF_W1wvimvaRsI0OO9EarvSx6CjaYmAn9tvcMoP5viAnDcKMxdB5xl93Ju8TDfuLgs_0F25F8x5jWLePpaYbQvGCGVyuH-Il0yhve8rZ0U9VliE2NuBIxnxt6I5c9CUP00kuI6Zd9OfoyGI8g4oxyqKnaElCJiMBQ%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b3ee6f89c0c14bc4b8b0bd3f6500086d&_e=oXcygIKZbSPRVsT1oXeQJjnWnuTQ-5rvNwH3OJ9w0r-CUVFp4qP0alP17U1IpgX61dy0hdrYOuEQDLm41pPLGUZnye8d24t8nGMFSnlTaA9JqZ-RYQpCySF_W1wvimvaXz9UTNMemI0fY4UedLxY56_kSxt9K6NpudvnR_JP5qhpsJvqIBJBWZu9dKNGEq4hsLrVZq5M6QY8NelMnXs1gj-kHEpwnHJvcH_h3Og18vJ9cKsDgbPPDr8A0q0QJGZiz_qfHOhBe272tr8DuzgNrg%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. Peter,

For the **third** time and the most of any former president, Donald Trump has been indicted on criminal charges.

This case is the biggest case against him we’ve seen so far. Finally, he’s being held accountable for his attempts to directly undermine the 2020 election and incite a deadly riot on January 6th at the U.S. Capitol.

Let’s be clear: Trump and Republicans attacked the very foundations of our democracy and sowed doubt into our free and fair election process.

Here’s why this indictment really matters: Because it shows that no one—even a former president—is above the law.

His effort to hinder a peaceful transition of power, undermining the will of the American people, was an unprecedented attack on our freedoms. And he used it to spark a violent and deadly insurrection in the halls of Congress.

Accountability, not just for the rioters but for those who incited them, is necessary to uphold our democratic values and strengthen the foundation of our elections.

**[There is no telling what Trump and right-wing extremists might attempt in 2024. body:
|
---
Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. **** _The Annual IDEA Conference is Next Weekend_ Next week, we are excited to meet and greet Hoosiers from across the state at the annual IDEA Conference in French Lick. The conference will span four days from Thursday, Aug. 17 to Sunday, Aug. 20 and will feature special guest speaker Cincinnati Mayor Aftab Pureval, as well as many other great events. We can’t wait to [see you on the porch](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67951775/421406518/195588442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWMyNzNiMy03YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XEVXXcalpztgGKQrexKLkTDMhX3k_ZObCaD4BgOILDQ=&emci=9fce1a9f-7538-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=11c273b3-7a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535). **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67951776/421406519/808036285?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWMyNzNiMy03YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XEVXXcalpztgGKQrexKLkTDMhX3k_ZObCaD4BgOILDQ=&emci=9fce1a9f-7538-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=11c273b3-7a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67951777/421406520/808036285?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWMyNzNiMy03YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XEVXXcalpztgGKQrexKLkTDMhX3k_ZObCaD4BgOILDQ=&emci=9fce1a9f-7538-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=11c273b3-7a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) Mayor Pureval will speak at the Lee H. Hamilton dinner on Saturday, Aug. 19, which is proudly presented by the Ninth District Democratic Party. Head online to [purchase your tickets for the dinner](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67951778/421406521/1343734111?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWMyNzNiMy03YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XEVXXcalpztgGKQrexKLkTDMhX3k_ZObCaD4BgOILDQ=). ****_Hoosiers Deserve the Right to Decide Directly on Issues at the Ballot_ On August 8, the people of Ohio voted to reject a proposal known as Issue 1, which would have made it harder to amend the state constitution. Had it passed, the change would have raised the threshold for approving future changes from a simple majority vote — 50% plus one — to 60% of the vote. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67951779/421406522/76710745?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWMyNzNiMy03YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XEVXXcalpztgGKQrexKLkTDMhX3k_ZObCaD4BgOILDQ=&emci=9fce1a9f-7538-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=11c273b3-7a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)**[Share Sen. Fady Qaddoura](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67951780/421406523/76710745?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWMyNzNiMy03YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XEVXXcalpztgGKQrexKLkTDMhX3k_ZObCaD4BgOILDQ=&emci=9fce1a9f-7538-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=11c273b3-7a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) This is a major win for pro-choice and womens’ rights advocates as the rejection of Issue 1 paves the way for the approval of a constitutional amendment this November that would codify the right to abortion in the state constitution. Hoosiers should have the same right to decide these important issues directly at the ballot box. It’s time for a new ballot initiative process for Indiana. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67951781/421406524/-1592890060?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWMyNzNiMy03YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XEVXXcalpztgGKQrexKLkTDMhX3k_ZObCaD4BgOILDQ=&emci=9fce1a9f-7538-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=11c273b3-7a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)**[Share Sen. Shelli Yoder](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67951782/421406525/-1592890060?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWMyNzNiMy03YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XEVXXcalpztgGKQrexKLkTDMhX3k_ZObCaD4BgOILDQ=&emci=9fce1a9f-7538-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=11c273b3-7a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) This week, we’re featuring Sen. Shelli Yoder’s push for increased funding for Indiana child care. [Recent data](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67951783/421406526/1776759704?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWMyNzNiMy03YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XEVXXcalpztgGKQrexKLkTDMhX3k_ZObCaD4BgOILDQ=&emci=9fce1a9f-7538-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=11c273b3-7a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) shows that there are approximately 408,309 children under age five living in Indiana — [further data](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67951784/421406527/-806124167?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWMyNzNiMy03YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XEVXXcalpztgGKQrexKLkTDMhX3k_ZObCaD4BgOILDQ=&emci=9fce1a9f-7538-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=11c273b3-7a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) indicates that only 180,000 of these children are receiving a high level of care. To highlight this discrepancy, several Indianapolis care providers [participated in a national protest](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67951785/421406528/-550666434?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWMyNzNiMy03YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XEVXXcalpztgGKQrexKLkTDMhX3k_ZObCaD4BgOILDQ=&emci=9fce1a9f-7538-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=11c273b3-7a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) entitled “A Day Without Child Care,” to draw attention to the lack of fair pay provided to workers and the reduced access to care that low-income families are forced to contend with. “Next session, I will once again be offering a proposal and advocating for legislative action to support providers, parents and employers, who are all struggling right now,” Senator Yoder stated via Twitter. ******[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67951786/421406529/249027328?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWMyNzNiMy03YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XEVXXcalpztgGKQrexKLkTDMhX3k_ZObCaD4BgOILDQ=&emci=9fce1a9f-7538-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=11c273b3-7a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)**[Share Sen. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** The Annual IDEA Conference is Next Weekend Next week, we are excited to meet and greet Hoosiers from across the state at the annual IDEA Conference in French Lick. The conference will span four days from Thursday, Aug. 17 to Sunday, Aug. 20 and will feature special guest speaker Cincinnati Mayor Aftab Pureval, as well as many other great events. We can’t wait to . Mayor Pureval will speak at the Lee H. Hamilton dinner on Saturday, Aug. 19, which is proudly presented by the Ninth District Democratic Party. Head online to =. Hoosiers Deserve the Right to Decide Directly on Issues at the Ballot On August 8, the people of Ohio voted to reject a proposal known as Issue 1, which would have made it harder to amend the state constitution. Had it passed, the change would have raised the threshold for approving future changes from a simple majority vote — 50% plus one — to 60% of the vote. This is a major win for pro-choice and womens’ rights advocates as the rejection of Issue 1 paves the way for the approval of a constitutional amendment this November that would codify the right to abortion in the state constitution. Hoosiers should have the same right to decide these important issues directly at the ballot box. It’s time for a new ballot initiative process for Indiana. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. This week, we’re featuring Sen. Shelli Yoder’s push for increased funding for Indiana child care. shows that there are approximately 408,309 children under age five living in Indiana — indicates that only 180,000 of these children are receiving a high level of care. To highlight this discrepancy, several Indianapolis care providers entitled “A Day Without Child Care,” to draw attention to the lack of fair pay provided to workers and the reduced access to care that low-income families are forced to contend with. “Next session, I will once again be offering a proposal and advocating for legislative action to support providers, parents and employers, who are all struggling right now,” Senator Yoder stated via Twitter. ** Get Involved! Opportunities to Volunteer Near You! Municipal campaign season is heating up, and campaigns around the state are needing help! Find an event near you and get involved to help ! Upcoming Candidate Trainings ** Monday, Aug. 14: 1-2 p.m. ET: How Local Parties Prepare for GOTV: Join the National Democratic Training Committee for a free virtual live training designed to elevate your skills as a local Democratic leader in your community. As you prepare, NDTC will help you elevate your local party and its ability to reach voters, regardless of where you’re at in the cycle. Register by . 2023 IDEA Convention: Book Your Room Today and See the Full Schedule! **But then:** In 2021, MAGA Republicans elected Governor Glenn Youngkin and took back control of the Virginia House of Delegates.

****And now:** Virginia Republicans have the chance to take full control of state government – they only need to flip _two senate seats_ in November.**

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: Please read before you start your weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
I believe in our people-powered team, and I know that if we work together, we can continue to deliver real, lasting change for our Northeast Ohio community.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67952247/421408148/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.11_b2_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGVlYzZlZi03YjM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Msq-kjguY4tfMdU8UO1FR5-Qj3Bquy2CJtzOUHBcNv8=) Hi everyone, it’s Emilia. Before the weekend, I wanted to reach out personally to give you a campaign update.

Our race here in OH-13 is heating up. Over the past few months, numerous election forecasters have called our district a **pure toss-up** and a **must-win seat for reclaiming the Democratic House Majority** , and multiple Republican groups have already**funded attack ad campaigns against us**.

It couldn’t be more clear that this race is shaping up to be one of the most competitive in the country, once again.

But, Peter, I’m not afraid of a challenge. **I believe in our people-powered team, and I know that if we work together, we can continue to deliver real, lasting change for our Northeast Ohio community.**

**However, in a race this competitive, the only way we’re going to be successful is if we come together – _and stick together_ – as a grassroots team.**

[**That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you chip in $5 to our people-powered campaign today? Your support will make all the difference next November.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67952248/421408149/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.11_b2_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGVlYzZlZi03YjM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Msq-kjguY4tfMdU8UO1FR5-Qj3Bquy2CJtzOUHBcNv8=) | [**CHIP IN $5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67952249/421408150/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.11_b2_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGVlYzZlZi03YjM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Msq-kjguY4tfMdU8UO1FR5-Qj3Bquy2CJtzOUHBcNv8=)

Thank you so much for being on this team,

Emilia

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

| Hey Peter,

Texas is home. I don’t take it for granted.

**I was raised by Mexican immigrants in San Antonio, that always taught me: no matter where you’re from or how you got here,_Tejas_ can be home for anyone.**

Ted Cruz’s family moved here from Cuba, and then he spent his entire political career attacking immigrants – pulling up the ladder from folks who want to achieve the American dream.

The Texas I know is full of friendly, welcoming, hardworking people.

I am running for US Senate because the Texas I know needs leaders who will look out for them, listen to them, and stick to their word. Ted Cruz has had more than 10 years in the Senate to prove himself to us, and he’s failed.

**Fixing our state shouldn’t be this hard. But politicians like Ted Cruz make it hard. Will you donate right now to my campaign to put Texas back on the right track?**

Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can . = | Hey Peter, Texas is home. I don’t take it for granted. I was raised by Mexican immigrants in San Antonio, that always taught me: no matter where you’re from or how you got here,Tejas can be home for anyone. Ted Cruz’s family moved here from Cuba, and then he spent his entire political career attacking immigrants – pulling up the ladder from folks who want to achieve the American dream. The Texas I know is full of friendly, welcoming, hardworking people. I am running for US Senate because the Texas I know needs leaders who will look out for them, listen to them, and stick to their word. Ted Cruz has had more than 10 years in the Senate to prove himself to us, and he’s failed. Fixing our state shouldn’t be this hard. But politicians like Ted Cruz make it hard. name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: How to never solve your problems
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=342%2E52803%2EoYZQ0m)

| | Peter, as County Executive, I’ve learned that the fastest way to _never_ solve your problems is to sit around waiting for a magic bullet solution. And when it comes to an urgent crisis like climate change, it’s not just foolish to wait for that magic bullet – it’s downright dangerous. In Washington, too many folks are hoping Republicans will see the writing on the wall about climate change and we’ll finally pass the legislation needed to solve it before it’s too late. **I’m an optimist, Peter, but I’m not holding my breath!** That’s why I prefer a different approach. I like to look at a HUGE problem like climate change, break it down, and tackle it one thoughtful step at a time. **[I’d like to tell you all about our achievements in Prince George’s, but first, can I ask you to chip in $10 to help me go even farther for Marylanders in the Senate?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4721?t=10&amount=25&akid=342%2E52803%2EoYZQ0m)** | | | [Donate](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4721?t=11&amount=10&akid=342%2E52803%2EoYZQ0m)
---
Here in Prince George’s, **we invested over a billion dollars into stormwater management.** We removed over 400 tons of litter from waterways, protected clean water access, modernized our drainage systems, and built flood-prevention infrastructure in high-risk areas.
**We reduced waste** by creating a countywide composting program, introducing a recovery system to keep useful materials out of landfills, and installing 29 solar trash and recycling stations at bus stops across the county.
**We reduced our carbon footprint** by building electric vehicle infrastructure, improving accessibility for bikers and pedestrians, and securing $540 million in funding to develop walkable, bikeable neighborhoods.
I’m proud of the work we’ve done at the county level. But we didn’t get here overnight. We made slow and steady progress one day and one initiative at a time.
**This Senate campaign is no different. It may look like one huge undertaking, but in reality, success is the sum total of thousands of hours of hard work and small, individual contributions from dedicated folks like you.**
**[So please, can I count on your support to get us just one step closer to a better, brighter future for Maryland?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4721?t=12&amount=25&akid=342%2E52803%2EoYZQ0m)**
| | [Chip in $10](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4721?t=13&amount=10&akid=342%2E52803%2EoYZQ0m)

So gratefully,
Angela Alsobrooks

body:
Today marks three years since Kamala officially joined the Biden-Harris ticket. | | |
---
Hey Peter, it’s Doug. As the first-ever Second Gentleman of the United States, it’s been my honor to witness Joe and Kamala’s leadership as they deliver results for working families all over the country. **And today marks three years since Kamala officially joined the ticket.** I am amazed by all the progress she and Joe have made over these last few years -- and to be honest, I am not sure we knew three years ago how much of an impact their work would have on improving the lives of so many Americans. Kamala’s work speaks for itself: She helped make the first significant federal gun safety legislation in nearly three decades a reality. She’s worked diligently to protect Americans’ fundamental rights and voices at the ballot box. On top of all that, she hit the campaign trail in the midterms, helping Democrats win tough races all over the country -- adding Democratic governors, holding the U.S. Senate, and running closer than _anyone_ thought possible in the House. It’s been my honor to have a front row seat to Kamala’s work, but there’s still so much progress left to be made. **That’s why I’m asking you to chip in what you can to support Joe and Kamala’s reelection campaign.** [We’re counting on grassroots donors to power this campaign. name: Team Lewis
subject: 📣 LAST CALL: Jazz's block party is tomorrow!
body:
Hey Team,
I'm so excited for to be hosting a Block Party tomorrow and would love to see you there. We'll have a great time with guest speakers Comptroller Brooke Lierman & Sheriff John Carr, as well as a DJ, moon bounce, live music performance, and prepaid food trucks. Come out and have a good time!
All the details are below and you can register and purchase tickets at: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jazzfestblockparty
Hope to see you on the 12th,
Jazz
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lewis_2022email?refcode2=logo]
Join us at the
Summer Block Party
hosted by
Majority Whip Jazz Lewis
Special Guest Speaker Brooke Lierman
Chair, Public Safety & Administration and Vice Chair, Capital Budget Subcommittee
House Appropriations Committee
DJ and Live Music
Food Trucks
Fun for the Family
Saturday, August 12th, 2023
12:00-3:00pm
Arbor Park
1100 Arbor Park Pl.
Bowie, MD 20721
Purchase Tickets > [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jazzfestblockparty]
For questions please contact adam@skybp.com or (240) 283-4899
As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Majority Whip in the Maryland House. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Bowie with his wife and son.

Bethesda, MD 20827

name: John Fetterman
subject: Will you do me a favor and help my friend Bob?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
My senior Senator and friend Bob Casey is running for re-election!!!

| Hey Peter, I’ve got some biiiig news. **🚨 ****My pal and senior Senator Bob Casey is *officially* running for re-election! ****🚨**
---
| [Donate to Re-elect Bob Casey » ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67952861/421410260/-2079439380?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230811-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwYzhiMDNiLTdmMzgtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qZ6hxEYQAt0pnQfcsxnX9nmnjxVfM2laoA6aTzixBWA=)
---
If you saw us on the campaign trail in 2022, then you probably saw Bob Casey too. NO ONE knows PA like Bob Casey, and no one stands up for PA’s families like him, either.

He’s spent his LIFE fighting the ultra-wealthy and special interests that threaten PA’s hardworking people — and that’s *exactly* why we need to send him back to DC to keep fighting for us.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67952862/421410261/-1611259197?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230811-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQwYzhiMDNiLTdmMzgtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qZ6hxEYQAt0pnQfcsxnX9nmnjxVfM2laoA6aTzixBWA=)
_^Like seriously, we gotta keep this dude in the U.S. Senate._ Bob’s campaign is *already* being attacked by the Republicans, and we’re going to do EVERYthing we can to keep him in the Senate and fighting for working Pennsylvanians.

Why now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67953009/421410707/767232599?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYyOTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmU0NjgyOTItN2YzOC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OF30f1dAN_e78GC8FJNz57U7D8hDueI6HjNDIGRLmx8=&emci=a1136e59-d036-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=be468292-7f38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7307312) [_**The Verge: Can you win a Senate race without a single tweet?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67953014/421410715/657031946?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYyOTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmU0NjgyOTItN2YzOC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OF30f1dAN_e78GC8FJNz57U7D8hDueI6HjNDIGRLmx8=&emci=a1136e59-d036-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=be468292-7f38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7307312) This kind of press coverage goes a long way toward getting Lexi’s message out. clean_body: Hey friend — this is Corby Reese, Lexi’s husband. Look, when Lexi first announced she was running for Senate, a lot of insiders wrote her off — a political novice challenging three career politicians who have been eyeing this seat for years. Well, it turns out, Lexi’s experience solving tough problems as a progressive business leader — and her vision to build a livable California with a livable economy, where every family can thrive — are resonating far and wide. We’re getting new donors and volunteers every day, picking up traction on social media, and now the media is taking notice. Check out some of this news coverage: This kind of press coverage goes a long way toward getting Lexi’s message out. Huge news out of Arizona, Peter: Abortion rights groups launched a campaign this week to enshrine abortion protections in the state’s Constitution. Arizona has a real shot at protecting the right to an abortion for every person in the state — but only because they elected Democrat Katie Hobbs over self-proclaimed “Trump in a dress” Kari Lake. **Elections have consequences.** Governor Hobbs has vetoed every single piece of legislation that aimed to restrict abortion access. Kari Lake would have signed them in a heartbeat — and pushed for more. That’s why it’s so important we elect reproductive rights champions into every office, every election year. [_**There are lots of important seats up over the next few years that will determine abortion access in many states around the country. clean_body: | = Huge news out of Arizona, Peter: Abortion rights groups launched a campaign this week to enshrine abortion protections in the state’s Constitution. Arizona has a real shot at protecting the right to an abortion for every person in the state — but only because they elected Democrat Katie Hobbs over self-proclaimed “Trump in a dress” Kari Lake. Elections have consequences. Governor Hobbs has vetoed every single piece of legislation that aimed to restrict abortion access. Kari Lake would have signed them in a heartbeat — and pushed for more. That’s why it’s so important we elect reproductive rights champions into every office, every election year. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your help, HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

subject: If you read just one email from us, Peter

body:
We need you to read THIS one.

Peter – Shawn’s name is officially on the gubernatorial ballot here in Louisiana, and you know what that means: _The fight is on._ For safer communities. For more affordable housing and health care access. For higher wages and a stronger state economy. For a state government that will prioritize families and workers instead of politicized culture wars. And it won’t be easy — Shawn is up against a whole field of GOP candidates determined to flip the governorship from blue to red. If the GOP succeeds, they’ll reverse 8 years of progress under the current Democratic governor and bring their extremist, MAGA ideology to our communities. But unlike the GOP, Shawn plans to move Louisiana forward, not backward. **So, to help him spread his vision, Team Wilson is setting up a Fight Back Fund — and we need YOUR help to hit the $15,000 name: Working Families Party
subject: A Hot Labor Summer update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
It’s Hot Labor Summer, and we’ve seen a groundswell of actions from workers fighting for safe working conditions, a living wage, and their right to organize. | | | Peter, It’s Hot Labor Summer, and we’ve seen a groundswell of actions from workers fighting for safe working conditions, a living wage, and their right to organize. From coast to coast, from nursing to entertainment to hotel employees to librarians and more, workers are uniting and demonstrating their strength to billionaire corporations. Let's make sure this momentum goes all the way to the ballot box. As we prepare for the upcoming elections and work to take back Congress in 2024, the Working Families Party is fighting to elect working people at every level who will stand with organized labor. **[Can you chip in to grow our movement and elect more candidates who fight for the many, not the few?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUKPcr6wafru7nTOckhaWvwHLjgEpp5xfAiJ0QEiMAD5pXbim-ttyRAUr0hZqtDeKFY3AeJ_U5G6ZeVEGBQ56gfoqgV7MEwOhM8zMVc2PHroNJPED4ScruJZm9QspbkxWCYxC4OaSwvNeGANtDALOpduHeIuamd41TV3wjNRdd5CyAICCaK34_rQqFG3BW2Kt-dNFcmWYxI6GAo3eIsMv-3pgYiimKM5VZck3Ze24xBFm_zbzKehT8uDrkBUdjraPxR2BOJvaJC72q1xaeVdgeZNJC2C5qr7uF_-hUFZ1MoId0Lx3QSV_q2AiYyFgfbbBaVQ_eBdh8FoSj_X8jP39fhFVTgy1MW1xXKAFw7EDP3Ko/3yn/aIa-iRkhQHWKeDGyvGGvaQ/h0/CiYbVaeOxja0f1YI0PgddJhEv38fmpzHGu-tgrL6wag)** **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUKPcr6wafru7nTOckhaWvwHLjgEpp5xfAiJ0QEiMAD5pXbim-ttyRAUr0hZqtDeKFZnrpLr1Ei-_wfJGPO1JXoMtD9GT3uJqmXowtbRb-lVH2Q3MCquhQL9J0bJlX359mImhq6tScfqDhADtnY-URSh-xygScnbaFp6gLNe1OnkYZmk9_RLIg61xI64IkugkL0mQOvC8KbgdrcRres69nxojckvtGkvWRU1oY9Ns_SFtgZA4bJZ47D1MUtPZy7NrZGZvQ1VkPDxDC891Qys3mH-NWqTkIBuwoa7DuFvBQ5jowuTM8n67z-h-jBosUQYteaFP3CBi3YNUomN4ma4BjsF9UT564nXUmvmrIIXYnkaM/3yn/aIa-iRkhQHWKeDGyvGGvaQ/h1/r26mgPH1y2ERQI-DOb3Oe2rejKqMcPAeX6o4t1OQid4)** Workers are exercising their power together to win fair working conditions this summer. Over just the last few weeks, we’ve seen:
* **The Writers Guild of America (WGA) and Screen Actors Guild (SAG-AFTRA)** stand strong in their strike against the massive studios and streamers underpaying their workforce and trying to replace workers with AI, with the WGA strike rapidly approaching the 100-day milestone.1
* **UPS employees** win a tentative agreement which would raise wages, create more full-time positions, and end an unfair two-tier wage system, following a strike threat. Members have until August 22 to vote on the agreement.2
* **11,000 Los Angeles city employees** stage a 24-hour strike last Tuesday — their first since 1980! — in response to vacant positions, severe staffing shortages, and forced overtime shortchanging city services for residents.3
* **Nurses at Rochester General Hospital in New York 4 and Robert Wood Johnson Hospital in New Jersey5** go on strike to demand sufficient staffing that allows nurses to provide patients the care they deserve.
* **Hotel workers in Southern California** walk out for a living wage, improved conditions, and support for policies to address the housing crisis6 — even in the face of violence from hotel security staff.7
* **Marvel visual effects employees** file for a union election, which could make them the first union in a field marked by chronic overworking and a lack of worker protections.8
* **4,500 San Jose city workers** schedule a three-day strike starting August 15 as they organize for wages that allow them to live in the city that they serve.9

clean_body: It’s Hot Labor Summer, and we’ve seen a groundswell of actions from workers fighting for safe working conditions, a living wage, and their right to organize. | | | Peter, It’s Hot Labor Summer, and we’ve seen a groundswell of actions from workers fighting for safe working conditions, a living wage, and their right to organize. From coast to coast, from nursing to entertainment to hotel employees to librarians and more, workers are uniting and demonstrating their strength to billionaire corporations. Let's make sure this momentum goes all the way to the ballot box. As we prepare for the upcoming elections and work to take back Congress in 2024, the Working Families Party is fighting to elect working people at every level who will stand with organized labor. Workers are exercising their power together to win fair working conditions this summer. Over just the last few weeks, we’ve seen: The Writers Guild of America (WGA) and Screen Actors Guild (SAG-AFTRA) stand strong in their strike against the massive studios and streamers underpaying their workforce and trying to replace workers with AI, with the WGA strike rapidly approaching the 100-day milestone.1 UPS employees win a tentative agreement which would raise wages, create more full-time positions, and end an unfair two-tier wage system, following a strike threat. Members have until August 22 to vote on the agreement.2 11,000 Los Angeles city employees stage a 24-hour strike last Tuesday — their first since 1980! — in response to vacant positions, severe staffing shortages, and forced overtime shortchanging city services for residents.3 Nurses at Rochester General Hospital in New York 4 and Robert Wood Johnson Hospital in New Jersey5 go on strike to demand sufficient staffing that allows nurses to provide patients the care they deserve. Hotel workers in Southern California walk out for a living wage, improved conditions, and support for policies to address the housing crisis6 — even in the face of violence from hotel security staff.7 Marvel visual effects employees file for a union election, which could make them the first union in a field marked by chronic overworking and a lack of worker protections.8 4,500 San Jose city workers schedule a three-day strike starting August 15 as they organize for wages that allow them to live in the city that they serve.9 In solidarity, Team WFP Source: 1\. , CNN Business, August 7, 2023 2\. , Reuters, August 3, 2023 3\. , In These Times, August 8, 2023 4\. , 13 WHAM ABC, August 4, 2023 5\. , NJBIZ, August 7, 2023 6\. , In These Times, August 8, 2023 7\. , Los Angeles Daily News, August 7, 2023 8\. , Vulture, August 7, 2023 9\. , Fox KTVU, August 7, 2023 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

| **GOP legislators file lawsuit against abortion rights petition**
The Republican effort to prevent a proposed constitutional amendment protecting abortion rights from making it on the statewide ballot next year took a new turn Aug. 7 when pair of GOP lawmakers filed a lawsuit claiming the fiscal summary accompanying the measure inadequately estimates the costs to taxpayers.

The arguments by state Sen. Mary Elizabeth Coleman, R-Arnold, and state Rep. Hannah Kelly, R-Mountain Grove, mirror those Attorney General Andrew Bailey made in his unsuccessful fight to force State Auditor Scott Fitzpatrick to rewrite the fiscal estimate his office prepared for the measure. Bailey wanted the fiscal note to falsely say ratifying the abortion rights amendment would cost the state $12.5 billion a year in lost revenue. Fitzpatrick said the measure would have no fiscal impact on the state, with one local government possibly incurring $51,000 in costs.

The Missouri Supreme Court ended the dispute on July 20 when it ruled Bailey had no authority to order Fitzpatrick to make changes since the attorney general’s role is limited to ensuring the fiscal estimate is in the proper legal form, which Fitzpatrick’s was. However, the court didn’t address the merits of whether Fitzpatrick’s estimate is incorrect, which the two anti-abortion rights lawmakers assert in their lawsuit.

Abortion rights supporters are seeking to put the measure on the statewide ballot using the initiative petition process, which allows citizens to bypass lawmakers to put legislation directly before voters. State officials were supposed to have cleared the petition for circulation by no later than May 1, but because of Bailey’s delays, final certification didn’t happen until almost three months later, on July 26.

The petition’s sponsors still haven’t started gathering the minimum 172,000 signatures needed to qualify for the November 2024 ballot as they challenge slanted ballot language Ashcroft prepared for measure claiming it would “allow for dangerous, unregulated and unrestricted abortions” and “nullify longstanding Missouri law protecting the right to life.” A Cole County judge has scheduled a Sept. 11 trial in that case. Regardless of which side prevails, appeals to the Missouri Court of Appeals and, ultimately, the state Supreme Court are expected

The case disputing the fiscal estimate likely will delay circulation even further. No hearing has yet been set in the matter, which is assigned to a different Cole County judge. The new case is _Hannah Kelly, et al., v. Scott Fitzpatrick, et al._
---
|
---
| **Ban on texting, cell phone use while driving set to take effect**
Later this month, Missouri will finally shed its dubious status as one of the last states that doesn’t prohibit all motorists from using a cell phone or texting while driving. But although a new law largely banning the use of electronic devices while behind the wheel takes effect Aug. 28, police will only be able to issue warnings for violations until Jan. 1, 2025.

For many years, Missouri has banned cell phone use while driving only for those operating a commercial vehicle, while texting has been prohibited for both commercial vehicle drivers and any motorist under age 21. However, Senate Bill 398, an omnibus bill containing various provisions relating to motor vehicles, makes the prohibitions on using a cell phone or texting while driving – excluding by means of a hands-free device – uniform for all drivers.

Under the new law, police will be prohibited from pulling over or detaining someone solely for using a cell phone or texting while driving. Instead, police can only cite someone for a violation if they pull them over for another traffic offense. The law also requires police to inform drivers that they have the right to decline a search of their cell phone or other device and prohibits the issuance of warrants to seize a phone or device in relation to an alleged violation of the law except in instances involving a car crash that results in serious bodily injury or death.

Once the grace period on enforcement expires in 2025 and police begin issuing tickets, the maximum penalty for a single violation during a two-year period will be a $150 fine, with fines rising to $250 for a second violation in that period and topping out at $500 for subsequent violations.

While most violations will be considered infractions, those occurring in designated work zones or that involve property damage exceeding $5,000 or serious injuries would be elevated to misdemeanors. A violation that results in someone’s death will be a Class D felony.

SB 398 also preempts local governments from regulating the use of electronic devices while driving, with state law superseding any local ordinances or restrictions.

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=47b78bd0d4&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.

| **RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY **
Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit:

As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy.

Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that **anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program.**

Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free.

---
|
---
| **LOW-COST INSULIN** Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the [Eli Lilly and Co. Website](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=7d124c2626&e=a088917f89).

But although a new law largely banning the use of electronic devices while behind the wheel takes effect Aug. 28, police will only be able to issue warnings for violations until Jan. 1, 2025. For many years, Missouri has banned cell phone use while driving only for those operating a commercial vehicle, while texting has been prohibited for both commercial vehicle drivers and any motorist under age 21. However, Senate Bill 398, an omnibus bill containing various provisions relating to motor vehicles, makes the prohibitions on using a cell phone or texting while driving – excluding by means of a hands-free device – uniform for all drivers. Under the new law, police will be prohibited from pulling over or detaining someone solely for using a cell phone or texting while driving. Instead, police can only cite someone for a violation if they pull them over for another traffic offense. The law also requires police to inform drivers that they have the right to decline a search of their cell phone or other device and prohibits the issuance of warrants to seize a phone or device in relation to an alleged violation of the law except in instances involving a car crash that results in serious bodily injury or death. Once the grace period on enforcement expires in 2025 and police begin issuing tickets, the maximum penalty for a single violation during a two-year period will be a $150 fine, with fines rising to $250 for a second violation in that period and topping out at $500 for subsequent violations. While most violations will be considered infractions, those occurring in designated work zones or that involve property damage exceeding $5,000 or serious injuries would be elevated to misdemeanors. A violation that results in someone’s death will be a Class D felony. SB 398 also preempts local governments from regulating the use of electronic devices while driving, with state law superseding any local ordinances or restrictions. | | 2023 SENATE BILLS \- Creates new provisions relating to financial institutions \- Enacts new law relating to wage range inquiries by employees and prospective employees \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons \- Creates certificates of exemplary conduct and good moral character issued by circuit courts \- Creates provisions relating to compensation for wrongful convictions \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution \- Designates "James W Brooks Memorial Highway" in St. Louis City and St. Louis County \- Creates the offense of unlawful possession by a minor \- Modifies the practice of dentistry to include the prescription and administration of vaccines \- Specifies that the St. Louis City school board shall fill any vacancy that occurs in such school board outside of the normal election cycle \- Authorizes counties to freeze the real property assessed values of certain senior citizens | | "Signed By Governor" | "Truly Agreed Bills" | | | | | HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19). SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing. Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and . Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov for more information on SBA disaster assistance. | | SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. If you or someone you know needs help, please visit or call 314-531-2003. You can also contact at 314-993-2777. | | COMMUNITY RESOURCE LIST The has a COVID-19 Community Economic Relief Fund. The Missouri Department of Health and Senior Services hotline can be reached at tel:%20\(877\%20435-8411). | | | | | | RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit: As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy. name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: Josh Hawley: “My race is going to be one of the TIGHTEST races in America in 2024”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter — Josh Hawley is starting to panic.
**Just read what he told his top donors in a message about his race against Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat:**
**_“My race is going to be one of the TIGHTEST races in America in 2024”_**
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35468?refcode=em20230811-3543&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3543%2E614464%2E2KLevp)**
After proving himself to be a fraud and a coward on January 6th and failing Missourians during his first term in the U.S. Senate, Josh Hawley made himself the most vulnerable GOP Senator up for re-election in 2024.
**FIRST:** Some of Hawley’s top supporters announced they’re refusing to support his re-election campaign this cycle — including his former mentor, three-term GOP U.S. Senator Jack Danforth, who said supporting Hawley in 2018 was _“one of the worst mistakes he’s ever made in his life.”_
**THEN:** Polling from _Morning Consult_ showed Josh Hawley has the lowest approval of any Republican U.S. Senator running for re-election in 2024 — even worse than Ted Cruz and Rick Scott!
**AND NOW:** National Republicans are dumping money into our race — more than a year out from Election Day — to prop up Hawley and his flailing campaign.
**All of this means we have a real opportunity to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat next year, but it’s not going to be easy —[and we need your help to get it done.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35468?refcode=em20230811-3543&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3543%2E614464%2E2KLevp)**
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35468?refcode=em20230811-3543&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3543%2E614464%2E2KLevp)**
Just weeks ago — when FEC reports showed Lucas had outraised Hawley’s campaign for the first six months of 2023 — **we learned GOP mega-donors had put over $1 million into a brand new Super PAC to support Hawley and attack Lucas.**
Lucas launched this campaign early so we’d have time to build a movement capable of defeating a vulnerable incumbent like Hawley. But we can only win this race if we have the resources to both combat Hawley’s attacks AND put Lucas’ positive vision in front of Missouri voters. **That’s why we need your help today, Peter.**
**[So please, will you rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford to our grassroots movement to elect Lucas Kunce? Our best shot at building a winning campaign is keeping up our record-breaking momentum — and we need your support to do it.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35468?refcode=em20230811-3543&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3543%2E614464%2E2KLevp)**

Just read what he told his top donors in a message about his race against Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat: “My race is going to be one of the TIGHTEST races in America in 2024” After proving himself to be a fraud and a coward on January 6th and failing Missourians during his first term in the U.S. Senate, Josh Hawley made himself the most vulnerable GOP Senator up for re-election in 2024. FIRST: Some of Hawley’s top supporters announced they’re refusing to support his re-election campaign this cycle — including his former mentor, three-term GOP U.S. Senator Jack Danforth, who said supporting Hawley in 2018 was “one of the worst mistakes he’s ever made in his life.” THEN: Polling from Morning Consult showed Josh Hawley has the lowest approval of any Republican U.S. Senator running for re-election in 2024 — even worse than Ted Cruz and Rick Scott! AND NOW: National Republicans are dumping money into our race — more than a year out from Election Day — to prop up Hawley and his flailing campaign. All of this means we have a real opportunity to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat next year, but it’s not going to be easy — Just weeks ago — when FEC reports showed Lucas had outraised Hawley’s campaign for the first six months of 2023 — we learned GOP mega-donors had put over $1 million into a brand new Super PAC to support Hawley and attack Lucas. Lucas launched this campaign early so we’d have time to build a movement capable of defeating a vulnerable incumbent like Hawley. But we can only win this race if we have the resources to both combat Hawley’s attacks AND put Lucas’ positive vision in front of Missouri voters. That’s why we need your help today, Peter. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you, — Team Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
