name: Darcy Draeger, Executive Director
subject: Districts for Democracy Weekly Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
| | Hi all,

This week, I’d like to expand on an issue Tom highlighted in a [thread](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67954519/421418941/-1638304580?s=20&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230811_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=00691b1c-8438-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDY5MWIxYy04NDM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YvlofHgVmgmW1n--Xdpixi4Rfj-3FRJ7g1nRo1HQYPQ=&emci=bed2ecff-8338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=00691b1c-8438-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294) on August 5. In it, he wrote: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67954521/421418945/-1638304580?s=20&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230811_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=00691b1c-8438-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDY5MWIxYy04NDM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YvlofHgVmgmW1n--Xdpixi4Rfj-3FRJ7g1nRo1HQYPQ=&emci=bed2ecff-8338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=00691b1c-8438-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294) “Last week, a MAGA-run school board in NJ [voted to end student mental health programs](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67954523/421418948/355930790?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230811_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=00691b1c-8438-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDY5MWIxYy04NDM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YvlofHgVmgmW1n--Xdpixi4Rfj-3FRJ7g1nRo1HQYPQ=&emci=bed2ecff-8338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=00691b1c-8438-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294). Sounds crazy–these guys say they just want to restrict age inappropriate books, right? Actually, this is the logical endpoint of the "parents rights" movement.

To these right wing groups, “parents rights” means parents they represent should have control over everything their kids experience in school. Kids speaking privately to mental health counselors about things they may not feel safe discussing at home violates that principle.

[Here's a rep for the "Moms for Liberty" group saying they're fine with mental health services, so long as "parents are involved."](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67954534/421418950/-926146656?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230811_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=00691b1c-8438-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDY5MWIxYy04NDM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YvlofHgVmgmW1n--Xdpixi4Rfj-3FRJ7g1nRo1HQYPQ=&emci=bed2ecff-8338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=00691b1c-8438-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294) They may think that sounds reasonable, but it defeats the very purpose of giving kids access to confidential counseling.

Depression and suicide rates among teens have skyrocketed in recent years, so the need for student mental health services is acute. And fortunately, the [Ramapo Indian Hills school board restored mental health funding](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67954536/421418960/1490740113?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230811_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=00691b1c-8438-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDY5MWIxYy04NDM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YvlofHgVmgmW1n--Xdpixi4Rfj-3FRJ7g1nRo1HQYPQ=&emci=bed2ecff-8338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=00691b1c-8438-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294) after local parents and students protested their initial ban.

But MAGA groups seeking to control how schools teach history and science, and to end the mental health services the overwhelming majority of parents and kids say are needed, are trying to take over more school boards this November.” – Tom Malinowski, via Twitter

**Elections Have (Serious) Consequences**

So, why did this happen at Ramapo Indian Hills?

Last November, candidates from a [Republican-supported parents' rights slate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67954540/421418963/1181341453?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230811_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=00691b1c-8438-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDY5MWIxYy04NDM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YvlofHgVmgmW1n--Xdpixi4Rfj-3FRJ7g1nRo1HQYPQ=&emci=bed2ecff-8338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=00691b1c-8438-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294) were elected to the regional high school.

The three new members–Thomas Bogdansky, Doreen Mariani, and Kim Ansh helped form a “parents' rights” voting majority on the nine-member board alongside Judith Sullivan and Marianna Emmolo.

When running, the candidates suggested their focus would be to raise academic performance. Instead, the parents’ rights faction has made sweeping changes to the district over seven months, beginning with the firing of the board's 20-year general counsel at the [reorganization meeting in January](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67954544/421418968/1198868167?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230811_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=00691b1c-8438-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDY5MWIxYy04NDM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YvlofHgVmgmW1n--Xdpixi4Rfj-3FRJ7g1nRo1HQYPQ=&emci=bed2ecff-8338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=00691b1c-8438-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294) to [abruptly canceling all mental health programs for the coming school year](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67954551/421418972/-603385498?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230811_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=00691b1c-8438-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDY5MWIxYy04NDM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YvlofHgVmgmW1n--Xdpixi4Rfj-3FRJ7g1nRo1HQYPQ=&emci=bed2ecff-8338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=00691b1c-8438-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294) in a 4-4 vote at the July 24 meeting.

Superintendent Rui Dionisio stated "...this is the first time as a superintendent that I had any indication that these resolutions would not pass... the three counselors are serving over 50 students over the course of the year. The challenge we have now is that school starts in about six weeks, and these families are now going to be wondering what's going to happen in September. If we have five to eight students that now have to go out of district, those placements will run approximately $100,000 per student with transportation."

Board member Brian DeLaite said “Depression among teenage kids is at practically an epidemic level; couple that with the fact that suicide amongst 14- and 15-year-olds is the number one cause of death in the country. You know, there’s a lot of reasons, particularly coming out of COVID, why it’s essential in my opinion to provide these services to kids in the schools.”

Board Vice President Kim Ansh was unmoved by both arguments, saying "I feel that our main focus should be on student achievement and helping all our students be graduation-ready. As such, I cannot support the three initiatives on tonight's agenda. These types of programs actually remove parents to some degree from being involved in and supervising their children's mental health. This is overreach, and I feel that we are becoming a psychiatric institution at this point."

**The Community Pushes Back–And Wins**

Outraged by the board’s action, community members immediately petitioned for an emergency meeting. The following week, after almost four hours of comments, [eight of the nine members voted in favor of reinstating the mental health programs recommended by Superintendent Rui Dionisio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67954554/421418979/1490740113?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230811_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=00691b1c-8438-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDY5MWIxYy04NDM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YvlofHgVmgmW1n--Xdpixi4Rfj-3FRJ7g1nRo1HQYPQ=&emci=bed2ecff-8338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=00691b1c-8438-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)

Vice President Kim Ansh voted no, and repeated her belief that the programs constitute "overreach" and she fears "we're becoming a psychiatric institution."

I think there are a few points to consider here:
1. **When we fight, we win!** Parents and students showed up in force and pushed the board to reverse its egregious decision.

2. **MAGA-aligned boards repeatedly show they will ignore** superintendent, teacher, and expert recommendations if they do not align with members’ personal partisan views.

3. **MAGA-aligned candidates misrepresent their intentions**. Over the past two years, extremist candidates claim “academic excellence” is their chief concern. When elected, however, they pivot to banning books and textbooks, rejecting teacher recommendations, targeting vulnerable student communities–and now, removing vital mental health services without notice.

But why did these school board members suddenly decide to prevent students from accessing mental health care?

When you remember that Moms for Liberty, [recently designated as an anti-government extremist group by the Southern Poverty Law Center](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67954557/421418982/601465837?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230811_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=00691b1c-8438-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDY5MWIxYy04NDM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YvlofHgVmgmW1n--Xdpixi4Rfj-3FRJ7g1nRo1HQYPQ=&emci=bed2ecff-8338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=00691b1c-8438-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294), was originally focused on opposing public health regulations for COVID-19, it starts to make more sense.

**Moms for Liberty: Mental Health Care Has NO Place in Schools**

On July 24, President Biden announced his administration’s new national strategy to address mental health care gaps across the US, including $1 billion designated for schools to hire more mental health care professionals.

Moms for Liberty immediately responded by insisting that mental health care has no place in public schools. The organization and its supporters have since doubled down on the position.

**What’s At Stake in This Year’s BOE election?**

As reporter [Marsha Stoltz recently wrote](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67954564/421418984/737242106?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230811_OT_news_0_3MO_DG_na_na_newsletter&refcode2=00691b1c-8438-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDY5MWIxYy04NDM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YvlofHgVmgmW1n--Xdpixi4Rfj-3FRJ7g1nRo1HQYPQ=&emci=bed2ecff-8338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=00691b1c-8438-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294), for Ramapo Indian Hills, it’s the board's five-member parents' rights majority.

Board President Judith Sullivan is not among six candidates who filed by the July 31 deadline to run for one of three open seats on its Board of Education in November.

Vivian Yudin King will be seeking her second term with running mate Amy Eilert under the "United for Students" slogan, while Oakland newcomers Melissa Kiel and Audrey Lynn Souders have filed to run separately for the same two seats.

In a separate race, Wyckoff trustee Brian DeLaite has filed to run for a new three-year term on the board against newcomer Jared A Geist.

For New Jersey more broadly, it’s whether we work to support and elect BOE members who are respect teachers as professionals and experts; who are committed to critical thinking. Not indoctrination; and who are running to support, not oppose, free and fair public schools.

**What Can You Do?**

As Winn Khuong of BoardBOOST says, “It’s simple: Do or donate.” Whether it’s a few hours or a few dollars, this is what the far right is doing for its candidates and we need to follow suit.

Over the next few weeks we will share a list of races we’re working to support. These candidates will need volunteers, donors, and word of mouth. Until then, find out who is running in your town and reach out. We’re stronger together, and standing up for what we believe in is more powerful when we stand together.

And of course, a shortcut is to support our work here at Districts for Democracy.

Thank you all again for your attention, and your time. Together we’re going to keep New Jersey public schools number one in the nation.

Sincerely,

Darcy
Executive Director
Districts for Democracy
---
* * *
| Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States.

clean_body: | | Hi all, This week, I’d like to expand on an issue Tom highlighted in a on August 5. In it, he wrote: “Last week, a MAGA-run school board in NJ . Sounds crazy–these guys say they just want to restrict age inappropriate books, right? Actually, this is the logical endpoint of the "parents rights" movement. To these right wing groups, “parents rights” means parents they represent should have control over everything their kids experience in school. Kids speaking privately to mental health counselors about things they may not feel safe discussing at home violates that principle. They may think that sounds reasonable, but it defeats the very purpose of giving kids access to confidential counseling. Depression and suicide rates among teens have skyrocketed in recent years, so the need for student mental health services is acute. And fortunately, the after local parents and students protested their initial ban. But MAGA groups seeking to control how schools teach history and science, and to end the mental health services the overwhelming majority of parents and kids say are needed, are trying to take over more school boards this November.” – Tom Malinowski, via Twitter Elections Have (Serious) Consequences So, why did this happen at Ramapo Indian Hills? Last November, candidates from a were elected to the regional high school. The three new members–Thomas Bogdansky, Doreen Mariani, and Kim Ansh helped form a “parents' rights” voting majority on the nine-member board alongside Judith Sullivan and Marianna Emmolo. When running, the candidates suggested their focus would be to raise academic performance. Instead, the parents’ rights faction has made sweeping changes to the district over seven months, beginning with the firing of the board's 20-year general counsel at the to in a 4-4 vote at the July 24 meeting. Superintendent Rui Dionisio stated "...this is the first time as a superintendent that I had any indication that these resolutions would not pass... the three counselors are serving over 50 students over the course of the year. The challenge we have now is that school starts in about six weeks, and these families are now going to be wondering what's going to happen in September. If we have five to eight students that now have to go out of district, those placements will run approximately $100,000 per student with transportation." Board member Brian DeLaite said “Depression among teenage kids is at practically an epidemic level; couple that with the fact that suicide amongst 14- and 15-year-olds is the number one cause of death in the country. You know, there’s a lot of reasons, particularly coming out of COVID, why it’s essential in my opinion to provide these services to kids in the schools.” Board Vice President Kim Ansh was unmoved by both arguments, saying "I feel that our main focus should be on student achievement and helping all our students be graduation-ready. As such, I cannot support the three initiatives on tonight's agenda. These types of programs actually remove parents to some degree from being involved in and supervising their children's mental health. This is overreach, and I feel that we are becoming a psychiatric institution at this point." The Community Pushes Back–And Wins Outraged by the board’s action, community members immediately petitioned for an emergency meeting. The following week, after almost four hours of comments, Vice President Kim Ansh voted no, and repeated her belief that the programs constitute "overreach" and she fears "we're becoming a psychiatric institution." I think there are a few points to consider here: 1. When we fight, we win! Parents and students showed up in force and pushed the board to reverse its egregious decision. 2. MAGA-aligned boards repeatedly show they will ignore superintendent, teacher, and expert recommendations if they do not align with members’ personal partisan views. 3. MAGA-aligned candidates misrepresent their intentions. Over the past two years, extremist candidates claim “academic excellence” is their chief concern. When elected, however, they pivot to banning books and textbooks, rejecting teacher recommendations, targeting vulnerable student communities–and now, removing vital mental health services without notice. But why did these school board members suddenly decide to prevent students from accessing mental health care? When you remember that Moms for Liberty, , was originally focused on opposing public health regulations for COVID-19, it starts to make more sense. Moms for Liberty: Mental Health Care Has NO Place in Schools On July 24, President Biden announced his administration’s new national strategy to address mental health care gaps across the US, including $1 billion designated for schools to hire more mental health care professionals. Moms for Liberty immediately responded by insisting that mental health care has no place in public schools. The organization and its supporters have since doubled down on the position. What’s At Stake in This Year’s BOE election? As reporter , for Ramapo Indian Hills, it’s the board's five-member parents' rights majority. Board President Judith Sullivan is not among six candidates who filed by the July 31 deadline to run for one of three open seats on its Board of Education in November. Vivian Yudin King will be seeking her second term with running mate Amy Eilert under the "United for Students" slogan, while Oakland newcomers Melissa Kiel and Audrey Lynn Souders have filed to run separately for the same two seats. In a separate race, Wyckoff trustee Brian DeLaite has filed to run for a new three-year term on the board against newcomer Jared A Geist. For New Jersey more broadly, it’s whether we work to support and elect BOE members who are respect teachers as professionals and experts; who are committed to critical thinking. Not indoctrination; and who are running to support, not oppose, free and fair public schools. What Can You Do? As Winn Khuong of BoardBOOST says, “It’s simple: Do or donate.” Whether it’s a few hours or a few dollars, this is what the far right is doing for its candidates and we need to follow suit. Over the next few weeks we will share a list of races we’re working to support. These candidates will need volunteers, donors, and word of mouth. Until then, find out who is running in your town and reach out. We’re stronger together, and standing up for what we believe in is more powerful when we stand together. And of course, a shortcut is to support our work here at Districts for Democracy. Thank you all again for your attention, and your time. Together we’re going to keep New Jersey public schools number one in the nation. Sincerely, Darcy Executive Director Districts for Democracy * | Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States. = = Paid for by Districts for Democracy Districts for Democracy P.O. name: Team Cori
subject: RE: Toxic waste from Manhattan Project still harms our communities.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
The toxic legacy of the atomic bomb in the United States still threatens children today. | |
---
Peter, While people flock to see the movie “Oppenheimer,” many don’t know about the toxic legacy of the atomic bomb in the United States. Government mismanagement of radioactive waste from the Manhattan Project has led to dangerous contamination for generations of people, increasing their risk of cancer and other health problems. That waste still endangers communities around the country, including around St. Louis. **After a recent report found unsafe levels of radioactive waste in and around an elementary school in Rep. Cori Bush’s district, she introduced the _Justice for Jana Elementary Act_. ** The bill would require clean-up and testing for radioactive contamination in the school district, and it would also create a fund for schools impacted by Manhattan Project waste to request financial assistance for radioactive testing or the construction of new schools. [**Please sign now to support Rep. | Peter, Earlier this week, Republicans in Ohio tried to make it more difficult to change the state’s constitution as part of a larger strategy to squash reproductive rights. Ohio voters headed to the polls and rejected their attempt. This is a HUGE victory, Peter, especially in a swing state like Ohio.

This is a reminder that we will not be silenced in the fight to protect abortion access.

Some of my Republican opponents have already voiced their support for a nationwide abortion ban, and classify themselves as staunchly pro-life.

**It’s not an exaggeration to say abortion is on the ballot again in PA-07.**

I won’t back down, though. I am more committed than ever to holding my seat in Congress and fighting for safe and legal abortion for all Americans.

clean_body: I am more committed than ever to holding my seat in Congress and fighting for safe and legal abortion for all Americans. | = | Peter, Earlier this week, Republicans in Ohio tried to make it more difficult to change the state’s constitution as part of a larger strategy to squash reproductive rights. Ohio voters headed to the polls and rejected their attempt. This is a HUGE victory, Peter, especially in a swing state like Ohio. This is a reminder that we will not be silenced in the fight to protect abortion access. Some of my Republican opponents have already voiced their support for a nationwide abortion ban, and classify themselves as staunchly pro-life. It’s not an exaggeration to say abortion is on the ballot again in PA-07. I won’t back down, though. I am more committed than ever to holding my seat in Congress and fighting for safe and legal abortion for all Americans. = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, Susan Wild | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. body:

---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67954967/421420457/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230811_bsc_emm_ff_20230811_f_voterpurge5_v1s1_ff_voterpurge5_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzVkNzViMC04NzM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=re4mKyXuLRzLJuL4zhDhL9EU4x-2GDkyhKDzyAiAEGg=&emci=675fa97b-8738-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=cc5d75b0-8738-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | Hi, I’m Tricia, a volunteer with Fair Fight. I’ve been pitching in however I can since Fair Fight was started — because voter suppression infuriates me, and because I want to do my part to make sure our democracy survives for our children and grandchildren. I wanted to share an update as we work to contact thousands of voters who are currently at risk of having their registrations purged by Brad Raffensperger. [_**More below, but if you’re able right now, will you please chip in to Fair Fight’s Prevent the Purge Fund, so volunteers like me can continue to reach impacted Georgia voters who may be at risk of losing their registrations now and in the future?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67954969/421420459/309034870?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230811_bsc_emm_ff_20230811_f_voterpurge5_v1s1_ff_voterpurge5_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzVkNzViMC04NzM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=re4mKyXuLRzLJuL4zhDhL9EU4x-2GDkyhKDzyAiAEGg=) Republican Secretary of State, Brad Raffensperger, plans to purge over 191,000 voters from the rolls after August 13, continuing Brian Kemp’s shameful tradition of purging hundreds of thousands of voters from the rolls between election cycles. They’re doing it yet again before the 2024 election In the past four years that I’ve been volunteering with Fair Fight, I’ve been able to witness first-hand the voter power we hold here in the South. Georgia voters made such a big impact during the 2020 and 2022 elections that these so-called leaders are scared — and doubling down on their efforts to silence us. I’ve also been able to witness first-hand how your support helps us volunteers turn out voters and get them the information they need to cast their ballots. **Take a look at the crucial messages we’re sending to voters impacted by this purge right now:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67954970/421420460/309034870?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230811_bsc_emm_ff_20230811_f_voterpurge5_v1s1_ff_voterpurge5_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzVkNzViMC04NzM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=re4mKyXuLRzLJuL4zhDhL9EU4x-2GDkyhKDzyAiAEGg=) **We have two days left to help voters save their registrations — and we still have more people we need to reach. Your support makes this crucial volunteer and voter mobilization work possible, and we couldn’t do this without you. ** [_**So, will you please make a donation to Fair Fight’s Prevent the Purge Fund today? Any amount you’re able to donate will help voters maintain their registrations before the August 13 deadline, and will help mitigate the impact of any future purges.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67954971/421420461/309034870?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230811_bsc_emm_ff_20230811_f_voterpurge5_v1s1_ff_voterpurge5_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzVkNzViMC04NzM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=re4mKyXuLRzLJuL4zhDhL9EU4x-2GDkyhKDzyAiAEGg=) Thanks for all your support! Tricia | [ DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67954972/421420462/309034870?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230811_bsc_emm_ff_20230811_f_voterpurge5_v1s1_ff_voterpurge5_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzVkNzViMC04NzM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=re4mKyXuLRzLJuL4zhDhL9EU4x-2GDkyhKDzyAiAEGg=)

clean_body: And we still have more people we need to reach. | | | Hi, I’m Tricia, a volunteer with Fair Fight. I’ve been pitching in however I can since Fair Fight was started — because voter suppression infuriates me, and because I want to do my part to make sure our democracy survives for our children and grandchildren. I wanted to share an update as we work to contact thousands of voters who are currently at risk of having their registrations purged by Brad Raffensperger. = Republican Secretary of State, Brad Raffensperger, plans to purge over 191,000 voters from the rolls after August 13, continuing Brian Kemp’s shameful tradition of purging hundreds of thousands of voters from the rolls between election cycles. They’re doing it yet again before the 2024 election In the past four years that I’ve been volunteering with Fair Fight, I’ve been able to witness first-hand the voter power we hold here in the South. Georgia voters made such a big impact during the 2020 and 2022 elections that these so-called leaders are scared — and doubling down on their efforts to silence us. I’ve also been able to witness first-hand how your support helps us volunteers turn out voters and get them the information they need to cast their ballots. Take a look at the crucial messages we’re sending to voters impacted by this purge right now: = We have two days left to help voters save their registrations — and we still have more people we need to reach. Your support makes this crucial volunteer and voter mobilization work possible, and we couldn’t do this without you. = Thanks for all your support! Tricia | = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: All workers should be able to join a union
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
All workers should be able to join a union — and hell yes, that includes every single Starbucks barista.
#
Peter,
All workers should be able to join a union — _and hell yes,_ that includes every single Starbucks barista.
This past weekend, I joined Starbucks Workers United out of Starbucks' Seattle corporate headquarters to amplify and embolden the collective work of the more than 8,500 workers at over 350 stores across 41 states who are fighting to unionize.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/44098?t=1&akid=2798%2E420207%2EdNCrok)
These workers have been fighting for their right to organize free from the union-busting tactics that Starbucks has been pushing for far too long.
While Starbucks claims to be a progressive company, they have consistently refused any good-faith negotiations with SBWU. Meanwhile, the federal government is currently processing more than 200 charges alleging over 1,300 violations — which would make Starbucks one of the _worst_ violators of labor law in modern U.S. history.1
The right to work in a safe, secure, and respectful workplace, a living wage, guaranteed hours, consistent scheduling, fairness in the workplace, benefits and more cannot be limited to manufacturing jobs.
**It's time for a change — and we are at the forefront of that change.** Right here in Washington state, a total of 28 Starbucks stores have filed for union elections and of that number, 25 stores have held union elections, 22 voted to join with SBWU, and just two stores rejected the union.
This fight is bringing inspiration to workers all across the country. Today and every day moving forward, I am honored to fight alongside the hardworking people of Washington. Together we will fight to usher in a new era of workers' rights and protections to ensure that everyone has the resources they need to live a fulfilling and productive life.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
* * *
1 - [Starbucks Solidarity At Strike Place Market Coporate HQ](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/44098?t=2&akid=2798%2E420207%2EdNCrok)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Madeleine Dean
subject: the results of our work

body:
Earlier this year I was appointed to the Regional Leadership Council, an initiative from Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries. We’re tasked with lifting up Democrats’ various legislative successes from the last few years and highlighting the on-the-ground implementation in our communities. **** Earlier this year I was appointed to the Regional Leadership Council, an initiative from Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries. We’re tasked with lifting up Democrats’ various legislative successes from the last few years and highlighting the on-the-ground implementation in our communities.

Peter, the legislation we passed in the last two Congresses addresses real needs and challenges faced by Americans nationwide, and I wanted to update you on investments from the _Inflation Reduction Act_ right here in the Keystone State:
* **$1.16 billion to install high-speed, affordable internet in rural and underserved communities** → This means over 276,000 homes and businesses will be connected – creating new jobs along the way.

* **Capping the cost of insulin at $35 per month for Medicare users → this provision, which passed in the previous Congress and commenced in 2023, is helping millions of Americans save money – including my constituents right here in Montgomery and Berks Counties.**

The anniversary of the _Inflation Reduction Act_ becoming law is coming up, and I want to hear from you. Show your support as we continue on-the-ground implementation – **[if you agree with House Democrats that we must invest in our communities and our infrastructure, instantly add your name to support our work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67955278/421421875/-885291906?amount=25&refcode=08112023_md_iraimplementation_en_1&refcode2=317e3811-8a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTdlMzgxMS04YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lV_itxiQ7d4_T24IJbALTT7Do6iWWRiCYrZ0r0QaMH8=)** | | [ **ADD YOUR NAME** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67955279/421421876/-885291906?amount=25&refcode=08112023_md_iraimplementation_en_1&refcode2=317e3811-8a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTdlMzgxMS04YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lV_itxiQ7d4_T24IJbALTT7Do6iWWRiCYrZ0r0QaMH8=)

– Madeleine
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67955280/421421878/-850630802?amount=25&refcode=08112023_md_iraimplementation_en_1&refcode2=317e3811-8a38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTdlMzgxMS04YTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lV_itxiQ7d4_T24IJbALTT7Do6iWWRiCYrZ0r0QaMH8=)

* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.**Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.**_

Fellow Conservative,

**$98 PER PERSON**
**As a former Navy SEAL** , I’m not intimidated by much. I’ve been around the world and fought on battlefields against enemy soldiers in hand-to-hand combat. As an aerial firefighter, **I’ve piloted planes through some of the most intense wildfires imaginable**.

While I’ve had some thrilling experiences, I’ve never feared the challenges that have been put before me - I assess each situation and determine how best to achieve the desired outcome with minimal harm to myself or to my team.

On June 27th I declared my candidacy to be the next U.S. Senator for Montana - it was the first time in longer than I can remember that my new day job didn’t involve the risk of serious injury or even death. But just because I’m not putting myself in harm’s way at present,**I’m still in the line of fire.**

In just a moment I’m going to ask you to **[chip in $9](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=767a27d683704eebbca8e74fad743014&_e=P-HG98HfzLtVpcjPGUNGwmPAxrj2GrMW4qmPS5tsvtFt2uQa3W2cHXBFLFibzo9EDGnGZQVEiszshekpqIM7c2Cx1E-eMslwJK9_MCC486bd62KXateockZ7W6a9AxLcOAF6WCIuBUn4UeQ_tp8gJY1ZGJrRFrjJcVN2FrB4FxICNnZNe0cg-OfiZqXBdHK_Qp0O7czZVJpcqQHB_P9_Np1_9m8qucyj9CdUO_AZJ9sez94NL1y5kDNJcrFjRvrGfnL1c0BNdyZyP6tMJPbhUhWGiOp11OLW9RSbyV58luXMfUU6frkVScRym4mXRoyFQwM0TDr_97qM8D5iYq9lTZnR0rDCDqZ5YfvdgLzfWiHmx8eKTYJx_RNyRhNXwPkl)** to help me hit my goal today of **raising $886** , but please continue reading to find out why I’m asking and why it’s important conservatives like you who care about this country get engaged in my race.

When I was deciding whether to challenge Jon Tester this spring, I did some digging to find out how much a U.S. Senate campaign costs and what I’d have to raise to be competitive against the last statewide elected Democrat. _**What I discovered shocked me. **_

**_OVER $70 MILLION WAS SPENT IN 2018 - AT THE TIME THE COSTLIEST FEDERAL RACE IN MONTANA’S HISTORY. CAMPAIGNS AND OUTSIDE SUPER PACS SPENT MORE THAN $98 PER PERSON TO INFLUENCE THEIR VOTE._ **
Given that my opponent has already raised $10 million this year,**the 2018 record won’t stand.**

While I’m not scared of the task ahead of me, **it is daunting to imagine raising the money I’ll need to successfully win this election.** By some estimates that sum will be more than $100 million dollars. **[[link to donate]](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=767a27d683704eebbca8e74fad743014&_e=P-HG98HfzLtVpcjPGUNGwmPAxrj2GrMW4qmPS5tsvtFt2uQa3W2cHXBFLFibzo9EDGnGZQVEiszshekpqIM7c2Cx1E-eMslwJK9_MCC486bd62KXateockZ7W6a9AxLcOAF6WCIuBUn4UeQ_tp8gJY1ZGJrRFrjJcVN2FrB4FxICNnZNe0cg-OfiZqXBdHK_Qp0O7czZVJpcqQHB_P9_Np1_9m8qucyj9CdUO_AZJ9snzgyvCBfqE68e0B6JYJijoije0lQQ6sZ1GkCAKWNVzfuzR0J4FDcYlNooYigAN9baVoFceAxbfCy3CJeoFEzhCqDI-mOlrfTq5j3ixiSxwm1aeEyC5lD3FmQzLXjCsTKXViqIJGtl8QhHWZ-ORS4f)**

I know we’re not going to raise the money we need all at once - or even in a year’s time. What I do know is that we will raise it. We’re setting goals each day - and **[if we continue to hit them, we’ll eventually get to where we need to be](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=767a27d683704eebbca8e74fad743014&_e=P-HG98HfzLtVpcjPGUNGwmPAxrj2GrMW4qmPS5tsvtFt2uQa3W2cHXBFLFibzo9EDGnGZQVEiszshekpqIM7c2Cx1E-eMslwJK9_MCC486bd62KXateockZ7W6a9AxLcOAF6WCIuBUn4UeQ_tp8gJY1ZGJrRFrjJcVN2FrB4FxICNnZNe0cg-OfiZqXBdHK_Qp0O7czZVJpcqQHB_P9_Np1_9m8qucyj9CdUO_AZJ9vFK312setpXunHxqF8WWWsrsPYPFl8Labcf38uDHLBLpEzzj-UUIm8b8pUPZ8mLyVlg4qFJMEjUq9E4lK5AQco0EzPJ6AW1hQjJCC82r4BbSMkzoLoVTQH0mlHE_so5cFp7T4hm5mLZGc3LYUX01Lj)**.

name: Josh Harder
subject: FWD: opposition memo
body:
He’s just as extreme as I thought. | | Peter, Did you see this? My team put together an opposition memo on our new Republican opponent and he’s just as extreme as I thought. **His record speaks for itself: apparently he supports defunding the police, because he’s actually done it! And he could be the one vote Kevin McCarthy needs to ban abortion nationwide. We can’t let him win.** [**Can you please rush in a donation to help us fight back and keep this seat blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67955968/421424471/1156059191?&refcode=E3700-20230811-OppositionKicker-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmI0NjlmMjAtOGMzOC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LBovaxpPaubluIaGFbbgno5yLr2X3YQY1ArJCvcveAQ=) More below on our new opponent! \- Josh **—FORWARDED MESSAGE—** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67955969/421424472/1156059191?&refcode=E3700-20230811-OppositionKicker-Header-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmI0NjlmMjAtOGMzOC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LBovaxpPaubluIaGFbbgno5yLr2X3YQY1ArJCvcveAQ=) Peter, As you know, Josh has a brand new Republican opponent. Kevin McCarthy even flew to our district to help launch his campaign. We need your help to fight back so we’ll leave a link for you to donate [**here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67955970/421424473/1156059191?&refcode=E3700-20230811-OppositionKicker-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmI0NjlmMjAtOGMzOC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LBovaxpPaubluIaGFbbgno5yLr2X3YQY1ArJCvcveAQ=). So who is the GOP’s new “top recruit” for Congress and hand-picked by Kevin McCarthy?
* He’s the mayor of Stockton, our biggest city
* He refused to answer a question about whether he would vote to restrict abortion rights
* He diverted money away from police and now the Stockton police department is short over 100 cops. Crime and homelessness have soared on his watch.

**He’s another GOP extremist like Kevin McCarthy and Marjorie Taylor Greene. We can’t let him be the one vote they need to ban abortion nationwide and reverse decades of hard-fought progress.** **[So will you please send in a donation right now to help us fight back against our new opponent and do everything it takes to keep this seat blue? clean_body: He’s just as extreme as I thought. | | Peter, Did you see this? My team put together an opposition memo on our new Republican opponent and he’s just as extreme as I thought. His record speaks for itself: apparently he supports defunding the police, because he’s actually done it! And he could be the one vote Kevin McCarthy needs to ban abortion nationwide. We can’t let him win. = More below on our new opponent! \- Josh —FORWARDED MESSAGE— = Peter, As you know, Josh has a brand new Republican opponent. Kevin McCarthy even flew to our district to help launch his campaign. We need your help to fight back so we’ll leave a link for you to donate =. So who is the GOP’s new “top recruit” for Congress and hand-picked by Kevin McCarthy? He’s the mayor of Stockton, our biggest city He refused to answer a question about whether he would vote to restrict abortion rights He diverted money away from police and now the Stockton police department is short over 100 cops. Crime and homelessness have soared on his watch. He’s another GOP extremist like Kevin McCarthy and Marjorie Taylor Greene. We can’t let him be the one vote they need to ban abortion nationwide and reverse decades of hard-fought progress. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- \- Team Harder

name: Tiernan Donohue
subject: I have to call on the team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
I know this team is ready to face any challenge, but...
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=435%2E552475%2E3NFhHU)
Hi Peter, it's Tiernan, Bob's campaign manager.
I know this team is ready to face any challenge from now until Election Day. **But with Mitch McConnell “aggressively recruiting” a self-funding mega-millionaire to enter the race to flip PA red, it's clear that we could be facing our toughest challenge to date.**
[**I'm asking everyone: Can you pitch in any amount toward our $45,000 mid-quarter goal so we can take on new GOP spending?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230811-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230811-1&refcode2=435_552475_3NFhHU&akid=435%2E552475%2E3NFhHU)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230811-1?refcode=em20230811-1&refcode2=435_552475_3NFhHU&akid=435%2E552475%2E3NFhHU)**
We know that this election will take all of us working together to compete against the millions of dollars that national Republicans, Mitch McConnell, and their favored mega-millionaire candidate could easily spend against us.
But we're building this campaign one grassroots supporter at a time -- and with all of us coming together, we'll be able to fight back.
Pennsylvania deserves someone in the Senate fighting for all of us. That's why we're working so hard to re-elect Bob and defend our Senate majority.
[**So please, Peter, support Bob Casey's campaign for Senate with a contribution today. If we can reach our $45,000 goal, we'll be able to stand up to the GOP and make sure they can't buy this Senate seat.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230811-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230811-1&refcode2=435_552475_3NFhHU&akid=435%2E552475%2E3NFhHU)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230811-1?refcode=em20230811-1&refcode2=435_552475_3NFhHU&akid=435%2E552475%2E3NFhHU)**
We couldn't do this without you — so thanks for being on the team.
Tiernan
Campaign Manager, Bob Casey for Senate

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=435%2E552475%2E3NFhHU)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=435%2E552475%2E3NFhHU)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Sign The Petition: Stop merciless trophy hunters from slaughtering bear cubs
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1924924?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **Friend, innocent grizzly bears and bear cubs are being brutally slaughtered by vicious trophy hunters — and in several states, it’s completely legal.[Will you do something to stop the violent massacre of these helpless animals?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1924925?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** The bloody carcass of a mangled grizzly bear was found _**just 14 miles outside of Yellowstone**_ , and the helpless creature likely suffered unimaginable pain. These animals are completely defenseless and don’t understand the concept of state boundaries, so as soon as they set just a single furry paw across the park’s borders, _**they are fair game to be murdered violently by ruthless hunters.**_ It’s no secret that corrupt politicians are in bed with the hunting lobby and Big Polluters. The Trump administration already gave trophy hunters a massive handout by scaling back critical Endangered Species Act Protections that kept bear cubs safe from being slayed inside their dens while sleeping. While precious bears and bear cubs are being **mercilessly brutalized by trophy hunters** , the GOP is still working overtime to _**REMOVE**_ any remaining safeguards that these iconic animals have left. And now, the Biden administration just proposed its new revisions to the Endangered Species Act. Unfortunately, these revisions _do NOT go far enough_ to restore life-saving ESA protections and still leave _**harmful portions of the Trump-era regulations**_ in place. We MUST respond immediately by demanding ESA protections for grizzly bears before they are WIPED OUT forever – _**but the Biden administration is only hearing public comments until August 21, so we need activists like you to SPEAK UP NOW.**_ [**Can these treasured animals count on your voice today, Friend? Sign our petition now to help defend grizzly bears from cruel trophy hunters before it’s too late >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1924926?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1924927?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
When trophy hunters set out to **kill harmless grizzly bears** , they use _horrific and inhumane_ methods. They will set out bait to lure hungry mama bears in, then _**choke them to death**_ using neck snares or fire rounds of lead bullets, mutilating their bodies. Back at the den, orphaned bear cubs will wait for their mama’s return. Too weak to survive on their own, they will likely _**STARVE TO DEATH**_ or _**DIE OF HYPOTHERMIA**_.
Animals like grizzlies that are highly vulnerable to extinction cannot afford any scalebacks to the ESA, which is a critical tool that we have to fight the global extinction and biodiversity crisis, Friend.
The federal government has a responsibility to protect vulnerable keystone species like grizzly bears against dangerous threats like vicious trophy hunters. But if we’re going to persuade the Biden administration to take bold action, we need environmentalists like you to step up in defense of these treasured mammals. **If we can get 4,983 more signatures by 11:59 P.M., it will send a strong message that the public DEMANDS stronger ESA protections for one of the nation’s most cherished animals.** [**Please, Friend, time is running out to save the last remaining grizzly bears from gruesome deaths at the hands of trophy hunters. Add your name right now >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1924928?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1924927?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for speaking up,
Friends of the Earth**

clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | Friend, innocent grizzly bears and bear cubs are being brutally slaughtered by vicious trophy hunters — and in several states, it’s completely legal.== The bloody carcass of a mangled grizzly bear was found just 14 miles outside of Yellowstone , and the helpless creature likely suffered unimaginable pain. These animals are completely defenseless and don’t understand the concept of state boundaries, so as soon as they set just a single furry paw across the park’s borders, they are fair game to be murdered violently by ruthless hunters. It’s no secret that corrupt politicians are in bed with the hunting lobby and Big Polluters. The Trump administration already gave trophy hunters a massive handout by scaling back critical Endangered Species Act Protections that kept bear cubs safe from being slayed inside their dens while sleeping. While precious bears and bear cubs are being mercilessly brutalized by trophy hunters , the GOP is still working overtime to REMOVE any remaining safeguards that these iconic animals have left. And now, the Biden administration just proposed its new revisions to the Endangered Species Act. Unfortunately, these revisions do NOT go far enough to restore life-saving ESA protections and still leave harmful portions of the Trump-era regulations in place. We MUST respond immediately by demanding ESA protections for grizzly bears before they are WIPED OUT forever – but the Biden administration is only hearing public comments until August 21, so we need activists like you to SPEAK UP NOW. == | == When trophy hunters set out to kill harmless grizzly bears , they use horrific and inhumane methods. They will set out bait to lure hungry mama bears in, then choke them to death using neck snares or fire rounds of lead bullets, mutilating their bodies. Back at the den, orphaned bear cubs will wait for their mama’s return. Too weak to survive on their own, they will likely STARVE TO DEATH or DIE OF HYPOTHERMIA. Animals like grizzlies that are highly vulnerable to extinction cannot afford any scalebacks to the ESA, which is a critical tool that we have to fight the global extinction and biodiversity crisis, Friend. The federal government has a responsibility to protect vulnerable keystone species like grizzly bears against dangerous threats like vicious trophy hunters. But if we’re going to persuade the Biden administration to take bold action, we need environmentalists like you to step up in defense of these treasured mammals. If we can get 4,983 more signatures by 11:59 P.M., it will send a strong message that the public DEMANDS stronger ESA protections for one of the nation’s most cherished animals. == == Thank you for speaking up, Friends of the Earth == == == | == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == == ==

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Timing is Everything
body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-agiyhl-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agiyhl-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Friday![_Our prayers are with our members in Maui._](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agiyhl-trhiujldw-y/)**
**A Terrible Deal** Republicans online**[torched Biden's $6 billion deal](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agiyhl-trhiujldw-j/) **to free American hostages from the Iranian regime. **Timing is Everything** Special Counsel Jack Smith**[has picked a date](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agiyhl-trhiujldw-t/) **to begin former President Donald Trump's trial. **FBI is Targeting Catholics** FBI documents show proof that several field offices contributed to a memo that**[targeted traditionalist Catholics as "potential terrorists".](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agiyhl-trhiujldw-i/)** **MSM Ignores Gold Star Families** All three evening news networks **[thumbed their nose at the Gold Star families](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agiyhl-trhiujldw-d/)** that testified before Congress this week.

**Bidenomics is NOT Working** The Consumer Price Index, a broad measure of the prices of everyday goods like energy and food, **[increased 3.2% on an annual basis in July](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agiyhl-trhiujldw-h/)**, compared to 3.0% in June. Meanwhile, the **[WH dismisses polling](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agiyhl-trhiujldw-k/)** that Bidenomics isn't popular with Americans. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agiyhl-trhiujldw-u/)!**
* That's **[exactly](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agiyhl-trhiujldw-p/)** what it stands for.
* **[Stay cool](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agiyhl-trhiujldw-x/)** , folks.
* Don't fall in **[love](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agiyhl-trhiujldw-m/)**!
* No, **[it isn't.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agiyhl-trhiujldw-c/)**

clean_body: Republicans across the nation are working tirelessly to keep control of the Virginia House. We’re calling on all of our grassroots donors to help Democrats flip control. | | | | | The results of this November's elections in Virginia will determine the path our country takes for years to come. That’s why Hillary Clinton is calling on grassroots Democrats, including you, to make a difference: For the past two years, our Democratic majority in the state Senate has acted as a barrier against Virginia Republicans' dangerous agenda. But we risk losing this essential check on GOP power if Democrats are defeated this November. Virginia Republicans have already rolled back voting rights, and their proposed budget favors tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy. If the GOP flips the state Senate and keeps control of the House, abortion rights could be first up on the chopping block. Their far-right governor has already endorsed plans to threaten abortion doctors with jail time – it's horrible. The stakes are high, and we cannot afford to lose. This team has stepped up time and time again to help drive our mission forward, so we know you'll come through this year, too. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you for everything. subject: we deserve transparency from Bob Ferguson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet
body:
| | Bob Ferguson has decided to bypass both contribution limits and campaign disclosure in his quest to occupy the Governor’s mansion. He carefully timed his transfers of OVER A MILLION DOLLARS to ensure he could move the money before our state’s strict disclosure rules closed a loophole in the rules.

[Mark is calling for transparency from the Ferguson campaign. Will you join him by signing our petition today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67956257/421425641/345146823?contactdata=m0xcVlszsh0xQoUTfs1ca6U83Q/BAUJg2ugIgxgSwlPbXTkt2+CFUSoKaV3htlR51N0FikcrnOvcfqZHCKJZOmmxF+1vNo5xUrnDsFXhrhdHNDnRUgGsTRxwmbMeXvvZfG3YsAfmnfflDmcWYTzidA==&source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_230811_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWUwNDc4NC04ZTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g9uTx4WiJyp4abzztKYPD9Fk7qdRSn3xHsUy4S6Cdws=&emci=38f0d2b9-8338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=15e04784-8e38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167)

– Liz

* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67956258/421425642/345146823?contactdata=m0xcVlszsh0xQoUTfs1ca6U83Q/BAUJg2ugIgxgSwlPbXTkt2+CFUSoKaV3htlR51N0FikcrnOvcfqZHCKJZOmmxF+1vNo5xUrnDsFXhrhdHNDnRUgGsTRxwmbMeXvvZfG3YsAfmnfflDmcWYTzidA==&source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_230811_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWUwNDc4NC04ZTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g9uTx4WiJyp4abzztKYPD9Fk7qdRSn3xHsUy4S6Cdws=&emci=38f0d2b9-8338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=15e04784-8e38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167)
Another round of fundraising reports was just released to the public, and once again Bob Ferguson failed to disclose the donors behind _more than $1 million in contributions to his campaign for Governor._

[I believe Ferguson needs to follow the same disclosure rules as everyone else – and _The Seattle Times_ agrees with me – so I’m asking you to sign my petition calling on Ferguson to reveal his secret donors »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67956259/421425643/345146823?contactdata=m0xcVlszsh0xQoUTfs1ca6U83Q/BAUJg2ugIgxgSwlPbXTkt2+CFUSoKaV3htlR51N0FikcrnOvcfqZHCKJZOmmxF+1vNo5xUrnDsFXhrhdHNDnRUgGsTRxwmbMeXvvZfG3YsAfmnfflDmcWYTzidA==&source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_230811_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWUwNDc4NC04ZTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g9uTx4WiJyp4abzztKYPD9Fk7qdRSn3xHsUy4S6Cdws=&emci=38f0d2b9-8338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=15e04784-8e38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67956260/421425644/345146823?contactdata=m0xcVlszsh0xQoUTfs1ca6U83Q/BAUJg2ugIgxgSwlPbXTkt2+CFUSoKaV3htlR51N0FikcrnOvcfqZHCKJZOmmxF+1vNo5xUrnDsFXhrhdHNDnRUgGsTRxwmbMeXvvZfG3YsAfmnfflDmcWYTzidA==&source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_230811_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWUwNDc4NC04ZTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g9uTx4WiJyp4abzztKYPD9Fk7qdRSn3xHsUy4S6Cdws=&emci=38f0d2b9-8338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=15e04784-8e38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167)**

This isn’t inside baseball nit-picking.

**Contribution limits keep elections fair, and I firmly believe our democracy depends on voters knowing exactly who their elected officials might be beholden to.**

So it’s more than a little concerning when a candidate for Governor knowingly bypasses both contribution limits and campaign disclosure rules.

__I’m committed to disclosing our campaign donors and respecting our campaign finance rules.__

A formal complaint has already been filed so Washingtonians learn who is funding Ferguson’s campaign, so I need to know that you stand with us in demanding transparency.

[Add your name here »:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67956261/421425645/345146823?contactdata=m0xcVlszsh0xQoUTfs1ca6U83Q/BAUJg2ugIgxgSwlPbXTkt2+CFUSoKaV3htlR51N0FikcrnOvcfqZHCKJZOmmxF+1vNo5xUrnDsFXhrhdHNDnRUgGsTRxwmbMeXvvZfG3YsAfmnfflDmcWYTzidA==&source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_230811_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWUwNDc4NC04ZTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g9uTx4WiJyp4abzztKYPD9Fk7qdRSn3xHsUy4S6Cdws=&emci=38f0d2b9-8338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=15e04784-8e38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167) [https://secure.ngpvan.com/I7-oCMni90itSKOUOVX4Qg2](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67956262/421425646/345146823?contactdata=m0xcVlszsh0xQoUTfs1ca6U83Q/BAUJg2ugIgxgSwlPbXTkt2+CFUSoKaV3htlR51N0FikcrnOvcfqZHCKJZOmmxF+1vNo5xUrnDsFXhrhdHNDnRUgGsTRxwmbMeXvvZfG3YsAfmnfflDmcWYTzidA==&source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_230811_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWUwNDc4NC04ZTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g9uTx4WiJyp4abzztKYPD9Fk7qdRSn3xHsUy4S6Cdws=&emci=38f0d2b9-8338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=15e04784-8e38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167)

Mark

clean_body: | | Bob Ferguson has decided to bypass both contribution limits and campaign disclosure in his quest to occupy the Governor’s mansion. He carefully timed his transfers of OVER A MILLION DOLLARS to ensure he could move the money before our state’s strict disclosure rules closed a loophole in the rules. – Liz Another round of fundraising reports was just released to the public, and once again Bob Ferguson failed to disclose the donors behind more than $1 million in contributions to his campaign for Governor. | | This isn’t inside baseball nit-picking. Contribution limits keep elections fair, and I firmly believe our democracy depends on voters knowing exactly who their elected officials might be beholden to. So it’s more than a little concerning when a candidate for Governor knowingly bypasses both contribution limits and campaign disclosure rules. I’m committed to disclosing our campaign donors and respecting our campaign finance rules. A formal complaint has already been filed so Washingtonians learn who is funding Ferguson’s campaign, so I need to know that you stand with us in demanding transparency. Thanks for being with us, Mark | Mark Mullet is running for Governor to make Washington safe, affordable and prosperous. | | ---|---|--- | = Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet Elect Mark Mullet 401 2nd Ave S Ste 303 Seattle, WA 98104 United States

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Celebrating the Inflation Reduction Act a year later
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67956283/421425781/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20230811_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWVlNWRlOS04ZTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a7lZGxS3amEyDVdqt21n7tF3VWLr67hGO5bAQtwCEFA=&emci=04ee5de9-8e38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=05ee5de9-8e38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=252045)
---
Friends, A year ago this week, we passed the _Inflation Reduction Act_ in the Senate. This critical policy is the largest climate investment in U.S. history — with ten times more climate impact than any other piece of legislation. We are already seeing the _Inflation Reduction Act_ ’s impact with advancements in clean energy, lower costs, and investments in good-paying jobs. Earlier this week, President Joe Biden came to New Mexico, and we visited a facility that this legislation made possible, the Arcosa Wind Tower Facility in Belén. This wind tower manufacturing location will provide hundreds of careers for New Mexicans and help build the middle class in our state. We are also welcoming the Maxeon Solar Technologies Solar cell and module manufacturing facility to New Mexico, which is the second clean energy manufacturing facility to open since the _Inflation Reduction Act_ became law. **We are one incredible step closer to a clean energy future and an economy that works for all New Mexicans.** I was proud to help write this legislation that made these advancements a reality and celebrate just a few of our many achievements so far with President Biden. This is only the beginning. I look forward to championing more wins from the _Inflation Reduction Act_ in the months to come. Thank you, Martin | | | **Martin Heinrich is running for re-election to the U.S. Senate and fighting to keep the Senate blue.[Will you pitch in any amount to his campaign to help him and Senate Democrats continue their work to advance clean energy, protect our public lands and waters, strengthen our economy, and more?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67956284/421425782/248357794?refcode=AU_MTH_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20230811_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWVlNWRlOS04ZTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a7lZGxS3amEyDVdqt21n7tF3VWLr67hGO5bAQtwCEFA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67956285/421425783/248357794?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20230811_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWVlNWRlOS04ZTM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a7lZGxS3amEyDVdqt21n7tF3VWLr67hGO5bAQtwCEFA=)

clean_body: Friends, A year ago this week, we passed the Inflation Reduction Act in the Senate. This critical policy is the largest climate investment in U.S. history — with ten times more climate impact than any other piece of legislation. We are already seeing the Inflation Reduction Act ’s impact with advancements in clean energy, lower costs, and investments in good-paying jobs. Earlier this week, President Joe Biden came to New Mexico, and we visited a facility that this legislation made possible, the Arcosa Wind Tower Facility in Belén. This wind tower manufacturing location will provide hundreds of careers for New Mexicans and help build the middle class in our state. We are also welcoming the Maxeon Solar Technologies Solar cell and module manufacturing facility to New Mexico, which is the second clean energy manufacturing facility to open since the Inflation Reduction Act became law. We are one incredible step closer to a clean energy future and an economy that works for all New Mexicans. I was proud to help write this legislation that made these advancements a reality and celebrate just a few of our many achievements so far with President Biden. This is only the beginning. I look forward to championing more wins from the Inflation Reduction Act in the months to come. Thank you, Martin | | | Martin Heinrich is running for re-election to the U.S. Senate and fighting to keep the Senate blue.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. subject: One of the most concerning polls I’ve ever seen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Friend, I’ve read just about a million polls in my life, and very few have terrified me quite like this one: [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_rosen?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5 [http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_rosen?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5]
That’s right: Sen. Jacky Rosen is TWO POINTS DOWN in Nevada’s battleground Senate race – a race that analysts at FiveThirtyEight report is likely to decide Senate control.
But this poll shouldn’t be shocking. Mitch McConnell and his GOP cronies are all in on Jacky as a TOP target for defeat. They’ve already been coming after her with vicious attack ads, and this is only the beginning.
So ahead of Jacky’s midnight fundraising deadline, I’m begging you to pitch in a split donation of $5 -- or whatever you can spare -- to Jacky's and Kirsten Gillibrand's campaign to make sure she has enough resources to keep both Nevada and the Senate blue. [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_rosen?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5]
Last year, McConnell and his cronies FLOODED Nevada’s Senate race with $55 MILLION – and they came within less than a percentage point of winning.
As Republicans gear up to spend even more this time around, I can’t believe that grassroots Democrats would just sit by and let Jacky Rosen lose to McConnell’s handpicked puppet candidate!
So please, Jacky needs your immediate grassroots support. She still needs to raise another $8,617 by midnight tonight to fight back against the GOP’s attacks and close this polling gap, but there’s not much time left. Will you rush a split donation of $5 or more now to make sure Jacky wins in Nevada and defends our Democratic Senate majority? [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_rosen?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Jacky Rosen and Kirsten Gillibrand:

Thank you,
James Carville

body:
We have to build off of our momentum from the August special election to ensure we protect abortion access for all Ohioans. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67956429/421426633/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTA2OTY1OS05MDM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0_7lS51-M_nUa_uPirkds5tMXusj_z7tA2p98enKXs=&emci=d7853316-7038-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fe069659-9038-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) | Team, we’re not done with Ohio yet: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67956430/421426634/-1644345685?&refcode=E3708-20230811-Pivot-Image-AbortionReproRights&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTA2OTY1OS05MDM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0_7lS51-M_nUa_uPirkds5tMXusj_z7tA2p98enKXs=) After this week’s MAJOR victory, we’re already pivoting to our biggest fight of the year. **This is the ONLY ballot measure to protect abortions this November, and we need to ramp up our efforts fast to ensure we keep up our proven track record for codifying _Roe_ around the country. [Will you help us get battle ready by chipping in today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67956431/421426635/-1644345685?&refcode=E3708-20230811-Pivot-SL-AbortionReproRights&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTA2OTY1OS05MDM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0_7lS51-M_nUa_uPirkds5tMXusj_z7tA2p98enKXs=)** [LET'S GET TO WORK!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67956432/421426636/-1644345685?&refcode=E3708-20230811-Pivot-Sb-AbortionReproRights&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTA2OTY1OS05MDM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0_7lS51-M_nUa_uPirkds5tMXusj_z7tA2p98enKXs=) Make no mistake, friend, the dirty tricks that put Issue 1 on the ballot are still in play. Our opponent’s goal with this special election was to put up as many smoke and mirrors as possible to distract voters from what’s really at stake in November. We thwarted their scheme in August, but we cannot let up now. _That’s why we have to keep up our momentum and ensure voters stay engaged and ready to protect reproductive freedom._ **[We have less than three months left to get the job done. Can you help us pivot fast to our next fight in Ohio and chip in today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67956433/421426637/-1644345685?&refcode=E3708-20230811-Pivot-SL-AbortionReproRights&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTA2OTY1OS05MDM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0_7lS51-M_nUa_uPirkds5tMXusj_z7tA2p98enKXs=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately:_ | **[$15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67956434/421426638/489265350?express_lane=true&&refcode=E3708-20230811-Pivot-EG-AbortionReproRights&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTA2OTY1OS05MDM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0_7lS51-M_nUa_uPirkds5tMXusj_z7tA2p98enKXs=)** | **[$25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67956435/421426639/489265350?express_lane=true&&refcode=E3708-20230811-Pivot-EG-AbortionReproRights&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTA2OTY1OS05MDM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0_7lS51-M_nUa_uPirkds5tMXusj_z7tA2p98enKXs=)**

This is the ONLY ballot measure to protect abortions this November, and we need to ramp up our efforts fast to ensure we keep up our proven track record for codifying Roe around the country. = = Make no mistake, friend, the dirty tricks that put Issue 1 on the ballot are still in play. Our opponent’s goal with this special election was to put up as many smoke and mirrors as possible to distract voters from what’s really at stake in November. We thwarted their scheme in August, but we cannot let up now. That’s why we have to keep up our momentum and ensure voters stay engaged and ready to protect reproductive freedom. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, team. [Here’s the problem: Brandon has until Sunday to raise $30,000 online, and right now he’s NOWHERE near close. What are you waiting for?! He doesn't waste his time with partisan games. No matter who you are or where you're from, he has your back. He's in this race to build a better Mississippi and root out corruption from every inch of the state. That’s a real leader in my book.

Now, Tate Reeves? He's a total clown who is only interested in lining his pockets, not fighting for everyday people. **But the man is swimming in stacks of cash from his special interest buddies and rich friends.**

That's why Brandon needs your help now more than ever to crush this goal, fund every voter outreach resource he can find, and send Tate Reeves packing.

clean_body: Brandon NEEDS you out there! | = = Listen up, Peter! I wouldn't be emailing you if it weren't important. Brandon Presley is now the official Democratic nominee for Mississippi governor. Do you know what that means? It means he can’t afford to miss A SINGLE fundraising goal from now through November if we want to send Tate Reeves packing. = Look, Mississippi has a chance to elect a real winner. I've been around the block more than a few times to know one when I see one. And Brandon's got it. He is the Democrat that can win statewide in Mississippi. He doesn't waste his time with partisan games. No matter who you are or where you're from, he has your back. He's in this race to build a better Mississippi and root out corruption from every inch of the state. That’s a real leader in my book. Now, Tate Reeves? He's a total clown who is only interested in lining his pockets, not fighting for everyday people. But the man is swimming in stacks of cash from his special interest buddies and rich friends. That's why Brandon needs your help now more than ever to crush this goal, fund every voter outreach resource he can find, and send Tate Reeves packing. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = James Carville | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. subject: did you see what Ted Cruz said about this race?
