body:
BREAKING: Ted Cruz worried 2024 race will be a "firefight"
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/74758/images/cruz.png]
Maybe it's his relentless attacks on our fundamental rights. Or his loyalty to Trump, even as he spewed lies, pushed conspiracy theories and cheered on the mob on Jan. 6. Or the fact that he abandoned our state and flew to Cancun during a deadly winter storm.
There are a lot of reasons to vote against Ted Cruz – and he knows it .
Polling showed more Texans disapprove of the job he's doing than support him, and CNN ranks him as one of the most vulnerable incumbent senators on the ballot next year. He's already calling this race a "firefight" and launching lie-filled attacks against Colin Allred.
We're not scared of Ted Cruz, but we know failing to fight back against his lies could doom our campaign before it even gets off the ground. We have a real chance to defeat Cruz, but only if we have the money we need to compete. So we set a rapid-response goal to raise $250,000 by midnight, and we're urgently asking for your help, friend:
Please, rush $5, $10, or any amount you can spare to split between our campaign and Serve America so that we can compete with Ted Cruz's massive war chest. Every dollar will go toward our fight to flip Texas blue and expand Democrats' Senate majority. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thanks for giving what you can to help us defeat Ted Cruz! Together, we can hold him accountable, flip Texas blue and defend the Senate.

name: David Hogg, Leaders We Deserve
subject: Badass young people have a habit of being underestimated
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Their Future PAC
body:
| | | Hey — it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives.

The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain.

But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans.

**That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve** — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future.

**_[We can’t do this without you by our side. Will you become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Their Future PAC today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yWqaAipSuLnSvVaNc1k1n-L5Q7FL_A_rYYIYrPP6hZKSpM1FZVLvn_mipnF5n7KFpnFWuOGwpdGNy3X4MjVes04yMr107d7372bRJ67g17u_2e8S-DRZ-ItlmQn6RuevX_13DndGcRhL4dQbOJggD1kbyvLLBkFxc6mEvMP1ESNCbCGDT4CIH-UjET72z2fIysQg71G9l2EOSAFqUm0yQmt_qgSGCBnYR3KxoBfEOJRkANlj6ON_dCk4Zuhk-xoEi5tEWB6y35iuvYTl-vNCOKhKaJ2SO-Y9coYDZKAnMfL20YhFgqbSbPqgVeF9BDL7xf6RKxEWV0oN6HXtOHQUsl8X128GkmxCH1We5NFvGLoaAkErqmq8X3NqwrQCV0Kb0/3yn/BANILGSgQ4uafX3IsgCW2g/h0/Ap_ZsxZUV3XNIXSWyWi17zdAbZPiuJwG0XV-sRmvjXk)_**

I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change.

It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats.

Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office.

**Let’s prove them wrong.**

**_[That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you become a Founding Donor to Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation with Their Future PAC today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yWqaAipSuLnSvVaNc1k1n-L5Q7FL_A_rYYIYrPP6hZKSpM1FZVLvn_mipnF5n7KFpnFWuOGwpdGNy3X4MjVes04yMr107d7372bRJ67g17u_2e8S-DRZ-ItlmQn6RuevUfhZ3gPt7Kq76jjVanQD8Rm2TeMF5scKQQxv_NKhRr8QeHImALCRNyO7r2quQk-vw-63fZJl8VoIIIIyYUt8UXisKBOwGmQEnvxAtWg_uwNO7bzbv5ZcZA80ISW-Z-ptmx-aoeDN5KrNq4LEA0kIgvgdSZCFhggAqW-Uk_TMMG_siHRCr2GEuXfAiHIsCr0Iak4JtUtiVlx7wI45GecZEBLEyexRqdwP4dKIw4SSRS82ZZnastA8QpFuPPABF5PgI/3yn/BANILGSgQ4uafX3IsgCW2g/h1/wtL0LiuG5gOTT1jsdMWuwDZjKnW032EW8AfjmQpEqKI)_**

Let's do this,

David Hogg
Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve

---

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zKMyJxzQ4bKAUZ6TCs94LCsp1duozFuMMPrhq3Yf_-WP5nnWGdMjNWxqO7vz8Sxtq1zt08I4GQR2x2qL4-0th5EDZVIhwxEuCFCgHQIFT8o3fDn-oHJ-EYmg0pIs6BMOCVff34XdVo3XFUVF9Ls9YerROvPGy-SMKyN12L4Q4gtg7xEGCQFaZS_srVnIXISSp8hBsVfBqxOt2y7VI1aw37QumbAcbYsI6ziUIwY65PJg6XTJNYSJpPEWXDY4DJHdwkLT9TdGqv72xZJC70vpbEyVanSgnjjsI-yi1ld5MVbgm5-JhRYlEcu1pcd9j6b0o6CD1zbOSXVMz_-jeqrQb8UdV5HvfgEsxncAO5od2CfOIDyQd79HXBl1R0_H-Ekbg/3yn/BANILGSgQ4uafX3IsgCW2g/h2/Z4BjoFLUzkgu7lCCWGk-j6HDA7rpRw5Lvot25xghI0M)

name: Kathleen Riebe
subject: No more relying on luck.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Riebe for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67956603/421427076/-1487052648?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDcxNTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjAzODVjOTgtOTEzOC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZENrJ_EShHUh15cM3xFTfq5i46JvK-JD_jyB4qCv-LI=&emci=46cadd6d-8c38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=f0385c98-9138-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=8062649)

| | Peter – Utah is a desert. The pioneers knew it, indigenous peoples knew it, and we know it too. When pioneers arrived in Utah and started to build dams and irrigate their farms with the flow of our beautiful streams and rivers, they never imagined we could run out of water. **But we got pretty close last year.** Lake Powell hit 22% capacity in 2022. That's almost low enough to halt electricity production, and approaching what they call "deadpool." Deadpool is just as bad as it sounds. The Great Salt Lake also reached record lows last year. You may have seen the dust clouds blowing off the lake bed. That dust contains arsenic, and is toxic; and with temperatures on the rise, the water level will continue to fall. **In 2022 the broader country, media, and world realized Utah does not have an endless supply of water. That's something my Republican colleagues are still figuring out.** Fortunately for all of us, we got lucky: this winter brought 160% of the normal amount of snowfall – great for winter sports, and even better for our water levels. But, Peter, "luck" isn't a sound basis for our water policy. **The fact is: we are still running out of water. Since Lake Powell's peak in July, we've already lost 3 feet of water to evaporation and controlled release. And the Great Salt Lake? 50% of its lake bed is still exposed.** For too long, our leaders have treated water like an endless resource and failed to manage it properly, and working people, family farms, and our state's beautiful environment have suffered. **So here is my priority when I get to Congress: Bring common sense to water management. No more proposals based on lake beds that are already dry, no more pipelines to nowhere, and no more relying on luck to ensure our friends and family in drier parts of the state have drinking water.** We need someone who cares about Utah and who will have the right priorities to serve Utah. And I can tell you today, the extremist GOP candidates running against me do not have the right priorities. **[Join our grassroots movement today and let's keep the water flowing in Utah with common sense and the right priorities.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67956604/421427077/-1280499633?refcode=2023-08-11-water-nonop&recurring=0&amount=10&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=f0385c98-9138-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDcxNTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjAzODVjOTgtOTEzOC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZENrJ_EShHUh15cM3xFTfq5i46JvK-JD_jyB4qCv-LI=)** clean_body: | | | | Peter – Utah is a desert. The pioneers knew it, indigenous peoples knew it, and we know it too. When pioneers arrived in Utah and started to build dams and irrigate their farms with the flow of our beautiful streams and rivers, they never imagined we could run out of water. But we got pretty close last year. Lake Powell hit 22% capacity in 2022. That's almost low enough to halt electricity production, and approaching what they call "deadpool." Deadpool is just as bad as it sounds. The Great Salt Lake also reached record lows last year. You may have seen the dust clouds blowing off the lake bed. That dust contains arsenic, and is toxic; and with temperatures on the rise, the water level will continue to fall. In 2022 the broader country, media, and world realized Utah does not have an endless supply of water. That's something my Republican colleagues are still figuring out. Fortunately for all of us, we got lucky: this winter brought 160% of the normal amount of snowfall – great for winter sports, and even better for our water levels. But, Peter, "luck" isn't a sound basis for our water policy. The fact is: we are still running out of water. Since Lake Powell's peak in July, we've already lost 3 feet of water to evaporation and controlled release. And the Great Salt Lake? 50% of its lake bed is still exposed. For too long, our leaders have treated water like an endless resource and failed to manage it properly, and working people, family farms, and our state's beautiful environment have suffered. So here is my priority when I get to Congress: Bring common sense to water management. No more proposals based on lake beds that are already dry, no more pipelines to nowhere, and no more relying on luck to ensure our friends and family in drier parts of the state have drinking water. We need someone who cares about Utah and who will have the right priorities to serve Utah. And I can tell you today, the extremist GOP candidates running against me do not have the right priorities. = Kathleen | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for and authorized by Riebe for Congress. |

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: In the latest national polling, we’ve had the biggest bump. | | Fellow American, our message is working. Americans are HUNGRY for a purpose. That's why we've seen the largest bump this summer in polling. In fact, the latest national polling has me up SIX POINTS, and now statistically tied for second place. We're polling ahead of career politicians and the DC establishment. This is our chance, Fellow American. I'm running to revive our American national identity, but I need your help to make sure we stay on track. Washington doesn't like that we're bucking against what's expected from a candidate or a presidential campaign. I am not a career politician. I am not bought and sold by a Super PAC. I've invested my own money in this race because I believe America is on the brink and we must do something TODAY to change course. We don't have 20 years left. Some stand for incremental reform - I stand for revolution. | It's time for The Great Uprising to defeat The Great Reset. This isn't just an R vs. D question in 2023. It's a 1776 moment. Together, we'll win back the White House next November. body:

# LIVE from the 1st RNC Debate, “Debate Prep”...
Just announced:
“Delve into the core of American politics with Debate Prep, an exclusive 30-minute live call hosted by strategist and show host, Sean Spicer; seasoned journalist, Mark Halperin; and experienced former governor and presidential candidate, Scott Walker. Together, they will provide unparalleled insights into the first Republican presidential debate in Milwaukee, delivering a unique combination of expertise, analysis, and firsthand knowledge.
Scheduled to take place on **August 23 at 8 AM CT / 9 AM ET, and August 24 at 8 AM CT / 9 AM ET, “** Debate Prep” will offer listeners an in-depth understanding of the upcoming political showdown. The trio will harness their decades of experience, intelligence gathered from the campaigns, and personal insights to provide comprehensive expectations for the pivotal debate.
For a chance to attend the live call, participants can become VIPs on Sean Spicer’s Locals community at [seanspicer.locals.com](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e9dc7e7981&e=f6564bbe3b). Attendees will be selected at random from all VIPs before August 20.”
Very excited to be a part of this unique insight into what goes into a debate for the first GOP debate, the morning of and the morning after, both at 9a ET with Mark Halperin and Governor Scott Walker. Stay tuned for more to come for this election cycle, coming Monday!
| [Sign up here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=aaec5245bd&e=f6564bbe3b)

|

[Joe Biden refuses to provide security for Hunter’s lovechild ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f310301e96&e=f6564bbe3b)— via the Daily Mail

# "In times of market downturn and economic instability, I turn to the experts at Bishop Gold Group”
---
In the Joe Biden economy, the stock market and inflation have become serious concerns. I’ve begun working with Bishop Gold Group to put my money in a consistent asset, gold and silver.
Bishop Gold Group are trusted experts in the precious metals space, I urge you to call them and find out how they can help you diversify your assets.
If you go to the link: [bishopgoldgroup.com/Sean](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=73571ebd0e&e=f6564bbe3b), they’ll know I sent you.
Thanks to my friends at Bishop Gold Group for sponsoring this newsletter so I can continue to bring you content for free.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=2c72ff6ab5&e=f6564bbe3b)

Will Hurd's message of unity and common sense conservative principles is gaining traction, my friend! Did you catch this latest article from the San Antonio Express-News about Will and how he's standing out among the other 2024 presidential candidates? _**Folks are fed up with Trump and all of this baggage. People are looking for solutions, not more problems.**_

Will is the **ONLY** candidate who is willing to call out President Trump for his toxic and dangerous behavior and lay out a forward-thinking vision to voters.

clean_body: | | | | | Will Hurd's message of unity and common sense conservative principles is gaining traction, my friend! Did you catch this latest article from the San Antonio Express-News about Will and how he's standing out among the other 2024 presidential candidates? Folks are fed up with Trump and all of this baggage. People are looking for solutions, not more problems. Will is the ONLY candidate who is willing to call out President Trump for his toxic and dangerous behavior and lay out a forward-thinking vision to voters. America needs Will on the debate stage on August 23rd. Thank you,Natalie J. | | | | www.hurdforamerica.com | | |

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: the sad truth of public education in Texas:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter,

Students across Texas are headed back to school over the next week, and here’s how things are going: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67956715/421428042/189400067?source=EM_NBI_BW_20230811_PT_BackToSchool_0_3MO_DrBrianWilliams_na_na_Education&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzVmNTdmNzEtOTIzOC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=63ldzn_XTQPbC79uyp12O4FXtmMfaPvfo_m3H-7dA4E=&emci=e79171b2-8d38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=c5f57f71-9238-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=13153572) This is the sad truth of what’s happening to public education in Texas: underfunding, teacher shortages, converting libraries to detention centers and requiring armed personnel on every public school campus.

**Our kids deserve better than this.**

Our kids deserve fully funded schools.

Our kids deserve teachers that are paid what they deserve.

Our kids deserve libraries that are safe places to learn.

Our kids deserve to be safe at school _WITHOUT_ putting guns on our campuses.

[If you’re with me, Peter, will you add your name? We’re stronger when we stand together. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67956717/421428072/189400067?source=EM_NBI_BW_20230811_PT_BackToSchool_0_3MO_DrBrianWilliams_na_na_Education&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzVmNTdmNzEtOTIzOC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=63ldzn_XTQPbC79uyp12O4FXtmMfaPvfo_m3H-7dA4E=&emci=e79171b2-8d38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=c5f57f71-9238-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=13153572) | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67956722/421428077/189400067?source=EM_NBI_BW_20230811_PT_BackToSchool_0_3MO_DrBrianWilliams_na_na_Education&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzVmNTdmNzEtOTIzOC1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=63ldzn_XTQPbC79uyp12O4FXtmMfaPvfo_m3H-7dA4E=&emci=e79171b2-8d38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=c5f57f71-9238-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=13153572)

name: Will Hurd
subject: Hospital Security to Hollywood's Future
body:
Three things that need more attention.
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _Welcome to The Brief! Common sense takes on current events, national security, and technology and the latest campaign info. It’s designed to make you smarter in less than 5 minutes! If you were forwarded this message, you can get_[ _The Brief here_](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqjWE9AVSrhUQO3Hke6ErDEjay4/xoH4gN0Muly7) _._
---
| Dear Friends,
We live in complicated times. Unfortunately they are only getting more complicated:
* Hospitals are having to deal with a major issue on top of trying to provide the best care possible.
* The writers and actors strike is going to have an impact on more than when you are going to get to watch your favorite movie and show again.
* A major ally is trying to hedge its diplomatic efforts with one of our biggest adversaries.

Here are 3 things that haven’t gotten proper attention since we last talked that need common sense solutions.
---
| | [](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqjWE9AVvCPgqmPNfoMIgb3iKg8/M6XYklzvTEpV)
---
---
| | | | |
### 1\. HOSPITAL RANSOMWARE ATTACK
---

| | | | |
---
| Photo: Manchester Memorial Hospital in Connecticut
**Big Picture:** The FBI is investigating a [ransomware attack](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqjWE9AWNX7tHAlTaycMVysh4OC/kBs1b2E4wnyQ) that is affecting 16 hospitals and 166 outpatient centers across four states.
* Ransomware is a type of malicious software that encrypts files or locks users out of their systems, demanding a ransom payment in exchange for restoring access.

**Why It Matters:** This disruption forced many hospitals to divert patients and halt operations and is just one more example of how America's healthcare system is susceptible to cyber attacks that could lead to deaths.
* In 2020, a ransomware attack on a German hospital led to a fatality. The cyberattack disrupted emergency services, causing treatment delays, and spotlighted the grave risks of cyber threats to healthcare infrastructure.

**Bottom Line:** More than half of cyber attacks and data breaches can be prevented by ensuring software is up-to-date. Additionally, critical infrastructure, such as healthcare systems are increasingly becoming targets of cyber attacks.
* Keeping hospitals safe from ransomware is essential to ensure the continued delivery of vital medical services to the public. This is one reason why we need standardized cybersecurity protocols, a common set of best practices, to be shared across different sectors to reduce the number of attacks with which the American public has to grapple**.**

---

| | | | |
### 2\. WRITERS ON STRIKE
---

|
---
| Photo: SAG-AFTRA picket line in Los Angeles
**Big Picture:** Actors and writers are on strike as Hollywood grapples with a number of issues to include how AI will impact the movie business.
**Why It Matters:** These strikes are not only causing your favorite show or movie to get postponed. How they are resolved could be a bellwether for how your job could be affected by artificial intelligence.
**Bottom Line:** Whether you like Hollywood or not, there is a privacy issue at play that could affect you too.
* Watch a recent video I put out [here](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqjWE9AWprq5hZ7ZW8sQLMhfo6G/UP2Zv6ej-cel), to learn why you should care about whether a studio should be able to bring back Heath Ledger to play the Joker.

---

|
### 3\. PLAYING FOOTSIES
---
|
---
| Photo: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and Chinese President Xi Jinping **Big Picture:** Our most important ally in the middle east, Israel, is flirting with the idea of [getting China’s help](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqjWE9AXICYI7xTfRJ8UAkWeXoK/iVeTKTVE5tMG) to improve relations with Saudi Arabia.
**Why It Matters:** The fact that Israel is even exploring this possibility is a sign of how far America’s standing in the world has eroded, to include with our allies.
* The Chinese Communist Party’s (CCP) interest in playing a role in strengthening a bilateral relationship between Israel and Saudi Arabia is an example of how the CCP is trying to surpass the United States as the sole global superpower.

**Bottom Line:** The United States built a world order that benefits us. If we don’t defend that world order, then that will negatively affect us.
* U.S. foreign policy should be based on a commonsense principle. Our friends should love us and our enemies should fear us and we need leaders who understand this.

[Click here](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqjWE9AXkXGUYLplMTOY08LdHWO/jsiWmnitWjTc) to help us talk to more people and qualify for the debate stage. Even donating $1 helps!

---

| Thanks for subscribing and reading all the way to the end - I really appreciate you and I need your help getting the above perspectives onto the debate stage.
I need to have 40,000 individual donors by Aug 21 to meet the qualifications for the Republican Presidential debate debate. If you want to see me on that stage, then [click here and donate](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqjWE9AYCrygykBrHdebpWAc1ES/LsY51wqyIjgo). Investing even $1 helps me get to this goal!
Thank you! God bless America and don’t forget to [donate today!](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqjWE9AYfCgtP8XxCnufetzakwW/VI4IuGNmDcWW) Will Hurd
---

| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---

_If you need to remove yourself from our email list_[ _Unsubscribe_](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/un/sh/1vWzjx5yNBs97udchRPNbcEv2cheR2/ZcyIAkrlPXDR) _._
_Was this message forwarded to you?_[_**Sign up**_](https://75y20.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/sh/SwqjWE9AZ7XP5pWu37yAjUHoZUea/hHVSlc06cvJ4) _now to get The Brief in your email._
---

---|---

name: Rick Coplen
subject: The people have made their voices heard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen
body:
|
---
From last year’s decisive referendum vote in Kansas, to Ohio voters overwhelmingly rejecting Issue 1 this week, and the stories I hear from folks across PA-10 at every Listening Session and Meet & Greet, the people’s will is clear: we stand firmly against abortion bans.

As the son of an immigrant mother, husband to a strong woman, and the father of two young women, I have always believed and strongly advocated for equal rights for all. I will not stand for this assault on women's rights.

**Scott Perry cannot say the same. Time and time again, he has voted against measures to protect women’s bodily autonomy and expand access to reproductive health care.**

Our communities need a representative who will defend foundational rights and uphold the will of voters. In Congress, I’ll do just that.

[It’s time we federally codify reproductive freedom once and for all. If you agree, add your name here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67957226/421429487/-106193484?source=RC_EM_PT_WL_230811_1_1&refcode2=29fe0f4f-9338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&contactdata=VS3lsTVuoWrtYVqALBauBZWzPA5ZHZh01na6U5Ez26+r2BfHgaKd41tj1ss9Npg7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWZlMGY0Zi05MzM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-qN5rnuNpMVmc2wuQdPkop2daNuPsByESklUpmZP9lk=&emci=179e5346-9338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=29fe0f4f-9338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=24669367) | | **[PROTECT REPRODUCTIVE FREEDOM](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67957227/421429488/-106193484?source=RC_EM_PT_WL_230811_1_1&refcode2=29fe0f4f-9338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&contactdata=VS3lsTVuoWrtYVqALBauBZWzPA5ZHZh01na6U5Ez26+r2BfHgaKd41tj1ss9Npg7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWZlMGY0Zi05MzM4LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-qN5rnuNpMVmc2wuQdPkop2daNuPsByESklUpmZP9lk=&emci=179e5346-9338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=29fe0f4f-9338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=24669367)**

clean_body: | From last year’s decisive referendum vote in Kansas, to Ohio voters overwhelmingly rejecting Issue 1 this week, and the stories I hear from folks across PA-10 at every Listening Session and Meet & Greet, the people’s will is clear: we stand firmly against abortion bans. As the son of an immigrant mother, husband to a strong woman, and the father of two young women, I have always believed and strongly advocated for equal rights for all. I will not stand for this assault on women's rights. Scott Perry cannot say the same. Time and time again, he has voted against measures to protect women’s bodily autonomy and expand access to reproductive health care. Our communities need a representative who will defend foundational rights and uphold the will of voters. In Congress, I’ll do just that. | | Millions of women have lost control over their own bodies thanks to the extreme conservative Republicans who have turned the Supreme Court into the Extreme Court. Right-wing extremists have waged this war in the courts for decades, and they won’t stop until abortion, contraceptives, and other critical reproductive health care services are effectively banned. I’m ready to get to work to defend reproductive freedom as the fundamental right of privacy that it is. | Thanks for taking a stand. Rick | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen | =

clean_body: This is absolutely HUGE news: The latest poll shows that Adam Frisch is TIED with Lauren Boebert! POLL UPDATE: Adam Frisch TIED with Lauren Boebert! = This is absolutely HUGE news, folks: The latest poll shows that Adam Frisch is TIED with Lauren Boebert! Last November, Adam’s race against Lauren Boebert went to a recount – Boebert won by just 546 votes in the closest race in the country. But with the help of grassroots donors like you, we’ve been building a people-powered campaign against Boebert, and we can take the lead! Here’s the bad news, though: Lauren Boebert and her Super PACs are not going to go down without a fight. They’re going to spend millions and millions of dollars blanketing the state in attacks and lies – especially after this first poll proves that Boebert is still incredibly vulnerable. We’ve set a goal of raising $125,000 this week to counter the lies and hold Lauren Boebert accountable – but right now, we’re still short. There’s still time to hit our goal, but Adam is counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if he’s going to finally kick Lauren Boebert out of Congress: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We’ve got momentum on our side, but we can’t afford to lose any ground. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Hope to see you on the road soon
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=3355%2E5257348%2EwJthoA ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,
greetings from the road! I’m traveling across California all month to meet
with people from every corner of this great state.

My favorite part of campaigning is getting to meet people and understand
what’s on their minds. Hearing their challenges, their passions, what
brings them joy, and what motivates them to get involved – this is what I
LOVE to do!

Everywhere I go, I ask the same question: “How can I help?”

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em.G4DTRv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230811_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=3355%2E5257348%2EwJthoA ]Keep reading to learn what I’m hearing at these campaign stops, and if
you can, please chip in a few bucks at the end to keep us out on the road
in the weeks and months ahead!

I met with local leaders in Bakersfield for a Latino Business roundtable
hosted by Supervisor Leticia Perez and Vice Mayor Andrae Gonzales. It was
exciting to learn of all the growth and innovation taking place in Kern
County — and how I can be a good partner and champion for job growth in
the county.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em.G4DTRv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230811_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=3355%2E5257348%2EwJthoA ]Adam at the Latino Business Roundtable in Bakersfield, sitting around
the table with a group of local leaders

We wrapped up our visit to Kern County with a keynote address I gave at
the Kern County Dems Dorothy Donahoe Dinner! I came away from the event
absolutely inspired by the hard work of these folks, stepping up to serve
their community.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em.G4DTRv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230811_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=3355%2E5257348%2EwJthoA ]Black and white photo of Adam talking with people at the Kern County
Democratic Party

After that, we hosted a roundtable discussion in Fresno focused on
healthcare, where I met with hard-working people who want to see results
for their families and neighbors. Some of the issues facing the Central
Valley are unique and challenging, and others are truly universal — and
I’m deeply committed to being a champion for the region in these fights in
the Senate.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em.G4DTRv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230811_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=3355%2E5257348%2EwJthoA ]Adam shaking hands with someone in Fresno

After that, we drove further north to join the phenomenal Women Democrats
of Sacramento over the weekend! As Senator, I look forward to standing
alongside these trailblazers and fighting to restore reproductive rights,
reform the Supreme Court, and bring down the cost of housing.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em.G4DTRv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230811_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=3355%2E5257348%2EwJthoA ]Big crowd of people at the Women Democrats of Sacramento event

Then we returned to Los Angeles where I joined the Watts Community for a
roundtable. Housing costs, public safety concerns, food access issues, and
environmental injustice are only a few of the challenges they face, and I
was so grateful to meet with civic leaders to learn how I can help.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em.G4DTRv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230811_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=3355%2E5257348%2EwJthoA ]Adam Schiff with civic leaders in Watts Community

Shortly after that, I sat down with Council Member Arturo Flores, Latino
small business owners, and leaders in Walnut Park to hear their stories,
thoughts, and concerns — and what I can do to help.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em.G4DTRv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230811_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=3355%2E5257348%2EwJthoA ]Adam shaking hands with Council Member Arturo Flores

Then I headed back north to speak to the Nevada County Democrats and got
to see my good friend County Supervisor Heidi Hall.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em.G4DTRv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230811_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=3355%2E5257348%2EwJthoA ]Adam on stage in front of a screen that says Adam Schiff for Senate

And I wrapped up the week at the Nevada County Fair! If you get the
chance, you should definitely go — it’s the only fair I’ve seen that’s
surrounded by trees — highly recommended!

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em.G4DTRv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230811_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=3355%2E5257348%2EwJthoA ]Adam and a supporter at the Nevada County Fair

Derek, at each
stop on this tour, I’ve met incredible people who care deeply about their
community. I’ve listened to their stories and learned more about their
concerns. In the Senate, I can’t wait to work with these folks to make a
difference for everyone.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em.G4DTRv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230811_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=3355%2E5257348%2EwJthoA ] I’m keeping up this tour over the coming
weeks, and I’d appreciate your support so we can keep
meeting voters everywhere!

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=aug2023_abs_em.8485K-&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230811_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=3355%2E5257348%2EwJthoA ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=aug2023_abs_em.Bh8ABg&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230811_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1015&akid=3355%2E5257348%2EwJthoA ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=aug2023_abs_em.MFl7wu&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230811_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1016&akid=3355%2E5257348%2EwJthoA ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=aug2023_abs_em.7ISnDA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230811_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1017&akid=3355%2E5257348%2EwJthoA ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=aug2023_abs_em.VivNkH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230811_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1018&akid=3355%2E5257348%2EwJthoA ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em.G4DTRv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230811_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1019&akid=3355%2E5257348%2EwJthoA ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you for your support, and I hope I get to see you on the road.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em.G4DTRv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230811_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1020&akid=3355%2E5257348%2EwJthoA ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=aug2023_abs_em.D43vgP&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20230811_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1021&akid=3355%2E5257348%2EwJthoA ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=3355%2E5257348%2EwJthoA ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=3355%2E5257348%2EwJthoA ]Privacy Policy

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3355%2E5257348%2EwJthoA

name: Jane Fonda Climate PAC
subject: re: Hawaii
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
The climate crisis continues to wreak havoc on communities and planet-warming fossil fuels are the root of the problem.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67957875/421431344/-1917331050?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3MDUzYzM1LTk4MzgtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CG2RKQREMqmRSKdS5gwAZ1zFx4FXzyLe3cp6zjcKGmg=&emci=81613e2d-9838-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=97053c35-9838-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)
---
| **BREAKING NEWS: Hawaii declares _State Of Emergency_ as hurricane winds drive wildfires in Maui**
---
Hawaii declares a state of emergency in the wake of blazing wildfires causing rescues and evacuations on the island. The wildfires have been exacerbated due to hurricane-force winds.

The climate crisis continues to wreak havoc on communities and planet-warming fossil fuels are the root of the problem. Our planet is warming at an alarming rate causing climate emergencies like the one in Hawaii.

_**We cannot sit idly by – it’s time we show our support to the communities in Hawaii.**_

_**Will you contribute whatever you can to these relief efforts?**_ [_**Hawaii Community Foundation - Maui Strong Fund**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67957876/421431345/-387557724?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3MDUzYzM1LTk4MzgtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CG2RKQREMqmRSKdS5gwAZ1zFx4FXzyLe3cp6zjcKGmg=&emci=81613e2d-9838-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=97053c35-9838-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)
The Maui Strong Fund was created to provide community resilience with resources for disaster preparedness, response, and recovery. The fund is currently being used to support communities affected by the wildfires on Maui.

[_**Maui Mutual Aid Fund**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67957877/421431346/757098324?hosted_button_id=Y7J26SYUJFQU8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3MDUzYzM1LTk4MzgtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CG2RKQREMqmRSKdS5gwAZ1zFx4FXzyLe3cp6zjcKGmg=&emci=81613e2d-9838-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=97053c35-9838-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)
The Maui Mutual Aid Fund collects donations, share needs, and kokua’Ohana most in need that wouldn’t otherwise qualify for support or have a hard time accessing it.

[_**Maui Food Bank**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67957878/421431347/610882186?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3MDUzYzM1LTk4MzgtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CG2RKQREMqmRSKdS5gwAZ1zFx4FXzyLe3cp6zjcKGmg=&emci=81613e2d-9838-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=97053c35-9838-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)
With every $1 donated, the Maui Food Bank can provide 4 meals to the hungry living in our island community.

[_**The Maui Humane Society**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67957879/421431348/863875064?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3MDUzYzM1LTk4MzgtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CG2RKQREMqmRSKdS5gwAZ1zFx4FXzyLe3cp6zjcKGmg=&emci=81613e2d-9838-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=97053c35-9838-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)
The Humane Society is currently all-hands-on-deck addressing the Wildfire Crisis and helping pets and their owners. Many businesses, countless homes, and hundreds of acres have been burned down with thousands of people displaced and being rescued by first responders. Places of historic and cultural significance in the town of Lahaina have been wiped out, leaving a devastating impact on the indigenous communities. This is our planet and home, and it’s up to us to fight for the safety of our communities and hold our elected officials accountable for their years of inaction that led to this moment of climate disasters.

With Gratitude,

Jane Fonda Climate PAC

clean_body: The climate crisis continues to wreak havoc on communities and planet-warming fossil fuels are the root of the problem. | | BREAKING NEWS: Hawaii declares State Of Emergency as hurricane winds drive wildfires in Maui Hawaii declares a state of emergency in the wake of blazing wildfires causing rescues and evacuations on the island. The wildfires have been exacerbated due to hurricane-force winds. The climate crisis continues to wreak havoc on communities and planet-warming fossil fuels are the root of the problem. Our planet is warming at an alarming rate causing climate emergencies like the one in Hawaii. We cannot sit idly by – it’s time we show our support to the communities in Hawaii. Will you contribute whatever you can to these relief efforts? The Maui Strong Fund was created to provide community resilience with resources for disaster preparedness, response, and recovery. The fund is currently being used to support communities affected by the wildfires on Maui. The Maui Mutual Aid Fund collects donations, share needs, and kokua’Ohana most in need that wouldn’t otherwise qualify for support or have a hard time accessing it. With every $1 donated, the Maui Food Bank can provide 4 meals to the hungry living in our island community. The Humane Society is currently all-hands-on-deck addressing the Wildfire Crisis and helping pets and their owners. Many businesses, countless homes, and hundreds of acres have been burned down with thousands of people displaced and being rescued by first responders. Places of historic and cultural significance in the town of Lahaina have been wiped out, leaving a devastating impact on the indigenous communities. This is our planet and home, and it’s up to us to fight for the safety of our communities and hold our elected officials accountable for their years of inaction that led to this moment of climate disasters. With Gratitude, Jane Fonda Climate PAC | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Friend,

Here's what's IN and OUT in Washington after a Republican SWEEP in 2024:

**IN:** HOLDING GOVERNMENT ACCOUNTABLE
**OUT:** LAME-DUCK LEADERSHIP AND POLITICAL FAVORITISM

**IN:** LOWER TAXES
**OUT:** MASSIVE GOVERNMENT SPENDING

**IN:** CORN, CROPS, AND COMMON SENSE
**OUT:** ANTI-AGRICULTURE RED TAPE & CORRUPTION

**IN:** NEW REPUBLICAN LEADERSHIP
**OUT:** POLITICIZED GOVERNMENT AND LEFTIST AGENDAS | [**DONATE NOW**](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=000950a80d314b568d4fea8d23173f89&_e=auVxNduvRM4Oc8PSsWl_Eg4PQyFORvrMSC2r-ezXDCr45hoj-q5AekIjYP0thdgndGO5ZuFZTCGtoUvHy2PyG19T3WM7CYtwHK5OsVIsaG0zPSm61uN_SnF387WkCboQCt40wu5U04SzAkpp-M6a3FAYmDNdXhdh3m6u2F0DweS3pPP4pLMvhZVzvJPuhkJj6sIN_OLo83KeE7GGqd03NZPSKYjX1tipNeoS51vKUugsq8xo27jWYLc5JYblHhwTHMH5wxAGnrANXackQJE2kDvVQuoQ8M4KWPgqbiOnD3c%3D)

We must rein in Big Government and protect the rights and freedoms of ALL AMERICANS.

Washington needs more Iowa common sense, and Washington needs to understand that more spending fuels inflation and makes it harder for families to make ends meet.

We can't tax and spend our way to prosperity. It will dig a bigger hole for our kids and grandkids.

It's time to stop the damages of the Biden economy before it's too late.

Hi Peter,
I wanted to make sure you saw our campaign has been endorsed by the Working Families Party!
The Working Families Party is the grassroots political party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. For over two decades, they’ve helped elect hundreds of progressive leaders at every level of government across the country.
I’m deeply honored to have the support of the Working Families Party, we look forward to partnering with them on our journey to Congress and our shared fight for working families. Join the WFP in support of our campaign by donating $25 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_081123_WFPreup&amount=25]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_081123_WFPreup&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_081123_WFPreup&amount=25]
The Working Families Party endorsed our campaign because of our record fighting to expand access to healthcare and protect abortion rights, and to beat back extremist MAGA Republicans in our state.
With the Working Families Party now on our side, we have a growing list of progressive leaders and organizations behind our movement. We have to ensure we have the resources to keep up this momentum. Chip in $25 today >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_081123_WFPreup&amount=25]
Gracias,
Raquel Terán
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_081123_WFPreup&amount=25]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/655A566A4D6351583942505531424E6A756B655939795555664E6B68692F6D746E713875657771364A42586E5A654649766D373776636D324B436851376D3643/editor_images/RT%20Bio%20Picture.png] Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District as the first Latina congresswoman from Arizona.
For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.
She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=x_subheader]
Terán for Congress

subject: What's your pronoun, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We need to stop focusing on pronouns and start focusing on keeping our country safe| | | What's your pronoun, Peter? Joe Biden has taken the most respected and feared military in the world and turned it into a college campus safe space. The military is the absolute LAST place that should have anything to do with "woke."China is laughing at us, Peter! We need to stop focusing on pronouns and start focusing on keeping our country safe and secure. **[Will you take the Military Readiness Assessment to help us de-woke our military? Follow this link to take the assessment.>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=7567920829fe4a66a25a57c69ef2188e&_e=OSNiLO_fd-x4kxfdyLz-8AELlEdRdPkE_5efLBHLUci4A11RwdSmkSBfE88ZGLrJklSwlOlZikoBN4gb4WnOAml_XRylz7eboNLpIhJgsi4HmcJD33TstmI2MHg93X4IjigGq9AJH-OqDjW7VgBQciFlgi7DycmgeCEDEKDgQACorPW8G62pr2RmmM2DHRD6mSKSn_PtYiKfT5VgOpr1te96d-X_vh-eM_vxZNTLHQWaVELzsxdmwDUE2a40jlCh2Xp37gE3ULiE--zBsSskfq1ivlj5VCXLb9LEqaT72N9AEHjFKd8XAEDJJ2IY9MQVvhsPUBUvRUIhEGsSr0HxcZFIBllS2WPY4vhBll5WKjX-zf1DD62kesbILqHCzemjjU49C0aHur10ynIn-oe-MwVvvrjCb7NpcXigFgpIvszvWAQxRHPDoXoPd_T7NpY7JWnnNb-ln6Uvc3jaqUaBkg%3D%3D)**

A few weeks ago, I told you about Rob Banse — the Democratic nominee for HD 30. Rob is running to win a swing district that could decide which party controls the Virginia House of Delegates.

Today, I want to re-emphasize this race and give a few more details about why the election for HD 30 is so critical.

Rob’s opponent denies the existence of climate change. When he was on a local board of supervisors, he supported a budget that capped teachers’ salaries. He’s said he’s running to ban all abortion in the Commonwealth. He even organized “Stop the Steal” rallies and continues to refuse to accept the 2020 election as legitimate.

**Virginians deserve better than a legislature dominated by anti-education, anti-choice, anti-science, and anti-democracy officials.** That’s why it’s so important for Rob Banse to sustain the resources to run a competitive campaign as we near the end of summer.

[**Will you split $10 between our campaigns? name: Kamala Harris
subject: “You ready to go to work?”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
It’s going to take a massive grassroots movement to defend the White House, so your support will go a very long way right now. | | |
---
_“You ready to go to work?”_ When Joe Biden said those words to me three years ago today, my answer was a resounding yes. **Because, Peter, I’ve never been afraid to fight for the people.** I was raised to take action. Growing up, whenever I got upset about something, my mother would look me in the eye and ask, “So what are you going to do about it?” That's why, when I saw a broken justice system, I became a lawyer to try and fix it. It's why, during the foreclosure crisis, I took on the big banks as California's attorney general. It's why, as a United States senator, I fought to represent people like my mother -- people who politicians often overlook or don't take seriously. **And it’s why I answered Joe’s question with a resounding yes.** Since taking office, Joe and I have worked every single day to move this country forward. I’m proud that we’ve made historic investments in our country’s infrastructure, taken on the climate crisis, lowered the cost of prescription drugs, and passed the first significant federal gun safety law _in nearly 30 years._ **But our work isn’t done -- and Joe and I will need you in our corner to finish the job. That’s why I’m asking:** [Can I count on you to make a $25 donation to our reelection campaign today? clean_body: It’s going to take a massive grassroots movement to defend the White House, so your support will go a very long way right now. | | | “You ready to go to work?” When Joe Biden said those words to me three years ago today, my answer was a resounding yes. Because, Peter, I’ve never been afraid to fight for the people. I was raised to take action. Growing up, whenever I got upset about something, my mother would look me in the eye and ask, “So what are you going to do about it?” That's why, when I saw a broken justice system, I became a lawyer to try and fix it. It's why, during the foreclosure crisis, I took on the big banks as California's attorney general. It's why, as a United States senator, I fought to represent people like my mother -- people who politicians often overlook or don't take seriously. And it’s why I answered Joe’s question with a resounding yes. Since taking office, Joe and I have worked every single day to move this country forward. I’m proud that we’ve made historic investments in our country’s infrastructure, taken on the climate crisis, lowered the cost of prescription drugs, and passed the first significant federal gun safety law in nearly 30 years. But our work isn’t done -- and Joe and I will need you in our corner to finish the job. That’s why I’m asking: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | I’m so grateful to have you on this grassroots team, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States

name: Katie Porter
subject: re: the state of the economy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
There are still real challenges to address—here are my priorities.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=28046%2E3422442%2Ev0694Y)
Last night I joined Lawrence O’Donnell to talk about the state of our economy. You can watch a clip **[here:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230811-2?refcode=EMAK11_2_VID_20230811_V1_F&refcode2=28046_3422442_v0694Y&akid=28046%2E3422442%2Ev0694Y)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230811-2?refcode=EMAK11_2_VID_20230811_V1_F&refcode2=28046_3422442_v0694Y&akid=28046%2E3422442%2Ev0694Y)
Because of Democrats’ economic policies, we have record-low unemployment while prices are falling and wages are rising. **But there’s still real, structural economic challenges we need to tackle. Some of my top priorities to strengthen our economy are:**
🎒Addressing the high cost of childcare.
🎓Lowering the cost of college.
🏘️Making serious investments in housing to tackle the high costs of home ownership and rising rent costs.
I’m running for the U.S. Senate to stand up to corporations and build an economy that works for working people. [**Consider supporting our campaign by making a contribution today:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230811-2?refcode=EMAK11_2_VID_20230811_V1_F&refcode2=28046_3422442_v0694Y&akid=28046%2E3422442%2Ev0694Y)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230811-2?refcode=EMAK11_2_VID_20230811_V1_F&refcode2=28046_3422442_v0694Y&akid=28046%2E3422442%2Ev0694Y)
Thanks, Derek!
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAK11_2_VID_20230811_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=28046_3422442_v0694Y&akid=28046%2E3422442%2Ev0694Y)**

| |
Dear Friends,

I hope everyone is having a great Friday. Last week, the California Republican Party announced that Governor Ron DeSantis, former President Donald Trump, and Senator Tim Scott will speak at their Fall Convention — it should be lively. The campaign season is here and heating up.
---
|
---
---
|
---
| I have a personal appeal as our campaign also starts to heat up. We are printing campaign handouts and preparing volunteer "Go Bags" for our grassroots teams and can use some help. What's a "Go Bag"? It's a Maher for Congress backpack that contains a tablecloth, campaign handouts, table signs, pens, sign-up forms, and other campaign materials that volunteers can use at events.

We can use your help to get these materials produced.
* **One "Go Bag" will cost about $10**
* **100 full-color, heavy-stock glossy campaign handouts cost around $15**

[Can you help pay for these costs with a contribution of $10 or $15 today or whatever you can do?](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=777111465f&e=1722d05e10)
---
| [Pay for a Go Bag!](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=a2410dd18c&e=1722d05e10 "Pay for a Go Bag!")
---
| Or can you help with a recurring weekly or monthly [$5 contribution](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=0c9ef16f74&e=1722d05e10)?

---
| Your help and support for this campaign is critical. I truly appreciate everything you are doing, your encouragement, and your prayers. Thank you. I look forward to your assistance.

Sincerely,
---
|

| **Michael Maher**
Businessman | Veteran | Republican for Congress

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Friends, I hope everyone is having a great Friday. Last week, the California Republican Party announced that Governor Ron DeSantis, former President Donald Trump, and Senator Tim Scott will speak at their Fall Convention — it should be lively. The campaign season is here and heating up. | | | I have a personal appeal as our campaign also starts to heat up. We are printing campaign handouts and preparing volunteer "Go Bags" for our grassroots teams and can use some help. What's a "Go Bag"? It's a Maher for Congress backpack that contains a tablecloth, campaign handouts, table signs, pens, sign-up forms, and other campaign materials that volunteers can use at events. We can use your help to get these materials produced. One "Go Bag" will cost about $10 100 full-color, heavy-stock glossy campaign handouts cost around $15 | "Pay for a Go Bag!" | Or can you help with a recurring weekly or monthly ? | "$5 Friday" | Your help and support for this campaign is critical. I truly appreciate everything you are doing, your encouragement, and your prayers. Thank you. I look forward to your assistance. body:
An indictment is looming.

An indictment is looming.
| | Friend,
---
It's been reported that if I am unjustly indicted and arrested in the Atlanta Witch Hunt, a mugshot will be taken of me:
**_Georgia sheriff on Trump probe: "We'll have a mugshot ready for you_ "** [SOURCE: _Axios_]
Atlanta has already begun setting up security barricades, shutting down roads surrounding the courthouse, and the Grand Jury is expected to reconvene.
_All signs indicate that a FOURTH SHAM INDICTMENT is on its way._
**The Left is trying their hardest to turn me - an innocent man - into a criminal, all while _they_ are the true criminals, violating our rights and weaponizing the legal system to imprison their leading opposition.**
These are the same thugs who attempted to _**FRAME**_ me as an agent of the Russian government.
Keep in mind - they've had access to just about every single piece of paper I've ever laid a finger on... and yet, they still can't find a crime to pin me down for.
If they can't find anything real after looking at my entire life under a microscope, then I must be one of the most honest people alive!
_The truth is: My only offense is opposing the Washington ruling class and standing up for the hardworking citizens of our country._
And in the eyes of the Deep State, there is no greater offense than that...
As a possible fourth sham indictment hangs over my head, I will continue our campaign to drain the corrupt Washington swamp and restore power to YOU, the American people.
_If you 're doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day._
But if not, I don't have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now.
